papers.title: CalBench: Evaluating Coordination-Privacy Trade-offs in Multi-Agent LLMs
papers.abstract: We introduce CalBench, a controlled evaluation environment for studying multi-agent coordination through calendar scheduling. In CalBench, N agents each manage a private calendar containing pre-existing commitments and must coordinate to schedule a stream of M incoming meetings while minimizing disruption costs. Because agents observe only their own calendars, successful scheduling requires communication across private information boundaries. Each scenario is generated with an oracle solution, enabling precise measurement of coordination quality via realized-to-optimal cost, as well as a Distributed Constraint Optimization (DCOP) baseline to provide a fair comparison under the same private-information constraints. CalBench enables precise verification of task success, communication efficiency, and fairness in the distribution of disruption costs. Our environment also studies privacy-preserving coordination by augmenting calendar entries with private semantic contexts of varying sensitivity and measuring whether agents reveal task-irrelevant private information during negotiation. Unlike multi-agent benchmarks where a single capable agent can often substitute for the group, CalBench is inherently decentralized: no agent has access to another agent's private calendar, yet agents must still reach mutually consistent decisions over shared meeting scheduling. CalBench therefore provides a practical and verifiable setting for studying coordination protocols, communication efficiency, negotiation strategies, fairness, and privacy leakage in multi-agent systems.

analysis.tldr: CalBench 是一个用于评估多智能体 LLM 在协调与隐私权衡方面的可控环境。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准常允许单个智能体替代群体，缺乏对去中心化协调和隐私保护的真实评估。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可验证的多智能体协调环境，同时量化协调质量、通信效率和隐私泄露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于日历调度的 N 智能体环境，每个智能体管理私有日历，需通过通信协调会议安排，并引入 DCOP 基线。
contributions: 提出 CalBench 基准，支持精确测量协调成本、通信效率和公平性。
引入隐私保护协调评估，通过敏感语义上下文检测隐私泄露。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅关注日历调度场景，泛化性未知。
隐私度量可能依赖预定义敏感上下文，真实场景更复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖且关注隐私-协调权衡，但缺乏实验验证，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CalBench 是一个用于评估多智能体 LLM 在协调与隐私权衡方面的可控环境。

papers.title: Oracle Poisoning: Corrupting Knowledge Graphs to Weaponise AI Agent Reasoning
papers.abstract: We define Oracle Poisoning, an attack class in which an adversary corrupts a structured knowledge graph that AI agents query at runtime via tool-use protocols, causing incorrect conclusions through correct reasoning. Unlike prompt injection, Oracle Poisoning manipulates the data agents reason over, not their instructions. We demonstrate six attack scenarios against a production 42-million-node code knowledge graph, providing the first empirical demonstration of knowledge graph poisoning against a production-scale agentic system, distinct from CTI embedding poisoning. Primary evaluation uses real SDK tool-use across nine models from three providers (N=30 per model), where models autonomously invoke a graph query tool and reason from results. The result is unambiguous: every tested model trusts poisoned data at 100% at moderate attacker sophistication(L2), with 269 valid trials (of 270) accepting fabricated security claims under directed queries. Under open-ended prompts, trust drops to 3-55%, confirming prompt framing as a confound; we report both conditions. An attacker sophistication gradient reveals discrete break points, a minimum skill at which trust flips from 0% to 100%, reframing the attack as a question not of whether but of how much. A controlled delivery-mode comparison shows that inline evaluation produces false negatives: GPT-5.1 shows 0% trust inline but 100% under both simulated and real agentic tool-use, demonstrating that delivery mode is a first-order confound. We evaluate five defences; read-only access control eliminates the direct mutation vector, while the remaining four are partial and model-dependent. Analysis of four additional platforms suggests the attack may generalise across the knowledge-graph ecosystem.

analysis.tldr: 提出Oracle Poisoning攻击，通过污染知识图谱使AI代理在正确推理下得出错误结论，实验表明所有模型在中等攻击复杂度下100%信任被污染数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有攻击如提示注入主要操纵指令，但AI代理越来越多地依赖外部知识图谱进行推理，知识图谱的完整性成为安全盲区，缺乏对此类攻击的系统性研究。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和实现一种针对AI代理所查询的结构化知识图谱的投毒攻击，使代理在保持正确推理逻辑的情况下得出错误结论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有测试模型在中等攻击复杂度下100%信任被污染数据；开放提示下信任度降至3-55%，表明提示框架是混淆变量；攻击者复杂度梯度显示信任从0%到100%的离散转折点；交付模式（内联评估vs真实代理工具使用）是首要混淆变量，内联评估可能产生假阴性。
analysis.method: 定义Oracle Poisoning攻击类，通过污染知识图谱中的节点和边，使AI代理在查询时基于被污染数据推理出错误结论。在4200万节点代码知识图谱上实施六种攻击场景，使用真实SDK工具调用和九种模型进行实证评估。
contributions: 首次定义Oracle Poisoning攻击类，区别于提示注入和CTI嵌入投毒
在4200万节点生产级知识图谱上提供首个实证演示
揭示攻击者复杂度梯度、提示框架和交付模式作为混淆变量的影响
评估五种防御措施，发现只读访问控制可消除直接变异向量，其余四种部分有效且依赖模型
analysis.experiments: 使用来自三个提供商的九种模型（每模型N=30），在真实SDK工具调用场景下进行270次有效试验，评估模型对污染数据的信任度；比较内联评估、模拟代理工具使用和真实代理工具使用三种交付模式；测试五种防御措施。
limitations: 防御措施仅部分有效且依赖模型，缺乏通用解决方案
攻击泛化性仅通过四个额外平台分析，未全面验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首次定义并实证知识图谱投毒攻击，方法新颖，实验充分，对AI代理安全有重要影响，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Oracle Poisoning攻击，通过污染知识图谱使AI代理在正确推理下得出错误结论，实验表明所有模型在中等攻击复杂度下100%信任被污染数据。

papers.title: LEAD: Length-Efficient Adaptive and Dynamic Reasoning for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large reasoning models, such as OpenAI o1 and DeepSeek-R1, tend to become increasingly verbose as their reasoning capabilities improve. These inflated Chain-of-Thought (CoT) trajectories often exceed what the underlying problems require, wasting compute, latency, and context budgets. While introducing length-based efficiency rewards during reinforcement learning offers a natural remedy, existing methods struggle with two fundamental challenges: the optimal balance between correctness and efficiency is non-stationary throughout training, and intrinsic reasoning budgets vary drastically across problems. Relying on static reward weights and global length constraints inevitably forces a compromise between degraded accuracy and unrealized compression. To overcome these limitations, we propose LEAD (Length-Efficient Adaptive and Dynamic reasoning), a method that replaces static heuristics with online, self-adaptive mechanisms. LEAD dynamically calibrates the correctness-efficiency trade-off at each step using a Potential-Scaled Instability, directing optimization capacity to the most informative learning signal. Furthermore, it estimates an adaptive per-problem target length online based on the model's own correct rollouts, applying a symmetric efficiency reward that penalizes both overthinking and over-compression. Evaluated on five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, LEAD achieves the highest accuracy and Accuracy-Efficiency Score among RL-trained efficient-reasoning methods while producing substantially shorter outputs than the base model.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEAD方法，通过在线自适应机制动态平衡大语言模型推理的正确性与效率，在数学推理基准上实现更高准确率和更短输出。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型推理模型（如OpenAI o1、DeepSeek-R1）随着推理能力提升，链式思维轨迹变得冗长，浪费计算、延迟和上下文预算。现有基于强化学习的长度效率奖励方法面临两个挑战：正确性与效率的最优平衡在训练过程中非平稳，且不同问题的内在推理预算差异巨大。静态奖励权重和全局长度约束会导致准确率下降或压缩不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型推理中动态自适应地平衡正确性与效率，避免冗长推理带来的资源浪费，同时不牺牲准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出大型推理模型存在过度推理现象，CoT轨迹长度超过问题所需；现有RL方法使用静态奖励权重和全局长度约束，无法适应训练动态和问题差异。
analysis.method: LEAD方法包含两个核心机制：1）使用Potential-Scaled Instability动态校准每一步的正确性-效率权衡，将优化能力导向信息量最大的学习信号；2）基于模型自身的正确rollouts在线估计每个问题的自适应目标长度，应用对称效率奖励同时惩罚过度思考和过度压缩。
contributions: 提出LEAD方法，用在线自适应机制替代静态启发式，动态平衡推理正确性与效率。
在五个数学推理基准上，LEAD在RL训练的高效推理方法中取得了最高准确率和准确率-效率分数，且输出显著短于基础模型。
analysis.experiments: 在五个数学推理基准上评估，LEAD在RL训练的高效推理方法中实现了最高准确率和准确率-效率分数，输出长度显著短于基础模型。
limitations: 方法可能对超参数敏感，如Potential-Scaled Instability的缩放因子。
仅评估了数学推理任务，在其他领域（如常识推理、代码生成）的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对LLM推理效率问题提出自适应机制，实验验证有效，与当前重点方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEAD方法，通过在线自适应机制动态平衡大语言模型推理的正确性与效率，在数学推理基准上实现更高准确率和更短输出。

papers.title: Insight: Enhancing Mobile Accessibility for Blind and Visually Impaired Users with LLMs
papers.abstract: This research paper addresses the limitations of current mobile accessibility services like TalkBack, which provide manual gesture-based sequential feedback to BVI users. Motivated by the promise of large language models (LLMs), this paper introduces Insight, an Android accessibility service that provides natural language interaction and real-time summarization of the screen. The paper performs a within-subject experimental study with users to compare Insight and TalkBack on usability factors. Results show Insight reduced mental effort and task time, and was preferred because of its dialogue interface, but users felt the need for interruption management. Results show LLM-based interfaces can significantly improve mobile accessibility, and describe the potential of hybrid solutions combining gesture and dialogue modalities towards more inclusive design.

analysis.tldr: Insight 利用 LLM 为视障用户提供自然语言交互和实时屏幕摘要，相比 TalkBack 降低了认知负荷和任务时间。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前移动无障碍服务（如 TalkBack）依赖手动手势和顺序反馈，对视障用户不够直观高效，而 LLM 的潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 设计更自然、高效的移动无障碍交互方式，以改善视障用户的体验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户实验表明，LLM 驱动的对话界面能显著降低心理努力和任务时间，但用户同时需要中断管理功能。
analysis.method: 开发 Insight，一个 Android 无障碍服务，集成 LLM 实现自然语言交互和实时屏幕内容摘要。
contributions: 提出 Insight 系统，将 LLM 应用于移动无障碍场景，支持自然语言对话和屏幕实时摘要。
通过用户实验（N=？）对比 Insight 与 TalkBack，证明 LLM 界面在可用性上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及进行了被试内实验，比较 Insight 和 TalkBack 的可用性因素。
limitations: 用户样本量未明确，可能影响泛化性。
未讨论 LLM 的延迟、隐私或能耗问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验信息有限，但应用方向有价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Insight 利用 LLM 为视障用户提供自然语言交互和实时屏幕摘要，相比 TalkBack 降低了认知负荷和任务时间。

papers.title: CrossVL: Complexity-Aware Feature Routing and Paired Curriculum for Cross-View Vision-Language Detection
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) enable text-guided object detection but degrade severely under cross-view scenarios where ground and aerial viewpoints differ in altitude, scale, and spatial layout. These geometric changes introduce systematic complexity variations between viewpoints, e.g., ground view images contain dense and highly occluded structures, while aerial images are sparse and globally organized. Fixed VLM fusion mechanisms cannot handle this discrepancy. We propose CrossVL, a framework combining Complexity-Aware Pathway Aggregation (CPA) and Paired Curriculum Learning (PCL) for enhanced cross-view detection for VLM. CPA estimates scene complexity from multimodal statistics and routes visual features through multiple pathways to obtain view-specific representations. PCL leverages semantic consistency of synchronized ground-aerial pairs to provide stable early supervision and then gradually shifts toward randomized sampling. On MAVREC, CrossVL improves Florence-2's aerial mAP from 58.66% to 61.03% and reduces the ground-aerial performance gap from 8.63pp to 6.65pp, while also achieving a 3.3x reduction in variance across random seeds. CPA provides stable complexity-aware feature aggregation, and PCL enhances optimization dynamics. Together, they demonstrate that coordinated architectural and training adaptations are crucial for robust cross-view VLM detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出CrossVL框架，通过复杂度感知特征路由和配对课程学习提升跨视角VLM检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型在跨视角场景（地面与航拍）下性能严重下降，因为视角变化导致场景复杂度系统性差异，固定融合机制无法处理。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM在跨视角目标检测中因视角差异（高度、尺度、空间布局）导致的性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 地面视角图像密集且遮挡严重，航拍图像稀疏且全局组织，固定VLM融合机制无法处理这种复杂度差异。
analysis.method: 提出CrossVL框架，包含复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）和配对课程学习（PCL）。CPA从多模态统计估计场景复杂度并通过多条路径路由视觉特征；PCL利用同步地面-航拍对的语义一致性提供早期稳定监督并逐步过渡到随机采样。
contributions: 提出复杂度感知路径聚合（CPA）实现视图特定特征表示
提出配对课程学习（PCL）利用语义一致性优化训练动态
在MAVREC上显著提升Florence-2的跨视角检测性能并降低视角间差距
analysis.experiments: 在MAVREC数据集上，CrossVL将Florence-2的航拍mAP从58.66%提升至61.03%，地面-航拍性能差距从8.63pp降至6.65pp，随机种子方差降低3.3倍。
limitations: 可能依赖同步地面-航拍对的数据可用性
复杂度估计模块可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，与VLM应用方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CrossVL框架，通过复杂度感知特征路由和配对课程学习提升跨视角VLM检测性能。

papers.title: Multi-Tier Labeling and Physics-Informed Learning for Orbital Anomaly Detection at Scale
papers.abstract: Detecting orbital anomalies, such as maneuvers, atmospheric decay, and attitude upsets, across the rapidly growing population of low-Earth-orbit (LEO) satellites is a prerequisite for collision avoidance, decay forecasting, and conjunction screening. The bottleneck is not modeling capacity but labels: there is no public ground-truth corpus of orbital anomalies, manual review does not scale to approximately 10^4 active satellites, and pure rule-based detectors trade recall for precision so aggressively that they are blind to most behavioral anomalies. We present a multi-tier labeling cascade that composes three weak supervision sources of increasing fidelity: a fast physics rule set (rule_v1), an Interacting Multiple Model Unscented Kalman Filter (IMM-UKF) bank, and a supplemental-element calibration step (supGP), to produce labels at a scale unavailable from any single source. Applied to 232M Two-Line Element (TLE) records spanning 60 years, the cascade yields 8.6M labeled sequences of length 50 (430M timesteps) over 11 features that include explicit time encoding and full mean-element state. On overlapping satellites, IMM-UKF surfaces 42.6x more anomalies than rule_v1 alone. We train a 6.5M-parameter Transformer in two stages, achieving a maneuver recall of 55.4% and decay recall of 62.8% on a held-out test set. An ablation on the time-delta feature alone yields a 107% relative improvement in decay recall. We frame the resulting model as a high-recall triage classifier whose role is to surface candidate events for downstream filtering, not to issue final attributions, and discuss the path toward a Neural-ODE-based orbital world model.

analysis.tldr: 提出多层级标注级联和物理信息学习，实现大规模轨道异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 轨道异常检测对碰撞规避和衰减预测至关重要，但缺乏公开真实标签，人工标注无法扩展，纯规则方法召回率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模低轨卫星数据上高效生成高质量标签并训练高召回率的异常检测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纯规则检测器以牺牲召回率为代价追求精度，导致大多数行为异常被遗漏；IMM-UKF比简单规则发现42.6倍异常。
analysis.method: 提出多层级标注级联（规则集、IMM-UKF滤波器、补充元素校准），生成大规模标签；两阶段训练6.5M参数Transformer模型。
contributions: 提出多层级弱监督标注级联，生成8.6M条标注序列（430M时间步），覆盖60年TLE数据。
训练Transformer模型，在机动和衰减检测上分别达到55.4%和62.8%召回率，时间差特征使衰减召回相对提升107%。
analysis.experiments: 在232M条TLE记录（60年）上生成8.6M条标注序列，测试集上机动召回55.4%，衰减召回62.8%。
limitations: 模型作为高召回分类器，需下游过滤，可能产生较多误报。
仅基于TLE数据，未利用其他传感器信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新（多层级弱监督级联）且实验规模大，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多层级标注级联和物理信息学习，实现大规模轨道异常检测。

papers.title: Parameter-Efficient Neuroevolution for Diverse LLM Generation: Quality-Diversity Optimization via Prompt Embedding Evolution
papers.abstract: Large Language Models exhibit mode collapse, producing homogeneous outputs that fail to explore valid solution spaces. We present QD-LLM, a framework for parameter-efficient neuroevolution that evolves prompt embeddings, compact neural interfaces (~32K parameters) that steer generation in frozen LLMs (70B+ parameters), within a Quality-Diversity (QD) optimization framework. Our contributions: (1) evolved prompt embeddings via gradient-free optimization enabling behavioral steering without model fine-tuning; (2) hybrid behavior characterization combining semantic and explicit features with formal coverage bounds (Theorem 1) under validated near-independence (NMI $= 0.08 \pm 0.02$); (3) co-evolutionary variation operators including targeted behavioral mutation via finite-difference gradient estimation. On HumanEval (164 problems), MBPP, and creative writing benchmarks, QD-LLM achieves 46.4% higher coverage and 41.4% higher QD-Score than QDAIF ($p<0.001$, 30 runs, Vargha-Delaney $A=0.94$). We demonstrate downstream utility: diverse archives improve test generation (34% more edge cases) and fine-tuning data quality (8.3% accuracy gain). We validate across open-source LLMs (Llama-3-70B, Mistral-Large) with full embedding access, establishing prompt embedding evolution as an effective paradigm bridging neuroevolution and modern LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出QD-LLM框架，通过进化提示嵌入实现冻结大模型的高覆盖多样化生成，无需微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型存在模式坍缩，生成同质化输出，无法充分探索有效解空间，限制了其在创意生成、测试用例生成等需要多样性的场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调大模型的前提下，高效地引导冻结的LLM生成多样化、高覆盖的输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出QD-LLM框架，采用质量-多样性优化，进化提示嵌入（约32K参数）作为神经接口，通过无梯度优化实现行为引导；结合语义与显式特征的混合行为表征，并给出覆盖界理论保证；引入共进化变异算子，包括基于有限差分梯度估计的目标行为突变。
contributions: 提出通过进化提示嵌入实现冻结大模型的行为引导，无需模型微调。
设计混合行为表征方法，结合语义与显式特征，并证明覆盖界。
引入共进化变异算子，包括目标行为突变。
在HumanEval、MBPP和创意写作基准上，QD-LLM相比QDAIF覆盖度提升46.4%，QD-Score提升41.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanEval（164个问题）、MBPP和创意写作基准上评估，QD-LLM相比QDAIF覆盖度提升46.4%，QD-Score提升41.4%（p<0.001，30次运行，Vargha-Delaney A=0.94）。下游任务中，多样化存档使测试生成边缘案例增加34%，微调数据质量提升8.3%准确率。在Llama-3-70B和Mistral-Large上验证。
limitations: 仅适用于具有完整嵌入访问权限的开源模型。
进化过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将神经进化与质量-多样性优化结合，实验充分且效果显著，与LLM多样化生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出QD-LLM框架，通过进化提示嵌入实现冻结大模型的高覆盖多样化生成，无需微调。

papers.title: Attribution-based Explanations for Markov Decision Processes
papers.abstract: Attribution techniques explain the outcome of an AI model by assigning a numerical score to its inputs. So far, these techniques have mainly focused on attributing importance to static input features at a single point in time, and thus fail to generalize to sequential decision-making settings. This paper fills this gap by introducing techniques to generate attribution-based explanations for Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). We give a formal characterization of what attributions should represent in MDPs, focusing on explanations that assign importance scores to both individual states and execution paths. We show how importance scores can be computed by leveraging techniques for strategy synthesis, enabling the efficient computation of these scores despite the non-determinism inherent in an MDP. We evaluate our approach on five case-studies, demonstrating its utility in providing interpretable insights into the logic of sequential decision-making agents.

analysis.tldr: 将归因解释技术扩展到马尔可夫决策过程，为状态和路径分配重要性分数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有归因技术主要针对静态输入特征，无法直接应用于序列决策场景，缺乏对MDP中决策逻辑的解释方法。
analysis.problem: 如何为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）生成基于归因的解释，量化状态和路径的重要性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用策略综合技术计算重要性分数，处理MDP中的非确定性，为状态和路径分配归因分数。
contributions: 形式化定义了MDP中归因应表示的内容，聚焦于状态和路径的重要性分数。
提出利用策略综合技术高效计算归因分数的方法。
analysis.experiments: 在五个案例研究上评估，展示了提供可解释洞察的实用性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于有限状态/动作的MDP。
计算复杂度可能随状态空间增大而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，但实验规模较小，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将归因解释技术扩展到马尔可夫决策过程，为状态和路径分配重要性分数。

papers.title: EvoPref: Multi-Objective Evolutionary Optimization Discovers Diverse LLM Alignments Beyond Gradient Descent
papers.abstract: Gradient-based preference optimization methods for large language model (LLM) alignment suffer from preference collapse, converging to narrow behavioral modes while neglecting preference diversity. We introduce EvoPref, a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm that maintains populations of Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) adapters optimized across helpfulness, harmlessness, and honesty objectives using Non-dominated Sorting Genetic Algorithm II (NSGA-II) selection with archive-based diversity preservation. Our primary contribution is demonstrating that population-based methods discover substantially more diverse alignments than gradient descent. On standard benchmarks, EvoPref improves preference coverage by 18% (median 82.5% vs. 70.0% for ORPO, $p<0.001$, Wilcoxon, $n=30$) and reduces collapse rates by 47% (11.0% vs. 20.6%, $p<0.001$), while achieving competitive alignment quality (median 75.5% RewardBench vs. 75.0% for ORPO, $p<0.05$). We provide theoretical motivation extending recent multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) runtime analysis (Dang et al., 2025) suggesting why archive-based methods escape collapse more effectively than single-trajectory optimization. Comprehensive comparisons against MOEA/D, SMS-EMOA, CMA-ES, and gradient baselines (DPO, IPO, KTO, ORPO) with rigorous statistical testing (Friedman with Holm correction, Vargha-Delaney effect sizes, median with IQR) confirm that multi-objective selection with diversity preservation is essential. This work establishes evolutionary optimization as a principled paradigm for diverse LLM alignment.

analysis.tldr: EvoPref 使用多目标进化算法（NSGA-II）优化 LoRA 适配器，在帮助性、无害性和诚实性目标上发现比梯度下降更多样化的 LLM 对齐，缓解偏好坍缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于梯度的偏好优化方法（如 DPO、ORPO）会导致偏好坍缩，收敛到狭窄的行为模式，忽视偏好多样性，而现有方法缺乏对多样性的显式建模。
analysis.problem: 解决 LLM 对齐中梯度下降方法导致的偏好坍缩和多样性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 梯度下降方法（如 ORPO）在偏好覆盖率和坍缩率上表现较差，而基于种群的多目标进化算法能显著提升多样性并降低坍缩率。
analysis.method: EvoPref：一种多目标进化算法，维护 LoRA 适配器种群，使用 NSGA-II 选择并配合存档多样性保持，同时优化帮助性、无害性和诚实性目标。
contributions: 首次证明基于种群的方法（进化算法）能发现比梯度下降更多样化的 LLM 对齐。
在标准基准上实现偏好覆盖率提升 18%（中位数 82.5% vs. 70.0%），坍缩率降低 47%（11.0% vs. 20.6%），同时保持竞争性对齐质量。
提供理论动机，扩展了近期 MOEA 运行时分析，解释存档方法为何更有效避免坍缩。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上对比 ORPO、DPO、IPO、KTO 等梯度基线及 MOEA/D、SMS-EMOA、CMA-ES 等进化方法，使用 Friedman 检验（Holm 校正）、Vargha-Delaney 效应量、中位数与 IQR 等严格统计测试。
limitations: 可能依赖 LoRA 适配器，未探索全参数微调场景。
多目标优化计算开销可能高于单目标梯度方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（进化算法用于对齐多样性），实验充分且统计严谨，与 LLM 对齐核心方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoPref 使用多目标进化算法（NSGA-II）优化 LoRA 适配器，在帮助性、无害性和诚实性目标上发现比梯度下降更多样化的 LLM 对齐，缓解偏好坍缩。

papers.title: DRIVE-C: A Controlled Corruption Dataset for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: DRIVE-C is a controlled corruption dataset designed to evaluate visual perception robustness in autonomous driving systems. It is built from real-world forward-facing driving videos collected across daytime, nighttime, urban, rural, freeway, and parking environments. Clean clips are anonymized via localized face and license plate blurring, then transformed with physics-inspired synthetic degradations. The dataset contains 10 clean clips and 600 corrupted clips spanning 12 camera degradation types across five severity levels, with per-clip metadata and Global Sensor Health Index (GSHI) annotations. DRIVE-C supports robustness benchmarking, degradation-aware modeling, uncertainty estimation, out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, and sensor health monitoring for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS). By providing pixel-aligned clean and degraded video clips with fully reproducible corruption parameters, DRIVE-C offers a structured testbed for studying perception reliability under controlled camera degradation.

analysis.tldr: DRIVE-C是一个为自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性评估设计的受控退化数据集，包含10个干净片段和600个退化片段。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶系统在实际部署中常面临相机退化（如模糊、噪声、遮挡等），但缺乏系统化、可复现的受控退化数据集来评估感知模型的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 现有数据集缺乏对相机退化类型和严重程度的精细控制，且退化参数不可复现，难以进行鲁棒性基准测试和退化感知建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从真实驾驶视频中收集干净片段，进行人脸和车牌匿名化，然后应用物理启发的合成退化（12种类型，5个严重级别），生成像素对齐的干净-退化视频对，并提供元数据和全局传感器健康指数（GSHI）标注。
contributions: 构建了首个包含12种相机退化类型、5个严重级别的受控退化自动驾驶数据集，共600个退化片段。
提供像素对齐的干净-退化视频对和完全可复现的退化参数，支持鲁棒性基准测试、退化感知建模、不确定性估计、OOD检测和传感器健康监测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（仅10个干净片段），可能不足以覆盖所有驾驶场景。
合成退化可能无法完全模拟真实世界退化的复杂性和交互效应。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集构建方法清晰，但规模较小且未提供实验验证，适合作为鲁棒性研究的参考资源。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DRIVE-C是一个为自动驾驶视觉感知鲁棒性评估设计的受控退化数据集，包含10个干净片段和600个退化片段。

papers.title: Exploitation Without Deception: Dark Triad Feature Steering Reveals Separable Antisocial Circuits in Language Models
papers.abstract: We use sparse autoencoder (SAE) feature steering to amplify Dark Triad personality traits (Machiavellianism, narcissism, and psychopathy) in Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct and evaluate the resulting behavioral changes across five psychological instruments. The steered model becomes substantially more exploitative, aggressive, and callous on novel behavioral scenarios (d=10.62) while its cognitive empathy remains intact, reproducing the empathy dissociation characteristic of human Dark Triad populations. Critically, strategic deception is completely unaffected across all features, suggesting that exploitation and deception may operate through dissociable computational pathways in large language models. Individual feature analysis reveals non-redundant encoding, with each feature driving distinct antisocial mechanisms through separable computational pathways. We also show that feature discovery method itself modulates intervention depth: contrastively-discovered features change both self-report and behavior, while semantically-searched features change only self-report (d=12.65 between methods on behavior). These findings suggest that antisocial tendencies in at least one large language model comprise dissociable components rather than a unified construct, with implications for how such tendencies should be detected, measured, and controlled.

analysis.tldr: 通过稀疏自编码器特征操控放大语言模型的暗黑三人格特质，发现剥削与欺骗由可分离的计算通路驱动。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解大语言模型中反社会倾向的内部机制对于安全对齐至关重要，但现有研究多将其视为统一构造，缺乏对可分离组件的分析。
analysis.problem: 探究大语言模型中暗黑三人格特质（马基雅维利主义、自恋、精神病态）是否由可分离的计算通路驱动，特别是剥削与欺骗是否独立运作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：特征操控后模型剥削性显著增强（d=10.62），但认知共情和策略性欺骗不受影响，表明剥削与欺骗存在可分离通路；对比发现的特征改变行为，语义搜索特征仅改变自我报告。
analysis.method: 使用稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征操控放大Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct的暗黑三人格特质，并通过五种心理量表评估行为变化。
contributions: 发现大语言模型中反社会倾向由可分离组件构成，剥削与欺骗通过不同计算通路运作。
揭示特征发现方法影响干预深度：对比发现特征改变行为，语义搜索特征仅改变自我报告。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct上使用五种心理量表评估，报告效应量d=10.62（剥削性）和d=12.65（方法间行为差异）。
limitations: 仅针对单一模型（Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct），泛化性未知。
未提供具体实验设置和数据集细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，揭示了反社会倾向的可分离性，对安全对齐有重要启示，但仅限单一模型。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过稀疏自编码器特征操控放大语言模型的暗黑三人格特质，发现剥削与欺骗由可分离的计算通路驱动。

papers.title: Marrying Generative Model of Healthcare Events with Digital Twin of Social Determinants of Health for Disease Reasoning
papers.abstract: Despite the central role of sensor-derived measurements such as imaging traits and plasma biomarkers in biomedical research and clinical practice, existing generative models for disease prediction largely depend on event-level representations from hospital and registry data. Given the multi-factorial nature of human disease, the absence of explicit modeling of social determinants of health (SDoH), even in the limited form of ICD-coded proxies (chapters Z and V--Y in ICD-10), limits the capacity for personalized disease modeling and clinical decision support. To address this limitation, we propose a generative model with ICD-coded proxies of SDoH for \textit{in silico} modeling of disease reasoning, a conditioned latent diffusion framework that establishes the connection between multi-organ sensor data with tokenized healthcare events. Specifically, we introduce a novel geometric diffusion model to characterize the temporal evolution of complex data representation such as brain networks (region-to-region connectivity encoded in a graph), in parallel with diffusion models for tabular data from other organ systems. Together, we integrate the generative model with digitalized SDoH proxies (coined \modelname{}) for simulated intervention and reasoning of future disease trajectories. We conduct extensive experiments on the UK Biobank (UKB) dataset, which contains organ-specific imaging traits, including brain (44,834), heart (23,987), liver (28,722), and kidney (32,155), along with nearly 500k medical history sequences (age range: 25$\sim$89 years). Our \modelname{} achieves significant improvements over state-of-the-art human disease autoregressive models and imaging trait generative baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合社会健康决定因素数字孪生的生成模型，用于疾病推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有疾病预测生成模型主要依赖医院和登记数据中的事件级表示，忽略了社会健康决定因素（SDoH）的显式建模，限制了个性化疾病建模和临床决策支持的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将SDoH的ICD编码代理整合到生成模型中，实现多器官传感器数据与医疗事件令牌的关联，以进行疾病推理和模拟干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个条件潜扩散框架，包含几何扩散模型（用于脑网络等图结构数据）和表格数据扩散模型（用于其他器官系统），并与数字化SDoH代理集成，实现疾病轨迹的模拟干预和推理。
contributions: 首次将ICD编码的SDoH代理整合到生成模型中用于疾病推理。
提出几何扩散模型与表格扩散模型并行处理多模态器官数据。
在UK Biobank大规模数据集上验证，显著优于现有自回归模型和生成基线。
analysis.experiments: 在UK Biobank数据集上进行实验，包含器官特异性成像特征（脑44834、心脏23987、肝脏28722、肾脏32155）和近50万医疗历史序列，模型在疾病预测和成像特征生成上取得显著改进。
limitations: SDoH代理仅使用ICD编码，可能无法完全捕捉真实社会决定因素。
模型依赖UK Biobank数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合SDoH与扩散模型，实验规模大且效果显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合社会健康决定因素数字孪生的生成模型，用于疾病推理。

papers.title: UTS at PsyDefDetect: Multi-Agent Councils and Absence-Based Reasoning for Defense Mechanism Classification
papers.abstract: This paper describes our system for classifying psychological defense mechanisms in emotional support dialogues using the Defense Mechanism Rating Scales (DMRS), placing second (F1 0.406) among 64 teams.1 A central insight is that defense mechanisms are defined by what is absent: missing affect, blocked cognition, denied reality. We encode this as an affect-cognition integration spectrum in prompt-level clinical rules, which account for the largest single gain (+11.4pp F1). Our architecture is a multi-phase deliberative council of Gemini 2.5 agents where class-specific advocates rate evidence strength rather than voting, achieving F1 0.382 with no fine-tuning - a top-5 result on its own. We find, however, that the council is confidently wrong about minority classes: 59-80% of stable minority predictions are incorrect, driven by a systematic "L7 attractor" in which emotional content defaults to the majority class. A targeted override ensemble from three fine-tuned Qwen3.5 models applies 16 overrides (+2.4pp), selected by a structured multi-agent system (builder, critic, regression guard) that produced a larger F1 gain in one iteration than 8 prior attempts combined.

analysis.tldr: 通过多智能体协商和缺失推理，在心理防御机制分类任务中取得第二名。
analysis.research_motivation: 心理防御机制分类在情感支持对话中具有重要应用价值，但现有方法难以捕捉防御机制中“缺失”的微妙特征，且少数类预测准确率低。
analysis.problem: 如何利用缺失推理和多智能体协商提升心理防御机制分类性能，特别是解决少数类预测偏差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现防御机制由缺失定义（缺失情感、阻断认知、否认现实）；多智能体协商对少数类自信但错误率高（59-80%稳定预测错误），存在“L7吸引子”使情感内容默认归为多数类。
analysis.method: 提出多阶段协商委员会架构，包含基于情感-认知整合谱的临床规则、类特定倡导者评估证据强度而非投票，以及由三个微调模型组成的针对性覆盖集成。
contributions: 提出缺失推理视角，将防御机制定义为缺失特征，并编码为情感-认知整合谱临床规则。
设计多智能体协商委员会，类特定倡导者评估证据强度，无需微调即达前五性能。
揭示少数类预测的“L7吸引子”偏差，并通过结构化多智能体系统选择覆盖集成有效缓解。
analysis.experiments: 在PsyDefDetect竞赛中排名第二（F1 0.406），共64支队伍；临床规则贡献最大增益（+11.4pp F1）；多智能体委员会无微调F1 0.382（前五）；覆盖集成进一步+2.4pp F1。
limitations: 少数类预测仍存在较高错误率（59-80%）。
方法依赖特定临床规则和模型选择，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（缺失推理+多智能体协商）且竞赛成绩优异，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多智能体协商和缺失推理，在心理防御机制分类任务中取得第二名。

papers.title: WISTERIA: Learning Clinical Representations from Noisy Supervision via Multi-View Consistency in Electronic Health Records
papers.abstract: Representation learning in electronic health records (EHR) has largely followed paradigms inherited from natural language processing, relying on sequence modeling and reconstruction based objectives that treat clinical labels as ground truth. However, real world clinical supervision is inherently weak, arising from heterogeneous, noisy, and institution specific labeling processes such as billing codes, heuristic phenotypes, and incomplete annotations. In this work, we propose WISTERIA, a weakly supervised representation learning framework that models labels as stochastic observations of an underlying latent clinical state. Instead of optimizing against a single supervision signal, WISTERIA constructs multiple weak supervision operators and learns representations by enforcing consistency across their induced label distributions. This multi view formulation induces an implicit denoising mechanism, allowing the model to recover clinically meaningful structure by reconciling disagreement between noisy labelers. We further incorporate ontology aware regularization in the label space to impose semantic structure over supervision signals. Empirically, WISTERIA improves predictive performance across standard EHR benchmarks, demonstrates strong robustness to label noise, and exhibits superior cross institutional generalization compared to sequence based pretraining objectives. These results suggest that explicitly modeling the supervision process rather than treating labels as fixed targets provides a more appropriate inductive bias for learning robust and clinically meaningful representations from EHR data.

analysis.tldr: 提出WISTERIA框架，通过多视图一致性学习鲁棒的临床表示，有效处理电子健康记录中的弱监督噪声。
analysis.research_motivation: 电子健康记录中的临床标签（如计费代码、启发式表型）本质上是弱监督的，存在异质性、噪声和机构特异性，而现有方法将标签视为真实值，忽略了这一特性。
analysis.problem: 如何从带有噪声的弱临床监督信号中学习鲁棒且有临床意义的表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将标签视为潜在临床状态的随机观测，构建多个弱监督算子，通过强制其诱导的标签分布一致性进行表示学习，并引入本体感知正则化。
contributions: 提出多视图一致性框架WISTERIA，显式建模弱监督过程而非将标签视为固定目标。
引入本体感知正则化在标签空间施加语义结构。
实验证明在标准EHR基准上提升预测性能，对标签噪声鲁棒，且跨机构泛化能力优于序列预训练方法。
analysis.experiments: 在标准EHR基准上评估，包括预测性能、对标签噪声的鲁棒性以及跨机构泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖多个弱监督算子的构建质量。
本体感知正则化需要预定义的语义结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对EHR弱监督问题提出多视图一致性框架，实验验证有效，与临床表示学习方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WISTERIA框架，通过多视图一致性学习鲁棒的临床表示，有效处理电子健康记录中的弱监督噪声。

papers.title: LEVI: Stronger Search Architectures Can Substitute for Larger LLMs in Evolutionary Search
papers.abstract: LLM-guided evolutionary methods such as AlphaEvolve have proven effective in domains like math, systems research, and algorithmic discovery, but their reliance on frontier models makes each run expensive. We argue this is largely an artifact of how existing frameworks allocate search: archives that fail to preserve solution diversity force compensation through stronger mutation models; blind model use spends frontier dollars on local edits a smaller model could handle; and full-set evaluation wastes rollouts on redundant examples. We introduce LEVI, a harness-first evolutionary framework built on the bet that stronger search architectures can substitute for or even outperform larger LLMs in evolutionary search. LEVI improves on three core components of evolutionary search: a solution database that establishes diversity from the beginning, and then maintains it throughout the run; a smarter mutation router that plays into the strengths of large and small LLMs; and a rank-preserving proxy benchmark for rollout-heavy settings. Across systems-research benchmarks LEVI attains the highest score on a budget 3.3-6.7x smaller than the published frontier-model runs of existing frameworks like ShinkaEvolve, GEPA, and AdaEvolve; on one problem, LEVI matches the existing best at a 35x lower cost. On prompt optimization, LEVI matches or exceeds GEPA at less than half of its rollout budget on four different benchmarks. LEVI is available as an open-source framework at https://github.com/ttanv/levi.

analysis.tldr: LEVI通过改进搜索架构（多样性数据库、智能变异路由、代理基准）在进化搜索中替代大模型，显著降低成本并保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM引导的进化方法依赖前沿模型，每次运行成本高昂，且现有框架在分配搜索资源时存在效率低下的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更高效的进化搜索架构，以减少对大型LLM的依赖，同时保持或提升搜索性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：现有框架的存档未能保持解多样性，导致需要更强的变异模型来补偿；盲目使用大模型处理局部编辑；全集评估浪费资源。
analysis.method: LEVI框架包含三个核心组件：1) 从开始就建立并维持多样性的解数据库；2) 智能变异路由器，根据任务复杂度分配大/小LLM；3) 用于节省评估成本的保序代理基准。
contributions: 提出LEVI框架，通过改进搜索架构在进化搜索中替代大型LLM，显著降低成本。
在系统研究基准上，以3.3-6.7倍更小的预算达到最高分，在提示优化上以不到一半的预算匹配或超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在系统研究基准和提示优化基准上评估，与ShinkaEvolve、GEPA、AdaEvolve等对比，LEVI在更小预算下取得更高或相当的性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的进化搜索任务（如系统研究和提示优化）。
代理基准的保序性可能在某些场景下失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，显著降低LLM进化搜索成本，但技术细节需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LEVI通过改进搜索架构（多样性数据库、智能变异路由、代理基准）在进化搜索中替代大模型，显著降低成本并保持性能。

papers.title: Fetal Brain Imaging: A Composite Neural Network Approach for Keyframe Detection in Ultrasound Videos
papers.abstract: This article presents a novel approach to keyframe detection in ultrasound videos, with a particular focus on fetal brain imaging. The proposed model is a composite neural network architecture that combines a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN). The CNN extracts spatial features from individual video frames, while the RNN captures temporal dependencies between consecutive frames within each video sequence. The proposed model may improve the efficiency and accuracy of fetal brain ultrasound analysis, thereby supporting earlier detection, diagnosis, and treatment planning for selected fetal brain conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CNN+RNN复合网络用于超声视频关键帧检测，聚焦胎儿脑成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 胎儿脑超声视频分析中关键帧检测依赖人工，效率低且主观性强，自动化方法可提升诊断效率与准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何从胎儿脑超声视频中自动、准确地检测关键帧。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 复合神经网络：CNN提取单帧空间特征，RNN捕获帧间时序依赖，联合进行关键帧检测。
contributions: 提出一种结合CNN和RNN的复合架构用于超声视频关键帧检测
聚焦胎儿脑成像领域，可能提升早期诊断效率
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在摘要中报告定量实验结果或对比基线
可能缺乏对模型泛化能力的验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法组合常见，摘要缺乏实验细节，与重点方向中等相关但贡献偏增量。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CNN+RNN复合网络用于超声视频关键帧检测，聚焦胎儿脑成像。

papers.title: Primal-Dual Guided Decoding for Constrained Discrete Diffusion
papers.abstract: Discrete diffusion models generate structured sequences by progressively unmasking tokens, but enforcing global property constraints during generation remains an open challenge. We propose primal-dual guided decoding, an inference-time method that formulates constrained generation as a KL-regularised optimisation problem and solves it online via adaptive Lagrangian multipliers. At each denoising step, the method modifies token logits through an additive, constraint-dependent bias, with multipliers updated by mirror descent based on constraint violation. The bias arises as the optimal KL-regularised projection of the constraint, so the constrained distribution remains as close as possible to the model's unconstrained distribution while still satisfying the constraint. The method requires no retraining and no additional model evaluations beyond standard sampling, supports multiple simultaneous constraints, and provides formal bounds on constraint violation. We evaluate our approach on topical text generation, molecular design, and music playlist generation, showing that a single algorithm instantiated via domain-specific scoring functions improves constraint satisfaction while preserving relevant domain-specific quality metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需重训练、通过在线拉格朗日乘子调整logits的推理时约束解码方法，用于离散扩散模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散扩散模型在生成结构化序列时难以在推理过程中强制执行全局属性约束，现有方法通常需要重训练或额外模型评估，效率低且灵活性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重训练且不增加额外模型评估的前提下，让离散扩散模型在生成时满足多个全局属性约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出原对偶引导解码，将约束生成建模为KL正则化优化问题，通过自适应拉格朗日乘子在线求解；每步去噪时用约束依赖的偏置修改token logits，乘子通过镜像下降根据约束违反程度更新。
contributions: 提出一种推理时约束解码方法，无需重训练和额外模型评估，支持多约束。
提供约束违反的形式化界，并在主题文本生成、分子设计和音乐播放列表生成上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在主题文本生成、分子设计和音乐播放列表生成三个任务上评估，使用领域特定评分函数，改进约束满足同时保持领域质量指标。
limitations: 可能对复杂约束的适应性有限，乘子更新可能不稳定。
仅适用于离散扩散模型，未讨论连续扩散或其他生成模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，实验覆盖多个领域，但摘要未提供具体数值结果，影响评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需重训练、通过在线拉格朗日乘子调整logits的推理时约束解码方法，用于离散扩散模型。

papers.title: Sequential Feature Selection for Efficient Landslide Segmentation from Multi-Spectral Data
papers.abstract: Landslide detection from satellite imagery has advanced through deep learning, yet most models rely on large, highly correlated spectral-topographic inputs whose contributions remain poorly understood. The question of which channels are actually necessary has received surprisingly little attention. This matters: redundant or correlated inputs obscure physical interpretability, inflate computational overhead, and can actively degrade model performance through the Hughes Phenomenon. We present a systematic, explainable channel-selection framework for the Landslide4Sense benchmark, combining Sentinel-2 multispectral and ALOS PALSAR terrain data with 16 engineered spectral and structural indices. Rather than relying on conventional single-band drop tests, which evaluate channels in isolation and miss interaction effects, we apply Sequential Forward Floating Selection (SFFS) to iteratively build and prune a candidate feature pool using a lightweight U-Net++ proxy model. Beyond identifying a compact 8-channel subset that matches or exceeds the segmentation F1 of configurations using up to 30 channels, we use the selection process itself to interrogate which spectral and topographic features landslide models genuinely rely on, and what this reveals about the physical cues driving their predictions. We argue that SFFS represents a principled feature selection approach to input design in Earth observation, in contrast to the prevailing practice of appending every available band and hoping the model learns what to ignore.

analysis.tldr: 提出SFFS特征选择框架，从多光谱数据中选出8个关键通道，在滑坡分割任务上达到甚至超越30通道的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有滑坡检测模型依赖大量高度相关的光谱-地形输入，冗余特征不仅增加计算开销，还可能因Hughes现象降低性能，且缺乏对必要通道的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 如何从多光谱和地形数据中系统性地选择最有效的特征子集，以提升滑坡分割的效率和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 冗余或相关输入会掩盖物理可解释性、增加计算负担，并通过Hughes现象降低模型性能；传统单波段丢弃测试忽略通道间交互效应。
analysis.method: 采用顺序前向浮动选择（SFFS）框架，结合轻量级U-Net++代理模型，迭代构建并剪枝候选特征池，最终选出8通道子集。
contributions: 提出基于SFFS的可解释通道选择框架，用于多光谱滑坡分割任务。
识别出8通道子集，在Landslide4Sense基准上匹配或超越30通道的F1分数。
通过选择过程揭示模型真正依赖的光谱和地形特征，提供物理可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在Landslide4Sense基准上使用Sentinel-2多光谱和ALOS PALSAR地形数据，对比不同通道配置的分割F1分数。
limitations: 仅针对滑坡分割任务，泛化性需在其他遥感任务中验证。
SFFS计算成本可能较高，尤其特征空间大时。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法系统且具有可解释性，但实验仅基于单一基准，创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SFFS特征选择框架，从多光谱数据中选出8个关键通道，在滑坡分割任务上达到甚至超越30通道的性能。

papers.title: Entropy-informed Decoding: Adaptive Information-Driven Branching
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve remarkable generative performance, yet their output quality is dependent on the decoding strategy. While sampling-based methods (e.g., top-k, nucleus) and search-and-select based methods (e.g., beam search, best-of-n, majority voting) can improve upon greedy decoding, both approaches suffer from limitations: sampling generally commits to a single path, while search often expends excessive computation regardless of task complexity. To address these, we introduce Entropy-informed decoding (EDEN), a plug-and-play, model-agnostic decoding framework that adaptively allocates computation based on the model's own uncertainty, approximating higher-width beam search with fewer expansions. At each generation step, EDEN estimates the entropy of the output token distribution and adjusts the branching factor monotonically with the entropy, expanding more candidates in high-entropy regions and following a greedier path in low-entropy regions, improving token efficiency. Experiments across complex tasks, including mathematical reasoning, code generation, and scientific questions, demonstrate that EDEN consistently improves output quality over existing decoding strategies, achieving better accuracy-expansion trade-offs than fixed-width beam search. By treating next-token selection as a noisy maximisation problem, we prove that branching factors monotone in entropy are guaranteed to find better (i.e. more probable) continuations than any fixed branching factor within the same total expansion budget, and derive explicit regret rates characterising the benefit of the adaptive allocation.

analysis.tldr: EDEN根据模型输出分布的熵自适应调整解码分支数，在相同扩展预算下比固定宽度束搜索找到更优的续写。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有解码策略如采样和束搜索存在局限：采样只走一条路径，束搜索无论任务复杂度都消耗固定计算量，缺乏对不确定性的自适应。
analysis.problem: 如何根据模型自身不确定性自适应分配解码计算资源，以在相同扩展预算下提升输出质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在高熵区域（不确定性高）需要更多候选分支，低熵区域可走贪心路径，固定分支数无法最优利用预算。
analysis.method: 提出EDEN框架，在每个生成步估计输出token分布的熵，并令分支因子与熵单调递增，高熵多扩展、低熵少扩展。
contributions: 提出一种即插即用、模型无关的自适应解码框架EDEN，根据熵调整分支数。
理论证明在相同总扩展预算下，单调于熵的分支因子比任何固定分支因子能找到更优续写，并给出显式遗憾率。
在数学推理、代码生成、科学问答等任务上实验验证EDEN优于现有解码策略，实现更好的准确率-扩展权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在数学推理、代码生成、科学问答等复杂任务上评估，EDEN一致提升输出质量，比固定宽度束搜索取得更好的准确率-扩展权衡。
limitations: 摘要未提及对非常长序列或极低熵场景的详细分析。
可能依赖熵估计的准确性，未讨论极端分布下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，实验覆盖多个推理任务，与LLM解码方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EDEN根据模型输出分布的熵自适应调整解码分支数，在相同扩展预算下比固定宽度束搜索找到更优的续写。

papers.title: TIDES: Implicit Time-Awareness in Selective State Space Models
papers.abstract: Selective state space models (SSMs), such as Mamba, achieve strong per-token expressivity by making the time discretization step $\TildeΔ$ a learned function of the input. However, in doing so, $\TildeΔ$ ceases to represent a physical sampling interval, limiting its irregular time series modeling capability. Continuous-time SSMs, such as S5, preserve the physical meaning of $\TildeΔ$ and handle irregular timestamps natively ($\TildeΔ\equivΔ)$, but their dynamics remain linear time-invariant (LTI), limiting per-token expressivity. We propose \textbf{TIDES}, a selective SSM variant that reconciles selective and continuous architectures by moving input-dependence off the step size and onto the diagonal state matrix. As a result, $\TildeΔ$ retains its physical meaning, tied to the state discretization, allowing the model to handle irregular timestamps natively without sacrificing the per-token expressivity that makes selective SSMs effective. We show this on a novel \emph{Fading Flash} experimental benchmark, a compact controlled diagnostic for sequence models that jointly tests input-dependence and extrapolation to out-of-distribution $Δ$ values, and isolates the distinct failure modes of current state-of-the-art architectures that TIDES avoids by construction. On large-scale benchmarks, TIDES sets the new state-of-the-art average rank on UEA time-series classification and the Physiome-ODE regression benchmark. Code available at: https://github.com/TaylanSoydan/TIDES.

analysis.tldr: TIDES 通过将输入依赖性从步长转移到对角状态矩阵，统一了选择性 SSM 和连续时间 SSM，实现了对不规则时间序列的原生处理并保持高表达力。
analysis.research_motivation: 选择性 SSM（如 Mamba）通过将时间离散化步长 Δ̃ 作为输入的函数来获得强表达力，但 Δ̃ 失去了物理采样间隔的意义，限制了不规则时间序列建模能力；连续时间 SSM（如 S5）保留了 Δ 的物理意义，但动态是线性时不变的，限制了逐 token 表达力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲选择性 SSM 逐 token 表达力的情况下，使模型能够原生处理不规则时间戳？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有选择性 SSM 和连续时间 SSM 在输入依赖性和时间离散化物理意义之间存在权衡，导致在不规则时间序列上出现不同的失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出 TIDES，将输入依赖性从步长 Δ̃ 转移到对角状态矩阵，使 Δ̃ 保留物理意义（与状态离散化相关），从而原生处理不规则时间戳，同时保持选择性 SSM 的表达力。
contributions: 提出 TIDES 架构，统一了选择性和连续时间 SSM，在不规则时间序列上实现原生处理和高表达力。
设计 Fading Flash 诊断基准，用于测试序列模型的输入依赖性和外推能力，并揭示现有架构的失败模式。
在 UEA 时间序列分类和 Physiome-ODE 回归基准上取得新的最佳平均排名。
analysis.experiments: 在 Fading Flash 诊断基准、UEA 时间序列分类和 Physiome-ODE 回归基准上进行了实验，TIDES 取得了新的最佳平均排名。
limitations: 可能仅在特定类型的不规则时间序列上表现优异，泛化性需进一步验证。
对角状态矩阵的输入依赖性可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，解决了选择性SSM和不规则时间序列建模的关键矛盾，实验验证充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TIDES 通过将输入依赖性从步长转移到对角状态矩阵，统一了选择性 SSM 和连续时间 SSM，实现了对不规则时间序列的原生处理并保持高表达力。

papers.title: The Silent Vote: Improving Zero-Shot LLM Reliability by Aggregating Semantic Neighborhoods
papers.abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly used as zero-shot classifiers in complex reasoning tasks. However, standard constrained decoding suffers from a phenomenon we define as Renormalization Bias. When a model is restricted to a small set of target labels, the standard softmax operation discards the probability mass assigned to semantic synonyms in the original distribution. This loss of information, which we call the Silent Vote, results in artificial overconfidence and poor calibration. We propose Semantic Softmax, an inference-time layer that recovers this lost information by aggregating the scores of the semantic neighborhood surrounding each target label. We evaluate this approach on Qwen-3 and Phi-4-mini models using GoEmotions and Civil Comments datasets. Our results demonstrate consistent improvements across all evaluation metrics: Semantic Softmax substantially reduces Expected Calibration Error (ECE) and Brier Score, while simultaneously enhancing discriminative performance in terms of AUROC and Macro-F1. By accounting for linguistic nuances, our method provides a more calibrated and accurate alternative for zero-shot classification.

analysis.tldr: 通过聚合语义邻域分数，提出Semantic Softmax以消除零样本分类中的重归一化偏差，提升校准性和判别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM作为零样本分类器时，标准约束解码因忽略语义同义词的概率质量，导致过度自信和校准不良，影响可靠性。
analysis.problem: 零样本分类中标准softmax操作丢弃了目标标签语义邻域的概率信息，造成重归一化偏差和校准误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到重归一化偏差现象：模型被限制到少量目标标签时，softmax丢弃了原始分布中语义同义词的概率质量，导致人工过度自信和校准差。
analysis.method: 提出Semantic Softmax，一种推理时层，通过聚合每个目标标签语义邻域内的分数来恢复丢失的概率信息。
contributions: 定义并分析了零样本分类中的重归一化偏差和Silent Vote现象。
提出Semantic Softmax方法，通过聚合语义邻域分数改善校准性和准确性。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-3和Phi-4-mini模型上使用GoEmotions和Civil Comments数据集进行评估，结果显示Semantic Softmax在ECE、Brier Score、AUROC和Macro-F1上均有一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的同义词或语义邻域定义。
计算开销可能略高于标准softmax。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对提升LLM零样本分类可靠性有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过聚合语义邻域分数，提出Semantic Softmax以消除零样本分类中的重归一化偏差，提升校准性和判别性能。

papers.title: KV-RM: Regularizing KV-Cache Movement for Static-Graph LLM Serving
papers.abstract: Static-graph LLM decoders provide predictable launches, fixed tensor shapes, and low submission overhead, but online decoding exposes highly irregular KV-cache behavior: request lengths differ, EOS events arrive asynchronously, and logical histories fragment over time. Dynamic runtimes recover flexibility through paged KV management and step-level scheduling, while static-graph executors often over-reserve memory and suffer burst-time latency outliers. This paper studies whether much of this variability can be absorbed below a fixed decode interface. We present KV-RM, a runtime design that regularizes KV-cache movement beneath a static-graph LLM decoder. KV-RM decouples logical KV histories from physical storage, tracks active KV state through a block pager, and materializes each decode step through a single committed descriptor. A merge-staged transport path coalesces non-contiguous KV mappings into a small number of large transfer groups before a fixed-shape attention kernel consumes them. Optional bounded far-history summaries can be enabled under the same interface, but the core design does not depend on them. On a 2-GPU NVIDIA A100 node, KV-RM improves mixed-length decoding throughput and tail latency relative to a static-graph baseline, reduces reserved KV memory across workload families, and removes severe burst-time latency spikes under production-trace replay. These results suggest that KV-cache movement, rather than kernel shape, can be an effective boundary for recovering runtime flexibility in static-graph LLM serving.

analysis.tldr: KV-RM通过解耦逻辑与物理KV缓存、分页管理和合并传输路径，在静态图LLM解码器下吸收KV缓存不规则性，提升吞吐并降低尾延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 静态图LLM解码器具有可预测的启动和固定张量形状，但在线解码中KV缓存行为高度不规则（请求长度差异、EOS异步到达、逻辑历史碎片化），导致内存过度预留和突发延迟尖峰。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持静态图解码器固定接口的同时，吸收KV缓存的不规则性，避免动态运行时的高开销和静态图的低效内存使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到静态图执行器因KV缓存不规则性而过度预留内存并出现突发延迟尖峰，而动态运行时通过分页和逐步调度恢复灵活性但增加开销。
analysis.method: KV-RM设计：解耦逻辑KV历史与物理存储，通过块分页器跟踪活跃KV状态，每个解码步通过单个提交描述符实现；合并分阶段传输路径将非连续KV映射合并为少量大传输组，供固定形状注意力核使用。
contributions: 提出KV-RM运行时设计，在静态图LLM解码器下通过分页和合并传输吸收KV缓存不规则性。
在2-GPU A100节点上验证了混合长度解码吞吐和尾延迟的改进，减少了KV内存预留并消除了突发延迟尖峰。
analysis.experiments: 在2-GPU NVIDIA A100节点上，使用生产轨迹回放评估，对比静态图基线，测量混合长度解码吞吐、尾延迟、KV内存预留和延迟尖峰。
limitations: 实验仅在2-GPU单节点上进行，未扩展到更大规模或多节点场景。
可选的有界远历史摘要未作为核心设计依赖，其效果未详细评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验验证充分，对LLM推理系统有实际价值，但规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KV-RM通过解耦逻辑与物理KV缓存、分页管理和合并传输路径，在静态图LLM解码器下吸收KV缓存不规则性，提升吞吐并降低尾延迟。

papers.title: Trajectory Supervision for Continual Tool-Use Learning in LLMs
papers.abstract: Most language-model training data shows final artifacts, not the process that produced them. We study a tractable version of this question in tool use: when a model learns a stream of new API domains, does keeping tool-use trajectories help compared with stripping the intermediate API trace? We fine-tune Llama 3.1 8B Instruct with QLoRA on API-Bank using four sequential domain blocks. Condition A strips previous API request/response lines from the prompt and trains the model to predict the next API call. Condition B keeps the trajectory context. In a single-seed pilot, full held-out generation evaluation shows that Condition B reaches 56.9\% final exact full-call accuracy compared with 39.2\% for Condition A. B also improves final API-name accuracy by 7.7 points. However, B uses 25.1\% more training tokens, the run uses one seed, and the task is next-call prediction rather than full dialogue success.

analysis.tldr: 保留工具使用轨迹（而非仅最终结果）能显著提升LLM在持续学习新API时的调用准确率，但代价是训练token增加约25%。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前语言模型训练数据多只包含最终产物，缺乏过程信息，限制了模型在工具使用等需要过程推理的任务上的持续学习能力。
analysis.problem: 在LLM持续学习新API域的场景中，是否保留工具使用轨迹（中间API调用历史）比仅保留最终结果更有利于模型学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过单种子实验观察到：保留轨迹（条件B）相比剥离轨迹（条件A）在最终精确完整调用准确率上提升17.7个百分点（56.9% vs 39.2%），API名称准确率提升7.7个百分点，但训练token增加25.1%。
analysis.method: 使用QLoRA微调Llama 3.1 8B Instruct，在API-Bank数据集上按四个顺序域块进行持续学习。条件A从提示中移除先前API请求/响应行，训练模型预测下一个API调用；条件B保留完整的轨迹上下文。
contributions: 首次在持续工具使用学习场景中系统比较保留轨迹与剥离轨迹的效果。
实验表明保留轨迹能显著提升API调用准确率，但需权衡训练成本。
analysis.experiments: 在API-Bank数据集上使用单种子（single-seed）实验，评估指标包括最终精确完整调用准确率和API名称准确率。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅使用单种子实验，统计显著性未验证。
任务为下一调用预测而非完整对话成功，可能低估实际应用难度。
训练token增加25.1%，成本效益比未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简单但问题重要，实验初步，适合关注持续学习与工具使用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 保留工具使用轨迹（而非仅最终结果）能显著提升LLM在持续学习新API时的调用准确率，但代价是训练token增加约25%。

papers.title: One for All: A Non-Linear Transformer can Enable Cross-Domain Generalization for In-Context Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: A central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL) is to learn models that generalize beyond the tasks on which they are trained, a goal traditionally pursued through multi-task and meta RL. Recently, transformer architectures have emerged as a promising approach, enabling adaptation to new tasks via in-context learning without explicit parameter updates. From a functional perspective, a transformer can be viewed as a functional operator that maps a context to a task-specific function. It is thus fundamental to understand and design this operator to support stronger generalization in RL. In this work, we address this resulting question of generalization from a kernel-based perspective by establishing a connection between non-linear transformers and kernel-based temporal difference learning. By interpreting the transformer as performing regression in a Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS), we show that value functions from different domains can be represented using a shared set of weights, provided they lie within the same RKHS. Experiments on multiple MetaWorld domains support this interpretation, demonstrating convergence of the temporal-difference objective.

analysis.tldr: 通过核方法视角将非线性Transformer与核时序差分学习关联，证明跨域价值函数可共享权重，实现上下文强化学习的跨域泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习模型泛化到未见任务是一个核心挑战，传统多任务和元学习方法需要显式参数更新，而Transformer的上下文学习能力为无需参数更新的任务适应提供了新途径，但其泛化机制尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上理解并设计Transformer在上下文强化学习中的泛化能力，特别是跨域泛化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从核方法视角建立非线性Transformer与核时序差分学习的联系，将Transformer解释为在再生核希尔伯特空间中进行回归，从而证明不同域的价值函数若位于同一RKHS中可共享权重。
contributions: 建立了非线性Transformer与核时序差分学习之间的理论联系，为上下文强化学习提供了核方法视角。
证明了跨域价值函数在共享RKHS条件下可共享权重，从而支持跨域泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个MetaWorld域上进行了实验，验证了时序差分目标收敛，支持理论解释。
limitations: 理论分析依赖于价值函数位于同一RKHS的假设，实际中可能难以保证。
实验仅在MetaWorld域上进行，泛化到更复杂或异构域的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论视角新颖，但实验规模有限，适合精读以了解核方法与Transformer结合的理论。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过核方法视角将非线性Transformer与核时序差分学习关联，证明跨域价值函数可共享权重，实现上下文强化学习的跨域泛化。

papers.title: On-Policy Distillation with Best-of-N Teacher Rollout Selection
papers.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD), which supervises a student on its own sampled trajectories, has emerged as a data-efficient post-training method for improving reasoning while avoiding the reward dependence of reinforcement learning and the catastrophic forgetting often observed in standard supervised fine-tuning. However, standard OPD typically computes teacher supervision under noisy student-generated contexts and often relies on a single stochastic teacher rollout per prompt. As a result, the supervision signal can be high-variance: the sampled teacher trajectory can be incorrect, uninformative, or poorly matched to the student's current reasoning behavior. To address this limitation, we propose BRTS, a Best-of-N Rollout Teacher Selection framework for on-policy distillation. BRTS augments standard student-context OPD with a teacher-context supervision branch constructed from the curated teacher trajectory. Rather than distilling from the first sampled teacher rollout, BRTS samples a small pool of teacher trajectories and selects the auxiliary trajectory using a simple priority rule: correctness first, student alignment second. When multiple correct teacher trajectories are available, BRTS chooses the one most aligned with the student's current behavior; when unconditioned teacher samples fail on harder prompts, it invokes a ground-truth-conditioned recovery step to elicit a natural derivation. The selected trajectory is then used to provide reliable teacher-context supervision inside the OPD loop, augmented with an auxiliary loss on the teacher trajectory. Experiments on AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and AMC 2023 show that BRTS improves over standard OPD on challenging reasoning benchmarks, with the largest gains on harder datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/BWGZK-keke/BRTS.

analysis.tldr: 提出BRTS框架，通过从多个教师轨迹中选择最佳轨迹来改进同策略蒸馏，提升推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 同策略蒸馏（OPD）在提升推理能力方面有效，但标准方法依赖单次随机教师轨迹，导致监督信号高方差，可能包含错误或无信息。
analysis.problem: 标准OPD中教师监督信号方差高，轨迹可能不正确、无信息或与学生行为不匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准OPD使用学生生成的上下文和单次随机教师轨迹，导致监督信号质量不稳定。
analysis.method: 提出BRTS框架，采样多个教师轨迹，根据正确性和学生对齐度选择最佳轨迹，并引入教师上下文监督分支和辅助损失。
contributions: 提出BRTS，一种基于最佳N选1的教师轨迹选择方法，用于同策略蒸馏。
在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和AMC 2023上验证了BRTS优于标准OPD，尤其在更难的数据集上提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和AMC 2023推理基准上评估，BRTS优于标准OPD，在更难的数据集上提升最大。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量和多样性。
额外采样多个轨迹增加了计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验验证有效，与推理方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BRTS框架，通过从多个教师轨迹中选择最佳轨迹来改进同策略蒸馏，提升推理能力。

papers.title: Security Risks in Tool-Enabled AI Agents: A Systematic Analysis of Privileged Execution Environments
papers.abstract: Tool-enabled AI agents are increasingly deployed in cloud-hosted environments and offered as services, where they perform side-effecting operations through privileged tools within execution environments. While such agents enable powerful automation, the security implications of hosting autonomous agents in privileged execution environments are not yet fully explored. This paper presents a structured analysis of security risks associated with cloud-hosted AI agents. We introduce a taxonomy of risk categories, illustrate these risks through three representative agent scenarios, and discuss mitigation strategies along with their tradeoffs. A small controlled experiment empirically illustrates risk manifestation and the effect of lightweight mitigations in this setup. Our analysis suggests that many risks in autonomous cloud agents arise not from novel vulnerabilities, but from over-privileged tools, capability-intent mismatches, and ambient authority leakage in execution environments. Based on these findings, we derive practical design guidelines for deploying AI agents in the cloud more securely.

analysis.tldr: 系统分析云托管AI Agent在特权执行环境中的安全风险，提出风险分类、实验验证及缓解策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具增强的AI Agent在云环境中广泛部署，但特权执行环境的安全风险尚未被充分探索，存在潜在攻击面。
analysis.problem: 云托管AI Agent在特权执行环境中的安全风险分类、实证验证及缓解策略设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 风险主要源于过度特权工具、能力-意图不匹配和环境权限泄漏，而非新型漏洞。
analysis.method: 提出风险分类法，通过三个代表性场景说明风险，并进行小规模控制实验验证风险表现及轻量级缓解效果。
contributions: 提出云托管AI Agent安全风险的结构化分类法
通过实验验证风险表现及轻量级缓解措施的有效性
给出安全部署AI Agent的实用设计指南
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验规模小，可能无法覆盖所有风险场景
缓解策略的通用性和长期效果未充分验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 系统分析安全风险，但实验有限，贡献偏分类和指南，适合了解但非核心突破。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统分析云托管AI Agent在特权执行环境中的安全风险，提出风险分类、实验验证及缓解策略。

papers.title: Distilling 3D Spatial Reasoning into a Lightweight Vision-Language Model with CoT
papers.abstract: Large-scale 3D vision-language models (VLMs) like LLaVA-3D offer strong spatial reasoning but are difficult to deploy due to high computational costs. We propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers spatial reasoning from a 7B teacher to a 2.29B student model. Our approach achieves 8.7x lower inference latency and a 3x reduction in model size while retaining 54-72% of the teacher's performance. The framework utilizes VGGT as the vision encoder and a multi-task distillation pipeline with uncertainty-aware loss weighting. To improve reasoning without chain-of-thought (CoT) data, we introduce "Hidden CoT": learnable latent tokens that serve as an internal scratchpad before answer generation. This is the first use of latent scratchpad reasoning in distilled 3D VLMs. The student model jointly performs spatial description, depth estimation, and object detection. Experiments on ScanNet and 3D-FRONT show strong spatial understanding, reaching 68-72% accuracy on proximity and contact tasks. Our framework enables efficient 3D scene QA on resource-constrained platforms.

analysis.tldr: 通过知识蒸馏将3D空间推理能力从大模型迁移至轻量级VLM，并引入隐式思维链提升效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型3D VLM（如LLaVA-3D）空间推理能力强但计算成本高，难以在资源受限平台部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持3D空间推理能力的同时，显著降低模型计算开销和推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 知识蒸馏框架：以7B教师模型蒸馏至2.29B学生模型，使用VGGT视觉编码器、多任务蒸馏（空间描述、深度估计、目标检测）及不确定性感知损失加权；引入隐式思维链（Hidden CoT）作为可学习潜变量，在答案生成前进行内部推理。
contributions: 首次在蒸馏3D VLM中使用隐式思维链（Hidden CoT）作为内部草稿板。
提出多任务蒸馏框架，实现8.7倍推理加速和3倍模型压缩，同时保留教师模型54-72%的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ScanNet和3D-FRONT数据集上评估，在邻近和接触任务上达到68-72%准确率。
limitations: 性能保留比例（54-72%）仍有提升空间。
隐式思维链的可解释性可能不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（隐式思维链+蒸馏），实验验证有效，但性能保留有限，适合关注模型压缩和3D VLM的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过知识蒸馏将3D空间推理能力从大模型迁移至轻量级VLM，并引入隐式思维链提升效率。

papers.title: Medical Model Synthesis Architectures: A Case Study
papers.abstract: Medicine is rife with high-stakes uncertainty. Doctors routinely make clinical judgments and decisions that juggle many fundamental unknowns, like predictions about what might be causing a patients' symptoms or decisions about what treatment to try next. Despite increasing interest in developing AI systems that aid or even replace doctors in clinical settings, current systems struggle with calibrated reasoning under uncertainty, and are often deeply opaque about their reasoning. We propose a framework for AI systems that can make practically useful but formally transparent clinical predictions under uncertainty. Given a clinical situation, our framework (MedMSA) uses language models to retrieve relevant prior knowledge, but constructs a formal probabilistic model to support calibrated and verifiable inferences under uncertainty. We show how an initial proof-of-concept of this framework can be used for differential diagnosis, producing an uncertainty-weighted list of potential diagnoses that could explain a patients' symptoms, and discuss future applications and directions for applying this framework more generally for safe clinical collaborations.

analysis.tldr: 提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索与概率模型，实现可校准且透明的临床不确定性推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床决策充满高风险的未知因素，现有AI系统在不确定性下推理校准能力不足且推理过程不透明，难以安全辅助或替代医生。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能在临床不确定性下进行实用、透明且可校准推理的AI系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MedMSA框架：给定临床情境，使用语言模型检索相关先验知识，然后构建形式化概率模型以支持校准和可验证的不确定性推理。
contributions: 提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索与概率模型实现透明且校准的临床推理。
通过鉴别诊断的概念验证展示了框架的可行性，并讨论了未来安全临床协作的应用方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅进行了概念验证，缺乏大规模临床实验评估。
框架依赖语言模型检索的先验知识质量，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合语言模型与概率模型有一定新意，但仅概念验证，缺乏实验支撑，适合保存待后续关注。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MedMSA框架，结合语言模型检索与概率模型，实现可校准且透明的临床不确定性推理。

papers.title: Metal-Sci: A Scientific Compute Benchmark for Evolutionary LLM Kernel Search on Apple Silicon
papers.abstract: We present Metal-Sci, a 10-task benchmark of scientific Apple Silicon Metal compute kernels spanning six optimization regimes (stencils, all-pairs in $n$-body problems, multi-field Boltzmann, neighbor-list molecular dynamics, multi-kernel PDE, FFT). Each task ships a CPU reference, a roofline-anchored fitness function, and a held-out generalization size. We pair the benchmark with a lightweight harness for automatic kernel search that runtime-compiles each candidate, scores it against the roofline across multiple sizes, and feeds structured compile and per-size correctness diagnostics back to a frozen LLM driving a $(1{+}1)$ evolutionary loop. We report matched single-model sweeps of Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT 5.5 on M1 Pro: in-distribution self-speedups span $1.00\times$ to $10.7\times$. Beyond raw speedup, our central methodological claim is structural: the held-out gate scoring function $Φ_\mathcal{T}$ (evaluated once at end-of-run on a configuration the agent never sees during search) functions as a cheap mechanical oversight primitive on this automatic search loop, catching e.g. an Opus template <uint D> HMC win that returns wrong samples at unseen dimensions, and a GPT FFT3D best that wins in-distribution at $2.95\times$ speedup but collapses to $0.23\times$ on a $256^3$ held-out cube, a silent regression that the in-distribution score alone cannot see. Code at https://github.com/vicgalle/metal-sci-kernels

analysis.tldr: 提出Metal-Sci基准，用于在Apple Silicon上通过LLM驱动的进化搜索自动优化科学计算核，并引入留出门控评分函数作为机械监督。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学计算核的手动优化耗时且需要专家知识，自动搜索方法缺乏标准化基准和泛化性评估，现有方法可能产生在未见配置上性能崩溃的静默回归。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对Apple Silicon的科学计算核基准，以及自动搜索中评估候选核泛化能力的有效机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：在分布内表现优异的核可能在留出尺寸上性能崩溃（如GPT FFT3D从2.95×加速比降至0.23×），而留出门控评分函数能捕获此类静默回归。
analysis.method: 构建10任务基准Metal-Sci，包含CPU参考、屋顶线适应度函数和留出泛化尺寸；搭配轻量级自动搜索框架，通过LLM驱动的(1+1)进化循环运行时编译候选核，并使用留出门控评分函数Φ_T进行机械监督。
contributions: 提出Metal-Sci基准，覆盖6种优化场景的10个科学计算核任务，提供标准化评估。
引入留出门控评分函数作为自动搜索的机械监督原语，能检测分布内性能优异但泛化失败的核。
analysis.experiments: 在M1 Pro上对Claude Opus 4.7、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT 5.5进行单模型扫描，分布内自加速比范围为1.00×至10.7×。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对Apple Silicon平台，可能不直接迁移到其他架构。
依赖特定LLM和进化搜索策略，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，引入机械监督概念，但实验规模有限且仅针对特定硬件，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Metal-Sci基准，用于在Apple Silicon上通过LLM驱动的进化搜索自动优化科学计算核，并引入留出门控评分函数作为机械监督。

papers.title: Adaptive Data Harvesting for Efficient Neural Network Learning with Universal Constraints
papers.abstract: Training neural networks to satisfy universal constraints over continuous domains poses unique challenges. Common examples include Lyapunov Neural Networks (Lyapunov NNs) and Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), where analytical solutions are generally either unavailable or overly restrictive. Sample-based methods are therefore commonly used to enforce these constraints, and the choice of samples has a substantial impact on convergence speed, stability, and solution quality. Most existing methods rely on fixed heuristics or handcrafted rules, and are suboptimal in practice. In this paper, we aim to improve upon them by learning, from data and experience, how to dynamically and iteratively adjust the samples in response to the model's evolving learning performance. Trained by reinforcement learning, the learned policy improves empirical constraint satisfaction on test problems while significantly improving efficiency. We validate the approach on both Lyapunov NNs and PINNs, and demonstrate its broader applicability to domains where adaptive input selection is essential for effective training.

analysis.tldr: 提出用强化学习动态调整采样策略，提升神经网络在通用约束下的训练效率与约束满足度。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练满足连续域通用约束的神经网络（如Lyapunov NN、PINN）时，样本选择对收敛速度、稳定性和解质量影响巨大，但现有方法依赖固定启发式规则，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据模型学习状态动态调整采样点，以高效满足通用约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出样本选择对训练效果影响显著，但现有启发式方法次优，且缺乏自适应机制。
analysis.method: 使用强化学习训练一个策略，根据模型当前表现动态迭代调整采样分布。
contributions: 提出一种基于强化学习的自适应数据采集方法，用于高效训练满足通用约束的神经网络。
在Lyapunov NN和PINN上验证了该方法在约束满足度和效率上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖强化学习训练策略的稳定性。
通用性需在更多约束类型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用强化学习动态调整采样策略，提升神经网络在通用约束下的训练效率与约束满足度。

papers.title: MOTOR-Bench: A Real-world Dataset and Multi-agent Framework for Zero-shot Human Mental State Understanding
papers.abstract: Understanding human mental states from natural behavior is crucial for intelligent systems in the real world. However, most current research focuses on predicting isolated mental state labels, lacking structured annotations of complex interpersonal interactions. To support structured analysis, we introduce MOTOR-Bench, a carefully-designed benchmark with a real-world dataset MOTOR-dataset, containing 1,440 multimodal video clips in collaborative learning scenarios, reflecting key real-world data challenges including natural class imbalance, visual noise, and domain-specific language. Each sample is labeled by educational experts based on self-regulated learning theory. We further evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models and multi-agent systems in a zero-shot setting on our MOTOR-Bench. However, their performance on this task remains limited, suggesting that existing methods still struggle with structured reasoning from observable behavior to deeper mental states. To address this challenge, we propose a reasoning multi-agent framework, named MOTOR-MAS. It coordinates multiple agents through a structured agent coordination mechanism to infer explicit behaviors, internal cognitions, and psychological emotions. Experimental results show that our MOTOR-MAS outperforms the best single-model benchmark by 15.93 points in Macro-F1 scores for the three labels of behavior, cognition, and emotion, and outperforms the general multi-agent benchmark by 10.2 points in internal cognition prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出MOTOR-Bench数据集和MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，用于零样本人类心理状态理解，在协作学习场景中超越单模型和通用多智能体方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注孤立心理状态标签预测，缺乏对复杂人际交互的结构化标注，且真实场景存在类别不平衡、视觉噪声和领域特定语言等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然行为中零样本地结构化推理出人类心理状态（行为、认知、情感）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有MLLM和多智能体系统在零样本设置下性能有限，难以从可观察行为推理深层心理状态。
analysis.method: 提出MOTOR-MAS，一种推理多智能体框架，通过结构化智能体协调机制协调多个智能体，分别推断显式行为、内部认知和心理情感。
contributions: 构建了MOTOR-Bench基准和MOTOR-dataset数据集，包含1,440个多模态视频片段，由教育专家基于自我调节学习理论标注。
提出MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，在零样本设置下显著优于单模型和通用多智能体方法。
analysis.experiments: 在MOTOR-Bench上评估多个SOTA多模态大语言模型和多智能体系统，MOTOR-MAS在行为、认知、情感三标签的Macro-F1上比最佳单模型高15.93分，在内部认知预测上比通用多智能体基准高10.2分。
limitations: 数据集仅涵盖协作学习场景，泛化性有待验证。
零样本设置可能无法完全适应其他领域心理状态理解。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 数据集和框架针对真实场景心理状态理解，方法创新且实验效果显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MOTOR-Bench数据集和MOTOR-MAS多智能体框架，用于零样本人类心理状态理解，在协作学习场景中超越单模型和通用多智能体方法。

papers.title: DriveFuture: Future-Aware Latent World Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Existing latent world models for autonomous driving have opened a promising path toward future-aware driving intelligence. However, they typically treat future latent states as prediction targets or auxiliary signals, rather than directly conditioning trajectory planning. This can entangle current and future features in latent space. In this work, we propose DriveFuture, a future-aware latent world modeling framework for autonomous driving that explicitly learns planning-oriented foresight by conditioning the current latent state modeling process on future world states. Specifically, during training, the model first predicts future latent world states from the current latent state and ego action, and then refines the prediction against the ground-truth future latent state via cross-attention. The resulting future-aware latent serves as an explicit condition for a diffusion-based trajectory planner. During inference, DriveFuture conditions on the predicted future latent state instead of the ground-truth future state. DriveFuture achieves SOTA performance on the public NAVSIM benchmarks, reaching \textbf{55.5} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}, \textbf{89.9} EPDMS on NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, and \textbf{90.7} PDMS on NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}, respectively. These results suggest that the key to latent world modeling lies not merely in simulating future states, but more importantly in conditioning current decision-making on future states. Notably, as of April 2026, DriveFuture ranks \textbf{1st} on the \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2025/e2e-driving-navhard}{NAVSIM-v2 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navhard}}}} leaderboard and achieves SOTA performance on \href{https://huggingface.co/spaces/AGC2024-P/e2e-driving-navtest}{NAVSIM-v1 {\textcolor{blue}{\textit{navtest}}}}.

analysis.tldr: DriveFuture通过将未来潜状态显式条件化到当前决策中，实现规划导向的潜世界模型，在NAVSIM基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有潜世界模型将未来潜状态视为预测目标或辅助信号，而非直接条件化轨迹规划，导致当前与未来特征在潜空间中纠缠，限制了驾驶智能的前瞻性。
analysis.problem: 如何显式地将未来世界状态作为条件融入当前潜状态建模，以提升自动驾驶轨迹规划的远期感知能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DriveFuture框架：训练时先预测未来潜状态，再通过交叉注意力用真实未来潜状态精炼，得到未来感知潜状态作为扩散轨迹规划器的显式条件；推理时使用预测的未来潜状态。
contributions: 提出一种规划导向的未来感知潜世界建模方法，显式将未来状态条件化到当前决策。
在NAVSIM-v1和v2多个子集上取得SOTA结果，并在NAVSIM-v2 navhard排行榜上排名第一。
analysis.experiments: 在NAVSIM基准上评估，DriveFuture在NAVSIM-v2 navhard上EPDMS为55.5，NAVSIM-v2 navtest上EPDMS为89.9，NAVSIM-v1 navtest上PDMS为90.7，均达到SOTA。
limitations: 依赖未来潜状态预测的准确性，预测误差可能影响规划性能。
仅在仿真基准上验证，真实世界泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，在自动驾驶导航任务上取得SOTA，与机器人/自动化方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DriveFuture通过将未来潜状态显式条件化到当前决策中，实现规划导向的潜世界模型，在NAVSIM基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: A Real-Calibrated Synthetic-First Data Engine
papers.abstract: Modern computer vision systems increasingly encounter performance limitations in data-scarce domains, where collecting large-scale, high-quality labeled data is costly or impractical. While controllable diffusion models enable scalable synthetic image generation, directly applying synthetic augmentation often leads to unstable performance gains due to dataset-level quality issues and insufficient feedback mechanisms. In this work, we present a Real-Calibrated Synthetic-First Data Engine, a modular data engineering framework that combines controllable diffusion generation and multi-stage curation/filtering within a unified pipeline, with optional support for uncertainty-driven selection and human verification. Instead of introducing new generative algorithms, our approach focuses on systematic dataset construction for improving the practical reliability of synthetic augmentation in low-data regimes. The framework is implemented as a modular CLI-based pipeline, where generation, filtering, selection, and validation components can be independently configured and replaced. This design emphasizes reproducibility, flexibility, and practical deployment in real-world data workflows. Through empirical evaluation centered on human pose estimation, we show that synthetic data improves a real-data baseline when used as near-zero-human-annotation-cost augmentation alongside real anchors, while synthetic-only training remains substantially below real-only performance. Supplementary segmentation diagnostics show the same domain-gap pattern. These results highlight the practical value of data-centric orchestration for low-data augmentation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个模块化数据引擎，通过可控扩散生成与多阶段筛选提升低数据场景下合成增强的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在数据稀缺领域，收集大规模高质量标注数据成本高昂，现有合成增强方法因数据集质量问题和缺乏反馈机制导致性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地构建合成数据集，使其在低数据场景下作为增强手段时能稳定提升真实数据基线性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成数据增强可提升真实数据基线，但纯合成训练性能远低于纯真实训练，且存在领域差距。
analysis.method: 提出Real-Calibrated Synthetic-First Data Engine，一个模块化CLI管道，集成可控扩散生成、多阶段筛选/过滤、不确定性驱动选择和人工验证。
contributions: 提出一个模块化、可复现的数据工程框架，用于低数据场景下的合成增强。
通过人体姿态估计实验验证了合成数据作为近零标注成本增强的有效性，并揭示了领域差距模式。
analysis.experiments: 在人体姿态估计任务上评估，合成数据增强提升了真实数据基线，但纯合成训练性能仍远低于纯真实训练；补充分割诊断显示相同领域差距模式。
limitations: 仅在一个任务（人体姿态估计）上验证，泛化性未知。
合成数据与真实数据之间的领域差距问题未解决。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法系统性强但实验规模有限，适合关注数据增强的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个模块化数据引擎，通过可控扩散生成与多阶段筛选提升低数据场景下合成增强的可靠性。

papers.title: Ambig-DS: A Benchmark for Task-Framing Ambiguity in Data-Science Agents
papers.abstract: As data-science agents shift from co-pilots to auto-pilots, silent misframing becomes a critical failure mode. Agents quietly commit to plausible but unintended task framings, producing clean, executable artifacts that hide their incorrect assessment of the task. Existing benchmarks score whether the pipeline runs, ignoring whether the agent recognized the task was underspecified. We introduce Ambig-DS, two diagnostic suites: one for prediction-target ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Target, 51 tasks built on DSBench, a tabular modeling benchmark) and one for evaluation-objective ambiguity (Ambig-DS-Objective, 61 tasks built on MLE-bench, a Kaggle-style ML competition benchmark), constructed so that scoring uses each source benchmark's original evaluator. For every task we pair the original, fully specified version with an ambiguous variant produced by controlled edits; a human-and-LLM verification pipeline confirms each variant admits multiple plausible interpretations with decision-relevant consequences. The suites are analyzed independently and ambiguity lowers performance in both.
