Across five agents spanning efficient to frontier-class models, we find in our controlled diagnostic setting: (i) failures are silent commitments: wrong-target submissions on Target, wrong-metric or non-committal baseline submissions on Objective, rather than execution errors; (ii) allowing the agent to ask one clarifying question recovers much of the loss under idealized conditions, suggesting missing framing information drives a substantial part of the observed degradation; but (iii) agents cannot reliably tell when to use it: permissive prompts induce over-asking on clear tasks, while conservative prompts induce silent defaulting on ambiguous ones. Recognizing target and objective underspecification, not pipeline execution, is the bottleneck missing from standard DS-agent evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ambig-DS基准，揭示数据科学智能体在任务框架模糊时静默失败的关键瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据科学智能体基准只评估流水线是否运行成功，忽略了智能体是否识别任务描述不充分导致的错误框架，这种静默失败模式在实际应用中危害极大。
analysis.problem: 数据科学智能体在任务描述模糊时，会静默地采用看似合理但错误的解释，生成可执行的错误结果，而现有基准无法检测这种失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 模糊性导致性能下降，失败模式是静默承诺（错误目标/错误指标），而非执行错误；2) 允许提问可恢复大部分损失，但智能体无法可靠判断何时提问（过度提问或静默默认）。
analysis.method: 构建两个诊断套件（Ambig-DS-Target和Ambig-DS-Objective），基于DSBench和MLE-bench，为每个任务配对原始明确版本和模糊变体，并通过人机验证确保模糊性。
contributions: 提出Ambig-DS基准，专门评估数据科学智能体处理任务框架模糊性的能力。
通过实验揭示静默承诺是主要失败模式，且提问能力虽有效但智能体无法可靠使用。
analysis.experiments: 在五个从高效到前沿的智能体上进行实验，使用两个诊断套件，分析了模糊性对性能的影响及提问机制的效果。
limitations: 基准基于特定源基准（DSBench和MLE-bench），可能不覆盖所有数据科学任务类型。
提问实验在理想化条件下进行，实际部署中效果可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对数据科学智能体任务框架模糊性这一被忽视的失败模式，提出了系统性的诊断基准，实验设计合理，对智能体评估有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Ambig-DS基准，揭示数据科学智能体在任务框架模糊时静默失败的关键瓶颈。

papers.title: Discriminative Span as a Predictor of Synthetic Data Utility via Classifier Reconstruction
papers.abstract: In many real-world computer vision applications, including medical imaging and industrial inspection, binary classification tasks are characterized by a severe scarcity of positive samples. A widely adopted solution is to generate synthetic positive data using image-to-image transformations applied to negative samples. However, a fundamental challenge remains: how can we reliably assess whether such synthetic data will improve downstream model performance? In this work, we propose a geometry-driven metric that predicts the utility of synthetic data without requiring model training. Our approach operates in the embedding space of a pre-trained foundation model and represents the dataset through difference vectors between samples. We evaluate whether the weight vector of a linear classifier can be expressed within the subspace spanned by these variations by measuring the relative projection error. Intuitively, if the variations induced by synthetic data capture task-relevant directions, their span can approximate the classifier, resulting in low projection error. Conversely, poor synthetic data fails to span these directions, leading to higher error. Across multiple datasets and architectures, we show that this metric exhibits strong correlation with downstream classification performance of CNNs trained on mixtures of real negative and synthetic positive data. These findings suggest that the proposed metric serves as a practical and informative tool for evaluating synthetic data quality in data-scarce settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于分类器重构的判别跨度指标，无需训练即可预测合成数据对下游二分类任务的效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 在医学影像、工业检测等真实场景中，正样本极度稀缺，常用方法是通过图像到图像变换从负样本生成合成正样本，但缺乏可靠指标预测合成数据能否提升下游模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行模型训练的情况下，评估合成数据对下游二分类模型性能的效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成数据若捕捉到任务相关方向，其变化张成的子空间能近似线性分类器权重向量，投影误差低；反之则误差高。
analysis.method: 在预训练基础模型的嵌入空间中，用样本间差向量表示数据集，通过测量线性分类器权重向量在差向量张成子空间上的相对投影误差来预测合成数据效用。
contributions: 提出一种几何驱动的度量，无需训练即可预测合成数据对下游二分类任务的效用。
在多个数据集和架构上验证了该度量与下游分类性能的强相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和架构上，度量与使用混合数据训练的CNN的下游分类性能表现出强相关性。
limitations: 仅针对二分类任务，未扩展到多类或更复杂任务。
依赖预训练基础模型的嵌入空间，可能受模型选择影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，但实验细节有限，适合阅读摘要后决定是否深入。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于分类器重构的判别跨度指标，无需训练即可预测合成数据对下游二分类任务的效用。

papers.title: Do multimodal models imagine electric sheep?
papers.abstract: Yes. We find that large multimodal models develop mental imagery when solving spatial puzzles, and they do imagine sheep when solving sheep puzzles. We fine-tune a Qwen3.5 VLM to solve twelve diverse visual reasoning tasks -- including tangram, jigsaw, sokoban, 3D mental rotation, and rush hour -- that require understanding geometry, spatial relationships, and the consequences of actions. By supervising the model to predict the open-loop sequence of actions to solve a puzzle from an initial state, we show that the model's activations after each action encode meaningful visual information about the intermediate state. This finding suggests that an imperfect visual world model begins to form as a byproduct of learning to select correct actions, in the absence of any explicit visual supervision. Building on this observation, we propose two ways to sharpen and use the mental images formed by the model. We find that integrating as few as sixteen visual tokens per step into the chain of thought improves the average solve rate from 83% to 89%, with particularly strong gains on reasoning-heavy tasks such as jigsaw and 3D mental rotation.

analysis.tldr: 大视觉语言模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成内部视觉表征（心理意象），且注入少量视觉token可提升推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解多模态模型是否具备类似人类的心理意象能力，以及这种能力如何影响空间推理，有助于揭示模型内部工作机制并提升推理性能。
analysis.problem: 探究大视觉语言模型在解决空间谜题时是否形成内部视觉世界模型，并利用该模型提升推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在预测动作序列时，其激活编码了中间状态的视觉信息，表明在无显式视觉监督下形成了不完美的视觉世界模型。
analysis.method: 微调Qwen3.5 VLM在12种视觉推理任务上预测开环动作序列，分析中间激活的视觉信息，并提出在思维链中注入少量视觉token（每步16个）以锐化心理意象。
contributions: 发现多模态模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成内部视觉表征（心理意象）。
提出在思维链中注入少量视觉token的方法，将平均解决率从83%提升至89%，尤其在推理密集型任务上效果显著。
analysis.experiments: 在12种视觉推理任务（包括七巧板、拼图、推箱子、3D心理旋转、rush hour等）上微调Qwen3.5 VLM，评估解决率。
limitations: 仅针对特定VLM和任务集，泛化性未知。
心理意象的精确性和可解释性有待进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 发现VLM具有心理意象现象，方法简单有效，与VLM推理方向高度相关，但实验仅基于单一模型和任务集。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大视觉语言模型在解决空间谜题时会自发形成内部视觉表征（心理意象），且注入少量视觉token可提升推理性能。

papers.title: Unpredictability dissociates from structured control in language agents
papers.abstract: Unpredictable behavior is often taken as evidence of control, yet stochastic dispersion and structured action control need not coincide. This paper tests whether stochastic sampling can substitute for structured mechanisms that couple reasons, memory, self-state and inhibition to action selection in a language-agent implementation whose control components can be selectively disabled. In a seven-dataset baseline lesion matrix comprising 74,352 calls, the high-stochasticity comparator was more unpredictable than the structured-control variant in 7/7 datasets, whereas targeted reason and veto lesions reduced the expected structured-control profiles in 7/7 datasets each. In a matched-interface control spanning 26,946 generations, the structured agent maintained stronger action-field coupling than all stochastic, post-hoc, scrambled and verbosity controls across every dataset. The primary behavioral test removed free-form trace wording from the evaluation: 57,816 scored records showed the structured-control variant exceeding the high-stochasticity comparator or the reason/veto lesions in 7/7 datasets for all predefined behavioral components. Later open-weight runs extended the no-context controls to Qwen2.5 7B, 14B and 32B and to an independent Mistral-7B family across 20 task families and three agent scaffolds; no-fields, scrambled-context and distribution-matched controls failed to recover structured action control. A three-annotator blinded audit over 1,200 overlap items preserved high agreement. Strict entropy matching, strict token/compute matching and a formal counterfactual-flip stress test did not meet their gates and are treated as limitations. Stochastic unpredictability did not reproduce structured, action-coupled control in this implemented agent family.

analysis.tldr: 语言代理中随机不可预测性无法替代结构化控制机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究常将不可预测行为视为控制的证据，但随机分散与结构化动作控制可能并不一致，需要明确区分。
analysis.problem: 验证随机采样能否替代语言代理中耦合推理、记忆、自我状态和抑制的结构化控制机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高随机性变体在7/7数据集上比结构化控制变体更不可预测，但结构化代理在所有数据集上保持更强的动作-场耦合；随机性无法复现结构化动作控制。
analysis.method: 通过消融实验（禁用推理、否决等组件）和多种控制条件（随机、后处理、打乱、冗长）对比结构化代理与高随机性变体的行为。
contributions: 证明随机不可预测性与结构化动作控制是可分离的。
通过大规模消融和对照实验（74,352次调用、26,946次生成、57,816条记录）系统验证了结构化控制机制的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在7个数据集上进行了基线消融矩阵（74,352次调用）、匹配接口控制（26,946次生成）、主要行为测试（57,816条记录）以及扩展到Qwen2.5和Mistral-7B系列（20个任务族、3个代理框架），并进行了三标注者盲审（1,200项）。
limitations: 严格的熵匹配、token/计算匹配和反事实翻转压力测试未通过，被视为局限性。
结论仅适用于该实现的代理家族，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法系统、实验充分，对理解语言代理的控制机制有重要启示，但未通过部分压力测试。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言代理中随机不可预测性无法替代结构化控制机制。

papers.title: ConFixGS: Learning to Fix Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Confidence-Aware Diffusion Priors in Driving Scenes
papers.abstract: Feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) often struggles in trajectory-based sparse-view driving scenes. Existing Gaussian repair methods mainly target optimization-based 3DGS, while diffusion-based repair is typically restricted to iterative refinement near observed viewpoints, leaving feedforward 3DGS repair underexplored. We propose ConFixGS, a plug-and-play method that learns to fix feedforward 3DGS with confidence-aware diffusion priors. Starting from a pretrained feedforward model, ConFixGS generates diffusion-enhanced local pseudo-targets and validates them through reprojection-based cross-checking against support views. The resulting dense confidence maps guide refinement, enhancing reliable details while suppressing hallucinated or inconsistent evidence. On Waymo, nuScenes, and KITTI, ConFixGS improves challenging novel view synthesis, with PSNR gains of up to 3.68 dB and FID reduced by nearly half. Our results highlight confidence-aware fusion of generative priors and support-view consistency as a key principle for robust feedforward 3D driving scene reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: ConFixGS通过置信度感知的扩散先验修复前馈3D高斯泼溅，显著提升驾驶场景新视角合成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 前馈3DGS在轨迹稀疏的驾驶场景中表现不佳，现有修复方法多针对优化型3DGS或局限于观测视角附近的迭代细化，前馈3DGS修复问题尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用扩散先验和置信度感知机制修复前馈3DGS在稀疏视图驾驶场景中的重建缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前馈3DGS在轨迹稀疏的驾驶场景中常出现重建质量下降，扩散先验可增强细节但可能引入幻觉或不一致信息。
analysis.method: 提出ConFixGS，一种即插即用方法，利用预训练前馈模型生成扩散增强的局部伪目标，通过重投影交叉验证生成密集置信度图，指导细化过程，增强可靠细节并抑制幻觉。
contributions: 提出首个针对前馈3DGS的修复方法ConFixGS，利用置信度感知扩散先验。
设计重投影交叉验证机制生成密集置信度图，平衡生成先验与支持视图一致性。
在Waymo、nuScenes和KITTI上验证，PSNR提升高达3.68 dB，FID降低近一半。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo、nuScenes和KITTI数据集上进行新视角合成实验，PSNR提升高达3.68 dB，FID降低近一半。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练前馈模型的质量。
重投影交叉验证的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对前馈3DGS修复问题，实验效果显著，与VLM/3D视觉方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ConFixGS通过置信度感知的扩散先验修复前馈3D高斯泼溅，显著提升驾驶场景新视角合成质量。

papers.title: Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for Remote Sensing Single-Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Remote Sensing (RS) single-image super-resolution aims to reconstruct high-resolution imagery from low-resolution observations while preserving fine spatial structures. Recent Swin Transformer-based models, including Swin2SR, provide strong spatial context modeling throughshifted-window self-attention, but their feed-forward networks remain generic channel-mixing modules and do not separate low-frequency structural content from high-frequency residual detail. To address this limitation, we propose SFG-SwinSR, a Spatial-Frequency Gated Swin Transformer for single-image super-resolution in remote sensing. SFG-SwinSR modifies the original Swin2SR attention block by replacing each transformer block's standard feed-forward network with a lightweight Spatial-Frequency Gated Feed-Forward Network (SFG-FFN). The module estimates low-frequency content via a depthwise-blur branch, extracts high-frequency residuals by subtraction, refines them with a lightweight spatial branch, and adaptively injects detail through a bottleneck gate. Experiments on SpaceNet and SEN2VENμS show that SFG-SwinSR improves reconstruction quality under the evaluated settings. On SpaceNet, it achieves 45.19 dB PSNR and 0.9852 SSIM, indicating effective enhancement of high-frequency details. This demonstrates that spatial-frequency transformation within the transformer feed-forward network improves detail reconstruction in RS super-resolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出SFG-SwinSR，在Swin Transformer的前馈网络中引入空间-频率门控机制，提升遥感图像超分辨率的高频细节重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感单图像超分辨率需要从低分辨率观测中重建高分辨率图像并保留精细空间结构，现有Swin Transformer模型的前馈网络仅做通用通道混合，无法分离低频结构和高频细节，限制了细节重建质量。
analysis.problem: Swin Transformer前馈网络缺乏对低频结构和高频残差的分开处理，导致高频细节重建不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SFG-SwinSR，用轻量级空间-频率门控前馈网络（SFG-FFN）替换标准前馈网络，通过深度模糊分支估计低频内容、减法提取高频残差、轻量空间分支细化高频残差、瓶颈门控自适应注入细节。
contributions: 提出SFG-FFN模块，在Swin Transformer前馈网络中显式分离并增强高频细节。
在SpaceNet和SEN2VENμS数据集上验证了SFG-SwinSR的有效性，PSNR达45.19 dB，SSIM达0.9852。
analysis.experiments: 在SpaceNet和SEN2VENμS数据集上进行实验，SpaceNet上PSNR 45.19 dB，SSIM 0.9852。
limitations: 可能仅在遥感图像上验证，泛化性未知。
计算开销和推理速度未与基线详细比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新适中，实验在标准数据集上表现良好，但未提供与SOTA的全面对比。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SFG-SwinSR，在Swin Transformer的前馈网络中引入空间-频率门控机制，提升遥感图像超分辨率的高频细节重建。

papers.title: Learning Unified Representations of Normalcy for Time Series Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: The core challenge in unsupervised anomaly detection is identifying abnormal patterns without prior knowledge of their characteristics. While existing methods have addressed aspects of this problem, they often struggle to learn a robust representation of the normal data distribution that is distinct from anomalous patterns. In this paper, we present a novel framework, Unified Unsupervised Anomaly Detection ($\text{U}^2\text{AD}$), that comprehensively addresses anomaly detection in multivariate time series. Our approach learns the underlying data distribution of normal samples by utilizing score-based generative modeling. We introduce a novel time-dependent score network and a unified training objective that together delineate the manifold of normal data while considering both local and global temporal contexts. Reconstruction is then performed via a deterministic sampling process using an ordinary differential equation solver. Our extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that $\text{U}^2\text{AD}$ not only outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in detection accuracy but also identifies anomalies at significantly earlier stages of their occurrence.

analysis.tldr: 提出U²AD框架，利用基于分数的生成模型学习正常数据分布，实现时间序列异常检测的早期准确识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督异常检测的核心挑战是在没有异常先验知识的情况下识别异常模式，现有方法难以学习鲁棒的正常数据表示。
analysis.problem: 如何学习正常数据分布的鲁棒表示，以区分异常模式并实现早期检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出U²AD框架，使用基于分数的生成模型学习正常样本的数据分布，引入时间依赖分数网络和统一训练目标，通过ODE求解器进行确定性采样实现重构。
contributions: 提出U²AD框架，利用基于分数的生成模型学习正常数据分布。
引入时间依赖分数网络和统一训练目标，同时考虑局部和全局时间上下文。
在检测准确性和早期异常识别上超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，U²AD在检测准确性和早期异常识别上优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对高维时间序列计算开销较大。
依赖ODE求解器，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验表明性能优越，与时间序列异常检测方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出U²AD框架，利用基于分数的生成模型学习正常数据分布，实现时间序列异常检测的早期准确识别。

papers.title: MonitoringBench: Semi-Automated Red-Teaming for Agent Monitoring
papers.abstract: We introduce a red-teaming methodology that exposes harder-to-catch attacks for coding-agent monitors, suggesting that current practices may under-elicit attacks and overstate monitor performance. We identify three challenges with current red-teaming. First, mode collapse in attack generation, which we reduce with a novel attack taxonomy for broader coverage. Second, a conceive-execute gap: frontier LLMs can propose strong attack ideas or execute them, but not all at once. We mitigate this by decomposing attack construction into strategy generation, execution, and post-hoc trajectory refinement. Third, manual elicitation is costly to scale, which we address with our semi-automated red-teaming pipeline. Applied to BashArena, an AI control setting for tool-using coding agents, this pipeline produces MonitoringBench, a benchmark of 2,644 attack trajectories for evaluating monitor capabilities and failure modes. Our pipeline produces more diverse and stronger attacks: Opus-4.5 monitor's catch rate falls from 94.9\% on elicited-only Opus attacks to 60.3\% on our best refined attacks, with larger drops for several mid-tier monitors. Attacks optimized against three development monitors generalize to ten held-out monitors, with catch rates generally increasing with monitor capability. Using this benchmark, we provide a snapshot of the current monitor capabilities and find that frontier monitors often detect suspicious actions but fall for persuasion or fail to calibrate suspiciousness scores appropriately, suggesting tractable paths for improvement. MonitoringBench provides both a static benchmark for current tool-use monitors and a reusable methodology for refreshing these evaluations as agents and monitors improve.

analysis.tldr: 提出半自动化红队测试方法生成更难的攻击轨迹，揭示当前编码Agent监控器性能被高估。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前红队测试存在攻击模式坍缩、构思-执行差距和人工成本高的问题，导致监控器性能被高估，需要更系统的方法暴露其真实弱点。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成多样化且更强的攻击轨迹，以准确评估编码Agent监控器的能力与失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1) 攻击生成存在模式坍缩；2) 前沿LLM能提出攻击想法但难以同时执行；3) 人工红队成本高；4) 监控器常能检测可疑动作但易被说服或无法校准可疑度分数。
analysis.method: 半自动化红队流程：将攻击构建分解为策略生成、执行和事后轨迹精炼，结合攻击分类法扩大覆盖，生成多样化强攻击。
contributions: 提出半自动化红队流程，生成更丰富和更强的攻击轨迹，暴露监控器性能高估问题。
构建MonitoringBench基准（2,644条攻击轨迹），提供静态基准和可复用方法。
揭示前沿监控器检测可疑动作但易被说服或分数校准不足的失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在BashArena（AI控制环境）上评估，Opus-4.5监控器捕获率从94.9%降至60.3%，多个中端监控器下降更大；攻击可泛化到十个未见监控器。
limitations: 仅针对编码Agent监控器，可能不直接适用于其他类型Agent。
半自动化流程仍依赖LLM生成质量，可能遗漏某些攻击类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，实验充分揭示监控器弱点，对Agent安全评估有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出半自动化红队测试方法生成更难的攻击轨迹，揭示当前编码Agent监控器性能被高估。

papers.title: Forcing-KV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Autoregressive Video Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models adopt a streaming generation framework, enabling long-horizon video generation with real-time responsiveness, as exemplified by the Self Forcing training paradigm. However, existing AR video diffusion models still suffer from significant attention complexity and severe memory overhead due to the redundant key-value (KV) caches across historical frames, which limits scalability. In this paper, we tackle this challenge by introducing KV cache compression into autoregressive video diffusion. We observe that attention heads in mainstream AR diffusion models exhibit markedly distinct attention patterns and functional roles that remain stable across samples and denoising steps. Building on our empirical study of head-wise functional specialization, we divide the attention heads into two categories: static heads, which focus on transitions across autoregressive chunks and intra-frame fidelity, and dynamic heads, which govern inter-frame motion and consistency. We then propose Forcing-KV, a hybrid KV cache compression strategy that performs structured static pruning for static heads and dynamic pruning based on segment-wise similarity for dynamic heads. While maintaining output quality, our method achieves a generation speed of over 29 frames per second on a single NVIDIA H200 GPU along with 30% cache memory reduction, delivering up to 1.35x and 1.50x speedups on LongLive and Self Forcing at 480P resolution, and further scaling to 2.82x speedup at 1080P resolution. Code and demo videos are provided at https://zju-jiyicheng.github.io/Forcing-KV-Page.

analysis.tldr: 提出Forcing-KV混合KV缓存压缩策略，在自回归视频扩散模型中实现30%缓存减少和2.82倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型因历史帧的冗余KV缓存导致注意力复杂度和内存开销大，限制了可扩展性和实时生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何高效压缩自回归视频扩散模型中的KV缓存，以降低内存占用并加速生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到主流自回归扩散模型中注意力头表现出稳定的功能特化：静态头关注跨块转换和帧内保真度，动态头控制帧间运动和一致性。
analysis.method: 提出Forcing-KV混合压缩策略：对静态头进行结构化静态剪枝，对动态头基于段间相似性进行动态剪枝。
contributions: 首次将KV缓存压缩引入自回归视频扩散模型，并基于注意力头功能特化提出混合剪枝策略。
在保持输出质量的同时，实现30%缓存减少，在480P分辨率下获得1.35x-1.50x加速，在1080P下达2.82x加速。
analysis.experiments: 在LongLive和Self Forcing框架上评估，480P分辨率下速度超过29 FPS（单H200 GPU），并提供了代码和演示视频。
limitations: 方法依赖对注意力头功能特化的先验观察，可能不适用于所有架构。
动态剪枝的段间相似性计算可能引入额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 针对视频生成效率瓶颈提出创新压缩方法，实验充分且加速效果显著，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Forcing-KV混合KV缓存压缩策略，在自回归视频扩散模型中实现30%缓存减少和2.82倍加速。

papers.title: DeepTumorVQA: A Hierarchical 3D CT Benchmark for Stage-Wise Evaluation of Medical VLMs and Tool-Augmented Agents
papers.abstract: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) and AI agents have made significant progress in learning to analyze and reason about clinical images. However, existing medical visual question answering (VQA) benchmarks collapse model capabilities into a single accuracy score, obscuring where and why models fail. We propose DeepTumorVQA, a hierarchical benchmark that follows the multi-stage evidence chain in tumor diagnosis and decomposes 3D CT reasoning into four stages: recognition, measurement, visual reasoning, and medical reasoning. Higher-level questions remain independently scorable, while their ground-truth evidence chains are defined over lower-level primitives. The benchmark contains 476K questions across 42 clinical subtypes on 9,262 3D CT volumes. In addition to a direct reasoning mode for VLMs, DeepTumorVQA provides tool-interaction environments for agent evaluation, where a model can call external tools, including segmentation models, measurement programs, and medical knowledge modules, before answering the question. Evaluating over 30 model configurations, we find that reliable quantitative measurement is the primary bottleneck, making later-stage visual and medical reasoning harder for VLMs, while tool augmentation substantially mitigates this issue. When tools are available, leveraging medical knowledge and tools to reason about medical images becomes a new challenge. We further show that ground-truth step-by-step tool-use traces from DeepTumorVQA can supervise agents and reduce tool-use and reasoning failures. This stage-wise progression from recognition to measurement to visual and medical reasoning provides a concrete roadmap for future medical VLM and AI agent studies. All data and code are released at https://github.com/Schuture/DeepTumorVQA.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个分阶段评估医学VLM和AI智能体的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可缓解问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学VQA基准将模型能力压缩为单一准确率分数，无法揭示模型在何处及为何失败，缺乏对诊断推理链的细粒度评估。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个分阶段、可分解的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，以系统评估VLM和工具增强智能体在肿瘤诊断各环节的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可靠定量测量是主要瓶颈，使后期视觉和医学推理对VLM更困难；工具增强可显著缓解该问题；当工具可用时，利用医学知识和工具推理医学图像成为新挑战。
analysis.method: 提出DeepTumorVQA基准，将3D CT推理分解为识别、测量、视觉推理、医学推理四个阶段，包含476K问题，并提供工具交互环境用于智能体评估。
contributions: 提出一个分阶段、层次化的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，支持细粒度评估和证据链追踪。
通过大规模实验揭示定量测量是VLM的主要瓶颈，并验证工具增强的有效性。
提供真实工具使用轨迹用于监督智能体，减少工具使用和推理失败。
analysis.experiments: 在30多个模型配置上评估，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可缓解；摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对肿瘤诊断场景，可能不适用于其他医学领域。
工具增强依赖外部模块，可能引入额外复杂性和依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，分阶段评估有实际价值，实验充分，与医学VLM和AI智能体方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个分阶段评估医学VLM和AI智能体的3D CT肿瘤VQA基准，发现定量测量是主要瓶颈，工具增强可缓解问题。

papers.title: Absurd World: A Simple Yet Powerful Method to Absurdify the Real-world for Probing LLM Reasoning Capabilities
papers.abstract: While extremely powerful and versatile at various tasks, the thinking capabilities of large language models (LLMs) are often put under scrutiny as they sometimes fail to solve problems that humans can systematically solve. However, recent literature focuses on breaking LLM reasoning with increasingly complex problems, and whether an LLM is robust in simple logical reasoning remains underexplored. This paper proposes Absurd World, a benchmarking framework, to test LLMs against altered realism, where scenarios are logically coherent, and humans can easily solve the tasks. Absurd World breaks a real-world model into symbols, actions, sequences, and events, which are automatically altered to create absurd worlds where the logic to solve the tasks remains the same. It evaluates a large collection of models with simple and advanced prompting techniques, and proves that it is an effective tool to determine LLMs' ability to think logically, ignoring the patterns learned from the real world. One can use this framework to extensively test an LLM against a real-world problem to verify whether the LLM's reasoning capability is robust against variations of the task.

analysis.tldr: 提出Absurd World基准，通过改变现实世界场景的逻辑一致性来探测LLM的推理鲁棒性。

papers.title: VFM-SDM: A vision foundation model-based framework for training-free, marker-free, and calibration-free structural displacement measurement
papers.abstract: Reliable displacement measurement is fundamental for structural health monitoring and digital engineering workflows, as it provides direct structural response information. Vision-based measurement has emerged as a promising approach for low-cost, non-contact displacement monitoring. However, its deployment often remains constrained by task-specific model training or on-site preparation, such as marker installation or manual camera calibration. This study presents a Vision Foundation Model-based framework for Structural Displacement Measurement (VFM-SDM) that integrates VFM-inferred camera parameter estimation and point tracking to reconstruct multi-directional structural displacements via triangulation without task-specific training or on-site preparation, enabling efficient non-contact deployment in real-world applications. Structural geometry constraints are incorporated to suppress physically implausible deviations and improve estimation consistency. A multi-modal field dataset collected from an in-service pedestrian bridge is introduced alongside a unified benchmarking protocol to support reproducible evaluation. Representative results show low amplitude errors (NRMSE$_{\text{range}}$: 0.11/0.12), strong temporal agreement (correlation coefficient: 0.86/0.88), and small peak-to-peak amplitude errors (RPPAE: 0.01/0.02) for vertical and lateral displacements, indicating robust performance under real-world conditions. The proposed framework advances automated, scalable displacement monitoring and lays the groundwork for VFM-enabled structural response measurements in digital twin and data-centric construction workflows.

papers.title: ChaosNetBench: Benchmarking Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks on Chaotic Lattice Dynamics
papers.abstract: Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) are widely used for short-term forecasting in dynamic physical systems such as traffic and weather. However, the prevailing evaluation practice uses real world benchmark data sets in a single domain with a single fixed holdout splits, making it difficult to compare architectures across different dynamical regimes. We introduce ChaosNetBench (CNB), a synthetic benchmark dataset and evaluation framework for studying STGNN performance under controlled multidimensional chaotic dynamics. CNB is built on a lattice of coupled standard maps with independently tunable local chaos ($K$), coupling strength ($\varepsilon$), and system size ($N$), providing known topology and known dynamics across 96 system instances and 9{,}600 trajectories. We introduce chaos indicators, evaluation metrics and a protocol to analyze and compare the capacity of STGNN architectures to deal with different levels of local and global chaos. We illustrate the usage of the framework by analyzing 13 architectures (5 STGNNs and 8 non-graph baselines). The results reveal a regime dependent transition in which non-graph baselines (TCN, N-BEATS, iTransformer) remain competitive when there is low local chaos, while STGNNs (e.g., Graph WaveNet, D2STGNN, STAEformer) are generally more resilient to higher levels of local and global chaos. CNB provides a practical, reusable testbed for systematically comparing and analyzing the capacity of STGNN architectures to handle different levels of local and global chaos.

papers.title: CodeClinic: Evaluating Automation of Coding Skills for Clinical Reasoning Agents
papers.abstract: Clinical reasoning agents based on large language models (LLMs) aim to automate tasks such as intensive care unit (ICU) monitoring and patient state tracking from electronic health records (EHRs). Existing systems typically rely on manually curated clinical tools or skills for concepts such as sepsis detection and organ failure assessment. However, maintaining these tool libraries requires substantial expert effort, while zero-shot querying or code generation often produces inefficient and unreliable reasoning chains, especially under institution-specific clinical policies. We introduce CodeClinic, a benchmark built on MIMIC-IV for evaluating whether LLM agents can synthesize and compose reusable clinical skills instead of relying on fixed toolboxes. The benchmark contains two complementary tasks: longitudinal ICU surveillance and compositional information seeking. The longitudinal setting simulates monitoring patient trajectories with structured decisions every four hours across 25 findings and eight clinical families, while the compositional setting spans 63k instances across 259 tasks in nine domains and is stratified by compositional dependency depth to evaluate increasingly complex multi-step reasoning. We further propose an offline autoformalization pipeline that converts natural-language clinical guidelines into reusable and verified Python skill libraries through iterative LLM refinement. Compared with zero-shot code generation, the resulting libraries improve consistency while reducing per-query token usage by up to 40%.

papers.title: Towards Generative Predictive Display for Vision-Based Teleoperation: A Zero-Shot Benchmark of Off-the-Shelf Video Models
papers.abstract: Teleoperation systems are fundamentally limited by communication latency, which degrades situational awareness and control performance. Predictive display aims to mitigate this limitation by presenting an estimate of the current visual state rather than delayed observations. While recent advances in generative video models enable high-quality video synthesis, their suitability for latency-sensitive predictive display remains unclear. This paper presents a zero-shot benchmark of off-the-shelf generative video models for short-horizon predictive display, without task-specific fine-tuning. We formulate the problem as rollout-based future frame prediction and develop a unified benchmarking pipeline using simulated driving data from the CARLA simulator. Five publicly released video models spanning transformer-based and diffusion-based families are evaluated across two resolutions and two conditioning regimes (multi-frame and single-frame). Performance is assessed using prediction accuracy (mean absolute difference), per-rollout latency, peak GPU memory usage, and temporal error evolution across the prediction horizon. On this zero-shot benchmark, no tested model simultaneously achieves low rollout error, non-divergent per-step error behavior, and real-time inference at the source frame rate. Increasing model scale or resolution yields limited and, in some cases, inverted improvements. These findings highlight a gap between general-purpose generative video synthesis and the requirements of predictive display in teleoperation, suggesting that practical deployment will require either explicit short-horizon temporal supervision, in-domain adaptation, or aggressive inference optimization rather than direct application of off-the-shelf models. Code, configurations, and qualitative results are released on the project page: https://bimilab.github.io/paper-GenPD

analysis.tldr: 零样本测试表明，现有生成式视频模型在遥操作预测显示中无法同时满足低误差、非发散和实时推理的要求。

In this Paper, we also made a comparison to other neural network architectures (CNN`s). Have a look at the results and feel free to contact me for any questions. papers.title: Rethinking Evaluation of Multiple Sclerosis (MS) Lesion Segmentation Models
papers.abstract: Multiple Sclerosis (MS) is a chronic autoimmune disease that can significantly reduce the quality of life of a patient. Existing treatment options can only help slow down the progression of the disease. Therefore, early detection and precise monitoring of disease progression are important. Deep learning offers state-of-the-art models for detecting and segmenting MS lesions in brain MRI scans. However, most of these models are evaluated using the Dice score, without accounting for lesion-wise detection and segmentation performance or other metrics that quantify model performance in cases that are complex or confusing for human annotators, or in cases that are essential for disease detection and progression monitoring. In this paper, we highlight the need to rethink the evaluation of MS lesion segmentation models. In this context, we first present problem fingerprinting in detail to highlight what neurologists look for in brain MRI scans for MS detection and progression monitoring, and which metrics are required to properly quantify model performance in these contexts. Additionally, we present an analysis of state-of-the-art models on two open-source datasets using these metrics to highlight their usability for real-world deployment in hospitals.

analysis.tldr: MS病灶分割模型评估不应仅依赖Dice分数，需引入病灶级检测、分割及临床相关指标。

papers.title: Learning Multi-Indicator Weights for Data Selection: A Joint Task-Model Adaptation Framework with Efficient Proxies
papers.abstract: Data selection is a key component of efficient instruction tuning for large language models, as recent work has shown that data quality often matters more than data quantity. Accordingly, prior studies have introduced various multi-dimensional heuristics to evaluate and filter instruction data. However, most existing methods rely on static task-agnostic and model-agnostic weighting schemes, which overlook the varying requirements of specific downstream tasks and the differing pre-existing capabilities of models. In this paper, we propose a framework for learning multi-indicator weights that jointly adapts data selection to both the downstream task and the specific model. Our method identifies optimal weight configurations without full-scale fine-tuning by utilizing in-context learning (ICL) signals on compact tiny-validation sets. These signals serve as efficient performance proxies that ensure high-fidelity evaluation at minimal computational cost. Experiments across multiple benchmarks and model families, including Mistral, Qwen, and Llama, show that the approach achieves performance comparable to or exceeding full-dataset tuning while using only 30\% of the training samples on GSM8K. Furthermore, our analysis reveals a trade-off between semantic diversity and logical complexity in reasoning tasks, highlighting the necessity of joint task-model adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种联合任务-模型适应的多指标权重学习框架，通过上下文学习信号高效代理数据选择。
