papers.title: Causal Parametric Drift Simulation: A Digital Twin Framework for Classifier Robustness Evaluation
papers.abstract: Machine learning classifiers in dynamic environments face concept drift -- changes in the data-generating process that degrade performance. Conventional evaluation via static test sets or noise perturbations fails to preserve causal dependencies in tabular data, often producing causally invalid assessments. Post-hoc tools like SHAP and LIME offer correlational insights that may not reflect the causal mechanisms driving model failure. We propose a framework that complements existing drift detection by leveraging Structural Causal Models as "Digital Twins" of data-generating processes, enabling precise causal interventions while preserving structural dependencies. Our technique, Causal Parametric Drift Simulation, stress-tests classifiers to identify vulnerabilities before deployment. Experiments on the Open Sourcing Mental Illness (OSMH) dataset demonstrate that this approach exposes latent vulnerabilities invisible to standard statistical monitors.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果参数漂移模拟框架，利用结构因果模型作为数字孪生体，在保持因果依赖关系的同时对分类器进行压力测试，揭示标准方法无法发现的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态环境中分类器面临概念漂移，传统评估方法（静态测试集、噪声扰动）无法保持表格数据中的因果依赖关系，导致评估结果因果无效；事后解释工具（如SHAP、LIME）仅提供相关性洞察，无法反映驱动模型失败的因果机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能保持因果依赖关系、对分类器进行因果有效压力测试的评估框架，以在部署前识别其脆弱性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因果参数漂移模拟框架，利用结构因果模型作为数据生成过程的数字孪生体，通过精确的因果干预生成漂移数据，同时保持结构依赖关系，对分类器进行压力测试。
contributions: 提出一种基于结构因果模型的数字孪生框架，用于分类器鲁棒性评估。
开发因果参数漂移模拟技术，能够进行因果有效的压力测试，揭示标准统计监控无法发现的潜在脆弱性。
analysis.experiments: 在Open Sourcing Mental Illness (OSMH)数据集上进行了实验，结果表明该方法能暴露标准统计监控不可见的潜在脆弱性。
limitations: 依赖结构因果模型的准确构建，可能不适用于因果结构未知或复杂的场景。
实验仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，结合因果推断与数字孪生，但实验规模有限，推荐阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果参数漂移模拟框架，利用结构因果模型作为数字孪生体，在保持因果依赖关系的同时对分类器进行压力测试，揭示标准方法无法发现的脆弱性。

papers.title: BEA-GS: BEyond RAdiance Supervision in 3DGS for Precise Object Extraction
papers.abstract: Most Gaussian Splatting techniques that provide a 3D semantic representation of the scene do not optimize the underlying 3D geometry, making object-level editing or asset extraction challenging. Recent methods, such as COBGS, Trace3D, ObjectGS, acknowledge this limitation and propose approaches that modify the scene's geometry to represent the underlying semantics. We advance this concept further by proposing a novel solution that provides near perfect boundaries in object extraction. We do so by introducing two new losses in the optimization that take care of: 1) a loss that modifies the geometry of visible Gaussians to respect semantic boundaries, and 2) a loss that adjusts the geometry of non-visible Gaussians that appear once the object is extracted. Our first loss propagates gradients directly through the rasterization, allowing for seamless integration within the optimization of the Gaussian parameters. The second loss also propagates gradients to Gaussian parameters but does so without passing through the rasterization, enabling modification of the scene's geometry even when little transmittance reaches a Gaussian (partial or non-visible). Exhaustive comparisons with 12 state of the art methods across 4 datasets, using six metrics, demonstrate that our approach produces overall the best boundary segmentation to date.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种新损失优化3D高斯几何，实现近乎完美的物体提取边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅技术优化语义表示时忽略底层几何，导致物体级编辑或资产提取困难。
analysis.problem: 如何优化3D高斯场景的几何结构以精确提取物体边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入两个新损失：1) 可见高斯几何损失，通过光栅化传播梯度以尊重语义边界；2) 非可见高斯几何损失，不通过光栅化直接调整提取后出现的非可见高斯几何。
contributions: 提出两种新损失函数，分别优化可见和非可见高斯的几何以精确提取物体边界。
在4个数据集上与12种方法比较，使用6个指标，取得最佳边界分割效果。
analysis.experiments: 在4个数据集上与12种最先进方法比较，使用6个指标，结果表明方法整体上产生最佳边界分割。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量语义先验。
非可见高斯损失的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对3D场景编辑和资产提取有重要应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种新损失优化3D高斯几何，实现近乎完美的物体提取边界。

papers.title: MedMeta: A Benchmark for LLMs in Synthesizing Meta-Analysis Conclusion from Medical Studies
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have saturated standard medical benchmarks that test factual recall, yet their ability to perform higher-order reasoning, such as synthesizing evidence from multiple sources, remains critically under-explored. To address this gap, we introduce MedMeta, the first benchmark designed to evaluate an LLM's ability to generate conclusions from medical meta-analyses using only the abstracts of cited studies. MedMeta comprises 81 meta-analyses from PubMed (2018--2025) and evaluates models using two distinct workflows: a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Golden-RAG) setting with ground-truth abstracts, and a Parametric-only approach relying on internal knowledge. Our evaluation framework is validated by a well-structured analysis showing our LLM-as-a-judge protocol strongly aligns with human expert ratings, as evidenced by high Pearson's r correlation (0.81) and Bland-Altman analysis revealing negligible systematic bias, establishing it as a reliable proxy for scalable evaluation. Our findings underscore the critical importance of information grounding: the Golden-RAG workflow consistently and significantly outperforms the Parametric-only approach across models. In contrast, the benefits of domain-specific fine-tuning are marginal and largely neutralized when external material is provided. Furthermore, stress tests show that all models, regardless of architecture, fail to identify and reject negated evidence, highlighting a critical vulnerability in current RAG systems. Notably, even under ideal RAG conditions, current LLMs achieve only slightly above-average performance (~2.7/5.0). MedMeta provides a challenging new benchmark for evidence synthesis and demonstrates that for clinical applications, developing robust RAG systems is a more promising direction than model specialization alone.

analysis.tldr: 首个评估LLM从医学研究中综合元分析结论能力的基准MedMeta，发现检索增强生成（RAG）显著优于纯参数方法，但模型普遍无法识别否定证据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学基准主要测试事实回忆，缺乏对LLM进行高阶推理（如综合多源证据）的评估，而临床决策需要这种能力。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM从多个医学研究摘要中综合生成元分析结论的能力，并分析不同方法（RAG vs. 纯参数）和微调的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 信息基础（RAG）至关重要，Golden-RAG显著优于纯参数方法；2) 领域微调收益有限，在提供外部材料时几乎被抵消；3) 所有模型在压力测试中均无法识别和拒绝否定证据，暴露了RAG系统的关键漏洞；4) 即使在理想RAG条件下，模型得分仅略高于平均（~2.7/5.0）。
analysis.method: 构建MedMeta基准，包含81项来自PubMed的元分析，设计两种工作流：Golden-RAG（使用真实摘要）和纯参数方法（依赖内部知识），并使用LLM-as-a-judge协议进行评估，该协议与人类专家评分高度相关（Pearson r=0.81）。
contributions: 首次提出评估LLM综合医学元分析结论能力的基准MedMeta。
通过系统实验揭示RAG优于纯参数方法，但模型存在无法识别否定证据的漏洞。
analysis.experiments: 在81项元分析上评估多个LLM，使用Golden-RAG和纯参数两种设置，并通过LLM-as-a-judge协议与人类评分对比验证可靠性。摘要未提供具体模型名称或详细结果。
limitations: 基准仅包含81项元分析，规模有限。
仅使用摘要而非全文，可能遗漏关键细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个医学元分析综合基准，方法创新且实验揭示重要漏洞，但规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个评估LLM从医学研究中综合元分析结论能力的基准MedMeta，发现检索增强生成（RAG）显著优于纯参数方法，但模型普遍无法识别否定证据。

papers.title: RDEx-CASK: Cauchy Mutation, Archive, and Stagnation Kick for RDEx-CSOP
papers.abstract: We extend RDEx-CSOP with 3 changes that target stagnation & late-stage variance, plus minor parameter tuning. The second scale factor in the standard branch is sampled independently from a truncated Cauchy. A small feasible-only JADE-style archive (|A|_max = 50) is added & sampled with probability |A|/(|A|+|P|). Per-individual stagnation counter triggers, after 180 no-improvement generations, three local overrides on standard branch: pull toward the global best, lift the archive sampling floor to 0.65, & saturate CR to 0.95 when population success rate is below 0.10. The exploitation biased branch & every other RDEx component are left untouched. On CEC CSOP suite (D=30, 25 runs), RDEx-CASK is competitive with RDEx, UDE-III, & CL-SRDE in feasibility-aware quality & improves time-to-target on most problems.

analysis.tldr: 通过柯西变异、存档和停滞触发机制改进RDEx-CSOP，在CEC约束优化问题上达到竞争性性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 差分进化算法在约束优化中易陷入停滞和后期方差不足，现有RDEx-CSOP仍有改进空间。
analysis.problem: 提升RDEx-CSOP在约束优化问题上的收敛速度和求解质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在RDEx-CSOP中引入三项改进：标准分支的第二尺度因子独立采样自截断柯西分布；添加仅可行解的JADE风格存档（最大容量50），以概率|A|/(|A|+|P|)采样；个体停滞计数器触发后（180代无改进），对标准分支施加三种局部覆盖：拉向全局最优、提升存档采样下限至0.65、当种群成功率低于0.10时将CR饱和至0.95。
contributions: 提出RDEx-CASK算法，结合柯西变异、存档和停滞触发机制。
在CEC约束优化套件上验证了算法的竞争性，并改善了多数问题的时间-目标性能。
analysis.experiments: 在CEC CSOP套件（D=30，25次运行）上测试，与RDEx、UDE-III和CL-SRDE比较，在可行性感知质量上具有竞争力，并在多数问题上缩短了达到目标的时间。
limitations: 存档仅包含可行解，可能限制多样性。
停滞触发参数（180代）可能需针对不同问题调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.reason: 方法为增量改进，实验规模有限，但针对约束优化问题有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过柯西变异、存档和停滞触发机制改进RDEx-CSOP，在CEC约束优化问题上达到竞争性性能。

papers.title: Workspace Optimization: How to Train Your Agent
papers.abstract: Modern agents built on frontier language models often cannot adapt their weights. What, then, remains trainable? We argue it is the agent's \emph{workspace}, the structured external substrate it reads, writes, and tests; we call its evolution workspace optimization. Workspace optimization targets hard multi-turn environments where a frontier model has strong priors but cannot solve the task in a single shot, so the agent must learn through interaction. We propose a principled way to evolve the workspace, mirroring the structure of weight-space training: artifacts in place of parameters, evidence in place of data, counterexamples in place of losses, and textual feedback in place of gradients. We instantiate the idea in DreamTeam, a multi-agent harness for ARC-AGI-3 whose roles build an executable world model, plan, hypothesize, probe, strategize, and route failures. On the current 25-game ARC-AGI-3 public set under the official scoring protocol and averaged over two independent runs, DreamTeam improves the SOTA protocol-matched agent's score from 36% to 38.4%, while using 31% fewer environment actions per game.

analysis.tldr: 提出工作空间优化方法，通过演化外部结构化基板提升多轮环境中的智能体性能，DreamTeam在ARC-AGI-3上以更少动作超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿语言模型构建的智能体通常无法调整权重，限制了其在复杂多轮环境中的适应能力，亟需探索其他可训练组件。
analysis.problem: 如何在不调整模型权重的情况下，通过演化智能体的外部工作空间（workspace）来提升其在硬多轮环境中的任务解决能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出工作空间优化框架，将权重空间训练的结构映射到工作空间：工件对应参数、证据对应数据、反例对应损失、文本反馈对应梯度；并实例化为DreamTeam多智能体系统，包含构建可执行世界模型、规划、假设、探测、策略和路由失败等角色。
contributions: 提出工作空间优化概念，为不可调权重的智能体提供了一种新的学习范式。
实现DreamTeam系统，在ARC-AGI-3基准上以更少环境动作超越当前最佳协议匹配智能体。
analysis.experiments: 在ARC-AGI-3公开集上，使用官方评分协议，两次独立运行平均结果：DreamTeam将SOTA协议匹配智能体的得分从36%提升至38.4%，同时每局环境动作减少31%。
limitations: 方法仅在ARC-AGI-3单一基准上验证，泛化性未知。
工作空间演化可能依赖特定任务结构，迁移到其他领域需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验有提升但幅度有限，适合关注Agent训练范式的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出工作空间优化方法，通过演化外部结构化基板提升多轮环境中的智能体性能，DreamTeam在ARC-AGI-3上以更少动作超越SOTA。

papers.title: Attention Itself Could Retrieve.RetrieveVGGT: Training-Free Long Context Streaming 3D Reconstruction via Query-Key Similarity Retrieval
papers.abstract: Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT) advances 3D reconstruction via scalable Transformer architecture, but the quadratic complexity of global attention prevents long context application. StreamVGGT enables streaming with causal attention, yet its KV cache grows linearly with frames, causing memory overflow and quality degradation. We present RetrieveVGGT, a training-free framework, which formulates context construction for VGGT as a retrieval problem. By retrieving a fixed number of relevant frames at each step, VGGT maintains a controllable memory budget, which is close to its training context length. Interestingly, we find that the similarity between current frame queries and cached history frame keys at the first global attention layer of VGGT is already a strong indicator of relevance, eliminating the need for additional learned scoring. To enhance information diversity similar to a recommender system, we propose Segment Sampling so that the retrieval spans distinct relevant segments rather than a single high-similarity region. We design a pose-aware spatial memory mechanism that organizes history frames according to their already estimated camera poses, enabling location-aware retrieval. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RetrieveVGGT achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming StreamVGGT, TTT3R, and InfiniteVGGT while maintaining constant memory usage regardless of sequence length. Code is available at https://github.com/zzctmd/RetrieveVGGT.

analysis.tldr: 通过检索固定数量相关帧实现无训练的长上下文流式3D重建，内存恒定且性能SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: VGGT在3D重建中表现出色，但全局注意力的二次复杂度限制了长上下文应用；流式变体StreamVGGT的KV缓存随帧数线性增长，导致内存溢出和质量下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练的情况下，使VGGT支持长序列流式3D重建，同时保持恒定内存预算并避免质量退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现VGGT第一个全局注意力层中当前帧查询与历史帧键的相似度已能强指示相关性，无需额外学习评分。
analysis.method: 将上下文构建视为检索问题，每步检索固定数量相关帧；提出Segment Sampling增强多样性，以及基于相机姿态的空间记忆机制实现位置感知检索。
contributions: 提出训练无关的检索式框架RetrieveVGGT，实现恒定内存的长上下文流式3D重建。
发现注意力相似度可作为相关性指标，并设计Segment Sampling和姿态感知空间记忆机制提升检索质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，RetrieveVGGT优于StreamVGGT、TTT3R和InfiniteVGGT，且内存使用恒定。
limitations: 依赖VGGT预训练模型，可能不适用于其他架构。
检索策略基于第一层注意力，深层信息可能未被充分利用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，与3D视觉方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过检索固定数量相关帧实现无训练的长上下文流式3D重建，内存恒定且性能SOTA。

papers.title: Overcoming Catastrophic Forgetting in Visual Continual Learning with Reinforcement Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Recent studies suggest that Reinforcement Fine-Tuning (RFT) is inherently more resilient to catastrophic forgetting than Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). However, whether RFT (e.g., GRPO) can effectively overcome forgetting in challenging visual continual learning settings, such as class-incremental learning (CIL) and domain-incremental learning (DIL), remains an open problem. Through a pilot study, we confirm that while RFT consistently outperforms SFT, it still suffers from non-negligible forgetting. We empirically trace this bottleneck to Trajectory-level Drift Agnosticism: among candidate rollouts achieving identical task rewards, the KL divergence from the preceding-task policy varies substantially, which strongly correlates with catastrophic forgetting across sequential tasks. Motivated by this insight, we propose Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO), a simple yet effective RFT method that explicitly mitigates forgetting through trajectory-level reward shaping. Specifically, RaPO comprises two core components: (1) Retention Reward that converts trajectory-level distribution drift into a continuous reward signal, preferentially reinforcing knowledge-preserving rollouts within each group; (2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN), which maintains a persistent exponential moving average of reward statistics across task boundaries to stabilize the optimization progress during continual learning. Leveraging the free-form textual generalization of MLLMs, we comprehensively evaluate RaPO across five visual continual learning settings. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RaPO achieves leading performance, substantially reducing catastrophic forgetting while preserving strong plasticity. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents the first systematic exploration of RFT in visual continual learning, offering insights that we hope will inspire future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO)，通过轨迹级奖励塑形缓解视觉持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化微调（RFT）被认为比监督微调（SFT）更能抵抗灾难性遗忘，但在视觉持续学习（如类增量、域增量）中是否有效尚不清楚，且现有RFT仍存在不可忽视的遗忘问题。
analysis.problem: 解决RFT在视觉持续学习中因轨迹级漂移导致的灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现RFT中候选轨迹即使获得相同任务奖励，其与先前任务策略的KL散度差异显著，且该差异与遗忘强相关，称为“轨迹级漂移不可知性”。
analysis.method: 提出RaPO，包含两个组件：(1) Retention Reward，将轨迹级分布漂移转化为连续奖励信号，优先保留知识保持性轨迹；(2) Cross-Task Advantage Normalization (CTAN)，跨任务边界维护奖励统计的指数移动平均以稳定优化。
contributions: 首次系统探索RFT在视觉持续学习中的应用，并揭示轨迹级漂移不可知性是遗忘的关键瓶颈。
提出RaPO方法，通过奖励塑形有效缓解遗忘，在五个视觉持续学习设置中取得领先性能。
analysis.experiments: 在五个视觉持续学习设置上评估，使用多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的文本泛化能力，实验表明RaPO显著减少灾难性遗忘并保持强塑性。
limitations: 可能依赖MLLMs的文本泛化能力，在纯视觉任务中适用性待验证。
CTAN的超参数（如衰减率）可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对持续学习和RL交叉领域有重要启发。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Retention-aware Policy Optimization (RaPO)，通过轨迹级奖励塑形缓解视觉持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: XTinyU-Net: Training-Free U-Net Scaling via Initialization-Time Sensitivity
papers.abstract: While U-Net architectures remain the gold standard for medical image segmentation, their deployment in resource-constrained environments demands aggressive model compression. However, finding an optimally efficient configuration is computationally prohibitive, typically requiring exhaustive train-and-evaluate cycles to find the smallest model that maintains peak performance. In this paper, we introduce a training-free selection framework to automatically identify ultralightweight, dataset-specific U-Net configurations directly at initialization. We observe that systematically scaling down U-Net channel width induces a sharp transition from a stable performance plateau to representational capacity collapse. To pinpoint this boundary without training, we propose a Jacobian-based sensitivity metric that scores discrete, width-capped U-Net variants using a small set of unlabeled images. By analyzing the total variation of this sensitivity curve, we isolate the smallest stable configuration, which we denote as XTinyU-Net. Evaluated across six diverse medical datasets within the nnU-Net framework, XTinyU-Net achieves segmentation accuracy comparable to the heavy nnU-Net baseline with 400x-1600x fewer parameters, and outperforms contemporary lightweight architectures while utilizing 5x-72x fewer parameters. Code is publicly accessible on https://github.com/alvinkimbowa/nntinyunet.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的U-Net缩放框架，通过初始化时的Jacobian敏感性指标自动找到超轻量配置XTinyU-Net，参数减少400-1600倍仍保持高分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: U-Net在医学图像分割中表现优异，但部署到资源受限环境需要模型压缩，而传统方法需大量训练-评估循环来寻找最优小模型，计算成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下自动识别数据集特定的超轻量U-Net配置，使其在保持性能的同时极大减少参数量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 系统缩小U-Net通道宽度时，分割性能会从稳定平台区突然过渡到表征能力崩溃，存在一个清晰的边界。
analysis.method: 提出基于Jacobian的敏感性指标，使用少量无标签图像对离散宽度受限的U-Net变体评分，通过分析敏感性曲线的总变分定位最小稳定配置（XTinyU-Net）。
contributions: 提出无需训练的U-Net缩放框架，自动识别超轻量配置。
引入Jacobian敏感性指标，利用初始化时的信息预测模型性能边界。
在六个医学数据集上验证，XTinyU-Net参数减少400-1600倍，性能与nnU-Net基线相当。
analysis.experiments: 在六个不同医学数据集上使用nnU-Net框架评估，XTinyU-Net达到与重型nnU-Net基线相当的分割精度，参数减少400-1600倍，并优于其他轻量架构（参数少5-72倍）。
limitations: 方法仅针对U-Net架构的通道宽度缩放，未考虑深度或其它维度。
依赖少量无标签图像，可能对数据分布敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，对资源受限场景有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的U-Net缩放框架，通过初始化时的Jacobian敏感性指标自动找到超轻量配置XTinyU-Net，参数减少400-1600倍仍保持高分割精度。

papers.title: PDEAgent-Bench: A Multi-Metric, Multi-Library Benchmark for PDE Solver Generation
papers.abstract: PDE-to-solver code generation aims to automatically synthesize executable numerical solvers from partial differential equation (PDE) specifications. This task requires not only understanding the mathematical structure of PDEs, but also selecting appropriate discretization schemes and solver configurations, and correctly implementing the resulting formulations in finite-element method (FEM) libraries. Existing code generation benchmarks mainly evaluate syntactic correctness, or success on predefined test cases. To our knowledge, there is currently no publicly available benchmark specifically for PDE-to-solver code generation, and general-purpose code benchmarks do not fully capture the unique challenges of numerical PDE solution, such as ensuring solver accuracy, efficiency, and compatibility with professional FEM libraries. We introduce PDEAgent-Bench, to the best of our knowledge, the first multi-metric, multi-library benchmark for PDE-to-solver code generation. PDEAgent-Bench contains 645 instances across 6 mathematical categories and 11 PDE families, with common FEM libraries for DOLFINx, Firedrake, and deal.II. Each instance provides an agent-facing problem specification, a reference solution on a prescribed evaluation grid, and case-specific accuracy and runtime targets. PDEAgent-Bench adopts a staged evaluation framework in which generated solvers must sequentially pass executability, numerical accuracy, and computational efficiency checks. Experiments with representative LLMs and code agents show that models can often produce runnable code, but their pass rate drops substantially once accuracy and efficiency requirements are enforced. These results indicate that current agents remain limited in producing numerically reliable and efficient PDE solvers, and that PDEAgent-Bench provides a reproducible testbed grounded in the practical requirements of numerical PDE solving.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向 PDE 求解器代码生成的多指标、多库基准，揭示现有 LLM 在数值精度和效率上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码生成基准主要评估语法正确性或预定义测试用例，缺乏针对 PDE 求解器代码生成的专用基准，无法捕捉数值求解中的独特挑战（如精度、效率、与专业 FEM 库的兼容性）。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个多指标、多库的基准来系统评估 PDE 求解器代码生成的质量，包括可执行性、数值精度和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，现有 LLM 和代码智能体通常能生成可运行代码，但在精度和效率要求下通过率大幅下降，说明当前模型在生成数值可靠且高效的 PDE 求解器方面能力有限。
analysis.method: 构建包含 645 个实例、覆盖 6 个数学类别和 11 个 PDE 族、支持 DOLFINx/Firedrake/deal.II 三个 FEM 库的基准，采用分阶段评估框架（可执行性→数值精度→计算效率）。
contributions: 首个多指标、多库的 PDE 求解器代码生成基准 PDEAgent-Bench，包含 645 个实例和分阶段评估框架。
通过实验揭示当前 LLM 和代码智能体在数值精度和效率上的显著不足，为未来研究提供可复现的测试平台。
analysis.experiments: 使用代表性 LLM 和代码智能体进行实验，结果显示可运行代码通过率较高，但精度和效率要求下通过率大幅下降。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖三个 FEM 库，可能不全面。
未提供具体模型名称和通过率数值，细节有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个 PDE 求解器代码生成基准，具有明确创新性和应用价值，但实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向 PDE 求解器代码生成的多指标、多库基准，揭示现有 LLM 在数值精度和效率上的不足。

papers.title: DegBins: Degradation-Driven Binning for Depth Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Depth super-resolution (DSR) aims to recover a high-resolution (HR) depth map from its low-resolution (LR) counterpart. With color image guidance, this task is typically formulated as learning the residual between HR and LR in a low-dimensional feature space. However, this additive formulation is insufficient to accurately capture the complex relationship between HR and LR, especially under spatially varying degradations. In this paper, we introduce DegBins, a novel DSR framework that leverages degradation-driven binning to adaptively enhance residual modeling. Specifically, DegBins reformulates the regression-based DSR as a hybrid classification-regression problem, where the residual depth is represented as a linear combination of discrete depth bins weighted by their learned probability distribution, yielding more flexible and expressive representations. Furthermore, DegBins models the degradation relationship between HR and LR in a high-dimensional feature space, enabling adaptive bin range adjustment and probability optimization conditioned on local degradation characteristics. To progressively improve reconstruction quality, DegBins adopts a multi-stage refinement scheme, where each stage performs finer-grained bin partitioning and probability updating based on the former estimation. This coarse-to-fine design facilitates more accurate depth recovery, particularly in regions with severe degradations or complex structural variations. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks demonstrate that DegBins consistently outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in terms of accuracy, robustness, and generalization.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于退化驱动的分箱方法，将深度超分辨率重构为混合分类-回归问题，实现自适应残差建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度超分辨率方法通常将任务建模为低维特征空间中的残差学习，但加法公式难以准确捕捉HR与LR之间的复杂关系，尤其是在空间变化退化下表现不足。
analysis.problem: 如何更灵活、准确地建模深度超分辨率中HR与LR之间的残差，以应对空间变化的退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DegBins框架，将回归任务转化为混合分类-回归问题：用离散深度箱的线性组合表示残差，通过学习概率分布加权；在高维特征空间中建模退化关系，自适应调整箱范围和概率；采用多阶段细化方案，逐步进行更细粒度的箱划分和概率更新。
contributions: 提出退化驱动的分箱方法，将深度超分辨率重构为混合分类-回归问题，增强残差建模的灵活性和表达能力。
设计多阶段粗到细的细化方案，逐步提升重建质量，尤其在严重退化或复杂结构区域。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，结果表明DegBins在准确性、鲁棒性和泛化性上持续优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的颜色图像作为引导，在无颜色或颜色退化场景下性能未知。
多阶段细化可能增加计算开销，实时性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验充分，但属于特定视觉任务，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于退化驱动的分箱方法，将深度超分辨率重构为混合分类-回归问题，实现自适应残差建模。

papers.title: Adaptive DNN Partitioning and Offloading in Heterogeneous Edge-Cloud Continuum
papers.abstract: In recent years, the use of artificial intelligence on resource-constrained IoT devices has grown significantly. However, existing approaches to DNN partitioning and offloading across the edge-cloud continuum typically rely on static methods that ignore runtime dynamics. Furthermore, they are often evaluated in simulated environments rather than on real hardware. To address this gap, we propose a framework that dynamically splits neural network layers across the heterogeneous continuum. The framework profiles the model at startup, measures network link conditions between nodes, and periodically re-evaluates the partition to adapt to environmental changes. We created a physical testbed comprising a Raspberry Pi edge device, a laptop fog, and a high-performance desktop PC as the cloud. We evaluated the framework over three widely adopted convolutional neural networks: VGG16, AlexNet, and MobileNetV2. Our results show that the framework achieves reductions in energy and end-to-end latency of 27.09--35.82% and 6.34--22.92%, respectively, compared to a static partitioning baseline. These findings confirm the superiority of adaptive to static partitioning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应DNN分区与卸载框架，在异构边缘-云连续体中动态调整分区，实测能耗和延迟均优于静态方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DNN分区与卸载方法多采用静态策略，忽略运行时动态变化，且通常在模拟环境中评估，缺乏真实硬件验证。
analysis.problem: 如何在异构边缘-云连续体中实现自适应DNN分区与卸载，以应对运行时环境变化并降低能耗和延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态分区方法无法适应网络条件变化，导致性能次优；模拟环境评估可能无法反映真实硬件上的性能。
analysis.method: 框架在启动时对模型进行性能分析，测量节点间网络链路条件，并周期性地重新评估分区以动态调整。
contributions: 提出一种自适应DNN分区与卸载框架，能够动态调整分区以适应环境变化。
在包含树莓派、笔记本电脑和高性能PC的真实物理测试床上进行了评估，验证了框架的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在VGG16、AlexNet和MobileNetV2三个卷积神经网络上评估，与静态分区基线相比，能耗降低27.09-35.82%，端到端延迟降低6.34-22.92%。
limitations: 仅针对卷积神经网络进行了评估，未涉及其他类型模型。
测试床规模有限，可能无法完全代表大规模异构边缘-云环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有实际应用价值，但创新性中等，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自适应DNN分区与卸载框架，在异构边缘-云连续体中动态调整分区，实测能耗和延迟均优于静态方法。

papers.title: Any2Any 3D Diffusion Models with Knowledge Transfer: A Radiotherapy Planning Study
papers.abstract: Voxel-wise dose prediction is a critical yet challenging task in practical radiotherapy (RT) planning, as bespoke models trained from scratch often struggle to generalize across diverse clinical settings. Meanwhile, generative models trained on billion-scale datasets from vision domains have achieved impressive performance. Herein, we propose DiffKT3D, a unified Any2Any 3D diffusion framework that leverages prior knowledge from pretrained video diffusion models for efficient and clinically meaningful dose prediction. To enable flexible conditioning across multiple clinical modalities (CT, anatomical structures, body, beam settings, etc.), we introduce an Any2Any conditional paradigm utilizing modality-specific embeddings without cross-attention overhead. Further, we design a novel reinforcement learning (RL) post-training mechanism guided by a clinically-informed Scorecard explicitly tailored to institutional treatment preferences. Compared with winner of GDP-HMM challenge, DiffKT3D sets a new state-of-the-art in dose prediction by reducing voxel-level MAE from 2.07 to 1.93. In addition, DiffKT3D achieves superior image quality and preference match. These results demonstrate that transferring diffusion priors via modality-aware conditioning and clinically aligned RL post-training can provide a robust and generalizable solution for RT planning across various clinical scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiffKT3D，利用预训练视频扩散模型的知识迁移实现任意模态条件的3D剂量预测，结合RL后训练提升临床一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 放疗计划中体素级剂量预测任务关键但困难，从头训练的专用模型难以泛化到不同临床场景，而视觉领域的大规模生成模型性能优异，因此探索知识迁移方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练视频扩散模型的先验知识，实现高效、泛化且符合临床偏好的3D剂量预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DiffKT3D框架：1) 利用预训练视频扩散模型进行知识迁移；2) 设计Any2Any条件范式，通过模态特定嵌入实现多模态灵活条件控制，避免交叉注意力开销；3) 引入基于临床评分卡的强化学习后训练机制，对齐机构治疗偏好。
contributions: 提出首个统一Any2Any 3D扩散框架DiffKT3D，利用视频扩散先验进行剂量预测。
设计Any2Any条件范式，支持CT、解剖结构、射束设置等多种模态灵活条件输入。
提出基于临床评分卡的强化学习后训练方法，提升预测与临床偏好的匹配度。
analysis.experiments: 在放疗计划数据集上，与GDP-HMM挑战赛冠军相比，DiffKT3D将体素级MAE从2.07降至1.93，达到新SOTA，并取得更优的图像质量和偏好匹配。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床评分卡设计，迁移到其他机构需重新调整。
仅验证了剂量预测任务，泛化到其他3D医学图像任务需进一步实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（Any2Any条件+RL后训练），实验显示SOTA结果，与医学图像应用高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DiffKT3D，利用预训练视频扩散模型的知识迁移实现任意模态条件的3D剂量预测，结合RL后训练提升临床一致性。

papers.title: GSMap: 2D Gaussians for Online HD Mapping
papers.abstract: Accurate High-Definition (HD) map construction is critical for autonomous driving, yet existing methods face a fundamental trade-off: vectorization-based approaches preserve topology but struggle with geometric fidelity, while rasterization-based approaches enable precise geometric supervision but produce unstructured outputs. To bridge this gap, we propose GSMap, a novel framework that unifies both paradigms via a learnable 2D Gaussian representation. Each map element is modeled as an ordered sequence of 2D Gaussians, whose centers correspond to the vertices of the vectorized polyline/polygon. This formulation enables simultaneous optimization through: (1) Differentiable rasterization that enforces pixel-level geometric constraints, and (2) Topology-aware vectorization that maintains structural regularity. Experiments on both nuScenes and Argoverse2 demonstrate that our Gaussian-based representation effectively unifies geometric and topological learning, achieving significant performance improvements and demonstrating strong compatibility with existing HD mapping architectures. Code will be available at https://github.com/peakpang/GSMap

analysis.tldr: GSMap 通过可学习的 2D 高斯表示统一了矢量化与栅格化 HD 地图构建范式，在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 上取得显著性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 HD 地图构建方法在矢量化（保持拓扑但几何保真度差）与栅格化（几何监督精确但输出非结构化）之间存在根本性权衡，亟需一种能同时兼顾几何与拓扑的统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种表示方法，既能通过可微栅格化施加像素级几何约束，又能通过拓扑感知矢量化保持结构规整性，从而提升 HD 地图构建的精度与结构化程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GSMap 框架，将每个地图元素建模为有序的 2D 高斯序列，高斯中心对应矢量化折线/多边形的顶点；通过可微栅格化施加像素级几何约束，同时结合拓扑感知矢量化保持结构规整性，实现几何与拓扑的联合优化。
contributions: 提出一种基于 2D 高斯表示的统一框架，同时支持可微栅格化与拓扑感知矢量化，弥合了矢量化与栅格化 HD 地图构建的鸿沟。
在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上验证了方法的有效性，显著提升了性能，并展示了与现有 HD 地图架构的强兼容性。
analysis.experiments: 在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 数据集上进行了实验，结果表明基于高斯的表示有效统一了几何与拓扑学习，取得了显著性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑结构（如交叉路口）的建模能力有限。
2D 高斯序列的初始化与优化可能对超参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，统一了两种范式，实验验证有效，与自动驾驶强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GSMap 通过可学习的 2D 高斯表示统一了矢量化与栅格化 HD 地图构建范式，在 nuScenes 和 Argoverse2 上取得显著性能提升。

papers.title: Reflection Anchors for Propagation-Aware Visual Retention in Long-Chain Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves large vision--language models, but visual information often fades during generation, limiting long-horizon multimodal reasoning. Existing methods either re-inject vision at inference or train policies for stronger grounding, but where to intervene relies on perception heuristics rather than principled gain analysis, and how local visual influence propagates remains implicit. We study this problem from an information-theoretic standpoint and derive a lower bound on the downstream visual gain of a one-step intervention, which suggests two factors: local branching room (token entropy) and downstream visual propagation potential (suffix divergence from a vision-marginalized reference). Guided by this analysis, we propose reflection-anchor policy optimization (RAPO), a GRPO-based policy optimization method that selects high-entropy reflection anchors and optimizes a chain-masked finite-window KL surrogate for downstream visual dependence. Experiments on reasoning-intensive and general-domain benchmarks show that RAPO delivers substantial gains over strong baselines across multiple LVLM backbones. Mechanism analyses further indicate that reflection anchors are enriched for visually sensitive decision points and that RAPO increases contrastive visual-dependence signals along generated trajectories.

analysis.tldr: 提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），通过信息论分析指导视觉信息保持，提升长链多模态推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长链思维推理中视觉信息逐渐衰减，现有方法依赖启发式干预，缺乏理论指导，且局部视觉影响传播机制不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何从信息论角度确定最佳干预位置并优化视觉依赖传播，以缓解长链多模态推理中的视觉信息衰减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉信息在长链生成中逐渐衰减；现有干预方法基于感知启发式而非增益分析；局部视觉影响传播隐式。
analysis.method: 基于信息论推导单步干预下游视觉增益下界，提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），利用GRPO选择高熵反射锚点并优化链式掩码有限窗口KL散度以增强下游视觉依赖。
contributions: 从信息论角度推导了单步干预下游视觉增益的下界，揭示局部分支空间和下游视觉传播潜力两个关键因素。
提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），通过选择高熵反射锚点和链式掩码KL散度优化，显著提升长链多模态推理的视觉保持能力。
analysis.experiments: 在推理密集型与通用域基准上，RAPO在多个LVLM骨干上相比强基线取得显著提升；机制分析表明反射锚点富集于视觉敏感决策点，RAPO增加生成轨迹中的对比视觉依赖信号。
limitations: 方法依赖GRPO框架，可能不适用于非策略优化场景。
理论下界推导基于特定假设，实际增益可能受模型架构影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析扎实，实验充分，与多模态推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出反射锚点策略优化（RAPO），通过信息论分析指导视觉信息保持，提升长链多模态推理性能。

papers.title: SABER: A Scalable Action-Based Embodied Dataset for Real-World VLA Adaptation
papers.abstract: Robotic deployment in real-world environments depends on rich, domain-specific action data as much as on strong model architecture. General-purpose robot foundation models show modest performance in complex unseen tasks such as manipulation in a retail domain when applied out of the box. The root cause is a data gap: retail environments are structurally absent from general robot pretraining distributions, and the path to filling that gap through teleoperation is prohibitively expensive, logistically constrained, and difficult to scale. We introduce SABER, a high-fidelity retail robotics action dataset built from over 100 hours of natural in-store capture across multiple real grocery environments. Egocentric footage from head-mounted cameras records fine-grained hand activity at the point of interaction, while exocentric 360-degree scene footage from DreamVu's ALIA camera simultaneously observes all actors and activities across the entire space. This combination yields a uniquely complete picture of human retail behavior: dexterous hand activity, whole-body motion, and scene dynamics, all captured without staging, scripting, or teleoperation overhead. The SABER corpus contains 44.8K training samples across three action representation streams: 25K latent action sequences via LAPA-style encoding, 18.6K dexterous hand-pose trajectories retargeted to robot joint space, and 1.2K whole-body synchronized motion sequences retargeted to a humanoid embodiment. When applied to GR00T N1.6 via a shared-backbone multi-task post-training recipe, SABER yields a mean success rate of 29.3% across ten retail manipulation tasks -- more than 2.19x over fine-tuning baselines (13.4%). SABER demonstrates that the path to capable retail robots runs through better data, which can be collected today, at scale, without a robot in the loop. The dataset and code are available at https://dreamvu.ai/saber

analysis.tldr: SABER 是一个大规模零售机器人动作数据集，通过自然场景采集填补数据空白，显著提升 VLA 模型在零售操作任务中的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 零售环境在通用机器人预训练数据中缺失，而通过遥操作填补该数据缺口成本高昂、受限于物流且难以扩展，导致通用机器人基础模型在零售操作等复杂未见任务中表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、可扩展地获取零售领域的高保真动作数据，以支持视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在真实世界中的适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用机器人基础模型在零售操作任务中开箱即用时性能有限（摘要未提供具体失败模式，但指出根本原因是数据缺口）。
analysis.method: 通过头戴相机采集第一人称视角的精细手部活动，同时利用 360 度场景相机记录全局行为，无需脚本或遥操作，构建包含潜在动作序列、灵巧手轨迹和全身运动序列的多流动作数据集 SABER。
contributions: 提出 SABER，一个基于自然零售场景采集的高保真动作数据集，包含 44.8K 训练样本和三种动作表示流。
通过共享骨干多任务后训练方法，在 GR00T N1.6 模型上实现 29.3% 的平均成功率，是微调基线（13.4%）的 2.19 倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在 GR00T N1.6 模型上使用共享骨干多任务后训练方法，在十个零售操作任务上评估，平均成功率为 29.3%，相比微调基线（13.4%）提升 2.19 倍以上。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖零售领域，泛化到其他领域需进一步验证。
动作表示流依赖特定编码和重定向方法，可能引入误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 数据集构建方法新颖且实用，实验效果显著，与 VLA 方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SABER 是一个大规模零售机器人动作数据集，通过自然场景采集填补数据空白，显著提升 VLA 模型在零售操作任务中的性能。

papers.title: SmartEval: A Benchmark for Evaluating LLM-Generated Smart Contracts from Natural Language Specifications
papers.abstract: We introduce SmartEval, a benchmark for systematically evaluating the quality of Solidity smart contracts generated by large language models (LLMs) from natural language specifications. SmartEval provides a corpus of 9,000 generated contracts paired with expert-written ground-truth implementations drawn from the FSMSCG dataset, a five-dimensional evaluation rubric covering functional completeness, variable fidelity, state-machine correctness, business-logic fidelity, and code quality, and a reproducible generation-and-evaluation pipeline. To validate the benchmark's reliability, we conduct three independent empirical studies: a five-condition ablation study (N=300 per condition) isolating the contribution of each pipeline component, a human expert evaluation by three Columbia University PhD researchers confirming automated scores align with expert judgment to within 0.34 points, and external security analysis via the Slither static analyzer confirming 79.4% agreement between the LLM auditor and a non-LLM rule-based tool. Systematic analysis of 9,000 generated contracts reveals characteristic failure modes (logic omissions at 35.3%, state transition errors at 23.4%, and complexity-driven degradation) and quantifies a +8.29 composite-score advantage of generated contracts over ground-truth implementations, attributable to LLMs' literal specification-following behavior. SmartEval establishes a reproducible, validated foundation for empirical research on LLM smart contract synthesis quality, with all data, evaluation code, and generated contracts publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出SmartEval基准，系统评估LLM从自然语言生成Solidity智能合约的质量，包含9000个合约、五维评估标准和验证实验。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的智能合约质量缺乏系统评估基准，现有方法难以全面衡量功能正确性、状态机一致性等关键维度。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可靠、可复现的基准来评估LLM从自然语言规范生成Solidity智能合约的质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析9000个合约发现典型失败模式：逻辑遗漏（35.3%）、状态转换错误（23.4%）和复杂度导致的退化；LLM生成的合约在复合评分上比真实实现高8.29分，归因于字面遵循规范的行为。
analysis.method: 基于FSMSCG数据集构建9000个生成合约与专家真实实现配对，设计五维评估标准（功能完整性、变量保真度、状态机正确性、业务逻辑保真度、代码质量），并提供可复现的生成与评估流水线。
contributions: 提出SmartEval基准，包含9000个合约、五维评估标准和可复现流水线
通过消融实验、专家评估和外部安全分析验证基准可靠性
揭示LLM生成合约的典型失败模式和性能优势
analysis.experiments: 进行了三项实证研究：五条件消融实验（每条件N=300）、三位哥伦比亚大学博士研究员的专家评估（自动评分与专家判断差异在0.34分内）、Slither静态分析器验证（LLM审计与非LLM规则工具一致率79.4%）。
limitations: 仅针对Solidity语言，可能不适用于其他智能合约语言
评估依赖FSMSCG数据集，可能覆盖有限的应用场景
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准系统评估LLM生成智能合约质量，方法创新且实验充分，对代码生成领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SmartEval基准，系统评估LLM从自然语言生成Solidity智能合约的质量，包含9000个合约、五维评估标准和验证实验。

papers.title: On the Generation and Mitigation of Harmful Geometry in Image-to-3D Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in image-to-3D models have significantly improved the fidelity and accessibility of 3D content creation. Such a powerful reconstruction capability that enables creative design can also be misused by the adversary to generate harmful geometries, which can be further fabricated via 3D printers and pose real-world risks. However, such risks are largely underexplored: it remains unclear how well current image-to-3D models can produce these harmful geometries, and whether existing safeguards can reliably prevent such generation. To fill this gap, we conduct a systematic measurement study of harmful geometry generation and mitigation. We first describe this risk through three kinds of unsafe categories: direct-use physical hazards, risky templates or components, and deceptive replicas. Each category is instantiated with representative objects. We evaluate both open-source and commercial image-to-3D models under original, degraded, viewpoint-shifted, and semantically camouflaged inputs. We consider different evaluation metrics, including geometric validity, multi-view VLM-based semantic scoring, targeted human validation, and controlled physical fabrication. The results reveal a concerning reality that current image-to-3D models can effectively reconstruct the harmful geometries, while fewer than 0.3% of such geometries trigger commercial moderation flags. As a first step toward mitigation, we evaluate three representative safeguard families, including input moderation, model-level benign alignment, and output-level filtering. We find that existing safeguards have distinct weaknesses. We further develop a stacked defense that can reduce harmful retention to <1%, but still at 11% overall false-positive cost. Taken together, our findings demonstrate that the risk in current system and encourage better geometry-aware safeguards for moderation.

analysis.tldr: 图像转3D模型能生成有害几何体，现有防护措施几乎无效，需开发几何感知的安全机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 图像转3D模型在提升3D内容创作质量的同时，可能被滥用于生成有害几何体（如武器、危险工具），并通过3D打印造成现实风险，但当前对此风险缺乏系统评估和有效防护。
analysis.problem: 系统测量图像转3D模型生成有害几何体的能力，并评估现有安全防护措施的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前图像转3D模型能有效重建有害几何体，但仅有不到0.3%的有害几何体触发商业审核标记；现有防护措施（输入审核、模型级对齐、输出过滤）各有明显弱点。
analysis.method: 提出三类有害几何体（直接物理危害、风险模板/组件、欺骗性复制品），在开源和商业模型上测试原始、退化、视角偏移、语义伪装输入，使用几何有效性、多视角VLM语义评分、人工验证和物理制造评估，并开发堆叠防御策略。
contributions: 首次系统测量图像转3D模型生成有害几何体的风险，定义三类不安全类别。
揭示现有商业审核机制几乎无法检测有害几何体（触发率<0.3%）。
评估三类防护措施并开发堆叠防御，将有害保留率降至<1%，但假阳性成本为11%。
analysis.experiments: 在开源和商业图像转3D模型上，使用原始、退化、视角偏移、语义伪装输入，评估几何有效性、多视角VLM语义评分、人工验证和物理制造。
limitations: 堆叠防御的假阳性成本较高（11%），可能影响正常使用。
仅评估有限类别和模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 系统评估了图像转3D模型的安全风险，方法新颖且具有实际意义，但防御方案假阳性较高。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 图像转3D模型能生成有害几何体，现有防护措施几乎无效，需开发几何感知的安全机制。

papers.title: DAP: Doppler-aware Point Network for Heterogeneous mmWave Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar provides privacy-preserving sensing and is valuable for human action recognition (HAR). Existing mmWave point cloud datasets are limited in scale and mostly collected under homogeneous single-source settings, preventing current methods from handling real-world distribution shifts caused by heterogeneous radar sources, such as different devices and frequency bands. To address this, we introduce UniMM-HAR, the largest and first mmWave point cloud HAR dataset for heterogeneous multi-source scenarios, standardizing three distinct radar configurations to realistically evaluate cross-source generalization. We further propose the Doppler-aware Point Cloud Network (DAP-Net) to tackle heterogeneity challenges. DAP-Net enhances intra-modal representations and performs cross-modal alignment to learn source-invariant action semantics. Leveraging action-consistent spatio-temporal Doppler patterns as anchors, the Dual-space Doppler Reparameterization (D2R) module performs sample-adaptive geometric densification and Doppler-guided feature recalibration, while the Text Alignment Module (TAM) provides stable semantic anchors via a pretrained textual space. Experiments show that DAP-Net significantly outperforms existing methods under heterogeneous radar settings, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy and strong cross-source robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个异构毫米波点云动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR和Doppler感知点云网络DAP-Net，通过多普勒重参数化和文本对齐实现跨源鲁棒动作识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 毫米波雷达在隐私保护动作识别中有价值，但现有数据集规模小且多为同构单源设置，无法应对异构雷达源（不同设备、频段）导致的分布偏移，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 异构毫米波雷达源（不同设备、频段）引起的点云分布偏移导致动作识别性能下降，需要跨源泛化的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Doppler感知点云网络（DAP-Net），包含双空间多普勒重参数化（D2R）模块进行样本自适应几何致密化和多普勒引导特征重校准，以及文本对齐模块（TAM）利用预训练文本空间提供稳定语义锚点，实现跨模态对齐和源不变动作语义学习。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模异构多源毫米波点云动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR，标准化三种雷达配置以评估跨源泛化。
提出DAP-Net，利用多普勒模式作为锚点进行跨模态对齐和特征重校准，显著提升异构设置下的动作识别鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在UniMM-HAR数据集上实验，DAP-Net在异构雷达设置下显著优于现有方法，达到最先进准确率和强跨源鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定雷达配置，泛化到更多未知源需验证。
文本对齐模块依赖预训练空间，可能受限于文本语义覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 提出新数据集和网络，方法有创新性，但应用领域较专，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个异构毫米波点云动作识别数据集UniMM-HAR和Doppler感知点云网络DAP-Net，通过多普勒重参数化和文本对齐实现跨源鲁棒动作识别。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Guided Dual-Domain Learning for Reliable Skin Lesion Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate skin lesion segmentation is vital for dermoscopic Computer-Aided Diagnosis. However, visual ambiguity and morphological irregularity often defeat spatial modeling, necessitating multi-domain architectures. Existing paradigms frequently overlook the active use of prediction uncertainty, leading to deterministic frameworks that suffer from blind cross-domain fusion and overfit to label noise. To address these issues, we propose the Uncertainty-Guided Dual-Domain Network (UGDD-Net). UGDD-Net introduces a novel "Glance-and-Gaze" mechanism to transform uncertainty into an active guiding signal. Specifically, the Uncertainty-Guided Bi-directional Feature Fusion (UGBFF) module uses pixel-level uncertainty to modulate spatial-spectral interactions. The Uncertainty-Guided Graph Refinement (UGGR) module constructs a topology-aware graph to propagate reliable semantic consensus and refine uncertain nodes. Finally, the Uncertainty-Guided Margin-Adaptive Loss (UGML) enforces strict constraints on confident pixels while relaxing penalties on uncertain ones to improve statistical calibration. Extensive experiments on ISIC2017, ISIC2018, PH2, and HAM10000 datasets demonstrate that UGDD-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially on "Hard Samples". Our uncertainty maps align with expert inter-observer variability, providing robust interpretability for human-machine collaborative diagnosis.

analysis.tldr: 提出不确定性引导的双域网络UGDD-Net，通过Glance-and-Gaze机制将预测不确定性转化为主动引导信号，提升皮肤病变分割的可靠性与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 皮肤病变分割中视觉模糊和形态不规则导致空间建模困难，现有方法忽视预测不确定性，导致确定性框架易过拟合标签噪声且跨域融合盲目。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预测不确定性主动引导双域特征融合与图细化，实现可靠且可解释的皮肤病变分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UGDD-Net，包含三个核心模块：不确定性引导双向特征融合（UGBFF）利用像素级不确定性调制空间-光谱交互；不确定性引导图细化（UGGR）构建拓扑感知图传播可靠语义并细化不确定节点；不确定性引导边缘自适应损失（UGML）对置信像素严格约束而对不确定像素放松惩罚。
contributions: 提出不确定性引导的双域学习框架UGDD-Net，首次将预测不确定性作为主动引导信号用于皮肤病变分割。
设计UGBFF、UGGR和UGML三个模块，分别实现不确定性引导的特征融合、图细化和损失校准。
在四个公开数据集上达到SOTA，尤其在困难样本上表现优异，不确定性图与专家观察者间变异性一致。
analysis.experiments: 在ISIC2017、ISIC2018、PH2和HAM10000数据集上实验，达到SOTA性能，尤其在困难样本上表现突出，不确定性图与专家观察者间变异性一致。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量不确定性估计，在噪声较大时效果受限。
图细化模块的计算复杂度可能较高，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且结果SOTA，与医学图像分割方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出不确定性引导的双域网络UGDD-Net，通过Glance-and-Gaze机制将预测不确定性转化为主动引导信号，提升皮肤病变分割的可靠性与可解释性。

papers.title: SoccerLens: Grounded Soccer Video Understanding Beyond Accuracy
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have recently shown strong potential in soccer video understanding. However, given the high complexity of soccer videos due to large viewpoint variations, rapid shot transitions, and cluttered scenes, it remains unclear on whether VLMs rely on meaningful visual evidence or exploit spurious correlations and shortcut learning. Existing evaluation protocols focus primarily on classification accuracy and do not assess visual grounding. To address this limitation, we introduce SoccerLens, a benchmark for grounded soccer video understanding. The benchmark contains annotated video segments spanning $13$ common soccer events, with structured visual cues organized into three levels of semantic relevance. We further extend the attribution method of Chefer [arXiv:2103.15679] to jointly model spatial and temporal attention, and introduce evaluation metrics that measure whether model attention aligns with annotated cues or drifts toward spurious regions. Our evaluation of state-of-the-art soccer VLMs shows that, despite strong classification accuracy, current models fail to exceed $50\%$ grounding performance even under the loosest cue definitions and consistently underutilize temporal information. These results reveal a substantial gap between predictive performance and true visual grounding, highlighting the need for grounded evaluation in complex spatio-temporal domains such as soccer.

analysis.tldr: SoccerLens 基准揭示现有足球视频 VLM 在分类准确率高但视觉定位能力弱，存在虚假关联问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 足球视频因视角变化大、镜头切换快、场景杂乱，VLM 可能依赖虚假关联而非有意义视觉证据，现有评估只关注分类准确率，缺乏对视觉定位的评估。
analysis.problem: 现有足球视频理解评估协议仅关注分类准确率，无法衡量模型是否真正基于视觉证据进行推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前最先进的足球 VLM 在分类准确率上表现良好，但定位性能在最宽松的线索定义下也不超过 50%，且一致性地未充分利用时间信息，表明预测性能与真实视觉定位之间存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 构建 SoccerLens 基准，包含 13 种常见足球事件的带注释视频片段，提供三级语义相关性的结构化视觉线索；扩展 Chefer 的归因方法以联合建模空间和时间注意力，并引入评估指标衡量模型注意力是否与注释线索对齐。
contributions: 提出 SoccerLens 基准，用于评估足球视频理解的视觉定位能力。
扩展归因方法以联合建模空间和时间注意力，并引入新的评估指标。
实验揭示当前足球 VLM 在分类准确率高但定位性能差，存在虚假关联问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明评估了最先进的足球 VLM，定位性能不超过 50%。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 13 种事件，可能无法代表所有足球场景。
归因方法扩展可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出针对足球视频定位的基准和评估方法，揭示重要问题，但方法增量有限，实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SoccerLens 基准揭示现有足球视频 VLM 在分类准确率高但视觉定位能力弱，存在虚假关联问题。

papers.title: From Pixels to Concepts: Do Segmentation Models Understand What They Segment?
papers.abstract: Segmentation is a fundamental vision task underlying numerous downstream applications. Recent promptable segmentation models, such as Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3), extend segmentation from category-agnostic mask prediction to concept-guided localization conditioned on high-level textual prompts. However, existing benchmarks primarily evaluate mask accuracy or object presence, leaving unclear whether these models faithfully ground the queried concept or instead rely on visually salient but semantically misleading cues. We introduce CAFE: \textbf{C}ounterfactual \textbf{A}ttribute \textbf{F}actuality \textbf{E}valuation, a novel benchmark for evaluating concept-faithful segmentation in promptable segmentation models. Our \textbf{CAFE} is built on attribute-level counterfactual manipulation: the target region and ground-truth mask are preserved, while attributes such as surface appearance, context, or material composition are modified to introduce misleading semantic cues. The benchmark contains 2,146 paired test samples, each consisting of a target image, a ground-truth mask, a positive prompt, and a misleading negative prompt. These samples cover three counterfactual categories: Superficial Mimicry (\textbf{SM}), Context Conflict (\textbf{CC}), and Ontological Conflict (\textbf{OC}). We evaluate various model types and sizes on our CAFE. Experiments reveal a systematic gap between localization quality and concept discrimination: models often generate accurate masks even for misleading prompts, suggesting that strong mask prediction does not necessarily imply faithful semantic grounding. Our CAFE provides a controlled benchmark for diagnosing whether promptable segmentation models perform concept-faithful grounding rather than shortcut-driven mask retrieval.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAFE基准测试，揭示可提示分割模型在概念忠实性上的系统性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分割模型评估主要关注掩码准确性，忽略了模型是否真正理解查询概念，可能依赖视觉显著性而非语义正确性。
analysis.problem: 评估可提示分割模型是否忠实于查询概念，而非依赖误导性语义线索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现模型即使面对误导性提示也能生成准确掩码，表明强掩码预测能力并不等同于语义忠实性。

系统揭示可提示分割模型在概念忠实性上的系统性缺陷。

papers.title: Efficient Ensemble Selection from Binary and Pairwise Feedback
papers.abstract: Organizations increasingly deploy multiple AI systems across task domains, but selecting a small, high-performing ensemble can require costly model calls, benchmark runs, and human evaluation. We study this selection problem as a distributional variant of multiwinner voting: tasks are drawn from an unknown domain distribution, each task induces feedback over candidate experts, and a committee's value on a task is determined by its best-performing member. We analyze both binary feedback, for tasks with correct/incorrect outcomes, and pairwise feedback, for tasks where candidate outputs are compared by preference. In the binary setting, the induced objective is coverage. We give exhaustive-elicitation baselines and matching worst-case query lower bounds, and we design a failure-conditioned greedy algorithm that preserves the standard $(1-1/e)$ guarantee while obtaining instance-dependent query savings. In the pairwise setting, we study $θ$-winning committees. We show that full-information optimization admits a PTAS but no EPTAS under Gap-ETH, and that the objective is monotone but not submodular. This motivates a weighted ordinal coverage relaxation, which is submodular and supports a failure-conditioned greedy oracle under pairwise feedback. We then convert this oracle back into $θ$-type guarantees through finite-family auditing or a minimax wrapper. We also provide small-scale LLM experiments illustrating the predicted query savings and the role of complementarity in committee selection.

analysis.tldr: 本文研究从二元和成对反馈中高效选择集成模型的问题，提出基于失败条件的贪心算法，在保持近似保证的同时减少查询次数。
analysis.research_motivation: 组织在多个任务域部署多个AI系统时，选择少量高性能集成模型需要昂贵的模型调用、基准测试和人工评估，现有方法效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何从候选专家中高效选择一个小型集成委员会，使得在未知任务分布上委员会的最佳成员表现最优，同时最小化查询成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在二元反馈下，目标函数是覆盖函数，贪心算法有(1-1/e)保证，但标准贪心需要大量查询；成对反馈下目标函数单调但不次模，需要松弛为加权序数覆盖。
analysis.method: 提出失败条件贪心算法，在二元反馈中通过条件查询节省实例级查询；在成对反馈中设计加权序数覆盖松弛，结合有限族审计或极小极大包装器恢复θ型保证。
contributions: 在二元反馈下给出穷举查询基线和匹配的最坏情况查询下界，并设计失败条件贪心算法保持(1-1/e)保证且节省查询。
在成对反馈下证明全信息优化有PTAS但无EPTAS，目标单调非次模，提出加权序数覆盖松弛并设计失败条件贪心预言机。
通过小规模LLM实验验证查询节省和互补性在委员会选择中的作用。

limitations: 实验规模较小，仅在小规模LLM上验证。
理论结果可能依赖于特定假设，实际应用中的查询节省程度未知。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文研究从二元和成对反馈中高效选择集成模型的问题，提出基于失败条件的贪心算法，在保持近似保证的同时减少查询次数。

papers.title: DeformMaster: An Interactive Physics-Neural World Model for Deformable Objects from Videos
papers.abstract: World models for deformable objects should recover not only geometry and appearance, but also underlying physical dynamics, interaction grounding, and material behavior. Learning such a model from real videos is challenging because deformable linear, planar, and volumetric objects evolve under high-dimensional deformation, noisy interactions, and complex material response. The model must therefore infer a physical state from visual observations, roll it forward under new interactions, and render the resulting dynamics with high visual fidelity. We present DeformMaster, a video-derived interactive physics--neural world model that turns real interaction videos into an online interactive model of deformable objects within a unified dynamics-and-appearance framework. DeformMaster preserves structured physical rollout while using a neural residual to compensate for unmodeled effects, grounds sparse hand motion as distributed compliant actuator for hand--continuum interaction, represents material response with spatially varying constitutive experts, and drives high-fidelity 4D appearance from the predicted physical evolution. Experiments on real-world deformable-object sequences demonstrate DeformMaster's ability to roll out future dynamics and render dynamic appearance, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while supporting novel action rollout, material-parameter variation, and dynamic novel-view synthesis.

analysis.tldr: DeformMaster从视频中学习可变形物体的物理-神经世界模型，支持交互式动力学预测与高保真渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 可变形物体的世界模型需要同时恢复几何、外观、物理动力学和材料行为，但现有方法难以从真实视频中学习高维变形、噪声交互和复杂材料响应。
analysis.problem: 从真实视频中构建可变形物体的交互式物理-神经世界模型，实现动力学预测、交互响应和高保真渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可变形物体（线性、平面、体积）在视频中呈现高维变形、噪声交互和复杂材料响应，导致纯物理或纯神经方法难以兼顾精度与泛化。
analysis.method: DeformMaster结合结构化物理滚动与神经残差补偿，利用稀疏手部运动作为分布式柔顺执行器建模交互，采用空间变化的本构专家表示材料响应，并通过预测的物理演化驱动高保真4D外观。
contributions: 提出统一动力学-外观框架的视频衍生交互式物理-神经世界模型
引入神经残差补偿未建模效应，稀疏手部运动作为分布式柔顺执行器
空间变化本构专家表示材料响应，实现材料参数变化和新动作滚动
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界可变形物体序列上评估，DeformMaster在动力学预测和动态外观渲染上优于现有基线，并支持新动作滚动、材料参数变化和动态新视角合成。
limitations: 可能依赖特定类型视频数据，泛化到极端变形或未知材料需验证
神经残差补偿可能引入过拟合，需更多场景测试

papers.title: CLR-voyance: Reinforcing Open-Ended Reasoning for Inpatient Clinical Decision Support with Outcome-Aware Rubrics
papers.abstract: Inpatient clinical reasoning is a sequential decision under partial observability: the clinician sees the admission so far and must choose the next action whose downstream consequences are not yet visible. Existing clinical-LLM evaluations and RL rewards signals collapse this into closed-form retrieval, clinical journey leakage, or unanchored LLM-as-judge scoring. We introduce CLR-voyance, a framework that reformulates inpatient reasoning as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) and supervises it with rewards that are simultaneously outcome-grounded and clinician-validated. We instantiate the formulation as CLR-POMDP, which partitions successful patient journeys into a policy-visible past and an oracle-only future. Using the past information, an oracle LLM generates a case-specific query-answer pair, and the first adaptive rubric for clinical reasoning which is verifiable in the future of the patient journey. These rubrics are used for both post-training and evaluation of models for inpatient clinical reasoning. We post-train Qwen3-8B and MedGemma-4B with GRPO followed by model merging, yielding state-of-the-art inpatient clinical reasoning while retaining generalist capabilities. CLR-voyance-8B achieves 84.91% on CLR-POMDP, ahead of frontier medical reasoning models like GPT-5 (77.83%) and MedGemma-27B (66.66%) and has comparable or better performance on existing medical benchmarks. To ensure a clinically meaningful setting, we conduct a large-scale clinician alignment study, where physicians curate per-case rubrics, grade candidate responses, and provide blinded pairwise preferences of model reasoning. This study provides insights on clinical LLM-as-a-judge and clinical preference-model selection, which can inform the community at large. CLR-voyance has been deployed for 6+ months at a partner public hospital, drafting thousands of reasoning-heavy inpatient notes.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLR-voyance框架，将住院临床推理建模为POMDP，用结果感知的适应性评分标准强化开放推理，在CLR-POMDP上超越GPT-5。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有临床LLM评估和RL奖励信号将住院推理简化为封闭式检索、临床路径泄露或无锚定的LLM评判，无法捕捉部分可观测下的序贯决策本质。
analysis.problem: 如何为住院临床决策支持设计一个能反映部分可观测序贯决策、结果可验证且临床医生认可的强化学习框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将住院推理形式化为POMDP（CLR-POMDP），划分策略可见的过去和仅预言机可见的未来；利用过去信息由预言机LLM生成病例特定问答对和首个自适应临床推理评分标准；使用GRPO后训练并合并模型。
contributions: 提出CLR-POMDP，将住院临床推理建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程。
设计结果感知的适应性评分标准，用于后训练和评估。
通过GRPO后训练和模型合并，在CLR-POMDP上达到84.91%，超越GPT-5等前沿模型。
开展大规模临床医生对齐研究，提供临床LLM评判和偏好模型选择的见解。

papers.title: FPGA-Based Hardware Architecture for Contrast Maximization in Event-Based Vision
papers.abstract: This paper presents a hardware architecture that implements the Contrast Maximization (CM) algorithm in Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) resources for event-based vision systems. CM estimates motion parameters by maximizing the contrast of an Image of Warped Events (IWE) reconstructed from asynchronous event streams. Event-based vision sensors generate sparse data with high temporal resolution and low spatial redundancy, which makes them well suited for hardware processing. The deterministic, massively parallel structure of the FPGA is leveraged to design a deeply pipelined architecture capable of high-throughput, energy-efficient processing suitable for real-time embedded applications. This paper details the hardware modules responsible for event warping, contrast computation, and iterative optimization, discusses key implementation decisions, and presents the hardware-aware optimization method used in the design. Experimental results demonstrate a substantial speed and efficiency improvement over CPU- and GPU-based implementations, with motion parameter estimation executing over 200 times faster. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first hardware architecture enabling acceleration of CM algorithm computations. Its performance is evaluated in terms of processing speed, energy efficiency, and hardware resource utilization. The proposed design is validated using an event-based object tracking application. The results confirm that the architecture provides a solid foundation for real-time motion estimation in high-speed, low-power embedded systems.

analysis.tldr: 首个FPGA硬件架构实现事件相机对比度最大化算法，速度比CPU/GPU快200倍以上。
analysis.research_motivation: 事件相机产生稀疏、高时间分辨率的数据流，传统CPU/GPU处理对比度最大化算法速度慢、功耗高，难以满足实时嵌入式应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高效的硬件架构，在FPGA上加速事件相机运动参数估计中的对比度最大化算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用FPGA的确定性、大规模并行结构，设计深度流水线架构，包含事件扭曲、对比度计算和迭代优化等硬件模块，并采用硬件感知优化方法。
contributions: 首次提出加速对比度最大化算法计算的FPGA硬件架构。
在运动参数估计上实现超过200倍的速度提升，并评估了处理速度、能效和资源利用率。
analysis.experiments: 在事件目标跟踪应用中验证，与CPU和GPU实现相比，速度提升超过200倍，并评估了能效和硬件资源利用率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定的事件相机分辨率和场景。

analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个FPGA硬件架构实现事件相机对比度最大化算法，速度比CPU/GPU快200倍以上。

papers.title: Biosignal Fingerprinting: A Cross-Modal PPG-ECG Foundation Model
papers.abstract: Cardiovascular disease remains the leading cause of global mortality, yet scalable cardiac monitoring is hindered by the gap between diagnostic-rich ECG and ubiquitous wearable PPG. Bridging this gap requires representations that are compact, transferable across modalities and devices, and deployable without task-specific retraining. Here we introduce biosignal fingerprints: compact latent representations of cardiovascular state derived from a cross-modal foundation model, the Multi-modal Masked Autoencoder (M2AE), trained on over 3.4 million paired ECG and PPG signals. M2AE integrates modality-specific encoders with a shared bottleneck and dual decoders, jointly optimized using reconstruction and cross-modal contrastive objectives, yielding generalizable fingerprints that retain intra- and inter-modality features. Like a biometric fingerprint, these representations uniquely encode an individual's cardiovascular state in a modality-agnostic, privacy-preserving form reusable across clinical tasks without exposing raw waveform data or requiring model retraining. Across 7 downstream tasks, spanning cross-modal reconstruction, cardiovascular disease classification, hypertension detection, mortality prediction, and demographic inference, biosignal fingerprints achieve competitive or superior performance compared to leading domain-specialist foundation models in frozen settings, including an AUROC of 0.974 for five-class CVD classification and 0.877 for hypertension detection, with a maximum improvement of 27.7% in AUROC across 5 classification tasks. Critically, strong performance is maintained with only a single modality, enabling deployment in resource-constrained, single-sensor environments typical of real-world wearable monitoring, with direct implications for continuous cardiovascular monitoring across clinical and consumer health settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态PPG-ECG基础模型M2AE，生成紧凑、可迁移的生物信号指纹，在7个下游任务中达到或超越领域专家模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 心血管疾病是全球主要死因，但可扩展的心脏监测受限于诊断丰富的ECG与可穿戴PPG之间的鸿沟，需要紧凑、跨模态和设备可迁移且无需任务特定重训练的表征。
analysis.problem: 如何学习一种跨模态、紧凑、可迁移且隐私保护的生物信号表征，以桥接ECG和PPG，并适用于多种下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多模态掩码自编码器M2AE，包含模态特定编码器、共享瓶颈和双解码器，联合优化重构和跨模态对比目标，生成通用生物信号指纹。
contributions: 提出生物信号指纹概念，作为跨模态、紧凑、隐私保护的心血管状态表征。
设计M2AE模型，在340万对ECG-PPG信号上训练，实现跨模态重构和下游任务SOTA性能。

papers.title: Annotation-free deep learning for detection and segmentation of fetal germinal matrix-intraventricular hemorrhage in brain MRI
papers.abstract: Background: Prenatal germinal matrix-intraventricular hemorrhage (GMH-IVH) is a leading cause of infant mortality and neurodevelopmental impairment. Manual diagnosis and lesion segmentation are labor-intensive and error-prone. Deep learning models offer potential for automation but typically require large annotated datasets, which are challenging to obtain. Purpose: To develop and validate an annotation-free deep learning framework for automated detection and segmentation of GMH-IVH on brain MRI. Materials and Methods: This retrospective study analyzed 2D T2-weighted MRI data from pregnant women collected from October 2015 to October 2023 at one hospital (internal validation) and two hospitals (external validation). Eligible participants included healthy fetuses and those with GMH-IVH. FreeHemoSeg was developed and trained using pseudo GMH-IVH images synthesized from normal fetal data guided by medical priors. Primary outcomes included diagnostic accuracy (area under the ROC curve [AUROC], sensitivity, specificity) and segmentation accuracy (Dice similarity coefficient [DSC]). A reader study evaluated clinical utility. Results: A total of 1674 stacks from 558 pregnant women were analyzed. FreeHemoSeg achieved the highest performance in both internal (sensitivity: 0.914, 95% CI 0.869-0.945; specificity: 0.966, 95% CI 0.946-0.978; DSC: 0.559, 95% CI 0.546-0.571) and external validation (sensitivity: 0.824, 95% CI 0.739-0.885; specificity: 0.943, 95% CI 0.913-0.964; DSC: 0.512, 95% CI 0.497-0.526), outperforming supervised and unsupervised methods. FreeHemoSeg assistance improved radiologists' sensitivity (from 0.882 to 0.941-1.000) and diagnostic confidence while reducing interpretation time by 16.0-52.7%. Conclusion: FreeHemoSeg accurately detects and localizes fetal brain hemorrhages without annotated training data, enabling earlier diagnosis and supporting timely clinical management.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需标注的深度学习框架FreeHemoSeg，用于胎儿脑MRI中出血的检测与分割，性能优于监督和无监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 产前脑出血是婴儿死亡和神经发育障碍的主因，手动诊断和分割耗时且易错，现有深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据，难以获取。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有标注数据的情况下实现胎儿脑MRI中出血的自动检测与分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用医学先验从正常胎儿数据合成伪出血图像，训练FreeHemoSeg模型，实现无标注学习。
contributions: 提出首个无需标注的胎儿脑出血检测与分割框架FreeHemoSeg。
在内部和外部验证集上取得高诊断准确率和分割精度，并提升放射科医生表现。
analysis.experiments: 在558名孕妇的1674个MRI堆栈上进行内部和外部验证，报告了AUROC、敏感性、特异性、Dice系数，并与监督和无监督方法比较。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定MRI序列（2D T2加权）。

papers.title: KAN Text to Vision? The Exploration of Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks for Multi-Scale Sequence-Based Pose Animation from Sign Language Notation
papers.abstract: Sign language production from symbolic notation offers a scalable route to accessible sign animation. We present KANMultiSign, a multi-scale sequence generator that translates HamNoSys notation into two-dimensional human pose sequences. Our framework makes two complementary contributions. First, we introduce a coarse-to-fine generation strategy with multi-scale supervision: the model is first guided by an intermediate body--hand--face scaffold to encourage global structural coherence, and then refines fine-grained hand articulation to improve finger-level detail. Second, we investigate integrating Kolmogorov--Arnold Network modules into a Transformer backbone, using learnable univariate function primitives to model the highly non-linear mapping from discrete phonological symbols to continuous body kinematics with a compact parameterization. Experiments on multiple public corpora spanning Polish, German, Greek, and French sign languages show consistent reductions in dynamic time warping based joint error compared with a strong notation-to-pose baseline, while using substantially fewer parameters. Controlled ablations further indicate that KAN-based variants substantially reduce parameter count while maintaining competitive performance when coupled with multi-scale supervision, rather than serving as the main driver of accuracy gains. These findings position multi-scale supervision as the key mechanism for improving notation-conditioned pose generation, with KAN offering a compact alternative for efficient modeling. Our code will be publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出KANMultiSign，用多尺度监督和KAN模块从符号标注生成手语姿态序列，发现多尺度监督是精度提升的关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 手语生成从符号标注到姿态的映射高度非线性，现有方法参数效率低且手指细节不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从HamNoSys符号标注生成精细且结构连贯的二维人体姿态序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多尺度监督是精度提升的主要机制，KAN模块主要贡献在于参数效率而非精度。
analysis.method: 粗到细生成策略：先预测身体-手-脸骨架，再细化手指关节；在Transformer中集成KAN模块建模非线性映射。
contributions: 提出粗到细的多尺度监督生成策略，提升全局结构和手指细节。
探索KAN模块在符号到姿态生成中的有效性，实现紧凑参数化。
analysis.experiments: 在波兰、德国、希腊、法语手语多个公开语料库上，相比强基线，DTW关节误差一致降低，且参数更少。
limitations: 仅验证二维姿态，未扩展到三维。
KAN模块对精度提升有限，主要贡献在参数效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新但实验仅二维，且KAN贡献有限，适合保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KANMultiSign，用多尺度监督和KAN模块从符号标注生成手语姿态序列，发现多尺度监督是精度提升的关键。

papers.title: Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network for Image Compressive Sensing
papers.abstract: Recent Deep Unfolding Networks (DUNs) have significantly advanced Compressive Sensing (CS) by integrating iterative optimization with deep networks. However, existing DUNs still suffer from two challenges: 1) Reliance on a single measurement stream, which limits effective information interaction across distinct measurement subsets. 2) Uniform processing of all image regions, which overlooks varying reconstruction difficulties induced by diverse textures. To address these limitations, a novel Dual-Path Hyperprior Informed Deep Unfolding Network (DPH-DUN) is proposed, which partitions measurements into double subsets to enable hyperprior-guided reconstruction via a dual-path architecture. In the Deep Hyperprior Learning branch, a series of lightweight neural modules are designed to efficiently generate hyperprior knowledge of different domains, enabling collaborative guidance for the CS reconstruction. In the Hyperprior Informed Reconstruction branch, a deep unfolding framework with hyperprior guidance is constructed to iteratively refine reconstruction. Specifically, i) in the gradient descent step, a Hyperprior Informed Step Size Generation network is designed to dynamically generate spatially varying step maps, enabling adaptive fine-grained gradient updates. ii) In the proximal mapping step, two well-designed hyperprior informed attention mechanisms are introduced to dynamically focus on challenging regions via gradient-based hard and soft attentions, facilitating CS reconstruction accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DPH-DUN outperforms existing CS methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络，通过分割测量子集和自适应步长/注意力机制提升图像压缩感知重建质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度展开网络（DUNs）在图像压缩感知中依赖单一测量流，限制了不同测量子集间的信息交互，且对所有图像区域统一处理，忽略了纹理差异导致的重建难度变化。
analysis.problem: 解决现有DUNs中单一测量流信息交互不足和区域重建难度差异被忽视的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络（DPH-DUN），包含深度超先验学习分支（生成多域超先验知识）和超先验引导重建分支（迭代优化，含自适应步长生成和基于梯度的硬/软注意力机制）。
contributions: 提出双路径架构，将测量值分割为两个子集以增强信息交互。
设计超先验引导的步长生成网络和注意力机制，实现自适应细粒度梯度更新和困难区域聚焦。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 双路径架构可能增加计算复杂度。
超先验学习模块的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验细节不足，与重点方向弱相关，适合保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双路径超先验引导深度展开网络，通过分割测量子集和自适应步长/注意力机制提升图像压缩感知重建质量。

papers.title: Towards Compact Sign Language Translation: Frame Rate and Model Size Trade-offs
papers.abstract: Sign Language Translation (SLT) converts sign language videos into spoken-language text, bridging communication between Deaf and hearing communities. Current gloss-free approaches rely on large encoder-decoder models, limiting deployment. We propose a compact 77M-parameter pipeline that couples MMPose skeletal pose extraction with a single linear projection into T5-small. By varying the input frame rate, we expose a practical efficiency trade-off: at 12 fps the model halves its sequence length, achieving a 75% reduction in encoder quadratic self-attention computational complexity while incurring only a modest BLEU-4 drop (9.53 vs. 10.06 at 24 fps on How2Sign). Our system is roughly 3x smaller than prior T5-base systems, demonstrating that a lightweight architecture can remain competitive without hierarchical encoders or large-scale models.

analysis.tldr: 通过骨骼姿态提取和帧率调整，用77M参数的小模型实现与大型模型相当的手语翻译性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前无词汇表的手语翻译依赖大型编码器-解码器模型，部署成本高，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持翻译性能的同时显著减小模型参数量和计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 降低输入帧率可减少序列长度，从而大幅降低编码器自注意力计算复杂度，但BLEU分数仅有轻微下降。
analysis.method: 使用MMPose提取骨骼姿态，通过线性投影输入T5-small，并调整帧率以平衡效率与性能。
contributions: 提出一个仅77M参数的紧凑型手语翻译流水线，比T5-base系统小约3倍。
揭示了帧率与翻译质量之间的实际效率权衡：12fps时计算复杂度降低75%，BLEU-4仅下降0.53。
analysis.experiments: 在How2Sign数据集上评估，12fps时BLEU-4为9.53，24fps时为10.06。
limitations: 仅使用How2Sign数据集，泛化性待验证。
未与更多基线模型比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，但创新性中等，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过骨骼姿态提取和帧率调整，用77M参数的小模型实现与大型模型相当的手语翻译性能。

papers.title: TIDE-Bench: Task-Aware and Diagnostic Evaluation of Tool-Integrated Reasoning
papers.abstract: Tool-integrated reasoning has emerged as a promising paradigm for enhancing large language models with external computation, retrieval, and execution capabilities. However, the field still lacks a high-quality and unified evaluation benchmark, and existing TIR evaluations remain limited in dataset quality, task diversity, diagnostic comprehensiveness, and evaluation efficiency. In this work, we introduce TIDE-Bench, a holistic and efficient benchmark for evaluating TIR methods, featuring three key advantages. First, it provides diverse task settings, combining widely used mathematical reasoning and knowledge-intensive QA tasks with two newly designed tasks, namely the tool-grounded experimental design task and the dynamic interactive task, to probe models' abilities in complex tool invocation and multi-tool coordination. Second, TIDE-Bench adopts a comprehensive yet task-aware evaluation protocol, jointly measuring final answer quality, process reliability, tool-use efficiency, and inference cost across heterogeneous task settings. Third, TIDE-Bench constructs high-quality and discriminative evaluation sets by filtering low-discrimination instances from existing datasets, substantially reducing evaluation cost while focusing on more challenging samples. Extensive experiments on multiple foundation models and TIR methods reveal persistent bottlenecks in tool grounding, offering insights for future TIR research.

analysis.tldr: TIDE-Bench 是一个面向工具集成推理的全面、高效评测基准，涵盖多样化任务、任务感知评估协议和高判别力数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具集成推理（TIR）虽能增强大模型，但现有评测在数据集质量、任务多样性、诊断全面性和评估效率上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏高质量、统一且高效的 TIR 评测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建 TIDE-Bench，包含多样化任务（数学推理、知识密集型 QA、工具接地实验设计、动态交互任务）、任务感知评估协议（综合答案质量、过程可靠性、工具使用效率、推理成本）和高判别力数据集（过滤低区分度实例）。
contributions: 提出 TIDE-Bench，一个涵盖多种任务和全面评估指标的 TIR 评测基准。
设计工具接地实验设计和动态交互任务，以探测复杂工具调用和多工具协调能力。
通过过滤低判别力实例构建高质量、高判别力的评测集，降低评估成本。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基础模型和 TIR 方法上进行实验，揭示了工具接地中的持续瓶颈。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有 TIR 任务类型。
过滤低判别力实例可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准针对 TIR 评测痛点，设计新颖且全面，实验揭示瓶颈，对 Agent 方向有重要参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TIDE-Bench 是一个面向工具集成推理的全面、高效评测基准，涵盖多样化任务、任务感知评估协议和高判别力数据集。

papers.title: LLM-Guided Monte Carlo Tree Search over Knowledge Graphs: Composing Mechanistic Explanations for Drug-Disease Pairs
papers.abstract: Extracting multi-step explanations from knowledge graphs poses a combinatorial challenge requiring both heuristic guidance (as candidates proliferate with depth) and credit assignment (as path quality emerges over extended sequences). Frontier LLMs, strong on knowledge/reasoning benchmarks, offer a compelling source of such heuristics, yet their knowledge comes sans guarantees and compositional performance degrades as chains lengthen. We thus present TESSERA, a 3-part neuro-symbolic framework that uses LLMs in a circumscribed role: for local discriminative judgement rather than autonomous multi-step generation; the knowledge graph then defines the hypothesis space enforcing hard structural constraints, and MCTS coordinates the long-horizon search with principled credit assignment via backpropagation. LLMs perform dual roles as a prior policy biasing exploration and a comparative state evaluator supplying reward signals. Evaluation on drug mechanism elucidation across two complementary knowledge graphs demonstrates fidelity to curated biology while surfacing coherent alternative mechanisms, with ablations confirming discriminative contribution from both LLM components. Beyond its current application, our framework offers a general paradigm for compositional reasoning over structured knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 提出TESSERA框架，结合LLM局部判别、知识图谱硬约束和MCTS长程搜索，为药物-疾病对生成多步机制解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 从知识图谱中提取多步解释面临组合爆炸和信用分配挑战，现有LLM虽强但缺乏保证且长链生成性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM的启发式能力，同时通过知识图谱的结构约束和MCTS的信用分配，生成忠实且连贯的多步机制解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在长链生成中性能退化，知识图谱搜索随深度增加候选激增，需要启发式引导和信用分配。
analysis.method: TESSERA框架：LLM作为先验策略（偏置探索）和比较状态评估器（提供奖励信号），知识图谱定义假设空间并施加硬结构约束，MCTS通过反向传播协调长程搜索。
contributions: 提出TESSERA，一种神经符号框架，将LLM用于局部判别而非自主多步生成，结合知识图谱和MCTS进行组合推理。
在药物机制阐明任务上验证，框架能忠实于已知生物学并发现连贯的替代机制，消融实验证实LLM组件的判别贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在两个互补知识图谱上评估药物机制阐明，通过消融实验验证LLM组件的贡献，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 依赖知识图谱的完整性和质量，可能遗漏未收录的机制。
LLM的判别能力可能受限于其训练数据中的偏见。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合LLM、知识图谱和MCTS解决组合推理问题，但实验细节有限，影响和相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TESSERA框架，结合LLM局部判别、知识图谱硬约束和MCTS长程搜索，为药物-疾病对生成多步机制解释。

papers.title: PhysHanDI: Physics-Based Reconstruction of Hand-Deformable Object Interactions
papers.abstract: While existing methods for reconstructing hand-object interactions have made impressive progress, they either focus on rigid or part-wise rigid objects-limiting their ability to model real-world objects (e.g., cloth, stuffed animals) that exhibit highly non-rigid deformations-or model deformable objects without full 3D hand reconstruction. To bridge this gap, we present PhysHanDI (Physics-based Reconstruction of Hand and Deformable Object Interactions), a framework that enables full 3D reconstruction of both interacting hands and non-rigid objects. Our key idea is to physically simulate object deformations driven by forces induced from densely reconstructed 3D hand motions, ensuring that the reconstructed object dynamics are both physically plausible and coherent with the interacting hand movements. Furthermore, we demonstrate that such simulation of object deformations can, in turn, refine and improve hand reconstruction via inverse physics. In experiments, PhysHanDI outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline across reconstruction and future prediction.

analysis.tldr: 通过物理仿真实现手与非刚性物体交互的完整3D重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手-物交互重建方法多假设物体为刚性或部分刚性，无法处理布料、毛绒玩具等高度非刚性变形物体，且缺乏完整3D手部重建。
analysis.problem: 同时重建交互中的手部和非刚性物体的完整3D形态与运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用从密集重建的3D手部运动产生的力来物理仿真物体变形，并通过逆物理过程优化手部重建。
contributions: 提出PhysHanDI框架，首次实现手与非刚性物体的完整3D交互重建。
证明物体变形仿真可反向优化手部重建。
analysis.experiments: 在重建和未来预测任务上，PhysHanDI优于现有基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量手部运动初始重建。
物理仿真计算成本较高。
