papers.title: RAwR: Role-Aware Rewiring via Approximate Equitable Partition
papers.abstract: While Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated significant efficacy in node classification tasks, where predictions rely on local neighborhood information, the performance of GNNs often drops when prediction tasks depend on long-range interactions. These limitations are attributed to phenomena such as oversquashing, where structural bottlenecks restrict signal propagation across the network topology. To address this challenge, we introduce RAwR, a computationally efficient rewiring framework that augments the input graph with a quotient graph derived from equitable partitions. This approach facilitates accelerated communication between nodes that share identical structural roles, as identified by the Weisfeiler-Leman graph coloring, and thereby reduces the total effective resistance of the system. Furthermore, by employing an approximate definition of the equitable partition, RAwR enables a controllable reduction of the quotient graph, which, in its most condensed state, recovers the conventional Master Node rewiring technique. Empirical evaluations across a diverse suite of benchmarks -- including homophilic, heterophilic, and synthetic long-range datasets -- demonstrate that RAwR achieves state-of-the-art results. Our contribution is further supported by an analytical investigation using a teacher-student model of linear GNNs, which elucidates the theoretical foundations of role-based rewiring. This analysis leads to the formulation of Spectral Role Lift (SRL), a metric designed to identify the optimal approximate equitable partition for maximizing predictive performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于近似公平划分的角色感知重连方法RAwR，通过商图加速长程信号传播，提升GNN在长程依赖任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: GNN在依赖长程交互的节点分类任务中性能下降，主要由于过挤压（oversquashing）导致结构瓶颈限制信号传播。现有重连方法缺乏对节点结构角色的利用，且计算效率有限。
analysis.problem: 如何通过高效的重连策略缓解GNN中的过挤压问题，提升长程依赖任务的预测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出GNN在长程交互任务中性能下降归因于过挤压现象，即结构瓶颈阻碍信号传播。公平划分可识别相同结构角色的节点，加速它们之间的通信。
analysis.method: RAwR框架：基于Weisfeiler-Lehman图着色识别节点结构角色，利用近似公平划分构建商图，将商图作为额外边添加到原始图中，实现角色感知的重连。通过控制近似程度可调节商图规模，最紧凑形式恢复Master Node重连。
contributions: 提出RAwR，一种计算高效的角色感知重连框架，通过近似公平划分的商图增强GNN长程信号传播。
在多种基准（同质、异质、合成长程数据集）上取得最先进结果，并通过线性GNN的师生模型分析提供理论支撑。
提出Spectral Role Lift (SRL)指标，用于选择最优近似公平划分以最大化预测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在包括同质、异质和合成长程数据集的多个基准上进行评估，RAwR取得最先进结果。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 近似公平划分的近似程度选择可能依赖任务，SRL指标的计算开销未明确。
方法主要针对节点分类任务，对其他图任务（如图分类、链接预测）的适用性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论分析扎实，实验覆盖全面，但摘要未提供具体性能数值，影响评估略保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于近似公平划分的角色感知重连方法RAwR，通过商图加速长程信号传播，提升GNN在长程依赖任务上的表现。

papers.title: Adaptive 3D Convolution for Remote Sensing Image Fusion
papers.abstract: Remote sensing image fusion aims to create a high-resolution multi/hyper-spectral image from a high-resolution image with limited spectral information and a low-resolution image with abundant spectral data. Recently, deep learning (DL) techniques have shown significant effectiveness in this area. Most DL-based methods approach image fusion as a 2D problem by encoding spectral information into feature map channels. However, our research suggests that this strategy introduces notable spectral distortions. In contrast, some methods consider spectral data as an additional dimension, utilizing standard 3D convolutions to preserve spectral information. Nevertheless, in a standard 3D convolutional layer, the same set of kernels is applied across all input regions, which we have found to be sub-optimal for image fusion. Furthermore, standard 3D convolutions necessitate substantial computational resources. To address these challenges, we propose a novel convolutional paradigm called Adaptive 3D Convolution (Ada3D) for remote sensing image fusion. Ada3D applies a unique set of 3D kernels to each input voxel, enabling the capture of fine-grained details. These adaptive kernels are generated through a two-step process: (i) spatial and spectral kernels are derived from their respective image sources; (ii) these two types of kernels are then combined to form content-aware 3D kernels that effectively integrate spatial and spectral information. Additionally, adaptive biases are introduced to enhance the convolutional outcome at the voxel level. Furthermore, we incorporate the group convolution technique to reduce computational complexity. As a result, Ada3D offers full adaptivity in an efficient manner. Evaluation results across five datasets demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA performance, underscoring the superiority of Ada3D. The code is available at https://github.com/PSRben/Ada3D.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应3D卷积（Ada3D）用于遥感图像融合，通过逐体素生成内容感知3D核来减少光谱失真并提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像融合中，现有深度学习方法将光谱信息编码为特征图通道会导致光谱失真，而标准3D卷积虽能保留光谱信息但计算量大且核共享策略次优。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能有效融合空间和光谱信息、减少光谱失真，又具有计算效率的卷积方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将光谱信息编码为通道的2D方法引入显著光谱失真；标准3D卷积对所有输入区域应用相同核，对图像融合次优且计算开销大。
analysis.method: 提出自适应3D卷积（Ada3D），为每个输入体素生成独特的3D核：先从空间和光谱源分别生成空间核与光谱核，再组合成内容感知3D核，并引入自适应偏置；同时采用组卷积降低复杂度。
contributions: 提出Ada3D卷积范式，实现逐体素自适应3D卷积，有效融合空间与光谱信息。
通过组卷积技术降低计算复杂度，实现高效的全自适应融合。
在五个数据集上达到SOTA性能，验证了方法的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个遥感图像融合数据集上进行评估，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能对高光谱维度扩展性有限，组卷积设计需进一步调优。
自适应核生成过程可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（自适应3D核），实验充分（5个数据集SOTA），与遥感图像融合方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应3D卷积（Ada3D）用于遥感图像融合，通过逐体素生成内容感知3D核来减少光谱失真并提升性能。

papers.title: SpaceMind++: Toward Allocentric Cognitive Maps for Spatially Grounded Video MLLMs
papers.abstract: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have made remarkable progress in visual understanding and language-based reasoning, yet they lack a persistent world-centered representation for spatially consistent reasoning in 3D environments. Inspired by the mammalian dual-stream system, where semantic and spatial cues are processed separately and integrated into an allocentric cognitive map, we propose SpaceMind++, a video MLLM architecture that explicitly builds a voxelized cognitive map from RGB videos. This map reorganizes fragmented egocentric observations into a shared 3D metric representation, enabling the model to preserve object permanence and spatial topology across changing viewpoints. To make this allocentric representation usable by a pretrained video MLLM without disrupting its native visual-token interface, we introduce Coordinate-Guided Deep Iterative Fusion, a new mechanism that relays map-level spatial knowledge back into the original 2D visual features. This fusion is explicitly guided by coordinate embeddings and 3D Rotary Positional Encoding, which ground semantic interactions in metric 3D space, resembling the entorhinal binding of sensory features to metric space. Extensive experiments show that SpaceMind++ achieves new state-of-the-art performance on VSI-Bench. Furthermore, it demonstrates superior out-of-distribution generalization on SPBench, SITE-Bench, and SPAR-Bench, underscoring its robustness in unseen 3D environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpaceMind++，通过构建类脑异我中心认知地图实现视频MLLM的3D空间一致推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM缺乏持久的世界中心表征，难以在3D环境中进行空间一致推理，而哺乳动物通过双流系统构建异我中心认知地图解决此问题。
analysis.problem: 如何让视频MLLM从RGB视频中构建并利用3D度量空间表征，实现跨视角的对象持久性和空间拓扑保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpaceMind++架构，包含体素化认知地图构建和坐标引导深度迭代融合机制，将地图级空间知识回注到2D视觉特征中，并采用3D旋转位置编码。
contributions: 提出显式构建体素化认知地图的视频MLLM架构，实现异我中心空间表征。
设计坐标引导深度迭代融合机制，在不破坏原生视觉-令牌接口前提下注入3D空间知识。
analysis.experiments: 在VSI-Bench上达到新SOTA，并在SPBench、SITE-Bench、SPAR-Bench上展现优越的分布外泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量RGB视频输入，对遮挡或动态场景鲁棒性未知。
体素化地图的计算开销可能限制实时应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，与VLM/MLLM重点方向高度相关，实验显示SOTA和强泛化，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpaceMind++，通过构建类脑异我中心认知地图实现视频MLLM的3D空间一致推理。

papers.title: Through the Lens of Character: Resolving Modality-Role Interference in Multimodal Role-Playing Agent
papers.abstract: The advancement of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) has expanded Role-Playing Agents (RPAs) into visually grounded environments. However, human vision is inherently subjective and identity-driven, whereas existing MLLMs extract objective, character-agnostic features for general tasks. In RPAs, this generic visual noise overpowers fragile character traits, causing Modality-Role Interference (MRI), where agents struggle to integrate visual grounding and character consistency. To address this, we introduce the training-free Character-Aware Visual Intervention (CAVI) framework, enabling agents to perceive the world through the lens of character. CAVI systematically targets MRI: macroscopically, Character-Guided Token Pruning (CTP) restricts the visual receptive field to role-relevant entities; microscopically, Orthogonal Feature Modulation (OFM) projects tokens onto a character-context subspace to extract aligned facts; and during decoding, Modality-Adaptive Role Steering (MARS) dynamically optimizes steering intensity based on visual reliance. Extensive experiments show CAVI effectively alleviates MRI, significantly enhancing character-consistent multimodal interactions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAVI框架，通过角色感知视觉干预解决多模态角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLMs提取客观、与角色无关的特征，在多模态角色扮演中，通用视觉噪声会压制脆弱的角色特征，导致模态-角色干扰（MRI），使得智能体难以同时保持视觉基础与角色一致性。
analysis.problem: 多模态角色扮演智能体中，视觉信息与角色特征之间的干扰问题，即智能体无法有效整合视觉基础与角色一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，人类视觉是主观且由身份驱动的，而现有MLLMs提取的是客观、与角色无关的特征，这种通用视觉噪声会压制角色特征，导致MRI。
analysis.method: 提出无需训练的CAVI框架，包含三个组件：宏观上，角色引导的令牌剪枝（CTP）限制视觉感受野到角色相关实体；微观上，正交特征调制（OFM）将令牌投影到角色-上下文子空间以提取对齐事实；解码时，模态自适应角色引导（MARS）根据视觉依赖动态优化引导强度。
contributions: 首次识别并形式化多模态角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰（MRI）问题。
提出无需训练的CAVI框架，通过角色感知视觉干预有效缓解MRI。
在多个基准上验证CAVI显著提升角色一致的多模态交互性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验表明CAVI有效缓解MRI，显著增强角色一致的多模态交互，但未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: CAVI为无需训练方法，可能无法完全适应复杂场景下的角色特征。
方法依赖角色相关实体的先验知识，可能在实际应用中受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对多模态角色扮演中的新问题提出创新框架，方法系统且无需训练，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关，但摘要未提供具体实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAVI框架，通过角色感知视觉干预解决多模态角色扮演中的模态-角色干扰问题。

papers.title: SWIFT: Prompt-Adaptive Memory for Efficient Interactive Long Video Generation
papers.abstract: Streaming long-video generation faces a central challenge in continuous semantic switching, requiring adaptive memory to preserve coherent visual evolution. Current approaches rely on cache rebuilding at prompt boundaries or fixed memory budgets, but they introduce redundant computation and limit flexible semantic adaptation. This limitation arises from a mismatch between cached video history and prompt updates, as memory preserves visual continuity while prompt switches demand rapid semantic adaptation. Motivated by this observation, we present SWIFT, Semantic Windowing and Injection for Flexible Transitions, a training-free framework for multi-prompt long-video generation that enables efficient semantic switching while preserving temporal coherence in causal video diffusion models. SWIFT introduces a lightweight Semantic Injection Cache that augments cached video memory rather than reconstructing it from scratch at every prompt boundary. To avoid uniformly perturbing all attention channels, we further perform head-wise semantic injection, so that each attention head receives a prompt update proportional to its alignment with the current video state. In addition, we introduce an Adaptive Dynamic Window that allocates temporal memory according to prompt phase, using larger local context near switching boundaries and smaller windows during stable segments to reduce average inference cost. To preserve long-range semantic consistency under compressed local attention, we further maintain segment-level semantic anchors that summarize prompt-conditioned video history and reintroduce it as compact memory tokens. Compared with current state-of-the-art methods, SWIFT preserves generation quality while achieving 22.6 FPS on a single H100 GPU, establishing a substantially more efficient solution for multi-prompt long-video generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/ShanwenTan/SWIFT.

analysis.tldr: SWIFT 提出无需训练的多提示长视频生成框架，通过语义注入缓存和自适应动态窗口实现高效语义切换。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式长视频生成面临连续语义切换的挑战，现有方法依赖提示边界处的缓存重建或固定内存预算，导致冗余计算和有限的语义适应能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成质量的前提下，实现多提示长视频生成中高效且自适应的语义切换，同时保持时间连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出缓存视频历史与提示更新之间存在不匹配：内存保持视觉连续性，而提示切换需要快速语义适应。
analysis.method: SWIFT 包含三个组件：1) 轻量级语义注入缓存，在提示边界处增强而非重建缓存；2) 逐头语义注入，根据每个注意力头与当前视频状态的对齐程度进行比例更新；3) 自适应动态窗口，在切换边界附近使用较大局部上下文，稳定段使用较小窗口，并维护段级语义锚点以保持长程一致性。
contributions: 提出无需训练的多提示长视频生成框架 SWIFT，实现高效语义切换。
设计语义注入缓存和自适应动态窗口，在保持生成质量的同时显著提升推理速度（22.6 FPS on H100）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称相比当前最先进方法，SWIFT 在保持生成质量的同时实现了 22.6 FPS 的推理速度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视频扩散模型架构，泛化性未验证。
长视频生成中的语义一致性可能仍有提升空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对长视频生成中的语义切换效率问题提出实用解决方案，且开源代码，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SWIFT 提出无需训练的多提示长视频生成框架，通过语义注入缓存和自适应动态窗口实现高效语义切换。

papers.title: Key Coverage Matters: Semi-Structured Extraction of OCR Clinical Reports
papers.abstract: Clinical reports are often fragmented across healthcare institutions because privacy regulations and data silos limit direct information sharing. When patients seek care at a different hospital, they often carry paper or scanned reports from prior visits. This hinders EHR integration and longitudinal review, and downstream applications that depend on more complete patient records, such as patient management, follow-up care, real-world studies, and clinical-trial matching. Although OCR can digitize such reports, reliable extraction remains challenging because clinical documents are heterogeneous, OCR text is noisy, and many healthcare settings require low-cost on-premise deployment. We formulate this problem as canonical key-conditioned extractive question answering over OCR-derived clinical reports. Because the key fields are neither fixed nor known in advance, the key space is open. We maintain a canonical key inventory through iterative key mining, normalization, clustering, and lightweight human verification, and introduce key coverage as a metric to quantify inventory completeness. Using a 0.2B BERT-based model, experiments on real-world reports from more than 20 hospitals show performance improves monotonically with key coverage. The model achieves F1 scores of 0.839 and 0.893 under exact match and boundary-tolerant matching, respectively, once the Top-90 canonical keys are covered. These results show that key coverage is a dominant factor for end-to-end performance. At Top-90 coverage, our model outperforms a fine-tuned Qwen3-0.6B baseline under exact match. Although our annotated corpus is Chinese, the method relies on the language-agnostic key-value organization of semi-structured clinical reports and can be adapted to other settings given an appropriate canonical key inventory and alias mapping.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于关键覆盖度的半结构化OCR临床报告抽取方法，用0.2B BERT模型在20+医院真实数据上达到0.839/0.893 F1。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床报告因隐私和数据孤岛难以共享，OCR数字化后噪声大、异构性强，且需低成本本地部署，现有方法难以可靠提取关键字段。
analysis.problem: 如何从噪声OCR文本中可靠提取临床报告的关键字段，且关键字段集合未知且开放。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 关键覆盖度（key coverage）与端到端性能单调正相关，覆盖Top-90规范键后性能显著提升。
analysis.method: 将问题建模为规范键条件抽取式问答，通过迭代键挖掘、归一化、聚类和轻量人工验证维护规范键库，并引入关键覆盖度作为评估指标。
contributions: 提出关键覆盖度作为量化规范键库完整性的指标，并证明其与抽取性能单调正相关。
设计迭代键挖掘与维护流程，结合轻量人工验证，实现开放键空间下的半结构化抽取。
在20+医院真实中文报告上验证，0.2B BERT模型在Top-90覆盖度下超越0.6B Qwen3基线。
analysis.experiments: 在来自20多家医院的真实中文临床报告上评估，使用0.2B BERT模型，精确匹配F1为0.839，边界容忍匹配F1为0.893，并对比了微调Qwen3-0.6B基线。
limitations: 实验仅基于中文报告，虽声称语言无关但需验证其他语言。
依赖人工验证构建规范键库，扩展性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法实用，关键覆盖度指标有启发性，但模型规模小且仅中文验证，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于关键覆盖度的半结构化OCR临床报告抽取方法，用0.2B BERT模型在20+医院真实数据上达到0.839/0.893 F1。

papers.title: Offline Preference Optimization for Rectified Flow with Noise-Tracked Pairs
papers.abstract: Existing preference datasets for text-to-image models typically store only the final winner/loser images. This representation is insufficient for rectified flow (RF) models, whose generation is naturally indexed by a specific prior noise sample and follows a nearly straight denoising trajectory. In contrast, prior DPO-style alignment for diffusion models commonly estimates trajectories using an independent forward noising process, which can be mismatched to the true reverse dynamics and introduces unnecessary variance. We propose Prior Noise-Aware Preference Optimization (PNAPO), an off-policy alignment framework specialized for rectified flow. PNAPO augments preference data by retaining the paired prior noises used to generate each winner/loser image, turning the standard (prompt, winner, loser) triplet into a sextuple. Leveraging the straight-line property of RF, we estimate intermediate states via noise-image interpolation, which constrains the trajectory estimation space and yields a tighter surrogate objective for preference optimization. In addition, we introduce a dynamic regularization strategy that adapts the DPO regularization based on (i) the reward gap between winner and loser and (ii) training progress, improving stability and sample efficiency. Experiments on state-of-the-art RF T2I backbones show that PNAPO consistently improves preference metrics while substantially reducing training compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出PNAPO，通过保留噪声对和利用直线插值实现更高效的整流流模型偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像偏好数据集仅存储最终图像，无法有效支持整流流模型；而扩散模型的DPO对齐方法使用独立前向加噪过程估计轨迹，与真实反向动力学不匹配，引入方差。
analysis.problem: 如何为整流流模型设计更精确、高效的偏好对齐方法，避免轨迹估计偏差和计算浪费。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 整流流模型生成由特定先验噪声索引且轨迹近似直线，现有DPO方法因轨迹估计不匹配导致方差大、效率低。
analysis.method: 提出PNAPO，保留生成胜/负图像的配对噪声，将三元组扩展为六元组；利用整流流直线性质通过噪声-图像插值估计中间状态，得到更紧的替代目标；引入动态正则化策略，根据奖励差距和训练进度调整DPO正则化强度。
contributions: 提出PNAPO框架，通过保留配对噪声和直线插值实现整流流模型的高效偏好对齐。
引入动态正则化策略，提升训练稳定性和样本效率。
在多个SOTA整流流T2I骨干上验证，偏好指标一致提升且训练计算大幅减少。
analysis.experiments: 在多个SOTA整流流T2I骨干上进行实验，偏好指标一致提升，训练计算大幅减少。
limitations: 仅适用于整流流模型，不直接适用于其他生成模型。
依赖直线轨迹假设，可能不适用于非线性轨迹模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对整流流模型特性设计，实验验证有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PNAPO，通过保留噪声对和利用直线插值实现更高效的整流流模型偏好对齐。

papers.title: FlashAR: Efficient Post-Training Acceleration for Autoregressive Image Generation
papers.abstract: Large-scale autoregressive models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in image generation. However, their sequential raster-scan decoding relies on strictly next-token prediction, making inference prohibitively expensive. Existing acceleration methods typically either introduce entirely new generation paradigms that necessitate costly pre-training from scratch, or enable parallel generation at the expense of a training-inference gap or altered prediction objectives. In this paper, we introduce FlashAR, a lightweight post-training adaptation framework that efficiently adapts a pre-trained raster-scan autoregressive model into a highly parallel generator based on two-way next-token prediction. Our key insight is that effective adaptation should minimize modifications to the pre-trained model's original training objective to preserve its learned prior. Accordingly, we retain the original AR head as a horizontal head for row-wise prediction and introduce a complementary, lightweight vertical head for column-wise prediction. To facilitate efficient adaptation, we branch the vertical head from an intermediate layer rather than the final layer, bypassing the inherent horizontal head bias. Moreover, since horizontal and vertical predictions capture complementary dependencies whose relative importance varies across target positions, we employ a learnable fusion gate to dynamically combine the two predictions at each position. To further reduce adaptation cost, we propose a two-stage adaptation pipeline: the vertical head is first initialized through adaptation from the pre-trained autoregressive model before jointly fine-tuned with backbone to adapt to the new decoding paradigm. Extensive experiments on LlamaGen and Emu3.5 show that FlashAR achieves up to a 22.9x speedup for 512x512 image generation through a lightweight post-training with merely 0.05% of the original training data.

analysis.tldr: FlashAR 通过轻量级后训练适配，将自回归图像生成模型加速至 22.9 倍，仅需原始训练数据的 0.05%。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模自回归图像生成模型推理成本极高，现有加速方法要么需要从头预训练，要么引入训练-推理差距或改变预测目标，缺乏高效且无损的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变原始模型训练目标的前提下，将预训练的逐光栅扫描自回归模型高效适配为并行生成模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FlashAR 框架，保留原始自回归头作为水平预测头，新增轻量级垂直预测头，从中间层分支以绕过水平头偏差，并通过可学习融合门动态结合两个方向的预测；采用两阶段适配流水线：先初始化垂直头，再与骨干网络联合微调。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级后训练适配框架 FlashAR，将自回归模型转化为双向并行生成模型，实现显著加速。
设计垂直头分支策略和可学习融合门，有效保留预训练先验并适应新解码范式。
在 LlamaGen 和 Emu3.5 上验证，512x512 图像生成加速达 22.9 倍，仅需 0.05% 原始训练数据。
analysis.experiments: 在 LlamaGen 和 Emu3.5 模型上进行实验，512x512 图像生成加速达 22.9 倍，使用 0.05% 原始训练数据。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定自回归架构（如 LlamaGen、Emu3.5），泛化性未验证。
加速效果可能随图像分辨率或模型规模变化，摘要未提供消融实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，与图像生成加速方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlashAR 通过轻量级后训练适配，将自回归图像生成模型加速至 22.9 倍，仅需原始训练数据的 0.05%。

papers.title: Evading Visual Aphasia: Contrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Are low-attention visual tokens truly redundant in vision-language reasoning? Existing pruning methods often assume so, ranking visual tokens by shallow text-to-image attention and discarding low-scoring patches to accelerate LVLM inference. We show that this scalar criterion is unreliable for compositional reasoning: tokens ignored in early layers can later become essential for resolving secondary objects, spatial relations, and contextual cues. Premature pruning can therefore induce Visual Aphasia, a failure mode in which the model loses visual grounding and falls back on language priors. We introduce COAST (COntrastive Adaptive Semantic Token Pruning), a training-free pruning framework that casts compression as adaptive semantic routing. COAST uses native cross-modal attention to identify query-specific anchors and estimate contextual dispersion via attention entropy, then adapts the retention trade-off between semantic evidence and spatial context. It further uses a contrastive routing score to preserve both anchor-aligned evidence and complementary spatial context. Across seven benchmarks, COAST reduces visual tokens by 77.8% and achieves a 2.15x latency speedup while retaining 98.64% of the original average performance. Beyond a single backbone or compression setting, COAST consistently outperforms strong pruning baselines across token budgets and generalizes across multiple LVLM families, showing that adaptive semantic routing is a robust alternative to one-shot scalar pruning

analysis.tldr: 提出COAST，一种无需训练的对比自适应语义令牌剪枝框架，通过自适应语义路由保留关键视觉信息，避免视觉失语症。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉令牌剪枝方法基于浅层文本-图像注意力分数丢弃低分令牌，但该标量标准在组合推理中不可靠，早期丢弃的令牌可能对解析次要物体、空间关系和上下文线索至关重要，导致模型失去视觉基础而依赖语言先验。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉-语言模型中视觉令牌剪枝导致的视觉失语症问题，即模型因过早丢弃关键视觉令牌而丧失视觉基础。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到低注意力视觉令牌并非真正冗余，在组合推理中早期被忽略的令牌可能对解析次要物体、空间关系和上下文线索至关重要，标量剪枝标准不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出COAST框架，利用原生跨模态注意力识别查询特定锚点，通过注意力熵估计上下文分散度，自适应调整语义证据与空间上下文的保留权衡，并使用对比路由分数保留锚点对齐证据和互补空间上下文。
contributions: 揭示视觉令牌剪枝中的视觉失语症现象，证明标量注意力剪枝在组合推理中的不可靠性。
提出COAST，一种无需训练的对比自适应语义令牌剪枝框架，通过自适应语义路由实现高效压缩。
在七个基准上减少77.8%视觉令牌，实现2.15倍加速，保留98.64%原始性能，且跨模型和令牌预算泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在七个基准上评估，COAST减少77.8%视觉令牌，实现2.15倍延迟加速，保留98.64%原始平均性能，且在不同令牌预算和多个LVLM系列上一致优于强剪枝基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定跨模态注意力结构，对非注意力机制模型不适用。
未讨论在极端低令牌预算下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM高效推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出COAST，一种无需训练的对比自适应语义令牌剪枝框架，通过自适应语义路由保留关键视觉信息，避免视觉失语症。

papers.title: AtteConDA: Attention-Based Conflict Suppression in Multi-Condition Diffusion Models and Synthetic Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: Recent conditional image generation methods can improve controllability by generating images that are faithful to conditions such as sketches, human poses, segmentation maps, and depth. By applying these techniques to image augmentation while preserving annotations, generated images can be used as additional training data and can improve recognition performance. However, for high-level driving tasks such as traffic-rule extraction and driving-behavior understanding, simply using annotations as conditions is insufficient. Instead, images must be augmented while preserving the detailed high-level structure of the original scene. One possible solution is to use multiple conditions so that generated images retain diverse structural cues after generation. However, when multiple conditions are used, conflicts among conditions can prevent reliable structure preservation. In this work, we input semantic segmentation, depth, and edges extracted from the original image into a multi-condition image generation model, thereby providing rich structural information as conditions. We further propose a modeling approach for handling conflicts among multiple conditions and show that it enables image generation with stronger structural preservation. We also build a generation framework and evaluation protocol for driving tasks, establishing a basis for comparison with prior and future models. As a result, this work contributes to image generation research by addressing condition conflicts in multi-condition generation and provides an important step toward mitigating data scarcity in high-level autonomous-driving tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出注意力机制抑制多条件扩散模型中的条件冲突，用于驾驶场景数据增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有条件图像生成方法在高级驾驶任务（如交通规则提取、驾驶行为理解）中，仅使用单一条件无法保留原始场景的详细高层结构，而多条件生成又面临条件冲突导致结构保真度下降的问题。
analysis.problem: 多条件图像生成中条件冲突导致结构保真度不足，影响在高级自动驾驶任务中的数据增强效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多条件生成时条件间存在冲突，会阻碍可靠的结构保留。
analysis.method: 提出AtteConDA，通过注意力机制抑制多条件扩散模型中的条件冲突，同时输入语义分割、深度和边缘图作为条件，实现更强结构保留的图像生成。
contributions: 提出一种处理多条件生成中条件冲突的注意力建模方法，增强结构保留。
构建面向驾驶任务的生成框架和评估协议，为后续模型提供比较基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在驾驶场景下验证，泛化性未知。
未提及计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但缺乏实验细节，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出注意力机制抑制多条件扩散模型中的条件冲突，用于驾驶场景数据增强。

papers.title: SimWorld Studio: Automatic Environment Generation with Evolving Coding Agent for Embodied Agent Learning
papers.abstract: LLM/VLM-based digital agents have advanced rapidly thanks to scalable sandboxes for coding, web navigation, and computer use, which provide rich interactive training grounds. In contrast, embodied agents still lack abundant, diverse, and automatically generated 3D environments for interactive learning. Existing embodied simulators rely on manually crafted scenes or procedural templates, while recent LLM-based 3D generation systems mainly produce static scenes rather than deployable environments with verifiable tasks and standard learning interfaces. We introduce SimWorld Studio, an open-source platform built on Unreal Engine 5 for generating evolving embodied learning environments. At its core is SimCoder, a tool/skill-augmented coding agent that writes and executes engine-level code to construct physically grounded 3D worlds from language/image instructions. SimCoder self-evolves by using verifier feedback (e.g., compilation errors, physics checks, VLM critiques) to revise environments and autonomously add reusable tools and skills to its library. Generated worlds are exported as Gym-style environments for embodied agent learning. SimWorld Studio further enables co-evolution between environment generation and embodied learning: agent performance feedback guides SimCoder to generate adaptive curricula near the learner's capability frontier, so that environments become increasingly challenging as the embodied agent improves. Three case studies on embodied navigation show that self-evolution improves generation reliability, generated environments substantially improve embodied agent performance that generalizes to unseen benchmarks, and co-evolution yields an 18-point success-rate gain over fixed-environment learning and a 40-point gain over an untrained agent.

analysis.tldr: 提出SimWorld Studio平台，通过自进化编码智能体SimCoder自动生成可部署的3D环境，用于具身智能体学习，并在导航任务中验证了有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能体缺乏丰富、多样且自动生成的3D环境用于交互学习，现有模拟器依赖手工场景或程序化模板，而LLM-based 3D生成系统主要生成静态场景，无法提供可验证任务和标准学习接口。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成具有可验证任务和标准学习接口的、可演化的3D环境，以支持具身智能体的交互式学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于Unreal Engine 5的开源平台SimWorld Studio，核心是SimCoder——一个工具/技能增强的编码智能体，它根据语言/图像指令编写并执行引擎级代码来构建物理真实的3D世界；SimCoder通过验证器反馈（编译错误、物理检查、VLM批评）自我进化，并自动将可复用工具和技能加入库；生成的世界导出为Gym风格环境；进一步实现环境生成与具身学习的协同进化，智能体性能反馈引导SimCoder生成自适应课程。
contributions: 提出了SimWorld Studio平台，能够自动生成可部署的3D环境用于具身智能体学习。
设计了自进化编码智能体SimCoder，通过验证反馈和工具库积累提升环境生成可靠性。
实现了环境生成与具身学习的协同进化，动态调整任务难度。
在具身导航任务中验证了方法有效性，协同进化相比固定环境学习提升18个百分点的成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在具身导航任务上进行三个案例研究，结果显示：自进化提高了生成可靠性；生成的环境显著提升了具身智能体性能，并泛化到未见基准；协同进化相比固定环境学习获得18个百分点的成功率提升，相比未训练智能体获得40个百分点的提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂任务（如操作、交互）上的验证。
可能依赖Unreal Engine 5，迁移到其他引擎或轻量化场景存在挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（自进化编码智能体+协同进化），实验验证充分，对具身智能领域有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SimWorld Studio平台，通过自进化编码智能体SimCoder自动生成可部署的3D环境，用于具身智能体学习，并在导航任务中验证了有效性。

papers.title: Perception Without Engagement: Dissecting the Causal Discovery Deficit in LMMs
papers.abstract: Although Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved strong performance on general video understanding, their susceptibility to textual prior shortcuts during causal discovery has been recognized as a critical deficit. The underlying mechanisms of this phenomenon remain incompletely understood, as existing benchmarks only measure response accuracy without revealing the sources and extent of the deficit. We introduce ProCauEval, a perturbation-based evaluation protocol that shifts from outcome assessment to mechanism diagnosis, probing causal discovery through five controlled configurations that systematically manipulate visual and textual modalities to decompose their respective contributions to model behavior and dissect the failure modes. Evaluating 17 mainstream LMMs, we find that models faithfully perceive video content yet systematically underexploit it during causal reasoning. We further observe that stronger post-training amplifies rather than mitigates textual prior reliance, and that higher baseline performance correlates with greater fragility under perturbation. To address these, we propose Anti-Distillation Policy Optimization (ADPO), a reinforcement learning framework built on negative teacher alignment, which augments GRPO by explicitly pushing the policy away from a prior-only counterfactual teacher induced by visual corruption. Specifically, ADPO maximizes the divergence between the policy distributions conditioned on the original and visually corrupted inputs, thereby forcing the model to ground its reasoning in visual evidence rather than textual shortcuts. Extensive experiments show that ADPO improves visual engagement without sacrificing fundamental comprehension, thus offering a preliminary step toward reliable causal discovery.

analysis.tldr: LMMs在因果发现中感知到视频内容却未充分利用，ADPO通过强化学习强制模型依赖视觉证据而非文本先验。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LMMs在视频因果发现中易受文本先验捷径影响，但现有基准仅测量响应准确性，无法揭示缺陷来源和程度。
analysis.problem: LMMs在因果发现中系统性未充分利用视频内容，且后训练强化反而加剧文本先验依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：模型忠实感知视频内容但因果推理时未充分利用；更强后训练放大文本先验依赖；更高基线性能与更大扰动脆弱性相关。
analysis.method: 提出ProCauEval扰动评估协议和Anti-Distillation Policy Optimization (ADPO)强化学习框架，通过最大化原始与视觉损坏输入下策略分布的散度，迫使模型依赖视觉证据。
contributions: 提出ProCauEval，一种从结果评估转向机制诊断的扰动评估协议，系统分解视觉和文本模态对因果发现的贡献。
发现LMMs感知视频内容但未充分利用，后训练强化文本先验依赖，高基线性能伴随高脆弱性。
提出ADPO，基于负教师对齐的强化学习框架，有效提升视觉参与度而不牺牲基础理解。
analysis.experiments: 在17个主流LMMs上评估，ADPO提升视觉参与度且不牺牲基础理解。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: ADPO可能增加计算开销，需额外视觉损坏输入。
方法在更复杂因果推理任务上的泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对LMM因果发现缺陷提出新评估协议和优化方法，实验充分，与多模态基础模型方向高度相关。

papers.title: Relational Retrieval: Leveraging Known-Novel Interactions for Generalized Category Discovery
papers.abstract: In this study, we tackle Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) via a Relational Retrieval perspective, explicitly coupling labeled and unlabeled data through bidirectional knowledge transfer. While existing methods treat these sources separately, missing valuable interaction opportunities, we propose Relational Pattern Consistency (RPC) that enables mutual enhancement. RPC employs One-vs-All classifiers for soft ID/OOD decomposition, then introduces two mechanisms: (i) for known-class preservation, we transfer semantic behavioral alignment; (ii) for category discovery, we leverage the insight that samples from the same category maintain invariant relationships with known-class prototypes, transforming unreliable pseudo-labeling into well-defined relational pattern matching. This bidirectional design allows labeled data to guide unlabeled learning while discovering novel categories through their collective relational signatures. Extensive experiments demonstrate RPC achieves state-of-the-art performance on both generic and fine-grained benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出关系模式一致性（RPC）方法，通过已知-未知类别间的双向知识传递实现广义类别发现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有广义类别发现方法将标注和未标注数据分开处理，忽略了它们之间的交互机会，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已知类别与未知类别之间的交互关系，同时提升已知类别的分类准确率和未知类别的发现能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一类别的样本与已知类原型之间保持不变的关系模式，这为替代不可靠的伪标签提供了可能。
analysis.method: 提出关系模式一致性（RPC），使用One-vs-All分类器进行软ID/OOD分解，然后通过语义行为对齐保持已知类别，并通过关系模式匹配发现新类别。
contributions: 提出关系检索视角，显式耦合标注和未标注数据实现双向知识传递。
设计关系模式一致性（RPC）方法，利用已知-未知类别交互提升广义类别发现性能。
analysis.experiments: 在通用和细粒度基准上达到最先进性能，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖已知类别的原型质量，对原型噪声敏感。
关系模式匹配的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验细节不足，与重点方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出关系模式一致性（RPC）方法，通过已知-未知类别间的双向知识传递实现广义类别发现。

papers.title: From Passive Reuse to Active Reasoning: Grounding Large Language Models for Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay
papers.abstract: While experience replay is essential for data efficiency in reinforcement learning (RL), standard methods treat the replay buffer as a passive memory system, prioritizing samples based on numerical prediction errors rather than their semantic significance. This approach stands in contrast to human learning, which accelerates mastery by actively abstracting fragmented experiences into behavioral rules. To bridge this gap, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Experience Replay (NSER), a framework that transforms experience replay from a passive sample reuse mechanism into an active engine for knowledge construction. Specifically, NSER addresses the incompatibility between linguistic reasoning and numerical optimization through a novel neuro-symbolic grounding pipeline. It leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot manner to induce candidate behavioral rules from accumulated trajectories, grounds these insights into differentiable first-order logic representations, and utilizes the resulting symbolic structures to dynamically reweight the replay distribution. By allowing abstract knowledge to directly shape policy optimization, NSER achieves consistent superior sample efficiency and convergence speed across reactive, rule-based, and procedural benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号经验回放（NSER），将LLM诱导的规则转化为可微逻辑表示，动态重加权回放分布，提升强化学习样本效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准经验回放将缓冲区视为被动记忆系统，仅基于数值预测误差排序样本，缺乏语义理解，与人类主动抽象经验为行为规则的学习方式形成对比。
analysis.problem: 如何将经验回放从被动样本复用转变为主动知识构建，使抽象语义规则能直接指导策略优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经符号经验回放（NSER），包含三个步骤：1）零样本使用LLM从累积轨迹中归纳候选行为规则；2）将规则转化为可微一阶逻辑表示；3）利用符号结构动态重加权回放分布，使抽象知识直接塑造策略优化。
contributions: 提出NSER框架，将经验回放从被动复用转变为主动知识构建。
设计神经符号接地管道，解决语言推理与数值优化的不兼容问题。
在反应式、基于规则和程序化基准上验证了样本效率和收敛速度的一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在反应式、基于规则和程序化基准上评估，NSER在样本效率和收敛速度上持续优于基线。
limitations: 依赖LLM的零样本归纳能力，可能受限于LLM对特定任务的理解。
可微逻辑表示的复杂度可能随规则数量增加而增长。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合LLM与神经符号推理解决经验回放核心问题，实验验证充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号经验回放（NSER），将LLM诱导的规则转化为可微逻辑表示，动态重加权回放分布，提升强化学习样本效率。

papers.title: MAG-VLAQ: Multi-modal Aerial-Ground Query Aggregation for Cross-View Place Recognition
papers.abstract: Multi-modal cross-view place recognition remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics due to the severe viewpoint, modality, and spatial-structure discrepancies between ground observations and aerial references. To address this challenge, we present MAG-VLAQ, a foundation-model-enhanced query aggregation framework for multi-modal aerial-ground cross-view place recognition. Specifically, our approach leverages pre-trained foundation models to extract dense visual tokens from both ground and aerial images, as well as expressive geometric tokens from ground LiDAR observations. These heterogeneous tokens are then projected into a shared embedding space for cross-modal alignment and fusion. As our main contribution, we propose ODE-conditioned VLAQ, which tightly couples neural ordinary differential equations (ODE)-based RGB-LiDAR fusion with vectors of locally aggregated queries (VLAQ). In this design, the VLAQ query centers are dynamically adapted according to the fused multi-modal state. This mechanism allows the final global descriptor to preserve globally learned retrieval prototypes while remaining responsive to scene-specific visual and geometric evidence, significantly improving aerial-ground matching. Extensive experiments on KITTI360-AG and nuScenes-AG validate the effectiveness of our proposed MAG-VLAQ. Notably, on KITTI360-AG, our MAG-VLAQ nearly doubles the state-of-the-art performance, achieving 61.1 Recall@1 in the satellite setting, compared with 34.5 from the closest competing approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAG-VLAQ框架，通过ODE条件化VLAQ融合RGB-LiDAR多模态特征，在跨视角地点识别任务上显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 地面与空中视角间的视点、模态和空间结构差异导致跨视角地点识别极具挑战，现有方法难以有效融合异构多模态信息。
analysis.problem: 如何有效聚合地面多模态（RGB和LiDAR）与空中图像特征，实现鲁棒的跨视角地点匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用预训练基础模型提取地面RGB和空中图像的密集视觉token以及地面LiDAR的几何token，投影到共享嵌入空间进行对齐融合；核心创新是ODE条件化VLAQ，通过神经ODE驱动RGB-LiDAR融合，动态调整VLAQ查询中心，使全局描述子兼顾全局检索原型与场景特异性证据。
contributions: 提出MAG-VLAQ框架，实现多模态地面-空中跨视角地点识别。
提出ODE条件化VLAQ机制，将神经ODE融合与局部聚合查询向量结合，动态适应多模态状态。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI360-AG和nuScenes-AG数据集上验证，在KITTI360-AG卫星设置下Recall@1达61.1，接近最先进方法34.5的两倍。
limitations: 依赖预训练基础模型，可能受限于其领域适应性。
ODE融合模块可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（ODE条件化VLAQ），实验性能显著提升，与视觉-语言模型方向相关。

papers.title: SAMOFT: Robust Multi-Object Tracking via Region and Flow
papers.abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is a fundamental task in computer vision that requires continuously tracking multiple targets while maintaining consistent identities across frames. However, most existing approaches primarily rely on instance-level object features for trajectory association, which often leads to degraded performance under challenging conditions such as object deformation, nonlinear motion, and occlusion. In this work, we propose SAMOFT, a robust tracker that leverages pixel-level cues to improve robustness under complex motion scenarios. Specifically, we introduce a Pixel Motion Matching (PMM) module that integrates the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with dense optical flow to refine Kalman filter-based motion prediction using instantaneous foreground pixel motion. To further enhance robustness under unreliable detections, we design a Centroid Distance Matching (CDM) module that performs flexible mask-based centroid matching for low-confidence or partially occluded observations. Moreover, a Distribution-Based Correction (DBC) module models long-tailed motion patterns in a training-free manner using historical optical flow statistics and dynamically corrects trajectory states online. We also incorporate a Cluster-Aware ReID (CA-ReID) strategy to improve the stability and discriminative power of trajectory appearance features. Extensive experiments on the DanceTrack and MOTChallenge benchmarks demonstrate that SAMOFT consistently improves baseline trackers and achieves competitive performance compared with recent state-of-the-art methods, validating the effectiveness of leveraging pixel-level cues for robust multi-object tracking.

analysis.tldr: SAMOFT通过像素级运动匹配和分布校正提升多目标跟踪在遮挡、形变等复杂场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MOT方法主要依赖实例级特征进行轨迹关联，在物体形变、非线性运动和遮挡等挑战下性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何利用像素级线索提升多目标跟踪在复杂运动场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SAMOFT，包含像素运动匹配（PMM）、质心距离匹配（CDM）、分布校正（DBC）和聚类感知ReID（CA-ReID）模块。
contributions: 提出PMM模块，结合SAM和密集光流细化卡尔曼滤波运动预测。
设计CDM模块，对低置信度或部分遮挡观测进行灵活掩码质心匹配。
提出DBC模块，利用历史光流统计无训练地建模长尾运动模式并在线校正轨迹状态。
引入CA-ReID策略提升轨迹外观特征的稳定性和判别力。
analysis.experiments: 在DanceTrack和MOTChallenge基准上，SAMOFT一致提升基线跟踪器，并与近期SOTA方法竞争。
limitations: 可能依赖光流计算效率。

papers.title: Strategic commitments shape collective cybersecurity under AI inequality
papers.abstract: The growing integration of AI into cybersecurity is reshaping the balance between attackers and defenders. When access to advanced AI-enabled defence tools is uneven, resource-limited defenders may be unable to adopt effective protection, creating persistent system vulnerabilities. We study the impact of differential AI access using an evolutionary game-theoretic model in a finite population. We first show that when high-capability defence is costly, the population is driven toward low-cost, weak-defence behaviour, sustaining attacks and weakening long-run security. To address this problem, we introduce differential access to AI defence tools by allowing defenders to choose between low- and high-capability protection based on their resources. We then examine the role of a small group of committed defenders who always adopt strong defence and influence others through social learning. Although commitment increases the prevalence of strong defence, it alone cannot stabilise secure outcomes due to high defence costs. We therefore incorporate a targeted subsidy to remove the cost disadvantage from committed defenders. Our analysis shows that subsidised commitment significantly increases strong defence adoption, suppresses successful attacks, and improves overall system resilience. Simulations across a broad parameter space confirm that subsidies consistently outperform commitment alone. In addition, social-welfare analysis shows improved defender outcomes while keeping attacker gains low. These findings suggest that targeted support for key defenders can be an effective mechanism for stabilising cybersecurity in AI-driven environments and provide a theoretical bridge between cybersecurity policy, AI governance, and strategic allocation of defensive AI capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 通过演化博弈模型研究AI能力不平等下战略承诺对集体网络安全的影响，发现补贴承诺可显著提升强防御采用率并抑制攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: AI融入网络安全改变了攻防平衡，但资源有限的防御者无法采用先进AI防御工具，导致系统持续脆弱，亟需研究AI能力不平等下的防御策略。
analysis.problem: 在AI防御工具访问不均的有限群体中，如何通过战略承诺和补贴机制提升集体网络安全水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高能力防御成本高时，群体倾向于低成本弱防御行为，导致攻击持续且长期安全弱化；仅靠承诺无法稳定安全结果，需结合补贴消除成本劣势。
analysis.method: 使用有限群体演化博弈模型，引入差异化AI防御工具访问，分析承诺者（始终采用强防御）和社会学习的影响，并加入针对性补贴机制。

papers.title: RePO-VLA: Recovery-Driven Policy Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain brittle in long-horizon, contact-rich manipulation because success-only imitation provides little supervision for execution drift, while failed rollouts are often discarded. We introduce RePO-VLA, a recovery-driven policy optimization framework that assigns distinct roles to success, recovery, and failure trajectories. RePO-VLA first applies Recovery-Aware Initialization (RAI), slicing recovery segments and resetting history so corrective actions depend on the current adverse state rather than the preceding failure. It then learns a Progress-Aware Semantic Value Function (PAS-VF), aligning spatiotemporal trajectory features with instructions and successful references. The resulting labels salvage useful failure prefixes via reliability decay, while low-value labels mark drift and terminal breakdowns, teaching differences among nominal, failed, and corrective actions. The data engine turns adverse states into planner-generated or human-collected corrective rollouts, teaching recovery to the success manifold. Value-Conditioned Refinement (VCR) trains the policy to prefer high-progress actions. At deployment, a fixed high value ($v=1.0$) biases actions toward the learned success manifold without online failure detectors or heuristic retries. We introduce FRBench, with standardized error injection and recovery-focused evaluation. Across simulated and real-world bimanual tasks, RePO-VLA improves robustness, raising adversarial success from 20% to 75% on average and up to 80% in scaled real-world trials.

analysis.tldr: RePO-VLA 通过恢复驱动策略优化，将成功、恢复和失败轨迹分别建模，显著提升 VLA 模型在长程接触操作中的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLA 模型仅从成功轨迹模仿学习，缺乏对执行漂移的监督，且失败轨迹常被丢弃，导致在长程接触操作中脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何利用失败和恢复轨迹来提升 VLA 模型在长程接触操作中的鲁棒性和恢复能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RePO-VLA 框架，包含恢复感知初始化（RAI）、进度感知语义值函数（PAS-VF）、数据引擎和值条件精炼（VCR），通过区分成功、恢复和失败轨迹并学习值函数来引导策略偏向成功流形。
contributions: 提出恢复驱动策略优化框架 RePO-VLA，有效利用恢复轨迹提升 VLA 模型鲁棒性。
引入 FRBench 基准，包含标准化错误注入和恢复评估。
在模拟和真实双臂任务中，将对抗成功率从 20% 提升至 75%（平均），真实场景达 80%。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实双臂任务上评估，对抗成功率从 20% 提升至 75%（平均），真实场景达 80%。
limitations: 可能依赖恢复轨迹的收集成本。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning

analysis.one_sentence_summary: RePO-VLA 通过恢复驱动策略优化，将成功、恢复和失败轨迹分别建模，显著提升 VLA 模型在长程接触操作中的鲁棒性。

papers.title: AnyDepth-DETR/-YOLO: Any-depth object detection with a single network
papers.abstract: Modern object detectors are static, fixed-depth networks optimized for a single operating point, requiring separate models for different deployment scenarios. We present an any-depth detection framework that enables a single network to span a continuous range of accuracy--efficiency trade-offs by controlling depth at inference time without retraining. Each backbone and neck stage is divided into an essential path, which always executes, and a skippable refinement path; this decomposition preserves the full multi-scale feature hierarchy at every depth configuration, unlike conventional early exiting that discards entire stages. To train such a network, jointly optimizing many sub-networks of varying depth introduces conflicting gradient signals. We address this via self-distillation between only the two extremes, with prediction-level and feature-level alignment losses that enforce stage-wise modularity, ensuring the outputs of each stage remain compatible regardless of the paths taken. Instantiated on RT-DETR and YOLOv12, our full-depth configurations match or surpass their respective SOTA baselines with negligible parameter overhead, while the most efficient configurations achieve up to $1.82\times$ speedup at a cost of only 2.0 AP, all from a single set of weights.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种任意深度检测框架，使单个网络在推理时通过控制深度实现精度-效率连续权衡，无需重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代目标检测器是静态固定深度网络，针对单一操作点优化，不同部署场景需要不同模型，导致资源浪费和部署不便。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个单一网络，使其在推理时能灵活调整深度以覆盖连续的精度-效率权衡，同时保持多尺度特征层次结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 联合优化多个不同深度的子网络会产生冲突的梯度信号；传统提前退出方法丢弃整个阶段，破坏了多尺度特征层次。
analysis.method: 将每个骨干和颈部阶段划分为始终执行的必要路径和可跳过的精炼路径；通过仅两个极端子网络之间的自蒸馏（预测级和特征级对齐损失）来训练，确保阶段级模块化。
contributions: 提出任意深度检测框架，支持单个网络在推理时连续控制深度。
设计阶段分解策略和自蒸馏训练方法，解决多子网络联合优化的梯度冲突。
在RT-DETR和YOLOv12上验证，全深度配置匹配或超越SOTA，高效配置实现1.82倍加速仅损失2.0 AP。
analysis.experiments: 在RT-DETR和YOLOv12上实验，全深度配置匹配或超越SOTA基线，高效配置实现最高1.82倍加速，AP损失仅2.0。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构（如RT-DETR和YOLOv12），泛化性待验证。

papers.title: Let the Target Select for Itself: Data Selection via Target-Aligned Paths
papers.abstract: Targeted data selection aims to identify training samples from a large candidate pool that improve performance on a specific downstream task. Many recent methods estimate candidate utility by aggregating local attribution scores along a trajectory induced by the candidate pool. When the pool is heterogeneous, however, this reference trajectory may be misaligned with the dynamics of a target-aligned selected subset, creating what we call reference path bias. We propose an alternative reference path: a validation-induced flow obtained from a short, capacity-limited warmup on the available target validation proxy. Along this path, candidates are scored by a normalized endpoint loss drop, yielding a simple zero-order selection rule that requires no candidate gradients or Hessian approximations. Across controlled logistic, vision, and instruction-tuning experiments, this score is competitive with strong dynamic attribution baselines while substantially reducing warmup and storage cost. Moreover, since the reference trajectory is decoupled from any specific candidate pool, the same compact warmup can be reused across additional pools without recomputing the trajectory.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过目标对齐路径进行数据选择的方法，无需候选梯度或Hessian近似，在多个任务上达到竞争性能并降低开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有目标数据选择方法在异构候选池中因参考轨迹与目标对齐子集动态不匹配而产生参考路径偏差，且需要大量计算资源。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效、无偏的数据选择方法，避免参考路径偏差并降低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当候选池异构时，基于候选池诱导轨迹的局部归因分数聚合会产生参考路径偏差，导致选择效果下降。
analysis.method: 提出使用验证诱导流作为参考路径，该路径通过在目标验证代理上进行短时、容量受限的预热获得，然后沿此路径用归一化端点损失下降作为候选分数，形成零阶选择规则。
contributions: 识别并形式化了参考路径偏差问题
提出一种无需候选梯度或Hessian近似的零阶数据选择方法，显著降低预热和存储成本
在逻辑回归、视觉和指令微调实验中验证了方法的竞争性和效率
analysis.experiments: 在逻辑回归、视觉和指令微调任务上进行实验，与强动态归因基线比较，方法在性能上具有竞争力，同时大幅降低预热和存储成本。
limitations: 可能依赖目标验证代理的质量
未在更大规模或更复杂任务上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且有效，但实验规模有限，适合关注数据选择的读者阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过目标对齐路径进行数据选择的方法，无需候选梯度或Hessian近似，在多个任务上达到竞争性能并降低开销。

papers.title: Sparsity Moves Computation: How FFN Architecture Reshapes Attention in Small Transformers
papers.abstract: Architectural choices inside the Transformer feedforward network (FFN) block do not merely affect the block itself; they reshape the computations learned by the rest of the model. We study this effect in one-layer Transformers trained on digit addition with carry, modular arithmetic, and histogram counting. Comparing dense FFNs, gated linear units (GLUs), mixture-of-experts (MoE), and MoE-GLUs, we find that sparse MoE routing can shift computation from FFN to attention, with the strongest ablation-visible effect on carry-based addition. We decompose this redistribution into reduced per-token FFN capacity and sparse partitioning across experts. Critically, frozen random routing nearly matches learned routing, suggesting that redistribution is driven largely by architectural sparsity rather than router-learned specialization. As a secondary finding, GLU-style multiplicative gating rotates task-relevant Fourier structure out of the per-neuron basis and into distributed subspaces, making neuron-level interpretability less informative while preserving structured computation. We validate these conclusions with random-routing, narrow-FFN, and top-2 MoE controls, plus parameter-matching, activation-function, and width-scaling analyses. Together, these results show that local FFN design choices can have nonlocal consequences for Transformer computation.

analysis.tldr: FFN架构稀疏性（如MoE）会将计算从FFN转移到注意力层，且随机路由几乎与学习路由效果相同。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer中FFN架构选择对整体模型计算的影响尚不明确，理解这种非局部效应有助于设计更高效的模型。
analysis.problem: 研究FFN架构（如MoE、GLU）如何改变小型Transformer中注意力与FFN之间的计算分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 稀疏MoE路由将计算从FFN转移到注意力层，尤其在进位加法任务上效果显著；GLU门控将任务相关的傅里叶结构分散到子空间，降低神经元级可解释性。
analysis.method: 在单层Transformer上训练数字加法（带进位）、模运算和直方图计数任务，比较密集FFN、GLU、MoE和MoE-GLU，并通过随机路由、窄FFN、top-2 MoE等控制实验分析计算重分配机制。
contributions: 发现稀疏MoE架构将计算从FFN转移到注意力层，且主要由架构稀疏性而非路由学习驱动。
揭示GLU门控将傅里叶结构分散到分布式子空间，降低神经元级可解释性但保持结构化计算。
analysis.experiments: 在三种任务（进位加法、模运算、直方图计数）上比较多种FFN变体，并进行了随机路由、窄FFN、top-2 MoE、参数匹配、激活函数和宽度缩放分析。
limitations: 仅研究单层小型Transformer，结论在深层大模型上可能不成立。
任务局限于算术和计数，未涉及自然语言等更复杂场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，但实验规模较小，对大型模型的影响需进一步验证。

papers.title: Empowering VLMs for Few-Shot Multimodal Time Series Classification via Tailored Agentic Reasoning
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose the first VL$\underline{\textbf{M}}$ $\underline{\textbf{a}}$gentic $\underline{\textbf{r}}$easoning framework for few-$\underline{\textbf{s}}$hot multimodal $\underline{\textbf{T}}$ime $\underline{\textbf{S}}$eries $\underline{\textbf{C}}$lassification ($\textbf{MarsTSC}$), which introduces a self-evolving knowledge bank as a dynamic context iteratively refined via reflective agentic reasoning. The framework comprises three collaborative roles: i) Generator conducts reliable classification via reasoning; ii) Reflector diagnoses the root causes of reasoning errors to yield discriminative insights targeting the temporal features overlooked by Generator; iii) Modifier applies verified updates to the knowledge bank to prevent context collapse. We further introduce a test-time update strategy to enable cautious, continuous knowledge bank refinement to mitigate few-shot bias and distribution shift. Extensive experiments across 12 mainstream time series benchmarks demonstrate that $\textbf{MarsTSC}$ delivers substantial and consistent performance gains across 6 VLM backbones, outperforming both classical and foundation model-based time series baselines under few-shot conditions, while producing interpretable rationales that ground each classification decision in human-readable feature evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个VLM智能体推理框架MarsTSC，通过自演化知识库和反思性推理实现少样本多模态时间序列分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 少样本多模态时间序列分类面临标注稀缺和分布偏移挑战，现有方法缺乏可解释性和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉语言模型（VLM）在少样本条件下进行多模态时间序列分类，并生成可解释的推理依据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MarsTSC框架，包含三个协作角色：Generator进行推理分类，Reflector诊断错误原因并提取时间特征洞察，Modifier更新知识库；并引入测试时更新策略缓解少样本偏差和分布偏移。
contributions: 首个将VLM智能体推理用于少样本多模态时间序列分类的框架。
提出自演化知识库和反思性推理机制，实现动态上下文优化。
在12个基准数据集上验证了显著性能提升和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在12个主流时间序列基准上，使用6种VLM骨干网络，与经典和基础模型基线对比，取得一致性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的预训练质量，对未见过的模态泛化能力未知。
测试时更新策略可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: HyNeuralMap: Hyperbolic Mapping of Visual Semantics to Neural Hierarchies
papers.abstract: Understanding the intricate mappings between visual stimuli and neural responses is a fundamental challenge in cognitive neuroscience. While current approaches predominantly align images and functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) responses in Euclidean space, this geometry often struggles to preserve fine-grained semantic relationships and latent hierarchical structures across visual and neural modalities. To overcome this, we propose HyNeuralMap, a framework that employ hyperbolic Lorentz model to map visual semantics into a shared, cross-subject neural hierarchy. By leveraging the negative curvature of hyperbolic space as an inductive bias, the proposed framework better captures hierarchical semantic organization and cross-subject neural similarities. Specifically, visual and neural embeddings are jointly optimized through hyperbolic geometric alignment, where geodesic distances preserve semantic proximity and hierarchical relationships more effectively than Euclidean embeddings. Experiments demonstrate that HyNeuralMap consistently outperforms state-of-the-art Euclidean baselines in both multi-label semantic prediction and cross-modal retrieval tasks. This confirms hyperbolic geometry's superiority for cross-modal semantic alignment and hierarchical modeling, providing a new avenue for vision-neural representation learning.

analysis.tldr: HyNeuralMap利用双曲几何对齐视觉与fMRI神经信号，更好地捕捉层次化语义结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在欧几里得空间中对齐视觉刺激与fMRI响应，难以保持细粒度语义关系和潜在的层次结构，限制了跨模态神经表征学习的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何将视觉语义与跨被试的神经响应在共享的层次化结构中对齐，以提升语义预测和跨模态检索性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HyNeuralMap框架，采用双曲Lorentz模型将视觉语义映射到共享的跨被试神经层次中，通过双曲几何对齐联合优化视觉和神经嵌入，利用测地距离保持语义邻近性和层次关系。
contributions: 首次将双曲几何引入视觉-神经跨模态对齐，利用负曲率作为归纳偏置捕捉层次化语义组织。
在多项任务上超越欧几里得基线，验证了双曲几何在跨模态语义对齐和层次建模中的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在多标签语义预测和跨模态检索任务上，HyNeuralMap持续优于最先进的欧几里得基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量fMRI数据，跨被试泛化性需进一步验证。
双曲空间训练复杂度较高，大规模数据扩展性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，双曲几何应用于神经解码有潜力，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyNeuralMap利用双曲几何对齐视觉与fMRI神经信号，更好地捕捉层次化语义结构。

papers.title: Do Linear Probes Generalize Better in Persona Coordinates?
papers.abstract: It is becoming increasingly necessary to have monitors check for harmful behaviors during language model interactions, but text-only monitoring has not been sufficient. This is because models sometimes exhibit strategic deception and sandbagging, changing their behavior during evaluation. This motivates the use of white-box monitors like linear probes, which can read the model internals directly. Currently, such probes can fail under distribution shift, limiting their usefulness in real settings. We study whether there exists a low-dimensional subspace of the model internals that captures harmful behaviors more robustly, while leaving out spuriously correlative features. Inspired by the Assistant Axis and Persona Selection Model, we construct persona axes for deception and sycophancy using contrastive persona prompts. The first principal components, obtained by unsupervised PCA of the persona-specific vectors, cleanly separate harmful and harmless personas. Across 10 evaluation datasets, we show that persona-derived directions transfer non-trivially and probes trained on persona-PC projections generalize better than probes trained on raw activations. We also find that a unified axis consisting of multiple harmful and harmless behaviors improves generalization across behaviors and datasets. Overall, persona vectors provide a useful inductive bias for building more transferable behavior probes.

analysis.tldr: 通过对比人格提示构建低维子空间，线性探针在人格坐标上比原始激活泛化更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本监控不足以检测语言模型中的策略性欺骗和沙袋行为，白盒探针在分布偏移下失效，需要更鲁棒的内部监控方法。
analysis.problem: 线性探针在分布偏移下泛化能力不足，容易受虚假相关特征影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在评估时可能改变行为（策略性欺骗），导致基于原始激活的探针失效；人格向量通过PCA能清晰分离有害/无害人格。
analysis.method: 使用对比人格提示构建人格轴（欺骗、谄媚），对人格特定向量进行无监督PCA，取第一主成分作为低维子空间，训练线性探针。
contributions: 提出基于人格坐标的低维子空间用于构建鲁棒行为探针
在10个评估数据集上证明人格派生方向具有非平凡迁移性，探针泛化优于原始激活探针
发现统一轴（包含多种有害/无害行为）能提升跨行为和跨数据集的泛化
analysis.experiments: 在10个评估数据集上比较了基于人格PC投影的探针与基于原始激活的探针的泛化性能。
limitations: 仅针对欺骗和谄媚行为，其他有害行为未验证
依赖对比人格提示的构造质量

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对比人格提示构建低维子空间，线性探针在人格坐标上比原始激活泛化更好。

papers.title: NEXUS: Continual Learning of Symbolic Constraints for Safe and Robust Embodied Planning
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have catalyzed progress in embodied intelligence, a fundamental gap between their inherent probabilistic uncertainty and the strict determinism and verifiable safety required in the physical world. To mitigate this gap, this paper introduces NEXUS, a modular framework designed for continual learning in embodied agents. Different from prior works that treat symbolic artifacts merely as static interfaces, NEXUS leverages them for symbolic grounding and knowledge evolution. The framework explicitly decouples physical feasibility from safety specifications: capability of agents is improved through closed-loop execution feedback, while probabilistic risk assessments are grounded into deterministic hard constraints to establish a rigorous pre-action defense. Experiments on SafeAgentBench demonstrate that NEXUS achieves superior task success rates while effectively refusing unsafe instructions, exhibiting robust defense against adversarial attacks, and progressively improving planning efficiency through knowledge accumulation.

analysis.tldr: NEXUS通过持续学习符号约束，在具身规划中实现安全与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在具身智能中取得进展，但其概率不确定性与物理世界所需的严格确定性和可验证安全性之间存在根本差距。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合LLM的概率不确定性与具身规划中安全约束的确定性要求之间的鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出模块化框架NEXUS，将物理可行性与安全规范解耦，通过闭环执行反馈提升能力，将概率风险评估转化为确定性硬约束，实现持续学习。
contributions: 提出NEXUS框架，实现具身代理中符号约束的持续学习。
将物理可行性与安全规范解耦，建立严格的行动前防御机制。
analysis.experiments: 在SafeAgentBench上实验，NEXUS实现了更高的任务成功率，有效拒绝不安全指令，对对抗攻击具有鲁棒性，并通过知识积累逐步提高规划效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定仿真环境，泛化性待验证。
持续学习中的知识遗忘问题未明确讨论。

papers.title: Kinetic-Optimal Scheduling with Moment Correction for Metric-Induced Discrete Flow Matching in Zero-Shot Text-to-Speech
papers.abstract: Metric-induced discrete flow matching (MI-DFM) exploits token-latent geometry for discrete generation, but its practical use is limited by two issues: heuristic schedulers requiring hyperparameter search, and finite-step path-tracking error from its first-order continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) solver. We address both issues. First, we derive a kinetic-optimal scheduler for prescribed scalar-parameterized probability paths, and instantiate it for MI-DFM as a training-free numerical schedule that traverses the path at constant Fisher-Rao speed. Second, we introduce a finite-step moment correction that adjusts the jump probability while preserving the CTMC jump destination distribution. We validate the resulting method, GibbsTTS, on codec-based zero-shot text-to-speech (TTS). Under controlled comparisons with a unified architecture and large-scale dataset, GibbsTTS achieves the best objective naturalness and is preferred in subjective evaluations over masked discrete generative baselines. Additionally, in comparison with the evaluated state-of-the-art TTS systems, GibbsTTS shows strong speaker similarity, achieving the highest similarity on three of four test sets and ranking second on the fourth. Project page: https://ydqmkkx.github.io/GibbsTTSProject

analysis.tldr: 提出动力学最优调度器和有限步矩校正，提升离散流匹配在零样本语音合成中的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 度量诱导离散流匹配（MI-DFM）利用令牌-潜在几何进行离散生成，但受限于启发式调度器需要超参数搜索和有限步路径跟踪误差。
analysis.problem: 解决MI-DFM中调度器依赖超参数搜索和CTMC求解器有限步路径跟踪误差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 推导动力学最优调度器，以恒定Fisher-Rao速度遍历路径；引入有限步矩校正，调整跳转概率同时保持CTMC跳转目标分布。
contributions: 提出动力学最优调度器，无需训练即可实现恒定Fisher-Rao速度调度。
引入有限步矩校正方法，减少路径跟踪误差。
在零样本语音合成任务上验证了GibbsTTS的有效性，达到最佳客观自然度和强说话人相似性。
analysis.experiments: 在统一架构和大规模数据集上，与掩码离散生成基线比较，GibbsTTS在客观自然度上最佳，主观评价中更受偏好；与SOTA TTS系统比较，在四个测试集中三个取得最高说话人相似度，另一个排名第二。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于特定的概率路径参数化。
矩校正的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。

papers.title: LiteMedCoT-VL: Parameter-Efficient Adaptation for Medical Visual Question Answering
papers.abstract: The reasoning gap between large and compact vision-language models (VLMs) limits the deployment of medical AI on portable clinical devices. Compact VLMs of 2--4B parameters can run on resource-constrained hardware but lack the multi-step reasoning capacity needed for interpretable clinical decision support. Existing knowledge distillation methods transfer answers without the reasoning process behind them. Medical visual question answering (VQA) serves as a testbed for this problem, as it requires models to integrate visual evidence with clinical knowledge through structured reasoning chains. We introduce LiteMedCoT-VL, a pipeline that transfers chain-of-thought reasoning from a 235B teacher model to 2B student models through LoRA-based fine-tuning on explanation-enriched training data. All inference is conducted without image captions by default, simulating the clinical scenario in which a physician interprets a medical image directly without an accompanying radiology report. On the PMC-VQA benchmark, LiteMedCoT-VL achieves 64.9% accuracy, exceeding the zero-shot Qwen3-VL-4B baseline of 53.9% by 11.0 percentage points and outperforming all published baselines. This result indicates that a 2B model with reasoning distillation can match or exceed models with twice the parameters. Visual grounding analysis shows that the model relies on image content rather than exploiting textual priors. Our code is publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiteMedCoT-VL.

analysis.tldr: 通过LoRA微调将235B教师模型的思维链推理蒸馏到2B学生模型，在医学VQA上超越所有已发表基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 紧凑型VLM（2-4B参数）可在资源受限设备上运行，但缺乏可解释的多步推理能力，而现有知识蒸馏方法仅传递答案不传递推理过程，限制了医学AI在便携临床设备上的部署。
analysis.problem: 如何将大型教师模型的结构化推理能力高效迁移到紧凑型学生模型，以提升医学视觉问答的可解释性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LiteMedCoT-VL流水线，通过LoRA微调在解释增强的训练数据上，将235B教师模型的思维链推理蒸馏到2B学生模型，推理时默认不使用图像标题。
contributions: 提出一种参数高效的思维链蒸馏方法，使紧凑VLM获得多步推理能力。
在PMC-VQA基准上达到64.9%准确率，超过所有已发表基线，且2B模型性能可媲美更大参数模型。
analysis.experiments: 在PMC-VQA基准上评估，LiteMedCoT-VL达到64.9%准确率，超过零样本Qwen3-VL-4B基线（53.9%）11个百分点，并超越所有已发表基线。视觉归因分析表明模型依赖图像内容而非文本先验。
limitations: 仅在一个基准上验证，泛化性未知。
蒸馏过程依赖教师模型生成的解释数据，质量可能影响学生性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，与VLM和医学应用高度相关，推荐精读。

papers.title: Learning-Augmented Scalable Linear Assignment Problem Optimization via Neural Dual Warm-Starts
papers.abstract: The Linear Assignment Problem (LAP) is a fundamental combinatorial optimization task with applications ranging from computer vision to logistics. Classical exact solvers such as the Hungarian and Jonker-Volgenant (LAPJV) algorithms guarantee optimality, but their cubic time complexity $\mathcal{O}(N^{3})$ becomes a bottleneck for large-scale instances. Recent learning-based approaches aim to replace these solvers with neural models, often sacrificing exactness or failing to scale due to memory constraints. We propose a learning-augmented framework that accelerates exact assignment solvers while maintaining optimality and worst-case guarantees. Our method predicts dual variables to warm-start a classical solver, with a fallback that prevents asymptotic runtime degradation when the learned advice is unreliable. We introduce RowDualNet, a lightweight row-independent architecture that avoids the $\mathcal{O}(N^{2})$ memory bottleneck of graph-based models, enabling neural warm-starting at large scale ($N=16{,}384$). Feasibility is ensured via a constructive mechanism based on LP duality (namely, the Min-Trick), eliminating costly iterative projection. Empirically, our approach reduces the search effort of LAPJV and achieves over $2{\times}$ speedups on challenging synthetic distributions, in addition to improving over $1.25{\times}$ and $1.5{\times}$ on real-world tracking (MOT) and transportation (LPT) datasets, respectively, while strictly maintaining full optimality, effectively yielding a robust zero-shot generalization to real-world tasks.

analysis.tldr: 通过轻量神经网络预测对偶变量热启动经典线性分配问题求解器，实现大规模加速且保持最优性。
analysis.research_motivation: 线性分配问题（LAP）的经典精确求解器（如匈牙利算法）时间复杂度为O(N³)，在大规模实例上成为瓶颈；现有学习方法要么牺牲精确性，要么因内存限制无法扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲最优性和最坏情况保证的前提下，加速大规模线性分配问题的精确求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出学习增强框架，使用轻量神经网络RowDualNet预测对偶变量，热启动经典求解器LAPJV；通过基于LP对偶的Min-Trick构造机制保证可行性，避免迭代投影；并设计回退机制防止学习建议不可靠时渐近性能退化。
contributions: 提出学习增强框架，在保持最优性和最坏情况保证下加速精确LAP求解器。
设计RowDualNet架构，避免O(N²)内存瓶颈，支持大规模（N=16384）神经热启动。
通过Min-Trick保证对偶变量可行性，无需昂贵迭代投影。
在合成和真实数据集上实现显著加速，且零样本泛化到真实任务。
analysis.experiments: 在合成分布上实现LAPJV搜索减少和超过2倍加速，在真实MOT和LPT数据集上分别实现超过1.25倍和1.5倍加速，且严格保持最优性。
limitations: 可能对特定分布的学习效果依赖训练数据。
加速倍数在部分真实数据集上有限（1.25x-1.5x）。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合学习与经典算法，实验显示加速效果，但属于组合优化特定领域，与重点方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轻量神经网络预测对偶变量热启动经典线性分配问题求解器，实现大规模加速且保持最优性。

papers.title: EduStory: A Unified Framework for Pedagogically-Consistent Multi-Shot STEM Instructional Video Generation
papers.abstract: Long-horizon video generation has advanced in visual quality, yet existing methods still struggle to maintain knowledge consistency and coherent pedagogical narratives across multi-shot instructional videos, especially in STEM domains. To address these challenges, we propose EduStory, a unified framework for reliable instructional video generation. EduStory integrates pedagogical state modeling to track persistent knowledge states, script-guided structured control to organize multi-shot narratives, and learning-oriented evaluation metrics to assess knowledge fidelity and constraint satisfaction. To support rigorous evaluation, we further introduce EduVideoBench, a diagnostic benchmark with multi-granularity annotations, including pedagogical storyboards, shot-level semantics, and knowledge state transitions, together with baseline tasks for controllable instructional video generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that domain-aware state modeling and structured control substantially reduce narrative breakdown and improve alignment with instructional intent. These results highlight the significance of domain-specific structural constraints and tailored benchmarks for advancing reliable, controllable, and also trustworthy long-horizon video generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出EduStory框架，通过教学状态建模和结构化控制生成知识一致的多镜头STEM教学视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长视频生成方法在STEM教学视频中难以保持知识一致性和连贯的教学叙事，缺乏领域特定的结构约束和评估基准。
analysis.problem: 多镜头教学视频生成中的知识一致性和叙事连贯性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在生成多镜头教学视频时会出现叙事断裂，与教学意图的对齐不足。

papers.title: From Detection to Recovery: Operational Analysis on LLM Pre-training with 504 GPUs
papers.abstract: Large-scale AI training is now fundamentally a distributed systems problem, and hardware failures have become routine operating conditions rather than rare exceptions. Public operational evidence from production training clusters, however, remains scarce. This technical report presents an empirical analysis of a 63-node NVIDIA B200 production cluster (504 GPUs), using 55 days of Prometheus time-series data and 73 days of operational logs covering 224 multi-node training sessions. The cluster operates within a cross-organizational environment in which five parties (SKT, Upstage, Lablup, NVIDIA Korea, and VAST Data) share a unified monitoring pipeline. This arrangement enabled joint diagnosis of a 60-node-scale storage I/O bottleneck that did not appear at 2-4-node scale, a production-scale phenomenon no single team could isolate alone. Drawing on a months-long pre-training campaign, we perform three quantitative analyses yielding four findings. First, statistical analysis over 751 Prometheus metrics and 10 XID-identified GPU failures achieves a 10/10 detection rate (2/10 pre-XID) at ~0.84 false positives per day. No single metric is consistently dominant across failure types, motivating a multi-signal detection strategy. Second, profiling 523 checkpoint events along the GPU VRAM to NFS path attributes the "bandwidth paradox" (1.4-10.4% utilization of 200 Gbps RoCE) to saturation of the 128-slot NFS RPC layer. Third, multi-node failure response shows concentrated exclusions (top 3 of 63 nodes account for >50% of all exclusions) and an auto-retry chain success rate of 33.3% over 12 chains (73 attempts), 2.7x the 12.5% manual recovery rate; the median retry interval is 11 min (IQR 10-11). All analyses are grounded in production infrastructure providing session-level workload management, GPU-centric scheduling, and unified observability.

analysis.tldr: 基于504 GPU生产集群的55天监控数据，系统分析了LLM预训练中的硬件故障检测、存储瓶颈与自动恢复机制。

papers.title: Explainable Knowledge Tracing via Probabilistic Embeddings and Pattern-based Reasoning
papers.abstract: Knowledge Tracing (KT) models students' knowledge states based on learning interactions to predict performance. While deep learning-based KT models have boosted predictive accuracy, most models rely on deterministic vector embeddings and opaque latent state transitions, limiting interpretability regarding how specific past behaviors influence predictions. To address this limitation, we propose Probabilistic Logical Knowledge Tracing (PLKT), an interpretable KT framework that formulates prediction as a goal-conditioned evidence reasoning process over historical learning behaviors. Instead of representing knowledge states as deterministic vector embeddings, PLKT employs robust Beta-distributed probabilistic embeddings to represent student knowledge states. This probabilistic foundation allows us to model the uncertainty of historical behaviors and perform explicit logical operations (e.g., conjunction), constructing transparent reasoning paths that reveal how specific past interactions contribute to the prediction. Extensive experiments show that PLKT outperforms state-of-the-art KT methods while achieving superior interpretability. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PLKT-D3CE/.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率逻辑知识追踪（PLKT），用Beta分布嵌入和显式逻辑推理实现可解释的知识追踪。

papers.title: Towards a Virtual Neuroscientist: Autonomous Neuroimaging Analysis via Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: Transforming neuroimaging data into clinically actionable biomarkers is a knowledge-intensive and labor-intensive process. Standardized workflows such as fMRIPrep have improved robustness and efficiency, but they are statically configured and cannot reason about downstream objectives, deliberate over alternative strategies, or close the loop between intermediate evidence and subsequent decisions in the way a human researcher would. This lack of closed-loop adaptation often leaves domain experts trapped in a cycle of manual trial-and-error to tune parameters and remediate pipeline failures, severely constraining the scalability of clinical biomarker development. To bridge this gap, we introduce NIAgent, a multi-agent system for autonomous end-to-end neuroimaging analysis. Unlike conventional flat tool-calling agents, NIAgent adopts a code-centric execution paradigm where specialist agents collaboratively synthesize and optimize executable programs over composable domain-specific primitives. This design enables robust, long-horizon workflow construction that adapts dynamically to runtime observations. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical verification framework for autonomous quality control, integrating cohort-level metric screening with agentic visual inspection to drive evidence-grounded workflow remediation. Experiments on ADHD-200 and ADNI demonstrate that NIAgent outperforms standard workflow-based baselines in predictive performance while exhibiting sophisticated agentic behaviors, including strategy exploration and adaptive refinement.

analysis.tldr: 提出NIAgent多智能体系统，实现自主神经影像分析，通过代码执行和分层验证提升预测性能。

papers.title: Position: Avoid Overstretching LLMs for every Enterprise Task
papers.abstract: Enterprise workloads are dominated by deterministic, structured, and knowledge-dependent tasks operating under strict cost, latency, and reliability constraints. While these are often addressed through large language model (LLM) deployment or distillation into smaller models, we argue this is inefficient, unreliable, and misaligned with enterprise task structures. Instead, AI systems should treat language models as interfaces rather than monolithic engines, externalizing knowledge and computation into dedicated components for greater reliability, scalability, and transparency. Our theoretical evidences show that finite-capacity models cannot fully capture the breadth of knowledge required for enterprise tasks, creating inherent limits to efficiency and interpretability. Building on this, we take the position that language models should primarily be used for structured extraction in deterministic enterprise workflows, while computation and storage are delegated to knowledge bases and symbolic procedures. We formally demonstrate that such modular architectures are more reliable and maintainable than monolithic frameworks, offering a sustainable foundation for enterprise tasks.

analysis.tldr: 论文主张企业任务应避免过度依赖LLM，提出将语言模型作为接口、外化知识与计算的模块化架构更可靠。

papers.title: FrameTwin: Curve-Anchored Gaussian Alignment from Sparse Views for Adaptive Wireframe 3D Printing
papers.abstract: We present FrameTwin, a curve-anchored Gaussian alignment framework that uses sparse-view images to close the control loop for adaptive wireframe 3D printing. Our key idea is to capture the deformation of thin wireframe structures from sparse-view images using Gaussian kernels anchored to parametric curves, yielding a compact and geometry-aware encoding that explicitly captures strut topology. Driven by a differentiable rendering pipeline, FrameTwin estimates a neural deformation field that aligns the partially printed target model with the deformed structure observed during fabrication, where the optimized curve-Gaussian representation serves as a digital twin of the evolving wireframe. Unlike general Gaussian-splatting approaches, our formulation constrains kernel placement along parametric curves, substantially reducing the ambiguity inherent in sparse-view observations of thin structures. The resultant deformation-field alignment enforces global consistency across all struts. By using the estimated deformation field to blend the distorted printed geometry with the remaining unprinted geometry, FrameTwin enables adaptive updates to future printing trajectories. We demonstrate that FrameTwin can robustly capture and compensate for deformation in wireframe models fabricated using a robotized 3D printing system.

analysis.tldr: 提出曲线锚定高斯对齐框架，利用稀疏视图图像实现自适应线框3D打印的变形补偿。
