papers.title: Your Simulation Runs but Solves the Wrong Physics: PDE-Grounded Intent Verification for LLM-Generated Multiphysics Simulation Code
papers.abstract: Execution-based evaluation of LLM-generated code implicitly treats successful execution as a proxy for correctness. In scientific simulation, this proxy is insufficient: a generated input file can run, mesh, and converge while encoding governing equations that differ from the user's intent. We call this mismatch between intended physics and generated code the comprehension-generation gap. We instantiate this in MOOSE, where Kernel and BC objects map compositionally to weak-form residual terms, enabling deterministic reconstruction of the encoded PDE and comparison against an intended contract. We formalize this comparison as the Intent Fidelity Score (IFS), a structural metric covering governing terms, BCs, ICs, coefficients, and time scheme. Building on IFS, we develop a PDE-grounded refinement loop that uses deterministic violation reports to correct generated code iteratively. We evaluate on MooseBench, a 220-case multiphysics benchmark with PDE-level ground truth released with this work. On this benchmark, our method consistently improves mean IFS over direct generation, with gains concentrated on hard cases. On the subset where direct generation falls below IFS 0.7, refinement adds +0.22 to +0.41 absolute IFS. In the deployment audit, execution-only repair improves execution success while leaving 39-40% of all 220 cases runnable but still solving the wrong physics across the three main deployment-audit models, exposing executability and intent fidelity as separable failure modes. Static proof-of-concept experiments on four PDE-oriented DSLs (UFL/FEniCS, FreeFEM, FiPy, and Devito) suggest that the reconstruction-and-comparison pattern extends beyond MOOSE. These findings reinforce that executable simulation code should be verified against the mathematical structure it is intended to encode, not accepted on execution alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出意图保真度分数(IFS)和PDE接地精炼循环，用于验证LLM生成的多物理场仿真代码是否编码了正确的物理方程。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的科学仿真代码即使能成功运行，也可能编码了与用户意图不同的控制方程，而传统的基于执行的评估无法检测这种物理意图偏差。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在MOOSE框架中，Kernel和BC对象组合映射到弱形式残差项，使得可以确定性重建编码的PDE并与预期契约比较；执行修复可提高运行成功率，但仍有39-40%的案例运行成功但物理错误。
analysis.method: 提出意图保真度分数(IFS)作为结构度量，覆盖控制项、边界条件、初始条件、系数和时间方案；基于IFS开发PDE接地精炼循环，利用确定性违规报告迭代修正生成代码。
contributions: 形式化定义了意图保真度分数(IFS)用于量化LLM生成代码与预期物理方程之间的匹配程度。
提出了PDE接地精炼循环，利用确定性违规报告迭代修正代码，在MooseBench上显著提升IFS。
发布了包含220个案例的MooseBench多物理场基准，带有PDE级真值。
在四个PDE导向的DSL上进行了静态概念验证实验，表明重建-比较模式可扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在MooseBench（220个案例）上评估，方法在直接生成IFS低于0.7的困难子集上平均提升+0.22至+0.41绝对IFS；部署审计显示执行修复后仍有39-40%案例运行成功但物理错误。
limitations: 方法目前针对MOOSE框架，对其他DSL仅做了静态概念验证。
IFS依赖于能够确定性重建PDE的框架，可能不适用于所有仿真代码。

papers.title: Skill-R1: Agent Skill Evolution via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Agentic large language models often rely on skills, reusable natural language procedures that guide planning, action, and tool use. In practice, skills are typically improved through prompt engineering or by aligning the task LLM itself, which is costly, model-specific, and often infeasible for closed-source models. Skill optimization is not a one-step problem but a recurrent process with two coupled levels of credit assignment: a useful skill must improve rollout quality under current conditioning, while a useful revision must turn observed outcomes into a better skill for the next round. We propose Skill-R1, a reinforcement learning framework for instance-level recurrent skill optimization from verifiable rewards. Rather than updating the task LLM, Skill-R1 trains a lightweight skill generator that conditions on the task context, prior rollouts, and their verified outcomes to produce skills that steer a frozen task LLM. This preserves black-box compatibility with both open- and closed-source models while making adaptation substantially cheaper than model-level updates. Skill-R1 proceeds over multiple generations: at each step, the current skill induces rollouts whose verified outcomes are fed back to produce the next revision. To optimize this recurrent process, we introduce a bi-level group-relative policy optimization objective combining intra-generation and inter-generation advantages. The intra-generation term compares rollouts under shared skill conditioning, while the inter-generation term rewards revisions that improve behavior across successive generations. Together, these provide a principled objective for directional skill evolution rather than one-shot self-refinement. Empirically, Skill-R1 achieves consistent gains over no-skill baselines and standard GRPO across benchmarks with verifiable rewards, with particularly strong improvements on complex, multi-step tasks.

analysis.tldr: Skill-R1 通过强化学习框架实现智能体技能的递归优化，无需更新任务 LLM 即可提升复杂多步任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能优化依赖提示工程或任务 LLM 对齐，成本高、模型特定且不适用于闭源模型，且技能优化是递归过程，需要双层信用分配。

contributions: 提出 Skill-R1，一种基于强化学习的递归技能优化框架，保持黑盒兼容性。
引入双层组相对策略优化目标，实现技能的方向性演化而非一次性自我改进。
analysis.experiments: 在具有可验证奖励的基准测试上，Skill-R1 相比无技能基线和标准 GRPO 取得一致提升，尤其在复杂多步任务上表现突出。
limitations: 可能依赖可验证奖励的可用性。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Skill-R1 通过强化学习框架实现智能体技能的递归优化，无需更新任务 LLM 即可提升复杂多步任务性能。

papers.title: The Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: Is Language the Attractor of Multimodal Convergence?
papers.abstract: Understanding why independently trained neural networks from different modalities converge toward shared representations, and where this convergence leads, remains an open question in representation learning. All existing evidence relies on symmetric similarity measures, which can detect convergence but are structurally blind to its direction. We introduce directional convergence analysis using cycle-kNN, an asymmetric alignment measure, applied across dozens of independently trained unimodal models spanning point clouds, vision, and language. We uncover a consistent directional asymmetry: non-language modalities move toward the neighborhood structure of language significantly more than the reverse, and this pattern holds across all model families and scales--yet is entirely invisible to symmetric measures. Mechanistic analysis traces the directionality to feature density asymmetry, whereby language representations occupy the most compact regions of representational space. The Information Bottleneck framework provides a principled interpretation: optimization under compression drives representations toward discrete, compositional structures characteristic of language. We formalize this as the Wittgensteinian Representation Hypothesis: the semantic structure of language is the asymptotic attractor of multimodal representation convergence.

analysis.tldr: 多模态表征收敛具有方向性：语言是收敛的吸引子。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究仅用对称相似性度量检测多模态表征收敛，无法揭示收敛方向，而理解方向性对表征学习理论至关重要。
analysis.problem: 多模态表征收敛的方向性是什么？语言是否扮演吸引子角色？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非语言模态（点云、视觉）的表示向语言邻域结构收敛的程度显著高于反向，且该方向性对所有模型族和规模一致，但对称度量完全无法察觉。
analysis.method: 提出非对称对齐度量cycle-kNN进行方向性收敛分析，结合信息瓶颈理论解释方向性源于特征密度不对称。
contributions: 引入cycle-kNN非对称度量，首次揭示多模态表征收敛的方向性。
提出Wittgensteinian表征假说：语言语义结构是多模态表征收敛的渐近吸引子。
analysis.experiments: 在点云、视觉、语言等多种独立训练的单模态模型上进行实验，验证方向性一致存在。
limitations: 仅分析三种模态，未涵盖更多模态类型。
方向性机制的解释依赖信息瓶颈理论，可能需进一步实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（非对称度量）、理论贡献明确（吸引子假说），实验充分，对表征学习领域有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态表征收敛具有方向性：语言是收敛的吸引子。

papers.title: CHAINTRIX: A multi-pipeline LLM-augmented framework for automated smart-contract security auditing
papers.abstract: Smart-contract exploits have caused billions of USD in cumulative losses, yet audits remain expensive and slow. Automated tools have emerged to close this gap, but each class has a characteristic failure mode. Static analyzers report findings that frequently fail manual triage at high rates, while large language models (LLMs) hallucinate findings that contradict the source code. Thus, we propose Chaintrix, an end-to-end auditing framework whose central architectural commitment is that every LLM-generated claim must be discharged against a deterministic structural contract representation. We introduce a Cross-Contract Interaction Model (CCIM) that parses Solidity into a structured map of function-level reads, writes, modifiers and resolved cross-contract calls. CCIM serves as the substrate against which all 12 of Chaintrix's deterministic signal engines and the parallel LLM audit pipelines operate. A staged false-positive-reduction pipeline, terminating in a Structural Verdict Engine (SVE) that applies deterministic structural checks against parsed code, filters the merged finding set, with selected high-confidence findings further validated through symbolic execution and fuzz testing. We evaluate Chaintrix on EVMbench, the smart-contract security benchmark by OpenAI, Paradigm, OtterSec. Chaintrix detects 86 of 120 high-severity vulnerabilities (71.7% recall), with 25 audits scoring 100% recall, placing Chaintrix 26 percentage points above the strongest frontier-model baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出多管道LLM增强框架Chaintrix，通过确定性结构合约表示消除LLM幻觉，在智能合约安全审计中召回率显著优于前沿模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能合约漏洞已造成数十亿美元损失，但人工审计昂贵且缓慢；现有自动化工具（静态分析器误报率高、LLM会幻觉）均存在关键失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何结合LLM的灵活性与确定性分析，实现高召回、低误报的智能合约安全审计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态分析器报告结果经常无法通过人工分类，而LLM会生成与源代码矛盾的幻觉发现。
analysis.method: 提出Chaintrix框架，核心是每个LLM生成的声明必须通过确定性结构合约表示（CCIM）验证；包含12个确定性信号引擎和并行LLM审计管道，通过结构判决引擎（SVE）进行假阳性缩减，并可选符号执行和模糊测试验证。
contributions: 提出Chaintrix，首个将LLM生成声明与确定性结构合约表示相结合的多管道审计框架。
引入跨合约交互模型（CCIM），将Solidity解析为函数级读写、修饰符和跨合约调用的结构化映射。
在EVMbench基准上达到71.7%的高严重性漏洞召回率，比最强前沿模型基线高26个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在EVMbench（OpenAI、Paradigm、OtterSec的智能合约安全基准）上评估，检测到120个高严重性漏洞中的86个（71.7%召回率），其中25次审计达到100%召回率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Solidity语言，未提及对其他智能合约语言的支持。
依赖CCIM的解析准确性，复杂合约可能解析失败。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（LLM+确定性结构验证），实验效果显著，但应用领域较窄（智能合约审计），与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多管道LLM增强框架Chaintrix，通过确定性结构合约表示消除LLM幻觉，在智能合约安全审计中召回率显著优于前沿模型。

papers.title: HOME-KGQA: A Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Knowledge Graph Question Answering on Household Daily Activities
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide flexible natural language processing capabilities, while knowledge graphs (KGs) offer explicit and structured knowledge. Integrating these two in a complementary manner enables the development of reliable and verifiable AI systems. In particular, knowledge graph question answering (KGQA) has attracted attention as a means to reduce LLM hallucinations and to leverage knowledge beyond the training data. However, existing KGQA benchmark datasets are biased toward encyclopedic knowledge, limited to a single modality, and lack fine-grained spatiotemporal data, which limits their applicability to real-world scenarios targeted by Embodied AI. We introduce HOME-KGQA, a novel KGQA benchmark dataset built on a multimodal KG of daily household activities. HOME-KGQA consists of complex, multi-hop natural language questions paired with graph database query languages. Compared to existing benchmarks, it includes more challenging questions that involve multi-level spatiotemporal reasoning, multimodal grounding, and aggregate functions. Experimental results show that the LLM-based KGQA methods fail to achieve performance comparable to that on existing datasets when evaluated on HOME-KGQA. This highlights significant challenges that should be addressed for the real-world deployment of KGQA systems. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/aistairc/home-kgqa

analysis.tldr: 提出面向家庭日常活动的多模态知识图谱问答基准数据集HOME-KGQA，揭示现有LLM方法在多跳时空推理等复杂任务上的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KGQA基准数据集偏向百科知识、单模态且缺乏细粒度时空数据，难以支撑具身AI等真实场景应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个覆盖多模态、多跳时空推理和聚合查询的家庭日常活动KGQA基准，以评估和推动LLM在真实场景中的KGQA能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于LLM的KGQA方法在HOME-KGQA上的性能显著低于现有数据集，表明现有方法难以处理多级时空推理、多模态对齐和聚合函数等复杂查询。
analysis.method: 构建基于家庭日常活动多模态知识图谱的问答基准数据集，包含复杂多跳自然语言问题及其对应的图数据库查询语言。
contributions: 提出了HOME-KGQA，首个面向家庭日常活动的多模态KGQA基准数据集，包含多级时空推理、多模态对齐和聚合函数等挑战性问题。
实验揭示了现有LLM-based KGQA方法在复杂真实场景下的性能瓶颈，为未来研究指明方向。
analysis.experiments: 在HOME-KGQA上评估了基于LLM的KGQA方法，结果显示其性能低于在现有数据集上的表现。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖家庭日常活动，可能不适用于其他领域。
未提供基线方法的详细性能对比和消融实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集新颖且针对具身AI真实场景，实验揭示现有方法不足，但摘要未提供详细实验结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向家庭日常活动的多模态知识图谱问答基准数据集HOME-KGQA，揭示现有LLM方法在多跳时空推理等复杂任务上的不足。

papers.title: Dsat: A Native SAT Solver for Discrete Logic
papers.abstract: Discrete variables are common in many applications, such as probabilistic reasoning, planning and explainable AI. When symbolic reasoning techniques are brought in to bear on these applications, a standard technique for handling discrete variables is to binarize them into Boolean variables to allow the use of Boolean computational machinery such as SAT solvers. This technique can face both computational and semantical challenges though. In this work, we develop a native SAT solver for discrete logic, which is a direct extension of Boolean logic in which variables can take arbitrary values. Our proposed solver has a similar design to Boolean SAT solvers, with ingredients such as unit resolution and clause learning but ones that operate natively on discrete variables. We illustrate the merits of the developed SAT solver by comparing it empirically to CSP solvers applied to discrete CNFs, to Boolean SAT solver applied to binarized CNFs, and to some hybrid solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种原生离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat，避免二值化带来的计算和语义问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 离散变量在概率推理、规划、可解释AI等应用中常见，传统方法将其二值化为布尔变量后使用SAT求解器，但面临计算开销和语义损失问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个直接处理离散变量的SAT求解器，避免二值化带来的效率和语义挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展布尔SAT求解器设计，将单元传播和子句学习等核心机制原生适配到离散变量上，开发离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat。
contributions: 提出首个原生离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat，直接处理离散变量。
将布尔SAT中的单元传播和子句学习扩展到离散逻辑。
通过实验与CSP求解器、二值化布尔SAT求解器及混合求解器对比，展示Dsat的优势。
analysis.experiments: 与CSP求解器、二值化布尔SAT求解器及混合求解器进行实证比较，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于离散CNF形式的问题。
未在更大规模或更复杂问题上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但应用领域较窄，与主流ML方向关联度一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种原生离散逻辑SAT求解器Dsat，避免二值化带来的计算和语义问题。

papers.title: RuPLaR : Efficient Latent Compression of LLM Reasoning Chains with Rule-Based Priors From Multi-Step to One-Step
papers.abstract: The Chain-of-Thought (CoT) paradigm, while enhancing the interpretability of Large Language Models (LLMs), is constrained by the inefficiencies and expressive limits of natural language. Latent Chain-of-Thought (latent CoT) reasoning, which operates in a continuous latent space, offers a promising alternative but faces challenges from structural complexities in existing multi-step or multi-model paradigms, such as error propagation and coordination overhead. In this paper, we introduce One-Model One-Step, a novel compression framework for Latent Reasoning with Rule-Based Priors(RuPLaR) to address this challenge. Our method trains an LLM to autonomously generate latent reasoning tokens in a single training stage, guided by rule-based prior probability distributions, thereby eliminating cascaded processes and inter-model dependencies. To ensure reasoning quality, we design a joint training objective that enforces answer consistency via cross-entropy, aligns soft tokens with rule-based priors via KL divergence (the Soft Thinking constraint), and adds a problem-thought semantic alignment constraint in the representation space. Extensive experiments show that our compression framework not only improves accuracy by 11.1% over existing latent CoT methods but also achieves this with minimal token usage, underscoring its effectiveness and extensibility. Code: https://github.com/xiaocen-luo/RuPLaR.

analysis.tldr: 提出RuPLaR框架，用规则先验将LLM多步推理压缩为单步隐式推理，提升效率与准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: CoT推理虽可解释但效率低且受限于自然语言表达；现有隐式CoT方法存在结构复杂、错误传播和协调开销等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将多步隐式推理压缩为单步，同时保持推理质量并消除级联过程和模型间依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练LLM在单阶段自主生成隐式推理token，通过规则先验概率分布引导，联合优化交叉熵（答案一致性）、KL散度（软思考约束）和表征空间语义对齐。
contributions: 提出One-Model One-Step压缩框架，将多步隐式推理简化为单步。
设计联合训练目标，融合规则先验、答案一致性和语义对齐。
实验表明准确率提升11.1%且token使用量极少。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理任务上对比现有隐式CoT方法，准确率提升11.1%，token使用量显著减少。
limitations: 规则先验的设计可能依赖领域知识，泛化性待验证。
单步隐式推理的可解释性可能低于显式CoT。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验显示显著提升，与LLM推理方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RuPLaR框架，用规则先验将LLM多步推理压缩为单步隐式推理，提升效率与准确率。

papers.title: SKG-VLA: Scene Knowledge Graph Priors for Structured Scene Semantics and Multimodal Reasoning for Decision Making
papers.abstract: Decision making in large-scale complaint handling systems increasingly relies on heterogeneous evidence, including complaint narratives, screenshots, order metadata, historical interactions, and platform policies. Existing complaint understanding systems mainly perform shallow classification or template matching over isolated modalities, while underutilizing explicit scene structure, rule knowledge, and cross-evidence dependencies. To address this limitation, we present SKG-VLA for multimodal complaint decision making. The core idea is to model each case as a structured complaint scene and represent its decision-relevant semantics with a \emph{Scene Knowledge Graph} (SKG), which organizes complaint entities, evidence items, policy clauses, temporal events, transactional states, and action-relevant relations into a unified graph. Based on SKG, we build a data synthesis pipeline that generates complaint scene descriptions, rule-consistent graph generalizations, question-answer supervision, and decision recommendations. We further construct a large-scale complaint scene dataset with both text-only and multimodal in-domain benchmarks. Finally, we adopt a three-stage training strategy -- domain-adaptive pre-training, task-oriented instruction fine-tuning, and end-to-end multimodal alignment -- to inject structured scene priors into a multimodal decision model. Experiments show that SKG-VLA consistently improves policy-grounded reasoning, complaint decision accuracy, long-tail generalization, and robustness under incomplete evidence.

analysis.tldr: SKG-VLA通过场景知识图谱注入结构化场景先验，提升多模态投诉决策的推理准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有投诉处理系统主要对孤立模态进行浅层分类或模板匹配，未能充分利用显式场景结构、规则知识和跨证据依赖关系，导致决策质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构化场景语义和规则知识提升多模态投诉决策的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建场景知识图谱（SKG）统一表示投诉实体、证据、政策条款等；基于SKG的数据合成管道生成场景描述、图泛化、问答监督和决策建议；采用三阶段训练策略（领域自适应预训练、任务导向指令微调、端到端多模态对齐）注入结构化场景先验。
contributions: 提出场景知识图谱（SKG）用于结构化投诉场景语义表示。
构建大规模多模态投诉场景数据集及基准。
提出三阶段训练策略注入结构化场景先验，提升决策准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明SKG-VLA在基于策略的推理、投诉决策准确性、长尾泛化和不完整证据下的鲁棒性方面持续改进。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的知识图谱构建，泛化到新领域需额外工程。
三阶段训练策略计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（场景知识图谱+三阶段训练）且实验验证有效，与VLM方向相关，但应用领域较专（投诉处理），推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SKG-VLA通过场景知识图谱注入结构化场景先验，提升多模态投诉决策的推理准确性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: Perceptual Asymmetry Between Hue Categories: Evidence from Human Color Categorization
papers.abstract: Human color categories are not uniformly distributed in perceptual space, yet most computational color models still assume fixed and evenly structured representations. In this paper, we present a focused analytical extension of the COLIBRI fuzzy color model by investigating perceptual asymmetry between hue categories. Using previously collected large-scale human color categorization data, we introduce quantitative measures of category extent and boundary uncertainty, namely Wideness and Boundary Width, derived from fuzzy membership functions at the α = 0.5 level. The analysis reveals a strong imbalance between the two categories: yellow occupies a compact and sharply constrained region of the hue space, whereas green spans a substantially broader interval and exhibits a more extended transition structure. The results show that perceptual color categories are not only fuzzy, but also highly non-uniform in their geometric organization. This asymmetry suggests that some categories behave as narrow, highly specific perceptual labels, while others function as broad, tolerant regions of human color naming. These findings provide a new perspective on linguistic color categorization and extend the interpretability of the COLIBRI framework for perceptually grounded color modeling.

analysis.tldr: 人类颜色类别在感知空间中存在不对称性，黄色区域紧凑而绿色区域宽广。
analysis.research_motivation: 大多数计算颜色模型假设颜色类别在感知空间中均匀分布，但人类颜色类别实际上是非均匀的，这种不对称性对颜色建模和语言分类研究具有重要意义。
analysis.problem: 量化人类颜色类别在色调空间中的感知不对称性，特别是黄色和绿色类别的范围与边界差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过分析大规模颜色分类数据，发现黄色类别在色调空间中占据紧凑且边界清晰的区域，而绿色类别则覆盖更宽的区间并具有更长的过渡结构，表明颜色类别在几何组织上高度非均匀。
analysis.method: 基于COLIBRI模糊颜色模型，引入模糊隶属函数在α=0.5水平下的宽度（Wideness）和边界宽度（Boundary Width）两个定量指标，分析色调类别的感知不对称性。
contributions: 提出用于量化颜色类别感知不对称性的新指标（Wideness和Boundary Width）。
揭示黄色和绿色类别在色调空间中的显著不对称性，为感知颜色建模提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及使用先前收集的大规模人类颜色分类数据进行分析。
limitations: 仅分析了黄色和绿色两个类别，其他色调类别的不对称性未知。
依赖COLIBRI模型，可能不适用于其他颜色模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法增量较小，实验信息有限，与主流机器学习方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类颜色类别在感知空间中存在不对称性，黄色区域紧凑而绿色区域宽广。

papers.title: The Trap of Trajectory: Towards Understanding and Mitigating Spurious Correlations in Agentic Memory
papers.abstract: Agentic memory enables LLMs to persist information beyond a single context window and reuse it in later decisions, but it also introduces a new vulnerability: spurious correlations, where retrieved memory carries miscorrelated evidence and propagates erroneous reasoning into downstream decisions. Despite the widespread use of agentic memory, this risk remains largely underexplored. We address it from two aspects. First, we benchmark several canonical types of spurious patterns identified through causal structure and record them across trajectory-level memory. Diagnosing agentic memory systems on this benchmark reveals that memory improves reasoning on clean inputs but amplifies reliance on spurious patterns when they are present. Second, we propose CAMEL, a plug-and-play calibration method that operates across diverse memory architectures at both write and retrieval time. CAMEL consistently reduces reliance on spurious patterns across all three types while preserving or improving performance on clean inputs and staying robust under adaptive attacks targeting the calibration. Overall, CAMEL offers a principled and lightweight solution toward more reliable agentic memory deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAMEL方法校准智能体记忆中的虚假关联，提升LLM决策可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体记忆使LLM能跨上下文持久化信息，但引入虚假关联风险，即检索到的记忆携带错误相关证据并传播到下游决策，该风险尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 智能体记忆中存在的虚假关联导致LLM推理错误，需要理解和缓解这一问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 诊断发现记忆在干净输入上改善推理，但在存在虚假模式时放大对其的依赖。
analysis.method: 提出CAMEL，一种即插即用的校准方法，在写入和检索时跨多种记忆架构操作，减少对虚假模式的依赖。
contributions: 通过因果结构识别并基准测试了轨迹级记忆中的几种典型虚假模式。
提出CAMEL方法，有效减少虚假关联依赖，同时保持或提升干净输入性能，并对抗自适应攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在基准测试上诊断智能体记忆系统，并评估CAMEL在三种虚假模式上的效果，显示一致减少虚假依赖。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定类型的虚假模式有效。
未在真实大规模部署中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且针对重要安全问题，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAMEL方法校准智能体记忆中的虚假关联，提升LLM决策可靠性。

papers.title: Noise-Started One-Step Real-World Super-Resolution via LR-Conditioned SplitMeanFlow and GAN Refinement
papers.abstract: Pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have shown strong potential for real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR), owing to their noise-started generation process that enables realistic texture synthesis and captures the one-to-many nature of super-resolution. However, diffusion-based Real-ISR methods still face a fundamental efficiency-quality trade-off. Multi-step methods generate high-quality results by iteratively denoising random Gaussian noise under LR conditioning, but suffer from slow sampling. Recent one-step methods greatly improve efficiency, yet they typically replace noise-started generation with direct LR-to-HR restoration, which weakens stochasticity and limits realistic detail synthesis. To address this issue, we propose SMFSR, a noise-started one-step Real-ISR framework via LR-conditioned SplitMeanFlow and GAN refinement. SMFSR preserves the random-noise starting point of diffusion models and learns a direct noise-to-HR mapping conditioned on the LR image. To this end, Interval Splitting Consistency distills the multi-step generative trajectory into a single average-velocity prediction, enabling efficient one-step generation. To compensate for the reduced opportunity for progressive refinement, we further introduce a GAN refinement stage, where a DINOv3-based discriminator enhances realistic texture synthesis and variational score distillation aligns the generated outputs with the natural image distribution under a frozen diffusion teacher. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SMFSR achieves state-of-the-art perceptual quality among one-step diffusion-based Real-ISR methods while retaining fast single-step inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出SMFSR，一种噪声启动的单步真实图像超分辨率方法，结合SplitMeanFlow和GAN优化，在保持快速推理的同时达到SOTA感知质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在真实图像超分辨率中潜力大，但现有方法存在效率与质量的权衡：多步方法质量高但速度慢，单步方法效率高但随机性弱、细节合成受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在单步推理中保留噪声启动的随机性，实现高效且高质量的真实图像超分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SMFSR框架，包含LR条件化的SplitMeanFlow和GAN优化阶段。SplitMeanFlow通过区间分裂一致性将多步生成轨迹蒸馏为单步平均速度预测，保留噪声启动；GAN阶段使用DINOv3判别器增强纹理合成，并通过变分分数蒸馏对齐自然图像分布。
contributions: 提出噪声启动的单步真实图像超分辨率框架SMFSR，兼顾效率与质量。
设计区间分裂一致性蒸馏方法，将多步扩散轨迹压缩为单步预测。
引入GAN优化和变分分数蒸馏，补偿单步中渐进式细化的缺失。
analysis.experiments: 大量实验表明，SMFSR在单步扩散基真实超分辨率方法中达到SOTA感知质量，同时保持快速单步推理。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练T2I扩散模型，泛化性受限于教师模型。
GAN优化可能引入不稳定性或模式坍塌风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合扩散和GAN解决单步超分辨率中的随机性损失问题，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SMFSR，一种噪声启动的单步真实图像超分辨率方法，结合SplitMeanFlow和GAN优化，在保持快速推理的同时达到SOTA感知质量。

papers.title: PGID: Progressive Guided Inversion and Denoising for Robust Watermark Detection
papers.abstract: With the proliferation of AI-generated images, digital watermarking has become an essential safeguard for protecting intellectual property and mitigating malicious exploitation. Recent works on semantic watermarking have enabled efficient copyright protection for diffusion models. However, the dependence of semantic watermarking on diffusion inversion for watermark detection creates a critical vulnerability. Imprint removal and forgery attacks exploit this weakness to produce deceptive results. Our analysis reveals that these attacks succeed by displacing watermarked latents into the unwatermarked region, while guiding unwatermarked latents into the watermarked region. Based on that, we propose Progressive Guided Inversion and Denoising (PGID), the first plug-and-play, training-free noise extraction framework designed to defend against both attack strategies. PGID effectively defends by projecting perturbed latents back to the region where they originally belong. The projection is achieved by eliminating intermediate latent deflections and mitigating adversarial perturbations through progressive inversion-denoising cycles. Comprehensive evaluations across multiple schemes demonstrate that PGID successfully restores detection reliability by recovering removed watermarks and identifying forged instances.

analysis.tldr: 提出PGID框架，通过渐进式反转-去噪循环防御扩散模型语义水印的移除与伪造攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像激增，数字水印是保护知识产权和防止恶意利用的关键手段，但现有语义水印依赖扩散反转进行检测，易受印记移除和伪造攻击。
analysis.problem: 语义水印检测中，攻击者通过将带水印潜变量偏移到无水印区域（移除攻击）或将无水印潜变量引导到水印区域（伪造攻击）来破坏检测可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 攻击成功的关键在于使带水印潜变量偏离到无水印区域，同时引导无水印潜变量进入水印区域。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式引导反转与去噪（PGID），一种即插即用、无需训练的噪声提取框架，通过渐进式反转-去噪循环消除中间潜变量偏移并缓解对抗扰动，将受扰潜变量投影回其原始所属区域。
contributions: 首次提出即插即用、无需训练的防御框架PGID，同时应对水印移除和伪造攻击。
通过渐进式反转-去噪循环有效恢复被移除的水印并识别伪造实例，恢复检测可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构，泛化性需验证。
渐进式循环可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对语义水印检测的防御方法有明确创新，但摘要未提供实验细节，评分偏保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PGID框架，通过渐进式反转-去噪循环防御扩散模型语义水印的移除与伪造攻击。

papers.title: Mem-W: Latent Memory-Native GUI Agents
papers.abstract: GUI agents are beginning to operate the web, mobile, and desktop as interactive worlds, where successful control depends on carrying forward visual, procedural, and task-level evidence beyond the fleeting present screen. Yet most agents still treat memory as an external, human-readable artifact: histories are summarized, categorized, retrieved, and reinserted as text or structured records before being encoded again by the policy. This creates a mismatch between the representational form in which experience is stored and the latent embedding sequence over which modern GUI policies actually act. We introduce Mem-W, a series of latent-memory-native GUI agents that treat memory as part of the agent's continuous context rather than as an auxiliary symbolic scaffold. Mem-W weaves both historical trajectories (as experiential memory) and in-session segments (as working memory) into compact memory tokens through a shared trajectory-to-latent compressor. These tokens are woven with the current GUI observation and local context into one continuous embedding sequence, allowing the agent to read successes, failures, and unfinished progress through the same machine-native interface. Mem-W is trained with self-distillation and outcome-aware supervision to preserve decision-relevant state while filtering memory toward evidence that truly supports task success. Across four web and mobile navigation benchmarks, Mem-W consistently improves diverse backbones and memory-enhanced baselines, with gains of up to $+30.0$, suggesting that latent-context-native memory can serve as a scalable foundation for long-horizon GUI agency.

analysis.tldr: 提出将记忆作为连续隐式上下文而非外部符号的GUI智能体Mem-W，在多个基准上提升达30%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI智能体将记忆视为外部可读的人工制品，需反复编码为文本或结构化记录，导致存储形式与策略实际操作的隐式嵌入序列不匹配，限制了长程任务性能。
analysis.problem: 如何让GUI智能体将历史轨迹和会话片段直接融入连续隐式上下文，而非依赖外部符号记忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出记忆存储形式（文本/结构化记录）与策略使用的隐式嵌入序列之间存在表征不匹配，导致信息传递效率低。
analysis.method: 提出Mem-W系列智能体，通过轨迹到隐式的压缩器将历史轨迹（经验记忆）和会话片段（工作记忆）压缩为紧凑记忆token，与当前GUI观测和局部上下文拼接成连续嵌入序列；采用自蒸馏和结果感知监督训练，保留决策相关状态并过滤支持任务成功的证据。
contributions: 提出隐式记忆原生GUI智能体范式，将记忆作为连续上下文而非外部符号。
设计轨迹到隐式压缩器和自蒸馏训练方法，实现高效记忆融合与过滤。
在四个Web和移动导航基准上验证，一致提升多种骨干网络和记忆增强基线，最高提升30%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个Web和移动导航基准上评估，对比多种骨干网络和记忆增强基线，Mem-W一致提升性能，最高提升30%。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 可能依赖特定压缩器架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
长序列下记忆token的压缩效率与信息保留之间的权衡未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，实验提升显著，与VLM/Agent方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将记忆作为连续隐式上下文而非外部符号的GUI智能体Mem-W，在多个基准上提升达30%。

papers.title: Neural Information Causality
papers.abstract: Query-separated computation forces a representation to play an operational role: data are encoded before a query is known, and a later decoder can answer only through the intermediate interface. In this regime the representation functions as a message rather than merely as a feature map. We formalize this observation by embedding information causality (IC) into representation learning, obtaining a framework called neural information causality (Neural-IC). The revised formulation separates two logically distinct statements. First, every query-separated architecture induces a random-access communication experiment and obeys the embedding inequality $I_{\mathrm{N\text{-}RAC}}\le I(\vec a:H,B)$. Second, any independently certified physical capacity bound on the interface, such as a hard $m$-bit alphabet, a finite-precision register, or a power-constrained noisy channel, implies $I_{\mathrm{N\text{-}RAC}}\le C_H$. This separation avoids treating capacity as a post hoc definition and makes Neural-IC an operational diagnostic for query leakage, precision leakage, and episode-specific memory. We also provide an exact one-bit classical RAC benchmark, showing explicitly that the relevant quantum enhancement is not total information beyond the bottleneck, but fair query-conditioned access. For CHSH-type correlation layers, nested Neural-RAC protocols multiply correlation biases across depth; requiring stability of a one-bit bottleneck for arbitrary depth selects the Tsirelson threshold. We extend the analysis to asymmetric seed biases, to multi-capacity finite-depth phase diagrams, and to correlated data via a conditional information score. Controlled simulations, including straight-through binary bottlenecks and deliberately leaky ablations, verify that apparent violations are accounted for by broken query separation or undercounted capacity.

analysis.tldr: 将信息因果性嵌入表征学习，提出Neural-IC框架，用于诊断查询分离架构中的信息泄漏与容量问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 查询分离计算中，表征作为消息而非特征图，但现有方法缺乏操作性的信息因果性诊断工具，难以检测查询泄漏、精度泄漏和特定情节记忆。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化并量化查询分离架构中表征的信息因果性约束，以诊断信息泄漏和容量违规。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明：查询分离架构服从嵌入不等式，物理容量界可转化为信息因果性上界；CHSH型相关层中，嵌套协议会倍增相关偏差，一比特瓶颈的稳定性要求导出Tsirelson阈值。
analysis.method: 提出Neural-IC框架，将信息因果性嵌入表征学习，通过随机存取通信实验形式化查询分离架构的约束，并分离两个逻辑陈述：架构诱导的嵌入不等式和物理容量界。
contributions: 形式化神经信息因果性框架，将信息因果性嵌入表征学习，提供操作性的诊断工具。
分离架构诱导的嵌入不等式与物理容量界，避免将容量作为后验定义。
提供精确的一比特经典RAC基准，阐明量子增强的本质是公平查询条件访问而非总信息超越瓶颈。
分析CHSH型相关层、非对称种子偏差、多容量有限深度相图及条件信息分数。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及受控模拟（包括直通二进制瓶颈和故意泄漏消融）验证了明显违规可由查询分离破坏或容量低估解释。
limitations: 理论框架可能依赖特定架构假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
实际应用中的容量界定义和测量可能复杂，诊断效率待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
