analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将信息因果性嵌入表征学习，提出Neural-IC框架，用于诊断查询分离架构中的信息泄漏与容量问题。

papers.title: Do Self-Evolving Agents Forget? Capability Degradation and Preservation in Lifelong LLM Agent Adaptation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in LLM agents enable systems that autonomously refine workflows, accumulate reusable skills, self-train their underlying models, and maintain persistent memory. However, we show that such self-evolution is often non-monotonic: adapting to new task distributions can progressively degrade previously acquired capabilities across all major evolution channels. We identify this phenomenon as \emph{capability erosion under self-evolution} and show that it consistently emerges across workflow, skill, model, and memory evolution. To mitigate this issue, we propose \emph{Capability-Preserving Evolution} (CPE), a general stabilization principle that constrains destructive capability drift during continual adaptation. Across all four evolution dimensions, CPE consistently improves retained capability stability while preserving adaptation performance. For example, in workflow evolution, CPE improves retained simple-task performance from 41.8\% to 52.8\% under GPT-5.1 optimization while simultaneously achieving stronger complex-task adaptation. Our findings suggest that stable long-horizon self-evolving agents require not only acquiring new capabilities, but also explicitly preserving previously learned ones during continual adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 自进化LLM代理在持续适应新任务时会出现能力退化，CPE方法通过约束破坏性漂移来保留已有能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM代理能够自主进化，但进化过程可能非单调，导致先前能力退化，影响长期稳定性。
analysis.problem: 自进化代理在持续适应新任务分布时，如何避免能力退化并保留已有能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到自进化代理在工作流、技能、模型和记忆四个进化通道上均出现能力退化现象，且进化是非单调的。
analysis.method: 提出Capability-Preserving Evolution (CPE)，一种通用稳定化原则，通过约束持续适应中的破坏性能力漂移来保留已有能力。
contributions: 识别并形式化了自进化代理中的能力退化现象
提出CPE方法，在四个进化维度上均能提升保留能力稳定性并保持适应性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅举例工作流进化中CPE将保留的简单任务性能从41.8%提升至52.8%。
limitations: 可能未考虑更复杂的任务分布或长期进化场景
CPE的约束机制可能增加计算开销或限制适应灵活性
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 问题重要且新颖，方法通用，但实验细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自进化LLM代理在持续适应新任务时会出现能力退化，CPE方法通过约束破坏性漂移来保留已有能力。

papers.title: How LLMs Are Persuaded: A Few Attention Heads, Rerouted
papers.abstract: Language models can be persuaded to abandon factual knowledge. This vulnerability is central to AI safety, but its internal mechanism remains poorly understood. We uncover a compact causal mechanism for persuasion-induced factual errors. A small set of mid-layer attention heads almost entirely determines the model's answer. These heads write answer options into a low-dimensional polyhedron, with options occupying distinct vertices. Persuasion does not blur belief or merely reduce confidence; it causes a discrete latent jump from the correct-answer vertex to the persuasion-target vertex. We show that decision heads are not reasoning over evidence. Instead, they copy whichever option token their attention selects. Persuasion works by redirecting attention. We isolate a rank-one evidence-routing feature that controls the route. Directly modifying this feature steers the model's choice, and removing it blocks persuasion. We then trace the feature back to a band of shallower attention heads that build it from persuasive keywords in the input. Every step is validated by intervention. This mechanism appears across open-source LLMs and realistic poisoning scenarios such as Generative Engine Optimization, revealing persuasion as a narrow, monitorable circuit.

analysis.tldr: LLM被说服放弃事实知识，其机制是少量中层注意力头通过低维多面体中的离散跳跃重定向注意力，而非模糊信念。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型易被说服放弃事实知识，这对AI安全至关重要，但其内部机制尚不明确，理解这一漏洞有助于提升模型鲁棒性和安全性。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM因说服性输入而产生事实错误的因果机制，并验证其可干预性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 说服不会模糊信念或降低置信度，而是导致从正确答案顶点到说服目标顶点的离散潜在跳跃；决策头不推理证据，而是复制注意力选择的选项令牌。
analysis.method: 通过因果干预分析，识别出一小部分中层注意力头作为决策头，它们将答案选项写入低维多面体的不同顶点；说服通过重定向注意力实现，并发现一个秩一证据路由特征控制该路由，该特征由浅层注意力头从说服性关键词构建。
contributions: 发现LLM被说服的紧凑因果机制：少量中层注意力头通过离散潜在跳跃改变答案。
识别并验证了秩一证据路由特征，可直接修改以控制模型选择或阻止说服。
在多个开源LLM和真实场景（如生成引擎优化）中验证了机制的普遍性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 机制可能仅适用于特定类型的说服性输入，泛化性需进一步验证。
干预方法可能对模型其他能力产生未知影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 揭示了LLM被说服的精细因果机制，方法创新且对AI安全有重要影响，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM被说服放弃事实知识，其机制是少量中层注意力头通过低维多面体中的离散跳跃重定向注意力，而非模糊信念。

papers.title: Attention Sinks in Diffusion Transformers: A Causal Analysis
papers.abstract: Attention sinks -- tokens that receive disproportionate attention mass -- are assumed to be functionally important in autoregressive language models, but their role in diffusion transformers remains unclear. We present a causal analysis in text-to-image diffusion, dynamically identifying dominant attention recipients per timestep and suppressing them via paired, training-free interventions on the score and value paths. Across 553 GenEval prompts on Stable Diffusion~3 (with SDXL corroboration), removing these sinks does not degrade text-image alignment (CLIP-T) or preference proxies (ImageReward, HPS-v2) at $k{=}1$; only under stronger interventions ($k\!\geq\!10$) does HPS-v2 exhibit a metric-dependent boundary, while CLIP-T remains robust throughout. The perceptual shifts induced by suppression are nonetheless \emph{sink-specific} -- $\sim\!6\times$ larger than equal-budget random masking -- revealing an empirical dissociation between trajectory-level perturbation and \emph{semantic alignment} in diffusion transformers. \footnote{Code available at https://github.com/wfz666/ICML26-attention-sink.}

analysis.tldr: 扩散Transformer中的注意力沉没有语义必要性，抑制后对齐指标不降但感知变化显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 注意力沉没在自回归语言模型中被认为功能重要，但在扩散Transformer中的角色尚不明确，理解其作用有助于优化模型。
analysis.problem: 探究扩散Transformer中注意力沉没的功能重要性及其对文本-图像对齐的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 抑制注意力沉没在弱干预下不损害CLIP-T和HPS-v2等指标，但强干预下HPS-v2出现指标依赖边界，且感知变化是沉没特异的，比随机掩蔽大6倍。
analysis.method: 通过动态识别每步中主导注意力接收者，并在分数和值路径上施加无训练干预来抑制注意力沉没。
contributions: 首次对扩散Transformer中的注意力沉没进行因果分析
发现注意力沉没在语义对齐中非必要，但影响感知轨迹
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion 3上使用553个GenEval提示，并用SDXL验证，评估CLIP-T、ImageReward、HPS-v2等指标。
limitations: 仅针对文本到图像扩散模型，未验证其他模态
干预方法为无训练，可能未完全揭示沉没的长期影响
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，但应用范围有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散Transformer中的注意力沉没有语义必要性，抑制后对齐指标不降但感知变化显著。

papers.title: Low-Cost Neural Radiance Fields
papers.abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieve high-quality novel-view synthesis, but their long training times and reliance on dense input views limit accessibility. We present a comparative study of three accelerated NeRF variants - DS-NeRF, TensoRF, and HashNeRF and explore extensions targeted at the low-compute, low-data regime. First, we add a depth-supervision loss derived from COLMAP keypoints to TensoRF (TensoRF-DS) and evaluate it on the LLFF dataset under reduced view counts. Second, we ablate the feature-decoding MLP of TensoRF and study the effect of input downsampling on PSNR and runtime on the synthetic Lego scene. Third, we propose four architectural variants of the HashNeRF color and density networks, including residual and convolutional designs, and report PSNR/training-time tradeoffs under matched iteration budgets. Under iso-time evaluation, none of our extensions conclusively outperform the published baselines, but the experiments characterize which extensions transfer to constrained settings and surface design questions for future work.

analysis.tldr: 对三种加速NeRF变体在低计算量和低数据量场景下的扩展研究，发现无扩展能稳定超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: NeRF训练时间长且依赖密集输入视图，限制了其实际应用，需要探索低计算、低数据量下的高效变体。
analysis.problem: 在低计算量和稀疏输入视图条件下，如何改进加速NeRF变体的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在等时间评估下，所有提出的扩展均未能在性能上稳定超越已发表的基线，但实验揭示了哪些扩展适用于受限场景，并提出了未来设计问题。
analysis.method: 对DS-NeRF、TensoRF和HashNeRF三种加速NeRF变体进行对比研究，并探索针对低计算、低数据量的扩展，包括向TensoRF添加深度监督损失、消融TensoRF的特征解码MLP、以及提出HashNeRF的四种架构变体。
contributions: 提出了TensoRF-DS，将COLMAP关键点深度监督损失引入TensoRF，并在减少视图数量的LLFF数据集上评估。
消融了TensoRF的特征解码MLP，并研究了输入下采样对PSNR和运行时间的影响。
提出了HashNeRF颜色和密度网络的四种架构变体（包括残差和卷积设计），并报告了在匹配迭代预算下的PSNR/训练时间权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在LLFF数据集上评估TensoRF-DS在减少视图数量下的性能；在合成Lego场景上消融TensoRF的MLP并研究下采样影响；在匹配迭代预算下比较HashNeRF变体的PSNR和训练时间。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 所有扩展在等时间评估下均未显著优于基线，改进有限。
实验仅在有限数据集和场景上进行，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新有限，实验未超越基线，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对三种加速NeRF变体在低计算量和低数据量场景下的扩展研究，发现无扩展能稳定超越基线。

papers.title: Teaching Molecular Dynamics to a Non-Autoregressive Ionic Transport Predictor
papers.abstract: Unlike most static material properties widely studied in the machine learning literature, ionic transport properties are inherently dynamic, making their fast and accurate prediction from static atomic structures challenging. The current standard approach, molecular dynamics (MD) simulations, suffers from prohibitively high computational cost. Recent autoregressive learning-based MD acceleration methods requiring sequential inference remain slow and prone to error accumulation; in contrast, existing non-autoregressive material property prediction models are less accurate because they fail to exploit dynamics. Moreover, existing methods typically benefit from datasets either with or without atomic trajectories, but not both. To overcome these limitations, we propose a non-autoregressive learning framework based on auxiliary modality learning, which treats atomic trajectories as an auxiliary modality during training but does not require them at inference. This enables the predictor to learn dynamics without sequential inference while benefiting from both types of datasets. As a result, our framework achieves over 200 times speedup compared to autoregressive models on the dataset with atomic trajectories while substantially reducing prediction error relative to non-autoregressive benchmarks across both types of datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/jykim-git/MD.

analysis.tldr: 提出非自回归辅助模态学习框架，利用分子动力学轨迹作为辅助模态训练，实现离子输运性质快速准确预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 离子输运性质是动态的，传统分子动力学模拟计算成本高，现有自回归方法推理慢且误差累积，非自回归模型则因忽略动态信息而不够准确。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖自回归推理的情况下，从静态原子结构快速准确地预测动态离子输运性质，并同时利用有/无轨迹的两种数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于辅助模态学习的非自回归框架，训练时将原子轨迹作为辅助模态，推理时无需轨迹，从而学习动态信息且避免顺序推理。
contributions: 提出非自回归辅助模态学习框架，实现离子输运性质预测，推理速度比自回归模型快200倍以上。
框架能同时利用有轨迹和无轨迹的数据集，在两种数据集上均显著降低预测误差。
analysis.experiments: 在包含原子轨迹的数据集上，与自回归模型相比实现200倍以上加速；在两种数据集上均优于非自回归基准。
limitations: 可能仅适用于离子输运等特定动态性质预测。
辅助模态学习对轨迹质量敏感，低质量轨迹可能影响训练效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高（辅助模态学习），显著加速且误差降低，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非自回归辅助模态学习框架，利用分子动力学轨迹作为辅助模态训练，实现离子输运性质快速准确预测。

papers.title: Beyond ESG Scores: Learning Dynamic Constraints for Sequential Portfolio Optimization
papers.abstract: ESG-aware portfolio optimization is increasingly important for sustainable capital allocation, yet most learning-based methods still operationalize ESG by appending static scores to the policy observation or reward. This creates a mismatch for sequential control: ESG scores are noisy, provider-dependent, low-frequency, and temporally misaligned with sequential portfolio decisions, while financial evidence suggests that ESG is better treated as a portfolio preference, risk-exposure, or hedge dimension than as a robust alpha factor. We propose to impose ESG constraints without modifying the financial policy's observation or reward, using a Multimodal Action-Conditioned Constraint Field (MACF) that learns mechanism-specific ESG costs from point-in-time multimodal evidence and contemplated portfolio transitions. We then introduce MACF-X, a family of optimizer-specific adapters that converts MACF costs and uncertainties into native constrained-optimization interfaces through a shared slack- and uncertainty-aware pressure layer. Across multiple constraint-integration interfaces, MACF-X reduces tail ESG budget pressure while maintaining competitive financial performance. Ablations show that this improvement depends on dynamic evidence inputs and three-head decomposition, while static ESG-score proxies are nearly indistinguishable from score-shuffled noise baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态动作条件约束场（MACF）将ESG约束动态融入序列投资组合优化，避免静态评分的不匹配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: ESG评分存在噪声、依赖提供商、低频且与序列决策时间错位，而现有学习方法将其作为静态分数附加到策略观测或奖励中，导致不匹配。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改金融策略观测或奖励的情况下，将ESG约束动态且有效地融入序列投资组合优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态ESG评分代理与随机噪声基线几乎无法区分，表明静态评分在序列决策中缺乏信息量。
analysis.method: 提出多模态动作条件约束场（MACF），从多模态点证据和考虑的投资组合转移中学习机制特定的ESG成本；并引入MACF-X适配器族，通过共享的松弛和不确定性感知压力层将MACF成本和不确定性转换为原生约束优化接口。
contributions: 提出MACF框架，动态学习ESG约束而非使用静态评分。
设计MACF-X适配器，兼容多种优化器接口，降低尾部ESG预算压力并保持金融性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态点证据数据。
MACF-X适配器的通用性可能受限于特定优化器接口。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但应用领域较窄，与重点方向弱相关，适合保存稍后阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态动作条件约束场（MACF）将ESG约束动态融入序列投资组合优化，避免静态评分的不匹配问题。

papers.title: Hierarchical Attention-based Graph Neural Network with Relevance-driven Pruning
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) excel at relational reasoning but face two persistent challenges: the lack of interpretable attribution for heterogeneous node types, and the computational overhead of message passing over large, noisy graphs. We propose the Hierarchical Attention-based Heterogeneous GNN (HA-HeteroGNN), a framework that addresses both issues through a unied explainability-to-pruning pipeline. A two-tier attention mechanism separates sensor-level and context-level computation across 16 node types and 18 edge types, producing per-node relevance scores via an attention-based GNN Explainer without requiring gradient backpropagation. These relevance scores then serve as a principled pruning criterion: removing nodes identied as consistently uninformative yields a 27% reduction in graph edges while simultaneously improving classication accuracy by 2.46.1% across all model variants, challenging the conventional assumption that pruning necessarily trades accuracy for eciency. Experiments on a 50,000-record synthetic dataset spanning 11 report categories demonstrate 97.5% cross-strategy explanation stability and domain consistent sensor attribution, with training-time reductions of up to 43.9% and real-time inference latency of approximately 5860 ms per sample.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层注意力异构图神经网络，利用可解释性驱动的剪枝同时提升效率和精度。
analysis.research_motivation: GNN在关系推理中表现优异，但面临两个挑战：异构节点类型的可解释归因缺乏，以及在大规模噪声图上消息传递的计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 解决GNN在异构图中缺乏可解释归因和计算开销大的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HA-HeteroGNN，包含两层注意力机制（传感器级和上下文级），通过基于注意力的GNN Explainer生成节点相关性分数，并以此作为剪枝准则，移除不重要的节点。
contributions: 提出分层注意力机制处理16种节点类型和18种边类型，实现可解释归因。
利用相关性分数驱动剪枝，在减少27%边的同时提升分类准确率2.4-6.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在包含50,000条记录、11个报告类别的合成数据集上，达到97.5%的跨策略解释稳定性和领域一致的传感器归因，训练时间减少43.9%，推理延迟约58-60毫秒/样本。
limitations: 仅在合成数据集上验证，真实场景效果未知。
剪枝策略可能不适用于所有图结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法有创新，实验显示效率与精度双提升，但仅在合成数据上验证，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层注意力异构图神经网络，利用可解释性驱动的剪枝同时提升效率和精度。

papers.title: Discrete Langevin-Inspired Posterior Sampling
papers.abstract: We study posterior sampling for inverse problems in discrete state spaces using discrete diffusion models as generative priors. While continuous diffusion models have become widely used for inverse problems, their discrete counterparts remain comparatively underexplored. Existing discrete posterior samplers often rely on continuous relaxations of discrete variables, Gibbs-style updates, or mechanisms specialized to particular corruption processes, which can limit scalability or generality. We propose $Δ$LPS, a Discrete Langevin-Inspired Posterior Sampler that uses gradient information to identify promising discrete moves without leaving the discrete state space. The resulting approach enables efficient parallel updates across all token dimensions and is agnostic to the training paradigm of the discrete diffusion prior, including masked and uniform-state diffusion. We evaluate our method on image restoration tasks across MNIST, CIFAR, and FFHQ, as well as spatial mapping, covering linear, nonlinear, and blind inverse problems. Across these settings, we improve over recent discrete diffusion posterior samplers and are competitive with strong continuous diffusion-based inverse solvers. Our results suggest that fully discrete, gradient-informed posterior samplers offer a scalable and general path toward solving inverse problems over discrete representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种离散朗之万启发的后验采样器ΔLPS，利用梯度信息在离散状态空间中进行高效并行更新，无需连续松弛，适用于多种离散扩散先验和逆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续扩散模型在逆问题中广泛应用，但离散扩散模型的后验采样方法相对未被充分探索，现有方法依赖连续松弛、吉布斯更新或特定于噪声过程的机制，限制了可扩展性和通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种可扩展且通用的离散后验采样器，能够利用梯度信息在离散状态空间中高效采样，同时兼容不同的离散扩散先验训练范式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ΔLPS，一种离散朗之万启发的后验采样器，利用梯度信息识别有希望的离散移动，无需离开离散状态空间，支持所有token维度的并行更新，且与离散扩散先验的训练范式无关（包括掩码扩散和均匀状态扩散）。
contributions: 提出ΔLPS，一种完全离散的、基于梯度的后验采样器，无需连续松弛或吉布斯更新。
在图像恢复（MNIST、CIFAR、FFHQ）和空间映射任务上，覆盖线性、非线性和盲逆问题，优于现有离散扩散后验采样器，并与强连续扩散逆求解器竞争。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST、CIFAR、FFHQ图像恢复和空间映射任务上评估，涵盖线性、非线性和盲逆问题，与离散和连续扩散后验采样器比较。
limitations: 可能对梯度信息的质量敏感，在梯度不可靠时性能下降。
仅在图像和空间映射任务上验证，未涉及其他离散模态（如文本、图）。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，在离散扩散后验采样方向有明确贡献，实验覆盖多种任务且结果有竞争力，但应用范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种离散朗之万启发的后验采样器ΔLPS，利用梯度信息在离散状态空间中进行高效并行更新，无需连续松弛，适用于多种离散扩散先验和逆问题。

papers.title: Neural Cluster First, Route Second: One-Shot Capacitated Vehicle Routing via Differentiable Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: The Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem (CVRP) underpins modern last-mile logistics. Current Neural Combinatorial Optimization (NCO) methods construct CVRP solutions autoregressively, inheriting sequential decoding bottlenecks, sensitivity to spatial symmetries, and brittle out-of-distribution behavior. We revisit the classical Cluster-First-Route-Second (CFRS) paradigm -- long known to be asymptotically optimal but largely overlooked by NCO -- and argue that it is structurally aligned with the core strengths of deep learning: similarity and assignment over global context, rather than the construction of long sequential tours. We introduce Neural CFRS, the first purely non-autoregressive one-shot neural CFRS framework for the CVRP. It enforces global fleet-capacity constraints end-to-end via a differentiable entropic Optimal Transport layer, producing a continuous transport plan to sparsify an exact capacitated assignment solver. We provide formal theoretical guarantees that our architecture intrinsically abstracts away $E(2)$ spatial, inter-route permutation, and intra-route traversal symmetries. By equipping the framework with a pre-trained spatial vocabulary, we unlock extreme parameter efficiency and zero-shot scaling. Designed primarily for real-world spatial distributions under a constant capacity setting, Neural CFRS scales robustly to out-of-distribution $N=1000$ instances with a < 4% gap -- retaining an approximate 5% gap at this scale even as an ultra-lightweight, single-layer architecture. Furthermore, when deployed out-of-the-box on standard benchmarks, we achieve a highly competitive 2.73% optimality gap on size-100 problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个非自回归单次求解CVRP的神经CFRS框架，通过可微最优传输层实现全局容量约束，在OOD大实例上保持<4%的差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经组合优化方法自回归解码存在顺序瓶颈、对空间对称敏感且分布外行为脆弱，而经典的先聚类后路由范式虽渐近最优但被NCO忽视，其全局上下文相似性与分配能力更契合深度学习优势。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个非自回归、单次前馈的神经框架来高效求解带容量约束的车辆路径问题（CVRP），同时保证全局容量约束、对称性不变性和分布外泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Neural CFRS框架，采用先聚类后路由范式，通过可微熵最优传输层将全局车队容量约束端到端地融入网络，生成连续运输计划以稀疏化精确容量分配求解器，并利用预训练空间词汇实现参数高效和零样本缩放。
contributions: 首个纯非自回归单次神经CFRS框架，避免自回归解码瓶颈。
通过可微最优传输层端到端强制执行全局容量约束，并提供理论保证消除E(2)空间、路径间置换和路径内遍历对称性。
在常数容量设置下实现极端参数效率和零样本缩放，在N=1000的OOD实例上保持<4%的差距，轻量单层架构仍达约5%差距。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上，规模100的问题达到2.73%的最优性差距；在分布外N=1000实例上保持<4%的差距。
limitations: 主要针对常数容量设置下的真实空间分布设计，可能不适用于容量变化或非空间特征的问题。
单次前馈框架在极端复杂约束下可能不如迭代方法灵活。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（非自回归+最优传输），理论保证充分，实验在OOD大实例上表现稳健，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个非自回归单次求解CVRP的神经CFRS框架，通过可微最优传输层实现全局容量约束，在OOD大实例上保持<4%的差距。

papers.title: Micro-Defects Expose Macro-Fakes: Detecting AI-Generated Images via Local Distributional Shifts
papers.abstract: Recent generative models can produce images that appear highly realistic, raising challenges in distinguishing real and AI-generated images. Yet existing detectors based on pre-trained feature extractors tend to over-rely on global semantics, limiting sensitivity to the critical micro-defects. In this work, we propose Micro-Defects expose Macro-Fakes (MDMF), a local distribution-aware detection framework that amplifies micro-scale statistical irregularities into macro-level distributional discrepancies. To avoid localized forensic cues being diluted by plain aggregation, we introduce a learnable Patch Forensic Signature that projects semantic patch embeddings into a compact forensic latent space. We then use Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) to quantify distributional discrepancies between generated and real images. Our theory-grounded analysis shows that patch-wise modeling yields provably larger discrepancies when localized forensic signals are present in generated images, enabling more reliable separation from real images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MDMF consistently outperforms baseline detectors across multiple benchmarks, validating its general effectiveness. Project page: https://zbox1005.github.io/MDMF-project/

analysis.tldr: 提出局部分布感知框架MDMF，通过放大AI生成图像中的微观缺陷实现高精度检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器过度依赖全局语义特征，对微观缺陷不敏感，导致检测性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效捕捉并放大AI生成图像中的局部统计异常，以提升检测准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成图像中存在微观缺陷，但全局聚合会稀释这些局部线索；局部建模可产生更大的分布差异。
analysis.method: 提出MDMF框架，包含可学习的Patch Forensic Signature将语义块嵌入紧凑取证空间，并利用MMD度量真实与生成图像间的局部分布差异。
contributions: 提出局部分布感知检测框架MDMF，通过放大微观缺陷提升AI生成图像检测性能。
理论分析证明局部块建模能产生更大的分布差异，并设计可学习的Patch Forensic Signature。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上，MDMF一致优于基线检测器，验证了其通用有效性。
limitations: 可能对高分辨率图像的计算开销较大
对未知生成模型的泛化性有待进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，实验充分，与视觉理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出局部分布感知框架MDMF，通过放大AI生成图像中的微观缺陷实现高精度检测。

papers.title: Towards Effective Theory of LLMs: A Representation Learning Approach
papers.abstract: We propose Representational Effective Theory (RET), a framework for describing large language model computation in terms of learned macrostates rather than microscopic details. RET learns these macrostates from hidden-state trajectories using a BYOL/JEPA-style self-supervised objective, coarse-graining activations into macrovariables that preserve higher-level structure relevant for prediction and interpretation. We evaluate whether these macrovariables are practically relevant for interpretability: RET yields temporally consistent states that reveal "mental-state" trajectories of reasoning, capture high-level semantic structure, support early prediction of behavioral outcomes such as sycophancy, and provide causal handles for steering generations toward interpretable computational phases. Together, these results suggest that LLM computation admits useful effective descriptions via RET: high-level, dynamically meaningful variables that support interpretation, prediction, and intervention.

analysis.tldr: 提出表征有效理论（RET），通过自监督学习从LLM隐状态轨迹中提取宏观变量，用于解释、预测和干预模型行为。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM内部计算复杂且微观细节难以解释，缺乏高层语义结构描述方法，亟需一种能揭示模型宏观行为规律的理论框架。
analysis.problem: 如何从LLM的隐状态轨迹中学习具有语义意义、动态一致且可干预的宏观表征变量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用BYOL/JEPA风格的自监督目标，对隐状态轨迹进行粗粒化，学习宏观变量（macrovariables），保留与预测和解释相关的高层结构。
contributions: 提出RET框架，将LLM计算描述为学习到的宏观状态而非微观细节。
实验证明RET宏观变量在可解释性中的实用性：揭示推理的“心理状态”轨迹、捕获高层语义、支持早期预测行为（如谄媚）、提供因果干预手段。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或任务。
宏观变量的语义解释性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合自监督学习与粗粒化，对LLM可解释性有重要潜在贡献，但摘要缺乏实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出表征有效理论（RET），通过自监督学习从LLM隐状态轨迹中提取宏观变量，用于解释、预测和干预模型行为。

papers.title: Beyond Accuracy: Evaluating Strategy Diversity in LLM Mathematical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models now achieve high final-answer accuracy on mathematical reasoning benchmarks, but accuracy alone does not capture reasoning flexibility. We introduce a strategy-level evaluation framework instantiated on 80 AMC 10/12 and AIME problems with 217 AoPS-derived reference strategy families. Model outputs are annotated for strategy identity, validity, and correctness using dual-AI coding with human adjudication. Across four frontier models, we find a pronounced decoupling between answer accuracy and strategy diversity. Under a single-solution prompt, all models achieve high accuracy (95%-100%), but under a multiple-strategy prompt they recover substantially fewer strategies than the human reference set. Gemini, DeepSeek, GPT, and Claude generate 184, 152, 151, and 110 distinct valid strategies, respectively, with the largest gaps in Geometry and Number Theory. The models collectively produce 50 benchmark-novel valid strategies, indicating both incomplete coverage of human strategies and some capacity for alternative reasoning. A repeated-run robustness check on 20 problems shows diminishing gains in discovered strategies, with the strongest model recovering only 39 of 55 AoPS-reference strategies (71%) after three runs. These findings position strategy diversity as a complementary dimension for evaluating mathematical reasoning beyond answer correctness.

analysis.tldr: LLM在数学推理中答案准确率高但策略多样性不足，本文提出策略级评估框架并发现模型与人类策略覆盖存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数学推理评测仅关注最终答案准确率，无法反映模型的推理灵活性和策略多样性，而后者对于评估真实推理能力至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在数学推理中的策略多样性，并量化其与人类策略覆盖的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1）模型在单答案提示下准确率很高（95%-100%），但在多策略提示下生成的策略数量远少于人类参考集；2）不同模型策略多样性差异显著（Gemini 184种，Claude 110种）；3）模型能生成50种基准中未出现的新策略，但整体覆盖不足；4）重复运行后策略发现收益递减，最强模型三次运行仅恢复71%的人类策略。
analysis.method: 基于80道AMC/AIME竞赛题和217个AoPS参考策略族，采用双AI编码加人工裁决对模型输出进行策略身份、有效性和正确性标注，构建策略级评估框架。
contributions: 提出策略多样性作为数学推理评测的补充维度，超越传统答案准确率指标。
构建包含80道竞赛题和217个参考策略族的评测框架，并系统评估四个前沿模型的策略覆盖与新颖性。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemini、DeepSeek、GPT、Claude四个前沿模型上评估，使用单答案和多策略两种提示方式，并在20道题上进行三次重复运行鲁棒性检验。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 评测仅覆盖AMC/AIME竞赛题，可能无法推广到其他数学推理场景。
策略标注依赖双AI编码和人工裁决，可能存在主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 提出策略多样性这一新颖评测维度，实验设计系统，对LLM推理能力评估有重要补充价值，但方法本身为评测框架而非新模型或算法。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在数学推理中答案准确率高但策略多样性不足，本文提出策略级评估框架并发现模型与人类策略覆盖存在显著差距。

papers.title: MC$^2$: Monte Carlo Correction for Fast Elliptic PDE Solving
papers.abstract: Partial differential equation (PDE) solvers underpin scientific computing, but real-world deployment is bounded by compute. Classical Monte Carlo solvers such as Walk-on-Spheres (WoS) are unbiased and geometry-agnostic but are slow. Learned solvers are fast but biased and brittle under distribution shift. We present \textbf{MC$^2$}, a hybrid WoS-Neural Network (WoS-NN) PDE solver that treats a low-budget Monte Carlo solution as a structured estimator of the true field and learns a single-pass neural correction to recover a high-fidelity solution. MC$^2$ matches the accuracy of solutions using over $1000\times$ more Monte Carlo compute, outperforming all evaluated classical, denoising, and neural-operator baselines. To enable reproducible study of finite-compute PDE solving, we additionally release \textbf{PDEZoo}, the largest standardized elliptic PDE benchmark to date: 2M PDEs spanning five elliptic families and unlimited geometric compositions, with analytic ground truth and multi-budget Monte Carlo trajectories. Together \textbf{MC$^2$} and \textbf{PDEZoo} (1) empirically establish that finite-sample Monte Carlo error is structured, learnable, and correctable in a single forward pass, (2) show that we can solve PDEs $\sim$\textbf{1000x} faster than with just WoS, and (3) provide the evaluation infrastructure the field has so far lacked.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合WoS-神经网络求解器MC²，用单次前向传播校正低预算蒙特卡洛误差，实现千倍加速，并发布大规模椭圆PDE基准PDEZoo。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛PDE求解器（如WoS）无偏但计算慢，而学习型求解器快但存在偏差和分布漂移问题，实际部署受限于计算资源。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持精度的前提下，显著加速椭圆型偏微分方程的求解？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到有限样本蒙特卡洛误差具有结构化、可学习的特点，可通过单次前向传播进行校正。
analysis.method: 混合WoS-神经网络方法：将低预算蒙特卡洛解作为真实场的结构化估计，通过单次前向传播的神经网络校正恢复高保真解。
contributions: 提出MC²，一种混合WoS-NN PDE求解器，在精度匹配使用超过1000倍蒙特卡洛计算量的解，并优于所有基线。
发布PDEZoo，迄今最大的标准化椭圆PDE基准，包含200万个PDE、五个椭圆族和无限几何组合，提供解析真值和多预算蒙特卡洛轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称MC²在精度上匹配使用超过1000倍蒙特卡洛计算量的解，并优于所有基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于椭圆型PDE，对其他类型PDE的泛化性未知。
神经网络校正可能对训练数据分布外的几何或参数敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（混合WoS-NN），加速效果显著（千倍），并发布大规模基准，但应用领域偏物理科学，与核心方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合WoS-神经网络求解器MC²，用单次前向传播校正低预算蒙特卡洛误差，实现千倍加速，并发布大规模椭圆PDE基准PDEZoo。

papers.title: PiCA: Pivot-Based Credit Assignment for Search Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based search agents trained with reinforcement learning (RL) have significantly improved the performance of knowledge-intensive tasks. However, existing methods encounter critical challenges in long-horizon credit assignment: (i) Reward Sparsity, where models receive only outcome feedback without step-level guidance to differentiate action quality; (ii) Isolated Credit, where credit is assigned to steps independently, failing to capture sequential dependencies; and (iii) Distributional Shift, where rewards are estimated on templates that deviate from the model's natural generative distribution. To address these issues, we propose Pivot-Based Credit Assignment (PiCA), a novel step reward mechanism that reformulates the search trajectory as a sequential process of cumulative search progress. Unlike prior isolated step rewards, PiCA defines process rewards as success probabilities dependent on the historical context based on Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS). This approach identifies pivot steps, which comprise target golden sub-queries and sub-answers derived from historical trajectories, as information peaks that significantly boost the likelihood of a correct final answer. By anchoring these step rewards to the final task objective, PiCA provides dense, pivot-aware and trajectory-dependent guidance while maintaining distributional consistency. Extensive experiments show that PiCA outperforms existing strong baselines across seven knowledge-intensive QA benchmarks, achieving 15.2% and 2.2% improvements for 3B and 7B models. The consistent performance gains across various models show PiCA's robust generalization. The code is available at https://github.com/novdream/PiCA.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于枢轴的信用分配方法 PiCA，通过势能奖励塑形为搜索智能体提供密集、轨迹依赖的步骤奖励，显著提升长程信用分配效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于强化学习的LLM搜索智能体在长程信用分配中面临奖励稀疏、孤立信用和分布偏移三大挑战，导致模型难以区分动作质量并捕捉序列依赖。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM搜索智能体设计有效的步骤级奖励机制，以解决长程信用分配中的奖励稀疏、孤立信用和分布偏移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法存在三个关键现象：仅依赖结果反馈导致奖励稀疏；步骤独立分配信用忽略序列依赖；奖励估计基于偏离模型生成分布的模板导致分布偏移。
analysis.method: 提出基于枢轴的信用分配（PiCA），将搜索轨迹重构为累积搜索进度的序列过程，利用势能奖励塑形定义过程奖励为依赖历史上下文的成功概率，识别枢轴步骤（包含黄金子查询和子答案的信息峰值）提供密集、枢轴感知且轨迹依赖的指导。
contributions: 提出PiCA方法，通过势能奖励塑形实现轨迹依赖的步骤奖励，解决长程信用分配三大挑战。
在七个知识密集型QA基准上验证有效性，3B和7B模型分别提升15.2%和2.2%，并展示良好泛化性。
analysis.experiments: 在七个知识密集型QA基准上进行实验，PiCA在3B和7B模型上分别比强基线提升15.2%和2.2%，且在不同模型上表现一致。
limitations: 可能依赖枢轴步骤的准确识别，在复杂轨迹中识别质量可能受限。
势能奖励塑形的理论保证在非马尔可夫环境中可能减弱。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对LLM搜索智能体信用分配痛点提出新机制，实验充分且提升显著，与Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于枢轴的信用分配方法 PiCA，通过势能奖励塑形为搜索智能体提供密集、轨迹依赖的步骤奖励，显著提升长程信用分配效果。

papers.title: Semi-Supervised Neural Super-Resolution for Mesh-Based Simulations
papers.abstract: Mesh-based simulations provide high-fidelity solutions to partial differential equations (PDEs), but achieving such accuracy typically requires fine meshes, leading to substantial computational overhead. Super-resolution techniques aim to mitigate this cost by reconstructing high-resolution (HR), high-fidelity solutions from low-cost, low-resolution (LR) counterparts. However, training neural networks for super-resolution often demands large amounts of expensive HR supervision data. To address this challenge, we propose SuperMeshNet, an HR data-efficient super-resolution framework for mesh-based simulations aided by message passing neural networks (MPNNs). At its core, SuperMeshNet introduces complementary learning, a semi-supervised approach that effectively leverages both 1) a small amount of paired LR-HR data and 2) abundant unpaired LR data via two jointly trained, complementary MPNN-based models. Additionally, our model is enriched by inductive biases, which are empirically shown to further improve super-resolution performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SuperMeshNet requires 90% less HR data to achieve even lower root mean square error (RMSE) than that of the fully supervised benchmark without the inductive biases. The source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/jykim-git/SuperMeshNet.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出半监督超分辨率框架SuperMeshNet，利用少量高分辨率数据和大量低分辨率数据实现网格模拟的高效超分辨率重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于网格的模拟需要细网格才能获得高保真解，但计算开销大；超分辨率技术可从低成本低分辨率解重建高分辨率解，但训练需要大量昂贵的高分辨率标注数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在高分辨率训练数据稀缺的情况下，有效学习网格模拟的超分辨率映射。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SuperMeshNet，采用半监督互补学习框架，包含两个基于消息传递神经网络（MPNN）的互补模型，联合利用少量配对低-高分辨率数据和大量未配对低分辨率数据，并引入归纳偏置。
contributions: 提出SuperMeshNet，一个高分辨率数据高效的网格模拟超分辨率框架。
引入互补学习，一种半监督方法，有效利用少量配对数据和大量未配对数据。
通过归纳偏置进一步提升超分辨率性能。
analysis.experiments: 在网格模拟数据集上实验，SuperMeshNet仅需10%的高分辨率数据即可达到比全监督基准更低的均方根误差（RMSE）。
limitations: 可能对网格拓扑结构敏感。
归纳偏置的设计可能依赖特定问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，半监督框架有效降低HR数据需求，实验验证充分，但应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出半监督超分辨率框架SuperMeshNet，利用少量高分辨率数据和大量低分辨率数据实现网格模拟的高效超分辨率重建。

papers.title: A Prompt-Aware Structuring Framework for Reliable Reuse of AI-Generated Content in the Agentic Web
papers.abstract: The evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) and the software agents built on them (AI agents) marks a turning point in the transition from a human-centric Web to an ``Agentic Web'' driven by AI agents. However, for AI-Generated Content (AIGC), which is expected to dominate the Web, there is currently no mechanism for agents to verify its reliability, reproducibility, or license compliance during generation. This lack of transparency risks causing chained hallucinations and compliance violations through the reuse of AIGC. Consequently, a framework to manage the provenance and generation conditions of AIGC is essential. In this paper, we present a framework that automatically attaches structured metadata to AIGC at generation time, including modularized prompts, contexts, thoughts, model information, hyperparameters, and confidence. The metadata is enveloped together with verifiable credentials to support the reliable assessment and reuse of AIGC. This framework enables efficient curation of structured AIGC and facilitates its safe use for applications such as fine-tuning and knowledge distillation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个在生成时自动为AI生成内容附加结构化元数据的框架，以支持可靠评估与重用。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM和AI代理推动Web向Agentic Web演进，AI生成内容（AIGC）将主导网络，但缺乏验证其可靠性、可复现性和合规性的机制，导致链式幻觉和合规风险。
analysis.problem: 如何为AIGC提供可验证的元数据（包括提示、上下文、模型信息等），以支持代理对其可靠评估与重用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个框架，在生成时自动为AIGC附加结构化元数据（模块化提示、上下文、思考、模型信息、超参数、置信度），并使用可验证凭证封装，支持可靠评估与重用。
contributions: 提出一个自动为AIGC附加结构化元数据的框架，包含提示、上下文、模型信息等。
利用可验证凭证封装元数据，支持AIGC的可靠评估与重用，如微调和知识蒸馏。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能增加生成时的计算开销。
元数据标准化和互操作性可能面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 框架有实际意义，但摘要未提供实验验证，创新性和深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个在生成时自动为AI生成内容附加结构化元数据的框架，以支持可靠评估与重用。

papers.title: CAGS: Color-Adaptive Volumetric Video Streaming with Dynamic 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Volumetric video (VV) streaming enables real-time, immersive access to remote 3D environments, powering telepresence, ecological monitoring, and robotic teleoperation. These applications turn VV streaming into a real-time interface to remote physical environments, imposing new system-level demands for photorealistic scene representation, low-latency interaction, and robust performance under heterogeneous networks. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has been widely used for real-time photorealistic rendering, offering superior visual quality and rendering performance, but it faces challenges due to bandwidth consumption. Furthermore, as the foundation of adaptive VV streaming, existing Levels of Detail (LoD) methods based on density are not well-suited to Gaussian representations, leading to visible gaps and severe quality degradation. Recent studies have also explored attribute compression techniques to reduce bandwidth consumption. Our preliminary studies reveal that aggressive attribute compression primarily causes color distortion, which can be effectively corrected in the rendered image using a reference image. Motivated by these findings, we propose a novel Color-Adaptive scheme for adaptive VV streaming that uses vector quantization (VQ) to establish LoDs and correct color distortions with low-resolution reference images. We further present CAGS, an adaptive VV streaming system compatible with diverse Gaussian representations, which integrates the Color-Adaptive scheme by rendering reference images on the streaming server and performing color restoration on the client. Extensive experiments on our prototype system demonstrate that CAGS outperforms the existing adaptive streaming systems in PSNR by 5$\sim$20 dB under fluctuating bandwidth, operates significantly faster than existing scalable Gaussian compression methods, and generalizes across different Gaussian representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于颜色自适应的体积视频流系统CAGS，利用矢量量化建立细节层次并通过低分辨率参考图像校正颜色失真，在波动带宽下PSNR提升5~20 dB。
analysis.research_motivation: 体积视频流需要高保真、低延迟的实时渲染，但现有3DGS方法带宽消耗大，且基于密度的细节层次方法不适用于高斯表示，导致质量下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在带宽波动下实现高效、高质量的3DGS体积视频自适应流传输，解决颜色失真和细节层次不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步研究发现，激进的属性压缩主要导致颜色失真，而该失真可通过参考图像在渲染图像中有效校正。
analysis.method: 提出Color-Adaptive方案，使用矢量量化建立细节层次，并在服务器端渲染低分辨率参考图像，客户端进行颜色恢复；集成到CAGS系统中。
contributions: 提出Color-Adaptive方案，利用矢量量化和参考图像校正颜色失真，实现自适应体积视频流。
设计CAGS系统，兼容多种高斯表示，在波动带宽下PSNR提升5~20 dB，且速度优于现有可扩展压缩方法。
analysis.experiments: 在原型系统上进行了大量实验，表明CAGS在波动带宽下PSNR优于现有自适应流系统5~20 dB，运行速度显著快于现有可扩展高斯压缩方法，并泛化到不同高斯表示。
limitations: 可能依赖参考图像的质量和传输带宽。
未提及对高动态范围或复杂场景的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，对体积视频流有显著改进，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于颜色自适应的体积视频流系统CAGS，利用矢量量化建立细节层次并通过低分辨率参考图像校正颜色失真，在波动带宽下PSNR提升5~20 dB。

papers.title: EquiMem: Calibrating Shared Memory in Multi-Agent Debate via Game-Theoretic Equilibrium
papers.abstract: Multi-agent debate (MAD) systems increasingly rely on shared memory to support long-horizon reasoning, but this convenience opens a critical vulnerability: a single corrupted entry can contaminate the downstream memory-augmented reasoning, and debate alone fails to filter such errors. Existing safeguards filter entries via heuristics or LLM-based validation, yet they rely on AI judgments that share the same failure modes and overlook the cross-agent dynamics of MAD. We address this gap by formulating memory updating in MAD as a zero-trust memory game, in which no agent is assumed honest and the game's equilibrium serves as an indicator of optimal memory trust. Guided by this equilibrium, we propose EquiMem, an inference-time calibration mechanism that quantifies each update algorithmically against the shared memory state, using agents' existing retrieval queries and traversal paths as evidence rather than soliciting any LLM judgment. EquiMem instantiates calibration for both embedding- and graph-based memory, and across diverse benchmarks, MAD frameworks, and memory architectures, it consistently outperforms existing safeguards, remains robust under adversarial agents, and incurs negligible inference overhead.

analysis.tldr: 将多智能体辩论中的共享内存更新建模为零信任博弈，利用博弈均衡实现无需LLM判断的校准机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体辩论系统依赖共享内存支持长程推理，但单个错误条目会污染下游推理，现有基于启发式或LLM的过滤方法共享相同的失败模式且忽视跨智能体动态。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖LLM判断的情况下，校准多智能体辩论中的共享内存更新以抵御错误条目和恶意攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将内存更新建模为零信任记忆博弈，博弈均衡作为最优内存信任指标；利用智能体已有的检索查询和遍历路径作为证据，算法化地量化每个更新，无需LLM判断。
contributions: 提出将MAD中共享内存更新形式化为零信任博弈的新视角
设计EquiMem推理时校准机制，支持嵌入和基于图的内存，无需额外LLM判断
analysis.experiments: 在多种基准、MAD框架和内存架构上，EquiMem持续优于现有防护方法，对对抗性智能体保持鲁棒，且推理开销可忽略。
limitations: 可能依赖特定内存结构（嵌入/图）的假设
博弈均衡计算在极大规模智能体场景下的可扩展性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（博弈论视角），实验充分且鲁棒性好，与安全对齐方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将多智能体辩论中的共享内存更新建模为零信任博弈，利用博弈均衡实现无需LLM判断的校准机制。

papers.title: Uncertainty-Aware Token Importance Estimation in Spiking Transformers
papers.abstract: Spiking transformers have shown strong potential for neuromorphic vision, yet their token processing across multiple spiking steps still introduces substantial redundancy and inference cost. Existing token reduction methods mainly rely on response based cues, such as activation magnitude, firing statistics, or feature similarity. Although effective, these criteria do not explicitly characterize token importance from the perspective of temporally evolving class evidence. In spiking transformers, token representations are progressively formed across multiple spiking steps rather than determined at a single instant, suggesting that token importance should be evaluated not only by instantaneous responses but also by temporal uncertainty patterns. Our key observation is that tokens exhibit heterogeneous uncertainty trajectories over time, and that their temporally aggregated uncertainty statistics provide an effective cue for distinguishing informative tokens from redundant ones. Motivated by this, we propose Uncert, a training free and plug and play token importance estimation framework for spiking transformers. Specifically, Uncert models token wise class evidence with a Dirichlet distribution and summarizes each token temporal uncertainty using its mean and fluctuation across spiking steps, yielding an uncertainty aware importance score for token reduction during inference. Experiments on both static and neuromorphic benchmarks show that Uncert achieves favorable accuracy and efficiency tradeoffs, with the most consistent gains observed under token pruning. Further analysis reveals a clear empirical connection between temporal uncertainty patterns and token contribution, offering new insights into token dynamics in spiking transformers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于时间不确定性估计的脉冲Transformer令牌重要性评估方法，无需训练即可实现高效令牌剪枝。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲Transformer在神经形态视觉中具有潜力，但多步脉冲处理导致大量冗余和推理成本；现有令牌缩减方法依赖瞬时响应特征，未考虑令牌重要性随时间演化的不确定性模式。
analysis.problem: 如何从时间不确定性角度显式评估脉冲Transformer中令牌的重要性，以实现高效的令牌缩减。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到令牌在多个脉冲步上呈现异质的不确定性轨迹，其时间聚合的不确定性统计量能有效区分信息性令牌与冗余令牌。
analysis.method: 提出Uncert框架，使用Dirichlet分布建模令牌级类别证据，通过均值和波动性汇总每个令牌的时间不确定性，得到不确定性感知的重要性分数，用于推理时的令牌缩减。
contributions: 首次从时间不确定性角度分析脉冲Transformer中的令牌重要性，揭示不确定性模式与令牌贡献的实证关联。
提出无需训练、即插即用的令牌重要性估计框架Uncert，在静态和神经形态基准上实现精度与效率的有利权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在静态和神经形态基准上评估，Uncert在令牌剪枝下取得最一致的增益，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于脉冲Transformer架构，泛化性未验证。
不确定性建模依赖Dirichlet分布假设，可能不适用于所有数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需训练，但实验细节有限，适合关注脉冲神经网络和高效视觉理解的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于时间不确定性估计的脉冲Transformer令牌重要性评估方法，无需训练即可实现高效令牌剪枝。

papers.title: Towards Conversational Medical AI with Eyes, Ears and a Voice
papers.abstract: The practice of medicine relies not only upon skillful dialogue but also on the nuanced exchange and interpretation of rich auditory and visual cues between doctors and patients. Building on the low-latency voice and video processing capabilities of Gemini, we introduce AI co-clinician, a first-of-its-kind conversational AI system utilizing continuous streams of audio-visual data from live patient conversations to inform real-time clinical decisions. Its dual-agent architecture balances deep clinical reasoning with the low latency required for natural dialogue. To assess this system, we implemented a video-based interface emulating telemedicine consultations. We crafted 20 standardized outpatient scenarios requiring proactive real-time auditory and visual reasoning and designed "TelePACES" evaluation criteria alongside case-specific rubrics. In a randomized, interface-blinded, crossover simulation study (n = 120 encounters) with 10 internal medicine residents as patient actors, we compared AI co-clinician with primary care physicians (PCPs), GPT-Realtime, and a baseline agent. AI co-clinician approached PCPs in key TelePACES dimensions, including management plans and differential diagnosis, while significantly outperforming GPT-Realtime across all general criteria. While our agent demonstrated parity with PCPs in case-specific triage measures, physicians maintained superior overall performance in case-specific assessments. Although AI co-clinician marks a significant advance in real-time telemedical AI, gaps remain in physical examination and disease-specific reasoning. Our work shows that text-only approaches fail to capture the true challenges of medical consultation and suggests that high-stakes real-time diagnostic AI is most safely advanced in collaborative, triadic models where AI can be a supportive co-clinician for doctors and patients.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个利用实时音视频流进行临床决策的对话式医疗AI系统，在模拟远程医疗中接近初级保健医生水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗实践依赖医生与患者之间丰富的听觉和视觉线索交换，现有文本AI无法捕捉真实咨询挑战，亟需能处理多模态实时数据的系统。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能实时处理患者对话中的音频和视频流、并辅助临床决策的对话式医疗AI系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本方法无法捕捉医疗咨询中的真实挑战；AI在体格检查和疾病特定推理上仍有差距；高风险的实时诊断AI更适合协作式三方模型。
analysis.method: 基于Gemini的低延迟音视频处理能力，采用双智能体架构（一个负责深度临床推理，一个确保低延迟自然对话），并通过视频界面模拟远程医疗咨询。
contributions: 首次提出利用连续音视频流进行实时临床决策的对话式医疗AI系统
设计TelePACES评估标准和20个标准化门诊场景，并进行随机交叉模拟研究
analysis.experiments: 在120次模拟就诊中，与初级保健医生、GPT-Realtime和基线代理比较，AI在关键维度接近医生，显著优于GPT-Realtime。
limitations: 在体格检查和疾病特定推理上仍不如医生
仅基于模拟研究，未在真实临床环境中验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 创新性高，首次将实时音视频用于医疗对话AI，实验设计严谨，但技术细节有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个利用实时音视频流进行临床决策的对话式医疗AI系统，在模拟远程医疗中接近初级保健医生水平。

papers.title: Shaping Schema via Language Representation as the Next Frontier for LLM Intelligence Expanding
papers.abstract: Although natural language is the default medium for Large Language Models (LLMs), its limited expressive capacity creates a profound bottleneck for complex problem-solving. While recent advancements in AI have relied heavily on scaling, merely internalizing knowledge does not guarantee its effective application. Defining language representation as the linguistic and symbolic constructs used to map and model the real world, this paper argues that shaping schemas through advanced language representation is the next frontier for expanding LLM intelligence. We posit that an LLM's knowledge activation and organization -- its schema -- depends heavily on the structural and symbolic sophistication of the language used to represent a given task. This paper contributes both a formalization of this claim and the empirical evidence to support it. With a new formalization, we present multiple lines of evidence to support our position: Firstly, we review recent empirical practices and emerging methodologies that demonstrate the substantial performance gains achievable through deliberate language representation design, even without modifying model parameters or scale. Secondly, we conduct controlled experiments showing that LLM performance and its internal feature activations vary under different language representations of the same underlying task. Together, these findings highlight language representation design as a promising direction for future research.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出通过精心设计语言表征来塑造LLM的认知模式（schema），从而在不改变模型参数或规模的情况下提升其智能表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言的表达能力有限，成为LLM解决复杂问题的瓶颈；仅靠规模扩展内化知识并不能保证有效应用，亟需探索新的智能扩展方向。
analysis.problem: 如何通过语言表征的设计来优化LLM的知识激活与组织（即schema），以突破其复杂问题求解能力的上限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使任务本质相同，不同的语言表征方式会导致LLM性能及其内部特征激活产生显著差异，且已有实证表明精心设计的语言表征能带来实质性性能提升。
analysis.method: 提出语言表征设计作为塑造LLM schema的核心方法，通过形式化论证和受控实验验证语言表征的结构与符号复杂度对知识激活和组织的影响。
contributions: 形式化了语言表征对LLM schema塑造的作用机制，提出新的理论框架。
通过综述现有实践和受控实验，提供了多方面的实证证据，证明语言表征设计可显著提升LLM性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到进行了受控实验，比较不同语言表征下LLM的性能和内部特征激活，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验规模可能有限，未在多种任务和模型上验证泛化性。
语言表征设计的自动化或通用原则尚未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 观点新颖，但实验细节不足，适合关注LLM智能扩展的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出通过精心设计语言表征来塑造LLM的认知模式（schema），从而在不改变模型参数或规模的情况下提升其智能表现。

papers.title: Memorize Theorems, Not Instances: Probing SFT Generalization through Mathematical Reasoning
papers.abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is widely used for task-specific adaptation, yet recent work shows it systematically undermines reasoning generalization. We argue the root cause is not memorization itself, but its target: vanilla SFT drives models to exploit and memorize spurious surface correlations in problem-solution pairs, leaving them brittle to superficial input variations. To address this, we propose Theorem-SFT, which reorients supervision toward explicit theorem application by teaching models how rules are invoked rather than what answers look like. Theorem-SFT yields consistent gains across benchmarks and model families: +8.8% on MATH (LLaMA3.2-3B-Instruct) and +20.27% on GeoQA (Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) without modality-specific re-training. Fine-tuning MLP layers alone matches full-layers performance, implicating feed-forward components as the primary locus of reasoning rules. Our findings reframe the debate: Generalization failures stem not from memorization as a mechanism, but from memorizing the wrong inductive targets.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Theorem-SFT，通过监督定理应用而非实例表面模式来提升 SFT 的推理泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: SFT 虽广泛用于任务适配，但近期研究表明它会系统性地损害推理泛化能力，原因在于模型倾向于记忆问题-答案对中的虚假表面关联，导致对输入变化脆弱。
analysis.problem: 如何重新设计 SFT 的监督目标，使其引导模型学习可泛化的推理规则而非表面模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 SFT 泛化失败的根本原因不是记忆机制本身，而是记忆了错误的归纳目标（表面关联）。
analysis.method: Theorem-SFT：将监督信号从问题-答案对转向显式的定理应用过程，教导模型如何调用规则而非答案形式。
contributions: 揭示了 SFT 泛化失败源于记忆错误的归纳目标（表面关联）而非记忆机制本身。
提出 Theorem-SFT 方法，通过监督定理应用显著提升推理泛化，在 MATH 和 GeoQA 上分别提升 8.8% 和 20.27%。
发现仅微调 MLP 层即可达到全层微调的性能，表明前馈组件是推理规则的主要存储位置。
analysis.experiments: 在 MATH（LLaMA3.2-3B-Instruct）和 GeoQA（Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct）上评估，无需模态特定重训练即取得一致提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及 Theorem-SFT 在非数学推理任务上的效果。
可能需要对定理库进行人工设计或筛选，扩展性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验效果显著，对理解 SFT 泛化机制有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Theorem-SFT，通过监督定理应用而非实例表面模式来提升 SFT 的推理泛化能力。

papers.title: DeltaRubric: Generative Multimodal Reward Modeling via Joint Planning and Verification
papers.abstract: Aligning Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) requires reliable reward models, yet existing single-step evaluators can suffer from lazy judging, exploiting language priors over fine-grained visual verification. While rubric-based evaluation mitigates these biases in text-only settings, extending it to multimodal tasks is bottlenecked by the complexity of visual reasoning. The critical differences between responses often depend on instance-specific visual details. Robust evaluation requires dynamically synthesizing rubrics that isolate spatial and factual discrepancies. To address this, we introduce $\textbf{DeltaRubric}$, an approach that reformulates multimodal preference evaluation as a plan-and-execute process within a single MLLM. DeltaRubric operates in two steps: acting first as a $\textit{Disagreement Planner}$, the model generates a neutral, instance-specific verification checklist. Transitioning into a $\textit{Checklist Verifier}$, it executes these self-generated checks against the image and question to produce the final grounded judgment. We formulate DeltaRubric as a multi-role reinforcement learning problem, jointly optimizing planning and verification capabilities. Validated on Qwen3-VL 4B and 8B Instruct models, DeltaRubric achieves solid empirical gains. For instance, On VL-RewardBench, it improves base model overall accuracy by $\textbf{+22.6}$ (4B) and $\textbf{+18.8}$ (8B) points, largely outperforming standard no-rubric baselines. The results demonstrate that decomposing evaluation into structured, verifiable steps leads to more reliable and generalizable multimodal reward modeling.

analysis.tldr: DeltaRubric通过将多模态偏好评估分解为规划与验证两个步骤，显著提升了奖励模型的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单步评估器存在懒惰判断问题，依赖语言先验而忽视细粒度视觉验证，导致多模态奖励建模不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何为多模态大语言模型构建可靠且细粒度的奖励模型，避免评估中的视觉推理瓶颈和语言先验偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单步评估器容易利用语言先验进行懒惰判断，忽略实例特定的视觉细节；基于规则的方法在文本场景有效，但扩展到多模态任务受限于视觉推理复杂性。
analysis.method: 提出DeltaRubric，将多模态偏好评估重构为规划-执行过程：先由分歧规划器生成实例特定的验证清单，再由清单验证器执行检查并给出最终判断；通过多角色强化学习联合优化规划与验证能力。
contributions: 提出DeltaRubric，一种将多模态奖励建模分解为规划与验证两阶段的方法。
将DeltaRubric形式化为多角色强化学习问题，联合优化规划与验证能力。
在Qwen3-VL 4B和8B模型上验证，在VL-RewardBench上分别提升+22.6和+18.8个点，显著优于无规则基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-VL 4B和8B Instruct模型上验证，使用VL-RewardBench基准，DeltaRubric在整体准确率上分别提升+22.6和+18.8个点。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练MLLM的规划能力，对弱基座模型效果未知。
两阶段流程可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与VLM对齐方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DeltaRubric通过将多模态偏好评估分解为规划与验证两个步骤，显著提升了奖励模型的可靠性。

papers.title: Beyond Continuity: Challenges of Context Switching in Multi-Turn Dialogue with LLMs
papers.abstract: Users interacting with Large Language Models (LLMs) in a multi-turn conversation routinely refine their requests or pivot to new topics. LLMs, however, often miss these topic shifts and carry over irrelevant context from previous turns, leading to inaccurate responses. In this paper, we stress-test the multi-turn understanding of LLMs and study the following two sub-tasks: (1) detecting whether the user pivots or refines in the current turn, and (2) shortlisting relevant context from previous turns. To this end, we construct synthetic benchmarks based on real-world datasets from varied domains, as to simulate context shifts of different levels of difficulty. We then evaluate the zero-shot performance of ten LLMs (open-weight, closed-source and reasoning), and demonstrate that only some reasoning and strongly instructed LLMs are accurate in detecting pivots; open-weight LLMs struggle with the task and frequently carry stale context even with explicit cues; and all models suffer from a position bias. Based on the results, we discuss key takeaways for improving long-term robustness in multi-turn capabilities for LLMs.

analysis.tldr: LLM在多轮对话中难以检测用户话题切换，常错误继承无关上下文，导致回答不准确。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮对话中用户常切换话题或细化请求，但LLM容易继承无关上下文导致回答错误，这一问题影响对话系统的实用性和用户体验。
analysis.problem: LLM在多轮对话中无法准确检测用户是否切换话题（pivot）或细化请求（refine），并难以从历史轮次中筛选相关上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅部分推理型和强指令遵循的LLM能准确检测话题切换；开源LLM即使有明确线索也常携带过时上下文；所有模型存在位置偏差。
analysis.method: 基于真实世界多领域数据集构建合成基准，模拟不同难度的上下文切换，并评估10个LLM的零样本性能。
contributions: 形式化了多轮对话中的上下文切换检测和上下文筛选两个子任务
构建了基于真实数据的合成基准，覆盖不同难度的话题切换场景
系统评估了10个LLM，揭示了推理型/强指令模型与开源模型之间的性能差距及位置偏差问题
analysis.experiments: 在合成基准上评估10个LLM（包括开源、闭源和推理模型）的零样本性能，检测话题切换和上下文筛选的准确率。
limitations: 仅使用合成基准，可能无法完全反映真实对话的复杂性
未提出具体改进方法，仅提供分析结论
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 问题重要但方法为基准构建和评估，创新性一般，适合了解LLM多轮对话的局限性。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在多轮对话中难以检测用户话题切换，常错误继承无关上下文，导致回答不准确。

papers.title: SeePhys Pro: Diagnosing Modality Transfer and Blind-Training Effects in Multimodal RLVR for Physics Reasoning
papers.abstract: We introduce SeePhys Pro, a fine-grained modality transfer benchmark that studies whether models preserve the same reasoning capability when critical information is progressively transferred from text to image. Unlike standard vision-essential benchmarks that evaluate a single input form, SeePhys Pro features four semantically aligned variants for each problem with progressively increasing visual elements. Our evaluation shows that current frontier models are far from representation-invariant reasoners: performance degrades on average as information moves from language to diagrams, with visual variable grounding as the most critical bottleneck. Motivated by this inference-time fragility, we further develop large training corpora for multimodal RLVR and use blind training as a diagnostic control, finding that RL with all training images masked can still improve performance on unmasked validation sets. To analyze this effect, text-deletion, image-mask-rate, and format-saturation controls suggest that such gains can arise from residual textual and distributional cues rather than valid visual evidence. Our results highlight the need to evaluate multimodal reasoning not only by final-answer accuracy, but also by robustness under modality transfer and by diagnostics that test whether improvements rely on task-critical visual evidence.

analysis.tldr: SeePhys Pro 通过细粒度模态迁移基准揭示多模态推理中视觉变量定位瓶颈，并发现盲训练（掩码图像）仍能提升性能，但增益源于文本线索而非视觉证据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态推理基准仅评估单一输入形式，无法检测模型在关键信息从文本迁移到图像时是否保持推理能力，且缺乏对训练中视觉证据依赖性的诊断方法。

analysis.method: 构建 SeePhys Pro 基准（每个问题四个语义对齐变体，逐步增加视觉元素），并开发大规模多模态 RLVR 训练语料，通过盲训练（掩码图像）作为诊断控制，结合文本删除、图像掩码率和格式饱和控制分析效果来源。
contributions: 提出 SeePhys Pro 细粒度模态迁移基准，用于评估多模态推理的表示不变性。
发现视觉变量定位是多模态推理的关键瓶颈，并揭示盲训练效果可能源于非视觉线索。

papers.title: Reinforcing Multimodal Reasoning Against Visual Degradation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), yet the resulting policies remain brittle against real-world visual degradations such as blur, compression artifacts, and low-resolution scans. Prior robustness techniques from vision and deep RL rely on static data augmentation or value-based regularization, neither of which transfers cleanly to critic-free RL fine-tuning of autoregressive MLLMs. Reinforcing reasoning against such corruptions is non-trivial: naively injecting degraded views during rollout induces reward poisoning, where perceptual occlusions trigger hallucinated trajectories and destabilize optimization. We propose ROMA, an RL fine-tuning framework that modifies the optimization dynamics to reinforce reasoning against visual degradation while preserving clean-input performance. A dual-forward-pass strategy uses teacher forcing to evaluate corrupted views against clean-image trajectories, avoiding new rollouts on degraded inputs. For distributional consistency, we apply a token-level surrogate KL penalty against the worst-case augmentation; to prevent policy collapse under regularization, an auxiliary policy gradient loss anchored to clean-image advantages preserves a reliable reward signal; and to avoid systematically incorrect invariance, correctness-conditioned regularization restricts enforcement to successful trajectories. On Qwen3-VL 4B/8B across seven multimodal reasoning benchmarks, our method improves robustness by +2.4% on seen and +2.3% on unseen corruptions over GRPO while matching clean accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出ROMA框架，通过强化学习微调增强多模态大模型对视觉退化的鲁棒性，同时保持干净输入性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界中多模态大模型常面临模糊、压缩伪影等视觉退化，现有鲁棒性技术（如静态数据增强或基于值的正则化）无法直接应用于无评论家的强化学习微调，且简单注入退化视图会导致奖励中毒和优化不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲干净输入性能的前提下，通过强化学习微调增强多模态大模型对视觉退化的推理鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在强化学习微调中直接使用退化视图进行rollout会引发奖励中毒，即感知遮挡导致模型产生幻觉轨迹并破坏优化稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出ROMA框架，采用双前向传播策略（teacher forcing）评估退化视图与干净图像轨迹的差异，避免在退化输入上重新rollout；引入token级代理KL惩罚对抗最坏情况增强；使用锚定于干净图像优势的辅助策略梯度损失防止策略崩溃；通过正确性条件正则化限制仅对成功轨迹施加约束。
contributions: 提出ROMA，首个针对视觉退化鲁棒性的强化学习微调框架，适用于无评论家的自回归多模态大模型。
设计双前向传播、代理KL惩罚、辅助策略梯度损失和正确性条件正则化等机制，有效缓解奖励中毒并保持干净性能。
在Qwen3-VL 4B/8B上，七个多模态推理基准测试中，对已知和未知退化分别提升+2.4%和+2.3%的鲁棒性，同时匹配干净准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-VL 4B和8B模型上，使用七个多模态推理基准测试评估，对比GRPO基线，在已知和未知视觉退化上分别提升+2.4%和+2.3%的鲁棒性，且干净准确率持平。
limitations: 方法可能对特定类型的退化（如极端遮挡）效果有限。
双前向传播策略增加了计算开销。
仅验证了Qwen3-VL模型，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对实际视觉退化问题，实验充分且效果显著，与多模态大模型鲁棒性方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ROMA框架，通过强化学习微调增强多模态大模型对视觉退化的鲁棒性，同时保持干净输入性能。

papers.title: Remix the Timbre: Diffusion-Based Style Transfer Across Polyphonic Stems
papers.abstract: Timbre transfer aims to modify the timbral identity of a musical recording while preserving the original melody and rhythm. While single-instrument timbre transfer has made substantial progress, existing approaches to multi-instrument settings rely on separate-then-transfer pipelines that propagate source separation artifacts and produce incoherent synthesized timbres across stems. This paper proposes MixtureTT, to the best of our knowledge the first system for flexible per-stem timbre transfer directly from a polyphonic mixture. Given a mixture and a separate timbre reference for each target voice, MixtureTT jointly transfers all stems to the specified instruments through a shared diffusion process. Modeling the dependencies across the per-stem content and cross-stem harmonic, the proposed joint stem diffusion transformer eliminates cascaded separation error, reduces inference cost by a factor equal to the number of stems, and yields more coherent multi-stem outputs. Despite operating under a strictly harder input condition, evaluations on the SATB choral dataset show that MixtureTT outperforms single-instrument baselines on both objective and subjective metrics demonstrating the necessity of dedicated multi-instrument timbre transfer over the naive separate-then-transfer pipelines. As a result, this work confirms that the cross-stem modeling is essential for mixture-level timbre transfer as the proposed joint setting consistently exceeds an equivalent single-stem ablation.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个直接从多音轨混合音频进行逐轨音色迁移的扩散模型MixtureTT，通过联合扩散过程消除级联误差并提升一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音色迁移方法在多乐器场景下依赖分离-迁移流水线，会传播源分离伪影并导致跨音轨音色不连贯，亟需一种直接从混合音频进行灵活逐轨音色迁移的方法。

analysis.method: 提出MixtureTT，采用联合音轨扩散Transformer，在共享扩散过程中同时迁移所有音轨，建模跨音轨内容依赖与和声关系。
contributions: 首个直接从多音轨混合音频进行逐轨音色迁移的系统MixtureTT
提出联合音轨扩散Transformer，消除级联分离误差并降低推理成本
在SATB合唱数据集上超越单乐器基线，证明跨音轨建模的必要性

papers.title: Monocular Biomechanical Tracking of Fingers with Inverse Kinematics to Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Accurate hand and finger tracking from video has significant clinical applications for monitoring activities of daily living and measuring range of motion, yet monocular video approaches for obtaining hand biomechanics remain under-developed. We present a method that combines the SAM 3D Body foundation model with inverse kinematics optimization in a full-body biomechanical model to extract anatomically-constrained finger joint angles from single-view video. We port SAM 3D Body from PyTorch to JAX for integration with MuJoCo-MJX, enabling GPU-accelerated optimization, and develop a novel mapping between the Momentum Human Rig (MHR) outputs and biomechanical model markers. Validation against 8-camera multiview reconstruction on 4,590 frames from 7 participants performing a variety of hand poses and object manipulation tasks shows finger joint angle errors of approximately 10 degrees and hand position errors of approximately 6 mm, after Procrustes alignment. Results were consistent across camera viewpoints and robust to different methods for producing reference values from multiview video. This work extends monocular biomechanical analysis to detailed finger tracking, expanding access to quantitative characterization of hand movement from readily available video.

papers.title: Improving Generalization by Permutation Routing Across Model Copies
papers.abstract: We introduce a use of the \(M\)-cover (or \(M\)-layer) transform for machine learning. The method replicates a model \(M\) times, but instead of coupling the copies through parameter averaging or an explicit attractive force, as in replicated SGD or Elastic SGD, it rewires the contexts in which local learning messages are computed. Each local loss is evaluated on a routed model whose parameters are drawn from different copies according to permutations sampled from a structured mixing kernel \(Q\). Training then uses the original local update rule, while the resulting learning messages are redistributed across the copies through these routed computational paths. Thus \(Q\) defines a topology for message transport and controls the long-loop structure of the lifted factor graph. We formulate this construction for perceptrons, committee machines, and multilayer perceptrons, showing that the same principle applies from discrete models to differentiable neural networks. The resulting framework provides a mechanism for improving generalization through structured message sharing rather than replica collapse or parameter-space coupling.

analysis.tldr: 通过跨模型副本的排列路由机制改进泛化性能。

papers.title: Cornerstones or Stumbling Blocks? Deciphering the Rock Tokens in On-Policy Distillation
papers.abstract: While recent work in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has shown that a small subset of critical tokens disproportionately drives reasoning gains, an analogous token-level understanding of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) remains largely unexplored. In this work, we investigate high-loss tokens, a token type that--as the most direct signal of student-teacher mismatch under OPD's per-token KL objective--should progressively diminish as training converges according to existing studies; however, our empirical analysis shows otherwise. Even after OPD training reaches apparent saturation, a substantial subset of tokens continues to exhibit persistently high loss; these tokens, which we term Rock Tokens, can account for up to 18\% of the tokens in generated outputs. Our investigation reveals two startling paradoxes. First, despite their high occurrence frequency providing a disproportionately large share of total gradient norms, Rock Tokens themselves remain stagnant throughout training, resisting teacher-driven corrections. Second, through causal intervention, we find that these tokens provide negligible functional contribution to the model's actual reasoning performance. These findings suggest that a vast amount of optimization bandwidth is spent on structural and discourse residuals that the student model cannot or need not internalize. By deconstructing these dynamics, we demonstrate that strategically bypassing these ``stumbling blocks'' can significantly streamline the alignment process, challenging the necessity of uniform token weighting and offering a more efficient paradigm for large-scale model distillation.

analysis.tldr: 发现在线策略蒸馏中存在高损失但功能无关的“岩石令牌”，绕过它们可提升对齐效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR工作表明关键令牌驱动推理增益，但在线策略蒸馏（OPD）中令牌级理解尚属空白，且传统假设高损失令牌应随训练减少，实际却持续存在，造成优化浪费。

analysis.method: 通过实证分析识别岩石令牌，并设计策略性绕过这些令牌的蒸馏方法。
contributions: 首次揭示OPD中岩石令牌的存在及其两大悖论（高梯度贡献但自身停滞、功能无关）。

papers.title: CalibFree: Self-Supervised View Feature Separation for Calibration-Free Multi-Camera Multi-Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Multi-camera multi-object tracking (MCMOT) faces significant challenges in maintaining consistent object identities across varying camera perspectives, particularly when precise calibration and extensive annotations are required. In this paper, we present CalibFree, a self-supervised representation learning framework that does not need any calibration or manual labeling for the MCMOT task. By promoting feature separation between view-agnostic and view-specific representations through single-view distillation and cross-view reconstruction, our method adapts to complex, dynamic scenarios with minimal overhead. Experiments on the MMP-MvMHAT dataset show a 3% improvement in overall accuracy and a 7.5% increase in the average F1 score over state-of-the-art approaches, confirming the effectiveness of our calibration-free design. Moreover, on the more diverse MvMHAT dataset, our approach demonstrates superior over-time tracking and strong cross-view performance, highlighting its adaptability to a wide range of camera configurations. Code will be publicly available upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需标定的自监督多相机多目标跟踪方法，通过分离视角无关与视角相关特征提升跨视角身份一致性。

papers.title: How Much is Brain Data Worth for Machine Learning?
papers.abstract: If a person can solve a task, can measuring their brain make it easier to train a model to solve that task too? Recent NeuroAI work suggests that supplementing task training with neural recordings can modestly improve model performance and robustness. However, it is unclear when there should be a benefit from using neural data and how much benefit to expect. We formulate this question mathematically, and begin to address it theoretically using a simple, analytically tractable linear gaussian model of task targets and neural recordings. For a multimodal estimator trained on both brain data and task labels, we derive scaling laws for how performance scales with the numbers of brain and task samples. From these laws we derive relative value and exchange rates between brain samples and task samples, quantifying how much extra task samples neural data is worth as a function of task-brain alignment, neural and task noise, latent dimension, and brain data sample size. We also analyze test distribution shift, to identify conditions where brain-regularized learning can produce substantial robustness gains through learned invariances. Finally, under a fixed collection budget, we characterize the regimes in which brain data is worth collecting. Our results provide a foundation for understanding how valuable brain data could be for improving machine learning.

analysis.tldr: 通过理论推导，量化脑数据在机器学习中的样本价值，并给出何时值得收集脑数据的条件。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经AI研究表明脑数据能提升模型性能，但何时有效、收益多大尚不明确，缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 量化脑数据对机器学习任务的价值，推导脑样本与任务样本的交换率，并确定脑数据收集的收益条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建线性高斯模型，推导脑数据和任务标签联合训练的性能缩放律，计算相对价值和交换率，并分析测试分布偏移下的鲁棒性增益。
contributions: 推导了脑数据和任务标签联合训练的性能缩放律，量化了脑样本与任务样本的交换率。
分析了测试分布偏移下脑正则化学习带来的鲁棒性增益，并给出了固定预算下脑数据收集的决策条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论模型基于线性高斯假设，可能无法完全反映真实神经数据的复杂性。

analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学

papers.title: Cross-Modal Semantic-Enhanced Diffusion Framework for Diabetic Retinopathy Grading
papers.abstract: Automated grading of diabetic retinopathy (DR) faces several critical challenges: subtle inter-grade visual distinctions in fine-grained lesion patterns, distributional discrepancies induced by heterogeneous imaging devices and acquisition conditions, and the inherent inability of purely visual approaches to exploit clinical semantic knowledge. In this paper, we propose CLIP-Guided Semantic Diffusion (CGSD), a DR grading framework that synergistically integrates vision-language pretraining with diffusion probabilistic modeling. We adopt a domain-specific vision-language model tailored for DR grading as the semantic guidance module and adapt it to the target domain via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), effectively bridging the distributional gap between the pretrained model and the target dataset with only a minimal number of trainable parameters. Building on this foundation, we construct a cross-modal semantic conditioning vector by computing the dot product between image features and the text description features of each DR grade, yielding a joint representation that simultaneously encodes visual content and clinical-grade semantics. This vector serves as the conditioning signal for the diffusion denoising network, replacing the structurally complex dual-branch visual prior employed in existing diffusion-based classification methods. Experiments on the APTOS 2019 dataset demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves an accuracy of 87.5% and a macro-averaged F1 score of 0.731, outperforming a variety of representative methods. Ablation studies further validate the independent contribution of each constituent module.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLIP引导的语义扩散框架，通过视觉-语言预训练与扩散模型结合提升糖尿病视网膜病变分级性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变自动分级面临细粒度病变区分困难、多设备分布差异以及纯视觉方法无法利用临床语义知识等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何融合视觉-语言先验与扩散概率建模，解决DR分级中的细粒度区分、域偏移和语义缺失问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用领域特定视觉-语言模型作为语义引导模块，通过LoRA适配目标域；构建跨模态语义条件向量（图像特征与各等级文本描述的点积）作为扩散去噪网络的条件信号。
contributions: 提出CGSD框架，首次将视觉-语言预训练与扩散模型协同用于DR分级。
设计跨模态语义条件向量，替代传统扩散分类方法中的双分支视觉先验。
在APTOS 2019上取得87.5%准确率和0.731宏平均F1，优于多种代表性方法。
analysis.experiments: 在APTOS 2019数据集上评估，准确率87.5%，宏平均F1 0.731，并进行了消融实验验证各模块贡献。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性有待进一步测试。
依赖预训练视觉-语言模型，可能受限于其领域覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合视觉-语言预训练与扩散模型，在医学图像分类任务上有创新性，实验验证有效，但仅单数据集。
