papers.title: Sub-JEPA: Subspace Gaussian Regularization for Stable End-to-End World Models
papers.abstract: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) provide a simpleframework for learning world models by predicting future latent representations.However, JEPA training is subject to a bias-variance tradeoff.Without sufficient structural constraints, excessive representationalvariance causes the model to collapse to trivial solutions.The recent LeWorldModel (LeWM) shows that this issue can be alleviated bysimply constraining latent embeddings with an isotropic Gaussian prior.However, latent representations inherently lie on low-dimensional manifoldswithin a high-dimensional ambient space, and enforcing an isotropic Gaussianprior directly in this ambient space introduces an overly strong bias.In this work, we propose ame, which seeks a favorable operatingpoint on the bias-variance frontier by applying Gaussian constraints inmultiple random subspaces rather than in the originalembedding space.This design relaxes the global constraint while preserving itsanti-collapse effect, leading to a better balance between trainingstability and representation flexibility.Extensive experiments across fourcontinuous-control environments demonstrate that consistentlyoutperforms LeWM with very clear margins.Our method is simple yet effective, and serves as a strong baseline for future JEPA-based world model research.fdefinedeeemodeThe code is available at https://github.com/intcomp/Sub-JEPA.

analysis.tldr: Sub-JEPA 通过多随机子空间高斯约束替代全局各向同性高斯先验，在 JEPA 世界模型训练中实现更好的偏差-方差平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: JEPA 世界模型训练面临偏差-方差权衡：缺乏结构约束会导致表示方差过大而崩溃，但 LeWM 采用的各向同性高斯先验在原始高维空间中施加过强偏差，限制了表示灵活性。
analysis.problem: 如何在 JEPA 框架中设计约束，既能防止表示崩溃（抗坍塌），又不过度限制表示的表达能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，潜在表示本质位于高维空间中的低维流形上，直接在高维空间施加各向同性高斯先验会引入过强偏差。
analysis.method: 在多个随机子空间中施加高斯约束，而非在原始嵌入空间，从而放松全局约束同时保留抗坍塌效果。
contributions: 提出 Sub-JEPA，通过多随机子空间高斯正则化实现更优的偏差-方差平衡。
在四个连续控制环境中显著超越 LeWM，提供简单有效的基线。
analysis.experiments: 在四个连续控制环境（continuous-control environments）上进行实验，Sub-JEPA 一致且显著优于 LeWM。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续控制任务，未在更广泛领域验证。
随机子空间的选择策略（如维度、数量）可能影响性能，需进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，但属于增量改进，实验规模有限，适合关注世界模型的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Sub-JEPA 通过多随机子空间高斯约束替代全局各向同性高斯先验，在 JEPA 世界模型训练中实现更好的偏差-方差平衡。

papers.title: Intrinsic Muon: Spectral Optimization on Riemannian Matrix Manifolds
papers.abstract: Muon and related norm-constrained matrix optimizers have become central to large-scale learning problems. They are formulated as a linear maximization oracle (LMO) over an ambient matrix-norm ball in unconstrained Euclidean space. However, these do not generalize cleanly to manifold-valued parameters such as low-rank factorizations, orthogonality constraints, or symmetric positive definite (SPD) matrices. Naively restricting the Muon LMO to the tangent space (i) breaks quotient symmetries and (ii) couples the tangent-space constraint with an ambient norm bound, thereby obstructing closed-form solutions on various manifolds of interest. We resolve both issues with a single observation: every Riemannian metric canonically lifts a unitarily invariant Euclidean norm to an intrinsic norm on each tangent space, and the resulting intrinsic norm constrained LMO is symmetry preserving. Building on this, we introduce intrinsic Muon (iMuon), a unified framework that yields closed-form updates on the fixed-rank, SPD, Stiefel, and Grassmann manifolds for any unitarily invariant norm, including the spectral, Frobenius, and nuclear norms. We establish convergence guarantees for both deterministic and stochastic iMuon with rate constants that depend only on the manifold dimension. Notably, on the fixed-rank manifold this constant depends only on the rank, making the rate independent of factor conditioning and removing the runtime factor-rescaling required by prior work. Experiments on LoRA finetuning of LLMs, image classification, and subspace learning illustrate the efficacy of the proposed approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出iMuon，将Muon优化器推广到黎曼矩阵流形，实现闭式更新并保证收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: Muon等范数约束矩阵优化器在大规模学习中表现优异，但无法直接推广到流形值参数（如低秩分解、正交约束、SPD矩阵），因为直接限制到切空间会破坏商对称性并耦合约束，导致无闭式解。
analysis.problem: 如何将Muon优化器的线性最大化预言（LMO）推广到黎曼矩阵流形，同时保持对称性并得到闭式更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用黎曼度量将酉不变欧几里得范数提升为切空间上的内蕴范数，构造对称保持的内蕴范数约束LMO，从而在固定秩、SPD、Stiefel和Grassmann流形上导出闭式更新。
contributions: 提出iMuon，一个统一框架，在多种矩阵流形上为任意酉不变范数提供闭式更新。
建立确定性和随机iMuon的收敛保证，速率常数仅依赖于流形维度（固定秩流形上仅依赖于秩）。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM的LoRA微调、图像分类和子空间学习上验证了有效性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的矩阵流形和酉不变范数。
实际性能提升可能依赖于具体任务和超参数选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论扎实，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出iMuon，将Muon优化器推广到黎曼矩阵流形，实现闭式更新并保证收敛。

papers.title: Matching Meaning at Scale: Evaluating Semantic Search for 18th-Century Intellectual History through the Case of Locke
papers.abstract: While digitized corpora have transformed the study of intellectual transmission, current methods rely heavily on lexical text reuse detection, capturing verbatim quotations but fundamentally missing paraphrases and complex implicit engagement. This paper evaluates semantic search in 18th-century intellectual history through the reception of John Locke's foundational work. Using expert annotation grounded in a semantic taxonomy, we examine whether an off-the-shelf semantic search pipeline can surface meaning-level correspondences overlooked by lexical methods. Our results demonstrate that semantic search retrieves substantially more implicit receptions than lexical baselines. However, linguistic diagnostics also reveal a "lexical gatekeeping" effect, where retrieval remains partially constrained by surface vocabulary overlap. These findings highlight both the potential and the limitations of semantic retrieval for analyzing the circulation of ideas in large historical corpora. The data is available at https://github.com/COMHIS/locke-sim-data.

analysis.tldr: 评估语义搜索在18世纪思想史中捕捉隐含引用的能力，发现其优于词汇方法但受限于词汇门控效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字化语料库改变了思想传播研究，但现有方法依赖词汇文本重用检测，只能捕捉逐字引用，无法处理释义和复杂的隐含引用。
analysis.problem: 如何评估语义搜索在历史语料库中识别隐含思想引用的有效性及其局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义搜索能检索到比词汇基线多得多的隐含引用，但存在“词汇门控”效应，即检索仍部分受限于表面词汇重叠。
analysis.method: 使用基于语义分类学的专家标注，评估现成的语义搜索流程在18世纪思想史中检索洛克作品隐含引用的表现。
contributions: 首次系统评估语义搜索在18世纪思想史中捕捉隐含引用的能力。
揭示了语义搜索的“词汇门控”效应，为改进历史语料库语义检索提供方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对洛克作品和18世纪语料库，泛化性有待验证。
语义搜索的词汇门控效应可能限制其完全捕捉深层隐含引用。

papers.title: On Variance Reduction in Learning Mean Flows
papers.abstract: One-step generative modeling has emerged as a leading approach to amortize the inference cost of diffusion and flow-matching models. Among distillation-free methods, MeanFlow training is notoriously unstable, with non-decreasing loss and unbounded gradient variance. In this work, we establish a theory that attributes this pathology to a misuse of the conditional velocity field: it plays two distinct statistical roles in the loss, both as an unbiased regression target and as a Monte Carlo control variate inside a Jacobi-vector product, with the original loss assigning the wrong coefficient to the latter. We derive the optimal coefficient in closed form, and show that a family of fixes in concurrent works corresponds to different practical realizations of the same optimum. A controlled sweep of this coefficient on two-dimensional benchmarks and on a latent Diffusion Transformer recovers the predicted bias-variance ordering. The optimal coefficient yields up to a %54 improvement in sample quality on two-dimensional benchmarks and a monotone FID trend at every matched-step DiT checkpoint. Crucially, the same DiT measurement also reveals a quantitative FID-MSE landscape mismatch: although gradient variance is minimized at an interior coefficient value, the coefficient that minimizes FID prefers the direct use of conditional velocity.

analysis.tldr: MeanFlow训练不稳定的根源是条件速度场在损失函数中的双重统计角色被错误加权，最优系数可显著提升样本质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 一步生成模型（如MeanFlow）因推理成本低而备受关注，但其训练过程存在损失不降、梯度方差发散的不稳定性问题，阻碍了实际应用。
analysis.problem: MeanFlow训练中梯度方差发散的根本原因是什么，以及如何通过调整损失函数中的系数来稳定训练并提升生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出MeanFlow训练的不稳定性源于条件速度场在损失中扮演两个不同统计角色：无偏回归目标和雅可比-向量积中的蒙特卡洛控制变量，原始损失为后者分配了错误系数，导致梯度方差发散。
analysis.method: 理论推导出最优系数的闭式解，并证明多个并发工作中的修复方法对应同一最优系数的不同实际实现。通过控制系数扫掠实验验证偏差-方差排序。
contributions: 建立了MeanFlow训练不稳定的理论解释，归因于条件速度场双重统计角色的错误加权。
推导出最优系数的闭式解，并统一了现有修复方法。
在二维基准和潜扩散Transformer上验证了系数对样本质量和FID的单调影响，发现FID-MSE景观不匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在二维基准和潜扩散Transformer（DiT）上进行系数扫掠实验，最优系数使二维基准样本质量提升54%，DiT检查点FID单调改善。
limitations: 理论分析可能仅适用于MeanFlow类方法，对其他一步生成模型的适用性未知。
FID-MSE景观不匹配现象未给出理论解释。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 理论创新性强，实验验证充分，对扩散模型训练有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MeanFlow训练不稳定的根源是条件速度场在损失函数中的双重统计角色被错误加权，最优系数可显著提升样本质量。

papers.title: Towards Robust Sequential Decomposition for Complex Image Editing
papers.abstract: Recent advances in visual generative models have enabled high-fidelity image editing guided by human instructions. However, these models often struggle with complex instructions involving combinatorial editing operations or inter-step dependencies. This difficulty stems from the limitations of two canonical paradigms: (1) single-turn editing, which attempts to apply all instructed edits in one pass, often fails to parse the complex instruction accurately and causes undesired edits; and (2) sequential editing can decompose the task into simpler steps but suffers from compounding errors introduced by the sequential execution, leading to low-fidelity results. To derive a robust solution for complex image editing, we examine editing behaviors of different paradigms under a unified in-context editing framework, and study how the benefits of sequential decomposition can be balanced against its error-accumulation drawbacks. We further develop a synthetic data pipeline that constructs editing tasks of varying instruction complexity, allowing us to curate a large-scale editing dataset with high-quality decomposed sequences. By finetuning on synthetic data, we discovered that with properly designed editing paradigms, sequential decomposition yields robust improvements even as task complexity increases. Furthermore, the decomposition skills learned from synthetic tasks can transfer to real images by co-training with real-world editing data, demonstrating the promise of sim-to-real generalization for tackling complex image editing across broader domains.

analysis.tldr: 通过合成数据微调，顺序分解策略在复杂图像编辑中实现鲁棒改进，并展现出从仿真到真实的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉生成模型在处理包含组合编辑操作或步骤间依赖的复杂指令时表现不佳，单轮编辑难以准确解析复杂指令，而顺序编辑虽能分解任务但存在累积误差导致保真度低。
analysis.problem: 如何平衡顺序分解的优势与误差累积的缺点，实现鲁棒的复杂图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单轮编辑无法准确解析复杂指令，顺序编辑存在累积误差；通过合成数据微调，顺序分解在任务复杂度增加时仍能带来鲁棒改进，且分解技能可迁移到真实图像。
analysis.method: 提出统一上下文编辑框架，分析不同范式的编辑行为；构建合成数据流水线生成不同指令复杂度的编辑任务及高质量分解序列；在合成数据上微调模型，并与真实编辑数据联合训练实现仿真到真实泛化。
contributions: 提出一种鲁棒的顺序分解方法用于复杂图像编辑，平衡了分解优势与误差累积。
开发了合成数据流水线，可生成大规模、高质量、多复杂度的分解编辑数据集。
实验证明合成数据微调使顺序分解在复杂任务中鲁棒提升，且技能可迁移到真实图像。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成数据与真实数据之间可能存在分布差异，影响泛化效果。
方法依赖高质量的分解序列标注，可能难以扩展到所有编辑类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对复杂图像编辑的痛点提出顺序分解与合成数据结合，有实际应用价值，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过合成数据微调，顺序分解策略在复杂图像编辑中实现鲁棒改进，并展现出从仿真到真实的泛化能力。

papers.title: An Elastic Shape Variational Autoencoder for Skeleton Pose Trajectories
papers.abstract: Deep generative models provide flexible frameworks for modeling complex, structured data such as images, videos, 3D objects, and texts. However, when applied to sequences of human skeletons, standard variational autoencoders (VAEs) often allocate substantial capacity to nuisance factors-such as camera orientation, subject scale, viewpoint, and execution speed-rather than the intrinsic geometry of shapes and their motion. We propose the Elastic Shape - Variational Autoencoder (ES-VAE), a geometry-aware generative model for skeletal trajectories that leverages the transported square-root velocity field (TSRVF) representation on Kendall's shape manifold. This representation inherently removes rigid translations, rotations, and global scaling of shapes, and temporal rate variability of sequences, isolating the underlying shape dynamics. The ES-VAE encoder maps skeletal sequences to a low-dimensional latent space incorporating the Riemannian logarithm map, while the decoder reconstructs sequences using the corresponding exponential map. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ES-VAE on two datasets. First, we analyze skeletal gait cycles to predict clinical mobility scores and classify subjects into healthy and post-stroke groups. Second, we evaluate action recognition on the NTU RGB+D dataset. Across both settings, ES-VAE consistently outperforms standard VAEs and a range of sequence modeling baselines, including temporal convolutional networks, transformers, and graph convolutional networks. More broadly, ES-VAE provides a principled framework for learning generative models of longitudinal data on pose shape manifolds, offering improved latent representation and downstream performance compared to existing deep learning approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出弹性形状变分自编码器(ES-VAE)，利用Kendall形状流形上的TSRVF表示对骨架姿态轨迹进行几何感知生成建模，有效分离形状内在动态与无关因素。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准VAE在建模人体骨架序列时，会将大量容量浪费在相机朝向、尺度、视角、执行速度等无关因素上，而非形状及其运动的本质几何结构，导致表征效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个几何感知的生成模型，使得骨架姿态轨迹的潜在表征能够自动消除刚性变换（平移、旋转、全局缩放）和时序速率变化，从而聚焦于形状的内在动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准VAE在骨架序列建模中容易将容量分配给相机朝向、主体尺度、视角和执行速度等干扰因素，而非形状的固有几何和运动。
analysis.method: 提出ES-VAE，采用Kendall形状流形上的传输平方根速度场(TSRVF)表示，该表示天然消除刚性平移、旋转、全局缩放和时序速率变化；编码器使用黎曼对数映射将序列映射到低维潜在空间，解码器使用指数映射重建序列。
contributions: 提出一种几何感知的骨架轨迹生成模型ES-VAE，利用TSRVF表示在形状流形上实现不变性。
在步态分析（临床评分预测、健康/中风分类）和动作识别（NTU RGB+D）两个任务上，ES-VAE优于标准VAE及多种序列建模基线（TCN、Transformer、GCN）。
analysis.experiments: 在两个数据集上评估：1) 步态周期分析，用于预测临床移动性评分和健康/中风分类；2) NTU RGB+D数据集上的动作识别。ES-VAE一致优于标准VAE及TCN、Transformer、GCN等基线。
limitations: 可能对复杂遮挡或非刚性形变敏感。
TSRVF表示的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，几何感知的VAE设计有理论深度，实验验证有效，但应用领域相对特定。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弹性形状变分自编码器(ES-VAE)，利用Kendall形状流形上的TSRVF表示对骨架姿态轨迹进行几何感知生成建模，有效分离形状内在动态与无关因素。
